description: Draft starter topic packs generated from the ranked candidate pipeline. Review evaluation report before building/importing.

topics.display_name: Which Hogwarts House Do You Belong In?

synopsis.title: Which Hogwarts House Truly Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're more than just a brave heart or a clever mind? Step into the Great Hall and let the Sorting Hat peer into your deepest traits. From the dungeons of Slytherin to the towers of Gryffindor, your true magical home awaits discovery.

characters.name: Gryffindor
characters.short_description: You are defined by your daring spirit, nerve, and chivalry, often standing up for what is right regardless of the personal cost.
characters.profile_text: You possess a heart of gold and a spirit that refuses to back down from a challenge. Your bravery is not just about physical courage; it is about the moral strength to champion the underdog and face your fears head-on. You tend to act on instinct, trusting your gut to lead you toward the most honorable path. This boldness makes you a natural leader, though you might sometimes struggle with impulsivity or a tendency to act before thinking through the consequences. In social circles, you are the loyal friend who will always have someone's back. You thrive in environments where you can prove your mettle and protect those you care about. However, your pride can sometimes be your downfall, as you may find it difficult to admit when you are wrong or when a situation requires a more subtle touch than a direct confrontation.

characters.name: Hufflepuff
characters.short_description: You value hard work, patience, loyalty, and fair play above all else, making you a dependable and compassionate pillar of your community.
characters.profile_text: You are the person everyone can count on, known for your unwavering dedication and your belief in treating everyone with kindness and equality. You don't seek glory or fame; instead, you find satisfaction in a job well done and the quiet comfort of a harmonious environment. Your patience is one of your greatest strengths, allowing you to persevere through tasks that others might find tedious or overwhelming. You are deeply empathetic and often act as the glue that holds your social groups together. While your modesty is admirable, it can sometimes lead you to underestimate your own talents or allow others to take credit for your hard work. You might also find it difficult to stand up for yourself as fiercely as you stand up for others. Your sense of justice is strong, and you firmly believe that success is most meaningful when it is earned through honest effort and collaboration.

characters.name: Ravenclaw
characters.short_description: You are characterized by your wit, learning, and wisdom, possessing a restless curiosity that drives you to explore the mysteries of the world.
characters.profile_text: You have an analytical mind and a thirst for knowledge that is never quite quenched. You value intelligence and creativity, often finding yourself lost in thought or pursuing a niche interest that others might find eccentric. For you, the pursuit of truth is a noble endeavor, and you take pride in your ability to think critically and see patterns where others see chaos. You are likely the person your friends turn to for advice or a fresh perspective, as your objectivity allows you to remain calm under pressure. However, your focus on logic and theory can sometimes make you appear detached or overly critical of those who do not share your intellectual rigor. You may struggle with overthinking, leading to a state of analysis paralysis where you find it hard to make a definitive choice. Despite this, your originality and sharp wit ensure that you are always a step ahead, finding innovative solutions to complex problems that leave others in awe.

characters.name: Slytherin
characters.short_description: You are ambitious, resourceful, and cunning, with a sharp focus on achieving your goals and protecting your own.
characters.profile_text: You possess a keen sense of self-preservation and a drive to succeed that sets you apart from the crowd. You are highly strategic, always thinking several steps ahead to ensure that you and your allies come out on top. Your ambition is not just about power; it is about the desire to leave a lasting legacy and to be the best at whatever you choose to do. You value tradition and loyalty to your inner circle, often forming deep, exclusive bonds with those you trust. This selective nature means you are a formidable ally but a cautious stranger. Your resourcefulness allows you to navigate difficult situations with ease, though others might mistake your pragmatism for coldness. You are not afraid to take the lead or make the hard choices that others shy away from. Your main challenge lies in balancing your personal goals with the needs of the wider world, as your intense focus on your own path can sometimes lead to a disregard for the feelings or interests of those outside your immediate circle.

baseline_questions.question_text: You witness a situation where a peer is being treated unfairly by someone in a position of authority. What is your immediate internal reaction?

options.text: A surge of indignation and a desire to confront the authority figure directly.
A need to gather all the facts and understand the rules before forming a judgment.
A feeling of deep empathy for the peer and a wish to offer them quiet support.
A strategic assessment of how intervening might impact your own standing or future goals.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem that has no clear solution, which approach do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: Relying on your instincts and taking a bold, decisive action to break the deadlock.
Engaging in deep research and looking for patterns or unconventional theories.
Putting in the steady, patient work required to test every possible outcome one by one.
Finding the most efficient path to success, even if it requires bending traditional methods.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you find most indispensable in a long-term partner or close collaborator?

options.text: Moral courage and the willingness to stand up for their beliefs.
Intellectual curiosity and a sharp, analytical mind.
Reliability, kindness, and a strong sense of fair play.
Ambition and the resourcefulness to help both of you get ahead.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process a significant personal failure or setback?

options.text: You feel a temporary blow to your pride but quickly look for the next challenge to conquer.
You spend time introspecting and analyzing the logic of what went wrong to gain wisdom.
You accept it as part of life's journey and find comfort in the support of your community.
You immediately begin pivoting your strategy to ensure the next attempt is successful.

baseline_questions.question_text: In which environment do you feel your most authentic and productive self?

options.text: A high-energy atmosphere where you can lead others and take visible risks.
A quiet, secluded space where you can focus entirely on your thoughts and learning.
A warm, harmonious setting where everyone works together toward a common goal.
An exclusive, well-organized environment where you can network and build influence.

topics.display_name: Which 'Friends' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Friends' Character Are You? The Ultimate Central Perk Test
synopsis.summary: Are you the organized chef of the group or the one who always cracks a joke when things get awkward? Grab a seat on the orange velvet couch and find out which member of the iconic gang truly matches your soul. From fashion-forward career moves to 'pivoting' through life's messes, your personality holds the key to your Manhattan alter ego.

characters.name: Rachel Green
characters.short_description: You are a stylish and ambitious individual who has evolved from a sheltered life into a successful, independent professional.
characters.profile_text: You possess a natural flair for fashion and a social grace that makes you the center of any gathering. While you may have started your journey relying on others, your transformation into a self-sufficient career woman shows your immense inner strength and determination. You aren't afraid to take risks to pursue your dreams, even if it means starting from the bottom as a waitress to eventually conquer the fashion world. Your romantic life is often a whirlwind of grand gestures and complicated timing, but your heart is always in the right place. You value your friendships deeply and often serve as the emotional glue that keeps your social circle connected. Sometimes you can be a bit self-absorbed or indecisive, but your charm and genuine kindness always shine through. You thrive in environments where you can express your creativity and personal style, making you a true icon of growth and resilience.

characters.name: Monica Geller
characters.short_description: You are the organized and competitive heart of your group, known for your culinary skills and your need for everything to be in its right place.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate host, always ensuring that everyone is fed and comfortable while maintaining a spotless environment. Your competitive nature is legendary, and you approach every task—from a casual game of football to a professional kitchen shift—with a must-win attitude. This drive makes you incredibly reliable and high-achieving, though it can sometimes lead to high levels of stress when things don't go exactly according to your meticulous plans. You have a deep-seated need to be the mother hen of your friend group, offering a place to stay and a warm meal to anyone in need. Your loyalty is unwavering, and you are the person everyone turns to when they need someone to take charge of a chaotic situation. While your obsession with cleanliness and rules can be intense, it stems from a place of wanting the best for yourself and those you love. You are proof that hard work and a little bit of perfectionism can build a beautiful, stable life.

characters.name: Phoebe Buffay
characters.short_description: You are a whimsical and fiercely independent soul who marches to the beat of your own drum with a guitar in hand.
characters.profile_text: You are the most eccentric member of your circle, possessing a worldview that is entirely unique and often spiritual. Your past may have been unconventional and challenging, but it has gifted you with a street-smart resilience and a profound sense of empathy for the underdog. You express your creativity through music and storytelling, never shying away from sharing your smelly truths with the world. Your honesty is refreshing, even if it occasionally catches people off guard, and you have a mysterious quality that keeps everyone guessing about your next move. You are a staunch defender of your beliefs, whether it involves animal rights or the existence of gravity. Your friendships are sacred to you, and you often act as the voice of reason from a completely different perspective. While you might seem flighty to some, you are actually one of the most grounded and self-assured people anyone could meet. You remind everyone that it is okay to be different and that kindness is the most important trait of all.

characters.name: Joey Tribbiani
characters.short_description: You are a loyal, food-loving, and charismatic individual who values friendship and simple pleasures above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are the kind of person who wears your heart on your sleeve and would do anything for your friends, even if it means sharing your favorite sandwich—though that is a big if. Your career path in the arts is fueled by passion and a never give up attitude, even when the auditions are tough and the roles are small. You possess a natural charm and a famous catchphrase that makes you a hit in social settings, yet you remain remarkably humble and protective of those you care about. Your logic might be a bit unconventional at times, but your emotional intelligence and ability to comfort others are unmatched. You find joy in the little things, like a good television show, a comfortable chair, or a pizza that is just for you. While others might overthink their problems, you prefer to face life with a straightforward and optimistic outlook. You are the ultimate best friend, providing laughter and a shoulder to cry on without ever asking for anything in return.

characters.name: Chandler Bing
characters.short_description: You are a quick-witted and sarcastic individual who uses humor as a defense mechanism while hiding a deeply sensitive and caring heart.
characters.profile_text: You are the master of the one-liner, always ready with a joke to lighten the mood or deflect from an awkward situation. Your intelligence is sharp, and though you spent years in a data reconfiguration job you didn't love, you eventually found the courage to pursue a more creative path. You often struggle with commitment and self-esteem issues, but once you find someone you truly love, you are the most devoted and supportive partner imaginable. Your friendships are the foundation of your life, providing the family structure you lacked growing up. You might be the funny one, but you also possess a deep capacity for growth and emotional maturity. You have a tendency to overanalyze social interactions, leading to hilarious but neurotic internal monologues. Despite your cynical exterior, you are a true romantic who values stability and deep connections. Your journey is one of learning to trust yourself and others, proving that even the most guarded heart can find a place to belong.

characters.name: Ross Geller
characters.short_description: You are an intellectual and romantic academic who values tradition, science, and the pursuit of true love, even when it gets complicated.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of deep knowledge and passion, particularly when it comes to history and the natural world. Your career as a scientist is a source of great pride, and you aren't afraid to correct someone's grammar or facts if it means getting to the truth. You are a hopeless romantic at heart, often finding yourself in will-they-won't-they scenarios that span years. This can lead to some stubbornness and a tendency to be on a break from reality when your emotions get the better of you. You are a dedicated parent and a loyal brother, always trying to do the right thing even if your methods are a bit clumsy. Your social circle relies on your stability and your willingness to help, whether it's moving a couch or explaining the Jurassic period. While you can be socially awkward and a bit of a divorce force, your intentions are always pure. You believe in the power of destiny and the idea that there is a lobster out there for everyone.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically contribute to your social circle's dynamic?

options.text: I am the organized host who makes sure every detail is perfect.
I am the witty one who uses humor to keep the mood light.
I am the loyal protector who is always ready for a good time.
I am the trendsetter who brings style and social grace to the group.
I am the eccentric soul who offers a unique, spiritual perspective.
I am the intellectual who provides the facts and keeps things grounded.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary reaction when faced with a high-stress situation?

options.text: I start cleaning or organizing everything in sight to regain control.
I make a self-deprecating joke to deflect the tension.
I look for comfort food and try not to overthink it.
I vent to my friends and maybe do a little retail therapy.
I embrace the chaos and trust my instincts to get me through.
I overanalyze the situation and try to argue my way to a logical solution.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which career path sounds most fulfilling to you?

options.text: A high-pressure role where my leadership and precision are tested.
A creative field like acting or performing where I can follow my passion.
A corporate job that provides stability, even if I complain about it.
A fast-paced industry like fashion where I can climb the executive ladder.
An unconventional or freelance path that allows me to be my true self.
A specialized academic or scientific field where I can be an expert.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal weekend afternoon look like?

options.text: Hosting a competitive game night with a strictly followed rulebook.
Browsing the latest collections at a high-end department store.
Playing guitar in a park or exploring a quirky street market.
Ordering a large pizza and relaxing in a very comfortable chair.
Visiting a museum or catching up on a historical documentary.
Staying in and avoiding any situation that requires emotional vulnerability.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you approach romantic relationships?

options.text: I am a hopeless romantic who believes in destiny and 'the one.'
I am cautious and use humor to hide how much I actually care.
I am charming and flirtatious, focusing on the fun of the moment.
I look for someone who challenges me and supports my personal growth.
I am incredibly loyal and seek a partner who values home and family.
I want a connection that is deep, honest, and slightly unconventional.

topics.display_name: Which Original Avenger Matches Your Personality?

synopsis.title: Which Original Avenger Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the genius billionaire who leads the charge, or the tactical spy who keeps everyone in line? From the streets of Brooklyn to the halls of Asgard, every hero brings a unique spark to the team. Take this quiz to discover which of the founding six members matches your inner strength and personality. It's time to assemble your true self!

characters.name: Iron Man
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant visionary who uses intellect and innovation to solve complex problems while maintaining a sharp, confident wit.
characters.profile_text: You possess a restless mind that is always three steps ahead of everyone else in the room. Your creativity is matched only by your ambition, and you aren't afraid to disrupt the status quo if it means building a better future. While some might see your confidence as arrogance, it actually stems from a deep-seated need to protect those around you through technological advancement and strategic foresight. You thrive in high-pressure environments where your quick thinking and resourcefulness can shine. However, your tendency to take the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to isolation or burnout. You often struggle to ask for help, preferring to tinker with solutions in private until they are perfect. Learning to trust your team as much as you trust your own genius is your greatest challenge, but when you do, you become an unstoppable force for progress and security.

characters.name: Captain America
characters.short_description: You are a principled leader defined by unwavering integrity, a strong moral compass, and a selfless dedication to the common good.
characters.profile_text: You are the moral anchor of any group you join, consistently standing up for what is right even when it is not popular or easy. Your sense of duty and loyalty is unparalleled, and you inspire others simply by staying true to your core values. You value tradition and discipline, yet you possess a quiet resilience that allows you to adapt to a changing world without losing your soul. You are often the first to volunteer for the hard tasks and the last to take credit for a victory. Your greatest strength is your ability to see the potential in others and lead them toward a shared vision with compassion and courage. On the flip side, your rigid adherence to your ideals can sometimes make you appear stubborn or out of touch with modern complexities. You may find it difficult to compromise when you feel a principle is at stake, leading to friction with those who prefer more pragmatic or flexible approaches.

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and powerful individual who balances a regal sense of duty with a boisterous, adventurous spirit.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with a natural authority that commands attention, yet you are just as likely to be found laughing loudly at a feast as you are leading a charge into battle. Your personality is a blend of ancient nobility and raw, unbridled energy. You value honor, legacy, and the bonds of family, even when those relationships are fraught with tension. You are incredibly resilient, capable of weathering immense personal loss while remaining a pillar of strength for your community. Your journey is often one of humility, learning that true power comes not from a weapon or a throne, but from the character of the person wielding them. You are fiercely protective of your friends and will go to the ends of the universe to ensure their safety. Sometimes, your impulsiveness and pride can lead you into unnecessary conflicts, as you tend to act first and reflect later. Finding the balance between your warrior instincts and the wisdom required of a leader is your lifelong pursuit.

characters.name: Hulk
characters.short_description: You are a deeply intellectual and sensitive soul who grapples with intense inner emotions and a hidden, formidable power.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by a brilliant, analytical mind and a gentle nature that belies the intensity simmering beneath the surface. You often prefer the quiet of a laboratory or a book to the chaos of social interaction, as you are acutely aware of the impact your emotions can have on your surroundings. Your life is a constant exercise in self-control and mindfulness, as you strive to channel your inner turmoil into something productive rather than destructive. You are incredibly empathetic, often feeling the pain of others as if it were your own, which drives your desire to help and heal. Despite your preference for solitude, you are a vital part of any team because of your unique perspective and the sheer force you can bring to bear when pushed to the limit. Your struggle is one of integration, learning to accept the monster within as a part of your whole self. You may feel like an outsider, but your complexity is exactly what makes you so indispensable and profoundly human.

characters.name: Black Widow
characters.short_description: You are a highly skilled, pragmatic strategist who excels at navigating complex social landscapes with grace and calculated precision.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of observation, possessing an uncanny ability to read people and situations with clinical accuracy. Your past has taught you the value of discretion and the necessity of being several steps ahead of any potential threat. You are incredibly versatile, able to blend into any environment and perform at an elite level regardless of the stakes. While you may keep your cards close to your chest, your loyalty to the few people you trust is absolute and unshakable. You prefer to operate in the shadows, focusing on efficiency and results rather than seeking the spotlight or public validation. Your pragmatism is your greatest asset, allowing you to make the hard choices that others might shrink from. However, this same detachment can make it difficult for you to form deep emotional connections or forgive yourself for past mistakes. You are constantly seeking to balance the ledger of your life, proving that your skills can be used for redemption and the protection of the innocent.

characters.name: Hawkeye
characters.short_description: You are a grounded, observant professional who provides essential support and perspective through your unwavering focus and reliability.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate team player, often working behind the scenes to ensure that every piece of a plan falls into place. You possess a unique perspective, seeing the world from a distance that allows you to spot details others miss. Your personality is defined by a dry wit and a down-to-earth attitude that keeps your more flamboyant peers grounded. You value your privacy and your family above all else, viewing your work as a necessary means to protect the things that truly matter. You don't need superpowers to be effective; your mastery comes from years of dedicated practice and a refusal to give up, no matter how lopsided the odds may seem. You are the glue that holds a group together during times of crisis, offering a steady hand and a clear head when things get chaotic. Your main challenge is feeling overlooked or undervalued in a world of giants, but you know that your precision and reliability are what truly make the difference between success and failure.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex challenge, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: Inventing a creative, high-tech solution to bypass the problem.
Relying on a proven moral framework and leading by example.
Confronting the issue head-on with bold energy and confidence.
Gathering intel and acting with clinical, strategic precision.
Carefully managing your reaction to avoid an emotional escalation.
Finding a practical way to support the team from the sidelines.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward in a group setting?

options.text: The charismatic disruptor who challenges the status quo.
The reliable anchor who sets the moral standard.
The bold adventurer who brings everyone together through spirit.
The discreet expert who handles the most difficult tasks quietly.
The quiet thinker who provides deep, analytical insights.
The grounded professional who keeps the group focused on reality.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in your personal and professional life?

options.text: Innovation and the drive to build a better future.
Integrity and staying true to your core principles.
Honor and the strength of your family or legacy.
Redemption and balancing the scales of your past.
Knowledge and the pursuit of emotional self-understanding.
Reliability and protecting the things that truly matter.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when things become chaotic or high-stakes?

options.text: I get restless and start brainstorming multiple solutions at once.
I stay disciplined and remind everyone of the shared mission.
I embrace the challenge with enthusiasm and a sense of duty.
I become hyper-focused and emotionally detached to get results.
I feel the tension deeply and work hard to stay centered.
I look for the small, critical details that others are missing.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your perspective on your own strengths and abilities?

options.text: They are a reflection of my intellect and constant innovation.
They are a responsibility to be used for the common good.
They are a part of my identity and natural authority.
They are tools developed through necessity and survival.
They are a double-edged sword that requires constant control.
They are the result of discipline and years of practice.

topics.display_name: Which Disney Princess Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Disney Princess Is Actually Your Soul Twin?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your life is more of a magic carpet ride or a journey across the ocean? Whether you are a bookworm dreaming of adventure or a warrior fighting for your family, there is a royal heroine who matches your spirit perfectly. Take this quiz to discover which iconic Disney Princess truly reflects your personality and destiny!

characters.name: Jasmine
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent spirit who refuses to be a prize to be won, valuing freedom and authenticity above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp mind and a rebellious heart that bristles at the thought of being confined by outdated traditions or societal expectations. You aren't afraid to speak your mind, even when your voice shakes, and you have a keen eye for seeing through facades. Your strength lies in your refusal to be treated as an object, as you constantly seek a life filled with genuine connection and adventure beyond the palace walls. While your confidence is one of your greatest assets, your stubbornness can sometimes lead to friction with those who care about you. You might find yourself pushing people away in an attempt to assert your autonomy. However, your loyalty to your friends and your deep sense of justice make you a natural leader who inspires others to look at the world from a whole new perspective.

characters.name: Moana
characters.short_description: You are a natural-born leader and wayfinder who feels a deep, spiritual connection to your heritage and the calling of the horizon.
characters.profile_text: You are driven by an internal compass that points toward growth and discovery, even when the path ahead is uncertain or dangerous. Your resilience is unmatched; when faced with failure, you don't give up, but instead look for new ways to navigate the obstacles in your path. You carry the weight of responsibility with grace, balancing your duty to your community with your personal need to explore the unknown. Your greatest challenge often lies in the pressure you place on yourself to succeed and the fear of letting down those who depend on you. You may struggle to find your identity outside of your role as a protector or leader. Yet, by trusting your intuition and embracing your roots, you prove that you are capable of restoring balance to your world and leading your people into a bright, expansive future.

characters.name: Belle
characters.short_description: You are an intellectual and compassionate soul who looks past outward appearances to find the hidden beauty and potential in everyone you meet.
characters.profile_text: You find solace in the pages of books and the quiet corners of your imagination, often feeling like a bit of an outsider in your own community. Your curiosity is boundless, and you value knowledge and kindness far more than material wealth or social status. You have the rare ability to see the soul beneath a rough exterior, offering patience and understanding to those who have been cast aside by others. Because you are so focused on the internal world, you may sometimes come across as aloof or detached from reality. Your tendency to sacrifice your own comfort for the sake of others is noble, but it can lead to you neglecting your own needs. By staying true to your values and refusing to settle for a provincial life, you create a world where love and intellect triumph over prejudice and narrow-mindedness.

characters.name: Mulan
characters.short_description: You are a courageous and resourceful warrior who honors your family by staying true to your own unique path and inner strength.
characters.profile_text: You often feel the weight of expectation and the struggle to fit into a mold that wasn't designed for you. Your greatest strength is your strategic mind and your ability to adapt to any situation, often finding clever solutions where brute force fails. You are deeply devoted to those you love, willing to risk everything to protect them and bring honor to your name on your own terms. You might struggle with feelings of inadequacy or the fear that your true self will never be fully accepted. This can lead to a tendency to hide your emotions or take on too much burden alone. However, as you learn to embrace your identity and trust in your skills, you discover that your greatest power comes from your authenticity. You are a trailblazer who proves that bravery comes in many different forms.

characters.name: Ariel
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and curious dreamer who is willing to take big risks to explore new worlds and follow your heart's desires.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by an insatiable curiosity and a collection of interests that others might not fully understand. You are never satisfied with the status quo, always looking toward the surface for something more meaningful and exciting. Your enthusiasm is infectious, and your willingness to sacrifice everything for a chance at a different life shows a level of determination that is both inspiring and a bit reckless. Your impulsive nature can sometimes lead you into trouble, as you might act before fully considering the consequences of your choices. You may find yourself feeling misunderstood by those who prefer safety over exploration. Despite these pitfalls, your vibrant spirit and unwavering belief in your dreams allow you to bridge gaps between different worlds, proving that curiosity is the key to a life well-lived.

characters.name: Cinderella
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and optimistic spirit who maintains a kind heart and a hopeful outlook even in the most challenging circumstances.
characters.profile_text: You possess a quiet strength that allows you to endure hardship without losing your sense of self or your capacity for compassion. You believe that kindness is a powerful force, and you treat everyone, from the smallest creature to the most difficult person, with dignity and grace. Your patience is your shield, and your ability to keep dreaming in the face of adversity is what truly sets you apart from the world around you. Because you are so accommodating, you may sometimes struggle to stand up for yourself or set boundaries with those who take advantage of your good nature. You might wait for a change to happen rather than actively pursuing it, relying on your faith that things will eventually work out. However, your steadfast goodness eventually attracts the magic and support you deserve, showing that a gentle heart is a formidable power in its own right.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary motivation behind your most significant life choices?

options.text: A desire for personal independence and the freedom to choose my own path.
A sense of duty to my community and a calling to lead them toward growth.
A thirst for knowledge and a search for intellectual fulfillment.
A commitment to protecting my family and honoring my heritage through action.
An insatiable curiosity to explore new worlds and follow my heart's desires.
A steadfast belief in the power of kindness and maintaining hope in adversity.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond when you encounter a major obstacle or restriction?

options.text: I speak out boldly and refuse to comply with unfair expectations.
I look for new ways to navigate the situation, relying on my resilience.
I use my imagination and empathy to find a peaceful way forward.
I use my strategic mind to find a clever, unconventional solution.
I am willing to take a significant risk to change my circumstances entirely.
I endure the challenge with patience, trusting that things will eventually improve.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal strengths do you rely on most in difficult times?

options.text: My sharp mind and ability to see through facades.
My internal compass and strong sense of intuition.
My ability to see the hidden beauty and potential in others.
My adaptability and resourcefulness under pressure.
My infectious enthusiasm and determination to reach my goals.
My quiet strength and capacity for unconditional compassion.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a social setting, which role do you most naturally inhabit?

options.text: The rebel who isn't afraid to challenge the status quo.
The wayfinder who helps others find their direction.
The intellectual who prefers deep conversation over small talk.
The protector who works behind the scenes for the greater good.
The dreamer who is always looking for the next big adventure.
The peacemaker who treats everyone with dignity and grace.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a day of complete freedom?

options.text: Escaping confinement to see how the rest of the world truly lives.
Traveling toward the horizon to discover something new about myself.
Getting lost in a book or a creative project in a quiet place.
Practicing a skill that allows me to better serve those I love.
Collecting unique experiences and exploring unfamiliar environments.
Finding joy in simple moments and the company of loyal friends.

topics.display_name: Are You Jedi, Sith, or Bounty Hunter?

synopsis.title: Which Star Wars Icon Are You: Jedi, Sith, or Bounty Hunter?
synopsis.summary: The galaxy is in turmoil, and your choices will determine your destiny among the stars. Will you uphold the light, embrace the shadows, or simply follow the highest bidder? Discover which legendary path matches your true personality in this ultimate cosmic alignment test.

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.short_description: You are the beacon of hope who balances raw power with deep compassion and the belief in redemption.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an innate connection to the world around you, often feeling the weight of destiny on your shoulders. While you may have started your journey with a sense of restlessness or a desire for adventure, you have matured into a person of profound discipline and empathy. You are defined by your refusal to give up on others, even when the rest of the world sees only darkness. This optimism is your greatest strength, allowing you to find light in the most desolate situations and inspire those who have lost their way.

However, your journey is not without its struggles. You often grapple with the fear of failure and the temptation to let your emotions cloud your judgment. Your deep attachments to friends and family make you vulnerable, yet they also provide the foundation for your moral compass. You prefer to seek peaceful resolutions whenever possible, but you are more than capable of taking decisive action when the balance of justice is at stake. Your legacy is one of transformation, proving that even the humblest beginnings can lead to greatness.

characters.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
characters.short_description: You are the quintessential guardian, defined by your unwavering patience, tactical brilliance, and commitment to duty.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of composure and diplomacy, often serving as the voice of reason in chaotic situations. Your approach to life is methodical and grounded in tradition, yet you possess a dry wit that helps you navigate even the most dire circumstances. You value wisdom over raw power and believe that a true leader is one who serves a higher purpose with humility. Your patience is legendary, allowing you to wait for the perfect moment to act rather than rushing headlong into conflict, making you a formidable strategist.

Your primary pitfall lies in your rigid adherence to rules and codes, which can sometimes make you appear detached or overly cautious. You carry the burdens of the past with a quiet dignity, often sacrificing your own desires for the sake of the greater good. While you are a master of defense, your reliance on established protocols can occasionally blind you to unconventional solutions until they are forced upon you. Ultimately, your loyalty to your principles and your mentors makes you a pillar of stability for everyone around you, even in the darkest of times.

characters.name: Darth Vader
characters.short_description: You are a formidable force of nature, driven by intense passion and an uncompromising will to impose order.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by an overwhelming presence and a relentless drive to achieve your goals. Your life is shaped by deep-seated emotions—often pain or loss—which you have channeled into a source of immense personal power. You do not tolerate incompetence or failure, and you expect the same level of absolute dedication from others that you demand of yourself. You prefer direct, decisive action over the subtleties of politics, using your strength to command respect and ensure stability through control and intimidation.

Despite your outward display of invulnerability, you are often haunted by the choices of your past and the isolation that comes with your position. Your greatest strength is your focus, but it can also be your undoing, as it leads you to ignore the nuances of morality in favor of immediate results. You are a person of extremes, capable of great destruction but also possessed of a hidden complexity that few ever get to see. Your path is one of solitude, fueled by a desire to reshape the world according to your own vision of order, regardless of the cost.

characters.name: Emperor Palpatine
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate architect of influence, utilizing patience and manipulation to orchestrate your rise to absolute power.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a brilliant, calculating mind that views the world as a grand chessboard where every person is a potential piece to be moved. You excel at playing the long game, hiding your true intentions behind a mask of civility or necessity until the moment of your triumph is guaranteed. Your strengths lie in your ability to identify the weaknesses of others and exploit them to further your own ends. You thrive on secrecy and the accumulation of knowledge, believing that true control comes from understanding the hidden currents of power and human nature.

Your pitfall is an all-consuming arrogance that stems from your belief in your own intellectual superiority. Because you view others as tools rather than equals, you may underestimate the power of collective action or the unpredictability of the human spirit. You prefer to rule from the shadows, pulling strings and creating conflicts that only you can resolve. Your ambition knows no bounds, and you are willing to discard anything or anyone that no longer serves your ultimate vision of a unified, controlled reality under your singular command.

characters.name: Boba Fett
characters.short_description: You are a self-reliant professional who values reputation, efficiency, and the cold logic of a job well done.
characters.profile_text:
You operate on the fringes of society, governed by a personal code of conduct that emphasizes results over ideology. You are a person of few words, preferring to let your actions and your formidable toolkit speak for you. Your independence is your most prized possession, and you take great pride in your ability to survive and thrive in the most hostile environments. You are a master of preparation, always ensuring you have the right equipment and information before engaging in any pursuit, which has earned you a fearsome reputation.

While your stoicism makes you a highly effective operative, it can also lead to a life of emotional isolation. You tend to view relationships through the lens of utility or mutual benefit, which can make it difficult for others to truly know or trust you. Your primary motivation is often survival or the maintenance of your legacy, yet you possess a hidden sense of honor that dictates how you treat your allies and enemies alike. You are the ultimate survivor, navigating a dangerous galaxy with a level head and a steady hand, always looking for the next opportunity.

characters.name: Din Djarin
characters.short_description: You are a dedicated protector who finds purpose in tradition and the unexpected bonds formed through shared struggle.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your unwavering commitment to a creed and your deep sense of responsibility toward those under your care. Though you may appear guarded and distant, you possess a core of integrity that guides every decision you make. You are a person of action, skilled in the arts of combat and survival, but your true strength lies in your capacity for growth and adaptation. You often find yourself caught between the rigid requirements of your heritage and the evolving demands of your conscience as you encounter new perspectives.

Your journey is one of discovery, as you learn to balance your solitary nature with the needs of a found family. You are prone to taking on heavy burdens alone, often forgetting that you do not have to face every challenge in isolation. Your loyalty is absolute, and once you have given your word, you will move stars to keep it. While you value the safety of the shadows and the anonymity of your armor, your actions frequently thrust you into the light, proving that your sense of justice is stronger than your desire for a quiet life.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when facing a major life challenge?

options.text: To protect those I care about and find a path to redemption.
To fulfill my duty and uphold the traditions I was taught.
To establish order and ensure my will is carried out.
To gain influence and manipulate the situation to my advantage.
To complete the task efficiently and maintain my professional reputation.
To honor my personal creed and safeguard those under my protection.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to handle an opponent or rival?

options.text: I try to see the good in them and offer a chance for peace.
I use tactical patience and wait for them to make a mistake.
I confront them directly with overwhelming strength.
I pull strings from behind the scenes so they never see me coming.
I use every tool at my disposal to finish the job quickly.
I defend my ground and do whatever is necessary to survive.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you feel most comfortable in?

options.text: Surrounded by friends and family who support me.
In a place of learning or a structured organization.
At the center of a powerful, disciplined operation.
In a position of hidden authority where I hold all the secrets.
On the move, relying only on my own skills and equipment.
Within a tight-knit community bound by shared values.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a leader or mentor?

options.text: Their ability to inspire hope and believe in others.
Their wisdom, patience, and adherence to a moral code.
Their strength and ability to maintain absolute order.
Their strategic brilliance and mastery of influence.
Their reliability and the quality of the rewards they offer.
Their loyalty to the group and commitment to the 'way'.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view the concept of 'The Rules'?

options.text: They are guidelines, but my conscience is my ultimate guide.
They are essential for maintaining peace and must be followed.
They are tools I use to enforce stability and control.
They are obstacles to be bypassed or rewritten to suit my needs.
I follow my own personal code; external rules are secondary.
They are a sacred path that defines who I am.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Office' Character Is Your Workplace Alter Ego?

synopsis.title: Which 'The Office' Character Is Your Workplace Alter Ego?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder if your desk-side manner is more 'World's Best Boss' or 'Assistant to the Regional Manager'? Whether you're pulling elaborate pranks or just staring into an invisible camera, your professional style says a lot about your Dunder Mifflin counterpart. Take this quiz to discover which Scranton legend matches your career energy and office survival tactics.

characters.name: Michael Scott
characters.short_description: You are the well-meaning but often misguided leader who prioritizes office harmony and personal connection over traditional productivity.
characters.profile_text:
You view your coworkers as family and your workplace as a stage for building lasting memories. Your management style is defined by a desperate need to be liked, which often leads you to prioritize social events and elaborate jokes over actual deadlines. While your methods are unconventional and sometimes cringe-worthy, your heart is genuinely in the right place, and your loyalty to your team is unmatched. You possess a unique ability to find joy in the mundane, even if it means distracting everyone else from their tasks. You are the ultimate cheerleader for your staff, even when they do not ask for it.

Your biggest challenge is maintaining professional boundaries and recognizing when a situation requires serious leadership rather than a comedy routine. You may struggle with conflict resolution, often choosing to ignore problems or make them worse through awkward interventions. However, your resilience and optimism are your greatest strengths, allowing you to bounce back from failure with a renewed sense of purpose and a fresh batch of energy. You remind everyone that work is about people, not just paper, and your infectious enthusiasm can occasionally turn a dull Monday into something truly memorable.

characters.name: Dwight Schrute
characters.short_description: You are the intensely dedicated and fiercely loyal high-achiever who values order, authority, and survival skills above all else.
characters.profile_text:
In the workplace, you are the ultimate enforcer of rules and the most productive member of the sales team. You take your responsibilities with a level of seriousness that borders on the extreme, often viewing your colleagues as either subordinates or potential threats to your ascent. Your loyalty to the company is absolute, and you are always prepared for any emergency, whether it is a fire drill or a sudden shortage of office supplies. You thrive on structure and clear hierarchies, finding comfort in the rigid application of policy and the pursuit of the prestigious Assistant Regional Manager title.

Your intensity can be off-putting to those who prefer a more relaxed environment, and your lack of social nuance often leads to friction with peers. You might find it difficult to collaborate when you believe your way is the only logical path forward. Despite your gruff exterior, you are a reliable pillar of the organization who will go to any lengths to protect the business. Your ambition is your engine, driving you to seek constant improvement and recognition for your unwavering commitment to excellence. You are the person everyone wants on their side when things actually go wrong.

characters.name: Jim Halpert
characters.short_description: You are the charming and clever professional who uses humor and wit to navigate the daily grind while keeping your true ambitions close to the vest.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a natural charisma that makes you well-liked by almost everyone, and you often find yourself playing the role of the office prankster to alleviate boredom. While you are undeniably talented and capable of high performance, you frequently downplay your efforts to maintain a relaxed persona. You have a keen sense of observation, allowing you to navigate office politics with ease and identify the absurdity in every situation. Your ability to connect with people on a personal level makes you an effective communicator and a natural leader when you finally choose to step up and take charge.

Your tendency to disengage when bored can lead to missed opportunities or a reputation for being unmotivated. You might spend more time planning elaborate jokes than focusing on your long-term career trajectory. However, when you find something you truly care about, your focus is sharp and your dedication is absolute. You balance work and life with a grace that others envy, reminding everyone that the job is just one part of a much larger, more meaningful story. Your quick wit and emotional intelligence make you the heart of the office, even if you pretend you are just passing through.

characters.name: Pam Beesly
characters.short_description: You are the empathetic and observant backbone of the office who finds strength in quiet resilience and creative expression.
characters.profile_text:
You are often the person who keeps the office running smoothly behind the scenes, handling the small details that others overlook. Your superpower is your emotional intelligence; you understand the dynamics of the room better than anyone else and often act as a mediator or a confidante. While you may start out as someone who avoids confrontation and keeps your head down, you possess a growing sense of self-worth that eventually leads you to advocate for your own dreams and professional growth. You value stability and genuine connections, making you a beloved fixture in any team environment.

Your desire to please others can sometimes lead you to stay in your comfort zone for too long, sacrificing your own ambitions for the sake of harmony. You might struggle to speak up in high-pressure situations, fearing that your voice won't be heard or that you will cause a scene. As you gain confidence, however, you become a formidable force who proves that kindness and competence are not mutually exclusive. Your journey is one of self-discovery, showing that even the quietest person in the room can have the most profound impact. You are the steady hand that guides the office through its most chaotic moments.

characters.name: Angela Martin
characters.short_description: You are the meticulous and disciplined perfectionist who demands high standards and has little patience for workplace frivolity.
characters.profile_text:
In your professional life, you are the guardian of the books and the enforcer of the status quo. You take immense pride in your accuracy and your ability to maintain order in a chaotic environment. To you, the workplace is a place for work, not for games or social gatherings, and you have a low tolerance for anyone who doesn't share your intense work ethic. You are organized, punctual, and highly dependable, often serving as the moral compass—or at least the strictest judge—of the office. Your loyalty is hard-earned but deep, reserved for those who meet your exacting criteria.

Your rigid adherence to rules and your judgmental nature can create barriers between you and your colleagues. You may find it difficult to adapt to change or to accept that there are multiple ways to achieve a goal. This inflexibility can lead to isolation, as others may find you unapproachable or overly critical of their minor mistakes. However, your attention to detail ensures that nothing ever falls through the cracks, and your commitment to excellence provides a foundation of reliability that the entire organization depends on. You are the person who ensures the lights stay on and the math always adds up.

characters.name: Stanley Hudson
characters.short_description: You are the pragmatic and no-nonsense veteran who prioritizes personal boundaries and counts down the minutes until the workday ends.
characters.profile_text:
You have seen it all and done it all, and at this point in your career, you are simply here to do your job and go home. You have zero interest in office drama, team-building exercises, or the latest corporate initiatives. Your focus is entirely on your own productivity and the rewards that come with it, such as your paycheck and your hard-earned vacation time. You are a master of the "gray rock" method, remaining unmoved by the chaos surrounding you while you focus on your crossword puzzles or your sales calls. You value your time above all else and have no qualms about setting firm boundaries.

Your lack of engagement can sometimes be mistaken for a lack of care, and your refusal to participate in the social fabric of the office can make you seem distant or grumpy. You might miss out on collaborative successes because you prefer to work in a silo and avoid unnecessary meetings. Yet, there is a certain integrity in your honesty; everyone knows exactly where they stand with you. You are the ultimate realist, providing a grounding presence in an office full of big personalities, and your consistency is a quiet form of professional mastery. You prove that it is possible to be successful without letting the job consume your entire identity.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for showing up to the office every day?

options.text: To foster a sense of family and make sure everyone is having a good time.
To achieve total efficiency and climb the ladder of authority.
To find the humor in the mundane and enjoy the company of my favorite colleagues.
To provide steady support and ensure the environment remains harmonious.
To maintain strict standards of excellence and keep the records perfect.
To complete my assigned tasks so I can enjoy my life outside of these walls.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when a mandatory, non-productive meeting is called?

options.text: I try to take over the meeting to make it more 'entertaining' for everyone.
I sit in the front row, taking meticulous notes and looking for ways to impress.
I exchange knowing glances with a work friend and look for opportunities for a quick joke.
I attend quietly, making sure all the necessary supplies and logistics are handled.
I spend the time judging the lack of professionalism and the waste of company resources.
I bring a crossword puzzle or find a way to mentally check out until it's over.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your desk or personal workspace?

options.text: Cluttered with toys, awards, and photos meant to spark conversation.
Highly functional, featuring emergency supplies and symbols of my status.
Relatively sparse, with just enough personal touches to keep it comfortable.
A cozy, organized space that occasionally serves as a creative outlet.
Extremely tidy, sterile, and strictly adhering to all office policies.
A fortress of solitude where I can work undisturbed until the clock strikes five.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a conflict arises between two coworkers, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: I insert myself into the situation to try and force a 'fun' resolution.
I side with the person in authority or the one following the rules most closely.
I use sarcasm or a prank to lighten the tension and stay out of the line of fire.
I listen to both sides and try to help them find common ground quietly.
I report the infraction to management and expect disciplinary action.
I ignore it completely; as long as it doesn't affect my paycheck, it's not my problem.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle a heavy workload and tight deadlines?

options.text: I get distracted by social opportunities and end up rushing at the very last second.
I attack the work with intense focus, viewing it as a test of my superior abilities.
I do exactly what is required with high competence, but I won't overexert myself.
I work steadily and reliably, often helping others with their tasks as well.
I follow a rigid schedule and get frustrated by anyone who interrupts my flow.
I work at my own pace and refuse to let corporate stress ruin my evening plans.

topics.display_name: Who Is Your Greek God Parent?

synopsis.title: Which Olympian God Is Actually Your Divine Parent?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you don't quite belong in the mortal world? Whether you have a short fuse like a thunderstorm or a natural green thumb, your personality might be written in the stars—and the ichor in your veins. Take this quiz to discover which Greek deity is claiming you as their own at Camp Half-Blood!

characters.name: Zeus
characters.short_description: You are a natural-born leader with a commanding presence and an unyielding sense of authority.
characters.profile_text: As a child of the King of the Gods, you possess an innate charisma that draws others to your cause. You are often the one people look to when a difficult decision needs to be made, as you carry yourself with a confidence that borders on the electric. Your ambitions are vast, and you have the strategic mind and willpower to see your grandest visions through to completion. You value justice and order, though your temper can be as sudden and destructive as a summer storm when your authority is questioned. In social circles, you are the life of the party but also the one who sets the rules. You have a taste for the finer things in life and a pride that makes you fiercely protective of your reputation. However, your greatest pitfall is your ego; you may struggle to admit when you are wrong or find it difficult to share the spotlight. Learning to balance your powerful drive with humility will ensure that your reign is respected rather than merely feared.

characters.name: Poseidon
characters.short_description: You are a person of deep, shifting emotions and a powerful, unpredictable spirit that mirrors the vast ocean.
characters.profile_text: Being a child of the Earthshaker means your personality is as multifaceted as the sea itself. One moment you are calm and nurturing, providing a steady hand to those you love, and the next you are a tempest of passion and intensity. You are fiercely loyal to your friends and family, often going to extreme lengths to protect them from harm. You have a natural affinity for nature and travel, feeling most at home when you are exploring the unknown or standing at the edge of the world. Your strengths lie in your resilience and your ability to adapt to any situation, much like water carving through stone. However, your moods can be volatile, and you may hold onto grudges for a long time if you feel slighted. You are prone to impulsive actions when your emotions run high, which can lead to unnecessary conflict. By learning to channel your inner tides, you can harness your immense power to create lasting change rather than leaving destruction in your wake.

characters.name: Hades
characters.short_description: You are a reserved, introspective soul who finds strength in solitude and possesses a profound understanding of life's deeper mysteries.
characters.profile_text: As a child of the Underworld, you are often misunderstood by those who only see the surface. You are not necessarily dark or gloomy, but rather someone who values privacy, depth, and the truth over superficiality. You possess a quiet intensity and a sharp, analytical mind that allows you to see through deceptions. You are incredibly hardworking and reliable, often taking on the burdens that others are too afraid to touch, and you manage your responsibilities with a grim but steady determination. You tend to be a homebody, preferring the comfort of your own space and a few close, trusted companions over large crowds. Your sense of justice is absolute, and you believe in fairness above all else. Your main challenge is a tendency toward isolation and a cynical outlook on human nature. While your independence is a strength, allowing yourself to step into the light and connect with others will prevent you from becoming too detached from the world around you.

characters.name: Athena
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant strategist and a lifelong learner who values wisdom, logic, and the pursuit of excellence above all else.
characters.profile_text: As a child of the Goddess of Wisdom, your mind is your greatest weapon. You approach every challenge with a calculated plan, preferring to think three steps ahead of everyone else. You are highly disciplined and have a natural talent for crafts, technology, or any field that requires precision and intellect. You value facts over feelings and are often the voice of reason in chaotic situations, helping others find the most efficient path forward through logic and clear communication. In your personal life, you are a loyal friend who offers the best advice, though you can sometimes come across as cold or overly critical. You have high standards for yourself and those around you, which can lead to frustration when things don't go perfectly. Your pitfall is your tendency to overthink and your struggle to understand the messy, emotional side of human existence. Embracing the spontaneity of life will help you round out your formidable intellect with much-needed empathy and warmth.

characters.name: Apollo
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, multi-talented individual who shines in the spotlight and brings light and healing to those around you.
characters.profile_text: Being a child of the Sun God means you are likely gifted in many areas, from the arts and music to logic and medicine. You have a radiant personality that naturally attracts people, and you thrive when you are able to express your creativity. You are an optimist by nature, always looking for the silver lining and encouraging others to reach their full potential. Your honesty is one of your most defining traits; you value the truth and strive to live authentically in everything you do. However, having so many talents can sometimes lead to a lack of focus or a streak of arrogance. You may find it difficult to handle failure, as you are used to things coming easily to you. Your desire for validation can also make you overly sensitive to criticism. By staying grounded and focusing your energy on a few meaningful goals, you can ensure that your many gifts are used to their fullest extent, illuminating the world for yourself and everyone you encounter.

characters.name: Artemis
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent and adventurous spirit who values freedom, nature, and the bonds of true companionship.
characters.profile_text: As a child of the Goddess of the Hunt, you are most at home in the wild, away from the constraints of societal expectations. You possess a sharp focus and a self-sufficient nature that allows you to thrive in solitude or among a small, dedicated group of peers. You are a protector of the vulnerable and have a deep respect for the natural world. Your integrity is ironclad, and you are not easily swayed by the opinions of others, preferring to follow your own internal compass wherever it may lead. You are often seen as a bit of a rebel, as you value your autonomy above all else and resist any attempt to be controlled or pigeonholed. While your strength and independence are admirable, you may sometimes push people away to avoid feeling tied down. Your challenge is to find a balance between your need for freedom and the benefits of vulnerability. By allowing others into your inner circle, you can find a different kind of strength in shared experiences without losing the wild essence that makes you who you are.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group project or team setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The decisive leader who delegates tasks and sets the vision.
The strategist who analyzes data and plans the most efficient route.
The creative spark who keeps morale high and adds artistic flair.
The quiet observer who works independently behind the scenes.
The fierce protector who ensures everyone is treated fairly and stays loyal.
The self-sufficient rogue who prefers to handle their own portion alone.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when your plans are suddenly disrupted by an external force?

options.text: I feel a surge of frustration and immediately try to re-establish control.
I experience a wave of intense emotion but quickly adapt to the new tide.
I remain stoic and retreat into my thoughts to process the change.
I logically dissect the new situation to find a rational workaround.
I look for the silver lining and try to turn the disruption into an opportunity.
I rely on my instincts and move forward without needing anyone's help.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment makes you feel the most energized and at peace?

options.text: A high-altitude overlook or a place of grand, commanding architecture.
The edge of the ocean or a bustling port where the horizon is vast.
A quiet, dimly lit space where I can focus on my own inner world.
A library, workshop, or laboratory filled with tools and knowledge.
A vibrant studio, stage, or sun-drenched field full of life.
The deep, untamed wilderness under the light of the moon.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your most defining personal value?

options.text: Authority and the pursuit of a grand legacy.
Loyalty and the depth of my emotional connections.
Integrity and the pursuit of hidden truths.
Wisdom and the mastery of complex skills.
Authenticity and the expression of my unique talents.
Autonomy and the preservation of my personal freedom.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are at your worst, which of these traits is most likely to surface?

options.text: An inflated ego that refuses to admit any mistakes.
A volatile temper that can be destructive to those nearby.
A cynical outlook that leads to total social isolation.
A cold, hyper-critical attitude toward others' perceived failures.
A desperate need for validation and a streak of arrogance.
A tendency to push people away to avoid any form of vulnerability.

topics.display_name: Which Game of Thrones House Do You Lead?

synopsis.title: Which Great House of Westeros Would You Lead to the Iron Throne?
synopsis.summary: The Seven Kingdoms are in chaos, and a seat at the Small Council isn't enough for someone with your ambition. Whether you rule with fire and blood or through cold, hard logic, your leadership style defines the fate of your people. Take this quiz to discover which legendary Great House truly reflects your values and tactical mind.

characters.name: House Stark
characters.short_description: You are a stoic leader defined by honor, duty, and a deep connection to the ancient traditions of the North.
characters.profile_text:
You value loyalty above all else and believe that the person who passes the sentence should be the one to swing the sword. Your leadership style is grounded in integrity and a profound sense of responsibility to your people, often prioritizing the long-term survival of your kin over the fleeting games of southern politics. You are resilient, much like the winter you constantly prepare for, and you find your greatest strength in the unbreakable bonds of family. You prefer the quiet dignity of the woods to the noisy halls of court, and your word is your bond.

However, your rigid adherence to honor can be a double-edged sword. In a world of deception and shifting loyalties, your transparency and trust in the word of others can leave you vulnerable to those who do not play by the same rules. You may struggle to adapt to the shifting shadows of court intrigue, finding it difficult to compromise your principles even when survival depends on it. Your challenge is to learn that sometimes, to protect the pack, the lone wolf must learn to navigate the darkness without losing their soul.

characters.name: House Lannister
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic and ambitious strategist who uses wealth, intellect, and ruthless efficiency to maintain power.
characters.profile_text:
You understand that power is a game of resources, perception, and decisive action. You are highly intelligent and possess a sharp wit, often staying several steps ahead of your rivals by anticipating their moves before they even make them. To you, family legacy is paramount, and you will go to any lengths to ensure your house remains at the top of the social hierarchy. You are not afraid to make difficult, even cold-blooded decisions if they serve the greater goal of stability and dominance, believing that a feared leader is often more secure than a loved one.

Your reliance on fear and financial leverage can create a fragile foundation built on resentment rather than genuine support. While you are effective at commanding respect, you may find it difficult to inspire true loyalty that isn't bought or coerced. Your pride and the intense desire to protect your public image can sometimes lead to internal family strife, as the pressure to be perfect and powerful weighs heavily on everyone under your banner. Learning to value people for more than their utility is the key to your long-term legacy.

characters.name: House Targaryen
characters.short_description: You are a visionary leader with a fiery spirit and a belief in your own destiny to reshape the world.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a natural charisma and a sense of purpose that draws people to your cause from all walks of life. You are often seen as a revolutionary, willing to break the existing wheels of power to build something entirely new and more just. Your strength lies in your conviction and your ability to command awe, often backed by a raw, elemental power that others find both terrifying and inspiring. You are a dreamer who looks toward the horizon, seeking to reclaim what you believe is rightfully yours and restore glory to your name.

The line between greatness and madness is thin for you, and your absolute belief in your own righteousness can lead to impulsiveness. When your passions are ignited, you risk burning everything down in your pursuit of justice or conquest, potentially alienating the very people you intended to save. You may struggle to listen to dissenting voices when you are convinced of your divine path. To truly lead, you must balance your fire with the coolness of wisdom, ensuring your quest for change doesn't leave only ashes in its wake.

characters.name: House Baratheon
characters.short_description: You are a bold and formidable leader who commands through sheer force of will and a stubborn sense of justice.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by your immense strength, whether it be physical prowess or an unyielding determination to see your will done. You prefer direct action over subtle manipulation and are often the first to charge into a challenge, leading from the front. Your leadership is marked by a certain ruggedness and a demand for respect; you expect others to follow your lead because you have proven your worth through action and victory. You have a strong sense of what is right, and you are willing to fight to the death to defend your claims.

Your greatest strength—your stubbornness—is also your greatest weakness. You may find it nearly impossible to bend or compromise, which can lead to breaking when faced with overwhelming force or complex political realities that cannot be solved with a hammer. Your temper can flare quickly, and your tendency to see the world in black and white may prevent you from forming the necessary alliances needed to sustain long-term peace. You must learn that true leadership sometimes requires the grace to forgive and the flexibility to adapt to a changing world.

characters.name: House Tyrell
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and socially adept leader who masters the art of soft power and strategic alliances.
characters.profile_text:
You understand that a sharp tongue and a well-placed gift can be more effective than a thousand swords on the battlefield. You excel in social environments, using your charm, hospitality, and immense resources to win over allies and neutralize enemies before they even realize they are being played. Your leadership is subtle, often operating behind the scenes to ensure that your family remains prosperous and influential. You value growth and stability, preferring to thrive through diplomacy, marriage, and economic control rather than the chaos of open warfare.

Because you operate so heavily in the realm of appearance and social maneuvering, others may perceive you as superficial or untrustworthy. Your focus on the long game and maintaining a pleasant facade can sometimes lead you to underestimate more direct, violent threats that do not care for social graces. If your carefully cultivated network of alliances begins to fray, you may find yourself without the hard power necessary to defend your interests. Your challenge is to ensure that beneath your beautiful exterior lies a core of steel strong enough to withstand a direct assault.

characters.name: House Greyjoy
characters.short_description: You are a fierce and independent leader who values strength, self-reliance, and the harsh lessons of the sea.
characters.profile_text:
You do not seek the approval of the mainland; instead, you take what you want through courage, skill, and an iron will. Your leadership is forged in hardship, and you respect those who can hold their own in a fight and endure the elements. You are deeply connected to your heritage and the old ways, believing that true worth is earned through struggle rather than inherited through soft living. You are a survivor and a renegade, capable of enduring the most brutal conditions to achieve your goals and maintain your independence from those who would seek to rule you.

Your isolationist tendencies and your focus on personal glory can make it difficult for you to form lasting partnerships with others. You often prioritize immediate gains and the thrill of the hunt over long-term strategic stability, which can lead to your house being marginalized or targeted by more unified forces. Your rebellious nature might cause you to bite off more than you can chew, leading to cycles of conflict that are difficult to escape. To truly prosper, you must learn that even the strongest ship needs a safe harbor and allies who will help you weather the storm.

baseline_questions.question_text: A rival house has insulted your family's honor in a public forum. What is your immediate response?

options.text: Demand a public trial or duel to settle the matter with integrity.
Quietly cut off their supply lines and financial support to ruin them.
Use the insult as a rallying cry to inspire a revolution against the old guard.
Confront them directly and forcefully, demanding an apology or blood.
Smile and host a lavish feast for their allies to isolate them socially.
Ignore the words and prepare a raid to take what they value most.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you believe is the most essential quality of a ruler?

options.text: Unwavering duty and a commitment to the ancient laws.
The intellectual capacity to manage resources and maintain order.
A visionary spirit that can inspire people to change the world.
The strength of will to make hard decisions and enforce justice.
The social grace to build lasting alliances and ensure prosperity.
The resilience to survive any hardship and remain independent.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex political dilemma, where do you look for guidance?

options.text: The traditions and lessons passed down by my ancestors.
The most pragmatic and efficient solution for my family's legacy.
My own inner conviction and the destiny I feel called to fulfill.
The most direct path to a fair and decisive resolution.
The advice of a network of well-placed informants and diplomats.
The harsh realities of the world and my own instincts for survival.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to expand your influence across the Seven Kingdoms?

options.text: By earning the genuine loyalty of my subjects through fair rule.
By leveraging wealth and strategic marriages to gain control.
By breaking the existing power structures to liberate the people.
By proving my dominance on the battlefield and demanding respect.
By cultivating a reputation for culture, beauty, and generosity.
By taking what is needed and refusing to bow to any central authority.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear as a leader?

options.text: Betraying my principles or failing my family's honor.
Losing the financial or intellectual edge that keeps us on top.
Becoming the very tyrant I sought to overthrow.
Appearing weak or being unable to enforce my rightful claims.
