You are motivated by a desire to provide for those you care about, often sacrificing your own peace of mind to ensure their future. However, your commitment to the job can lead you to suppress your own conscience, and you may find yourself trapped in a cycle of violence that you can no longer escape.

baseline_questions.question_text: When starting a new project, what is your primary motivation for seeing it through to the end?

options.text: The desire to prove my brilliance and build a lasting legacy.
The need to ensure the safety and stability of my loved ones.
The satisfaction of maintaining order and achieving long-term perfection.
A sense of duty and the pride of a job done professionally.
The thrill of the win and the potential for a creative payoff.
A search for belonging and a way to do something meaningful.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond when an unexpected crisis threatens your plans?

options.text: I take aggressive control to ensure I am the one who decides the outcome.
I analyze the situation meticulously and wait for the most disciplined moment to act.
I use my charisma and quick thinking to talk my way out of the problem.
I pragmatically manage the fallout to keep my household or business afloat.
I rely on my experience and stoicism to fix the issue quietly and efficiently.
I feel the weight of the situation deeply and struggle with the moral consequences.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which professional reputation do you value the most?

options.text: Formidable and respected for my unmatched expertise.
Polite, disciplined, and completely in control of my environment.
Resourceful and capable of handling the most difficult secrets.
Reliable, silent, and strictly adherent to a personal code.
Persuasive, colorful, and always able to find a loophole.
Resilient and empathetic, even in the harshest circumstances.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your stance on following the rules?

options.text: Rules are obstacles that I will bypass if they stand in the way of my goals.
Rules are tools that can be bent or manipulated to my advantage.
I follow a strict internal code, regardless of what the law says.
I value order and protocol because they ensure predictability and success.
I try to do the right thing, but I often find myself caught in the gray areas.
I navigate the rules as a realist, doing what is necessary for survival.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The visionary leader who demands respect and results.
The strategic architect who operates behind the scenes.
The pragmatic manager who keeps everyone organized and safe.
The expert fixer who handles the dirty work without complaint.
The fast-talking advocate who handles the public and the pressure.
The loyal partner who provides the heart and the conscience.

topics.display_name: Which Simpson Family Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The Simpson Family Is Actually Your Spirit Animal?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your love for donuts or your saxophone skills define your soul? Whether you're the glue holding the family together or the one causing all the chaos, there's a Simpson for everyone. Take this quiz to find out which resident of 742 Evergreen Terrace matches your personality perfectly!

characters.name: Homer Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a fun-loving, donut-obsessed family man who prioritizes comfort and simple pleasures over complex responsibilities.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with a "live in the moment" attitude, often driven by your immediate desires for snacks, television, and relaxation. While you might occasionally lack foresight or stumble into mishaps at work, your heart is fundamentally in the right place when it comes to your family. You possess a resilient spirit that allows you to bounce back from any disaster, usually with a laugh and a cold beverage in hand. Your pitfalls include a short attention span and a tendency toward impulsiveness, but your genuine love for your spouse and children makes you the glue that holds your chaotic world together. You find joy in the little things, like a perfect bowling game or a fresh box of donuts, proving that one doesn't need a high IQ to lead a fulfilling and memorable life. You are the ultimate everyman, navigating the complexities of modern life with a mix of confusion and enthusiasm.

characters.name: Marge Simpson
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate and patient moral compass of your household, dedicated to keeping the peace and supporting your loved ones.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate caregiver, possessing an incredible amount of patience and a knack for finding the silver lining in even the most stressful situations. Your days are often spent managing the needs of others, ensuring that everyone is fed, clothed, and emotionally supported. You have a strong sense of morality and often act as the voice of reason when things get out of hand. While you are incredibly nurturing, you sometimes struggle to prioritize your own needs, occasionally suppressing your frustrations until they boil over in unexpected ways. Your strengths lie in your unwavering loyalty and your ability to maintain a sense of normalcy amidst total chaos. You appreciate the beauty in domestic life and find deep satisfaction in a clean home and a happy family. Your creative side occasionally shines through in your hobbies, reminding everyone that there is a vibrant individual beneath your supportive exterior. You are the rock of your household, providing the stability everyone else relies on.

characters.name: Bart Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a rebellious and clever prankster who lives for excitement and isn't afraid to challenge authority.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born disruptor with a sharp wit and a talent for finding trouble wherever you go. Rules feel more like suggestions to you, and you take great pride in your ability to outsmart those in charge with your elaborate schemes and catchphrases. You are fiercely independent and value your freedom above all else, often spending your time seeking out the next big thrill or a way to make your friends laugh. Despite your reputation as a troublemaker, you have a hidden core of loyalty and will stand up for your siblings when it truly counts. Your main pitfalls are your short-sightedness and a tendency to act before thinking about the consequences, which often lands you in detention or hot water at home. However, your charisma and resourcefulness ensure that you never stay down for long. You are the life of the party, always ready with a skateboard and a sarcastic remark to keep things interesting. You represent the spirit of rebellion and the joy of childhood mischief.

characters.name: Lisa Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, principled, and musically gifted individual who strives to make the world a better place through intellect and activism.
characters.profile_text: You often feel like an outsider because of your high intelligence and deep-seated convictions, but you never let that stop you from speaking your truth. You are a lifelong learner with a passion for music, science, and social justice, often finding solace in your saxophone or a good book. Your moral compass is exceptionally strong, leading you to advocate for the environment and the marginalized, even when it makes you unpopular. You possess a maturity far beyond your years, which can sometimes make it difficult for you to relate to your peers or even your own family members. Your primary struggle is the weight of the world you carry on your shoulders; your perfectionism and high expectations for yourself and others can lead to bouts of existential dread or loneliness. Despite these challenges, your integrity and brilliance are your greatest assets. You are a visionary who believes in the power of logic and compassion to change the world, and you won't stop until you've made your mark. You are the intellectual heart of your community.

characters.name: Maggie Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a silent but incredibly observant and resourceful individual who often saves the day from the sidelines.
characters.profile_text: You may not say much, but your actions speak volumes about your intelligence and capability. You are a master of observation, taking in everything that happens around you and intervening with surprising effectiveness when the situation demands it. While others might overlook you because of your quiet nature, you possess a hidden strength and a level of competence that often surpasses those much older than you. You are content to let others take the spotlight, finding your own ways to navigate the world and protect your family from behind the scenes. Your pitfalls include being underestimated and occasionally feeling ignored, but you use this to your advantage to move freely and solve problems without interference. You have a strong sense of intuition and a protective streak that makes you a silent guardian for those you love. Whether you are handling a pacifier or a complex situation, you do so with a calm and steady hand, proving that the quietest voices often have the most to offer. You are the secret weapon of your family, always ready to act when it matters most.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a major crisis or a sudden problem in your household?

options.text: I panic briefly but then try to ignore it and hope it goes away on its own.
I immediately take charge, organizing everyone and keeping the peace.
I look for a clever, unconventional way to exploit the situation or have fun with it.
I research the best solution and try to address the root cause logically.
I stay quiet and observant, stepping in only at the last second to fix things discreetly.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal way to spend a free Saturday afternoon?

options.text: Napping on the couch with a snack and the TV on.
Catching up on chores and making sure my family is taken care of.
Heading outside to find some adventure or pull off a harmless prank.
Practicing a hobby, reading a challenging book, or attending a protest.
Playing quietly with my favorite toys and watching the world go by.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your general attitude toward rules and authority figures?

options.text: Rules are fine as long as they don't get in the way of my comfort.
Rules are essential for maintaining order and a happy home.
Rules are meant to be broken, or at least tested frequently.
Rules should be followed if they are just, but questioned if they are unethical.
I don't say much about them; I just do my own thing regardless.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are in a group setting, what role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The one who keeps everyone entertained with jokes and lightheartedness.
The nurturer who makes sure everyone feels included and comfortable.
The instigator who pushes boundaries and keeps things exciting.
The intellectual who provides the facts and keeps the group on track.
The silent observer who notices the details everyone else misses.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal strength when things get difficult?

options.text: My ability to bounce back and stay happy despite my mistakes.
My unwavering loyalty and patience with the people I love.
My resourcefulness and ability to think fast on my feet.
My integrity and commitment to doing what is right.
My hidden competence and ability to act effectively without recognition.

topics.display_name: Which League of Legends Role Should You Play?

synopsis.title: Which League of Legends Role Best Fits Your Playstyle?
synopsis.summary: League of Legends is a complex game where your position on the map defines your entire experience. Whether you prefer the isolation of a solo lane or the strategic depth of the jungle, finding your niche is key to climbing the ranks. This quiz analyzes your tactical preferences and mechanical strengths to determine your ideal Summoner's Rift assignment.

characters.name: Top Laner
characters.short_description: You are the resilient island-dweller who excels in 1v1 duels and frontline dominance.
characters.profile_text: You thrive in isolation, relishing the long lane where mechanical skill and wave management determine the victor. Whether you are playing a hulking tank or a high-damage bruiser, you understand that your primary job is to be a self-sufficient force that can either split-push to victory or soak up immense pressure during teamfights. You possess the patience to endure difficult matchups and the grit to turn a small lead into a crushing advantage. However, your isolation can be a double-edged sword, as you might find yourself disconnected from the rest of the team's needs. Overextending without vision or failing to use your Teleport effectively can leave your allies vulnerable while you are stuck on your island. You must balance your desire for individual dominance with the strategic necessity of joining the fray when the game reaches its critical tipping point.

characters.name: Jungler
characters.short_description: You are the strategic architect of the early game, roaming the map to secure objectives and tilt the scales.
characters.profile_text: You prefer a role that demands high macro-awareness and the ability to track the enemy's movements through the fog of war. Instead of farming minions in a lane, you navigate the wilderness, clearing camps and looking for opportunities to ambush unsuspecting opponents. Your success is measured by your ability to secure neutral objectives like Dragons and Barons, as well as your knack for being in the right place at the right time to save a struggling ally. The weight of the game often rests on your shoulders, which can lead to significant pressure and blame from teammates when things go south. If you fall behind in levels or lose control of your jungle, you risk becoming irrelevant. You must maintain a cool head and a sharp tactical mind, ensuring that your pathing remains efficient while you juggle the competing demands of every lane on the map.

characters.name: Mid Laner
characters.short_description: You occupy the heart of the map, utilizing high-impact spells and roaming potential to dictate the pace.
characters.profile_text: You enjoy being at the center of the action, where your central position allows you to influence both the top and bottom sides of the map. As a mid laner, you typically pilot mages or assassins who rely on burst damage and quick rotations to secure kills. You are often the primary source of magic damage or the key playmaker who finds picks on high-priority targets. Your ability to clear waves quickly and move to assist your jungler is what defines a great player in this role. Because you are in the shortest lane, you are susceptible to ganks from multiple angles, requiring constant vigilance and warding. If you fail to roam or lose your lane priority, the enemy mid laner can wreak havoc across the entire map. You must master the art of trading health and mana efficiently while keeping a constant eye on the minimap to ensure you are never caught off guard.

characters.name: ADC
characters.short_description: You are the team's primary late-game insurance policy, specializing in consistent physical damage and precise positioning.
characters.profile_text: You are a marksman who starts the game relatively weak but scales into an unstoppable force of destruction. Your gameplay revolves around the meticulous accumulation of gold through last-hitting minions and staying alive long enough to reach your core item spikes. In teamfights, you are the glass cannon; you must navigate a chaotic battlefield with perfect positioning, kiting away from threats while dealing constant damage to whoever is in range. Your low defensive stats make you the primary target for every assassin and diver on the enemy team. One small misstep or a lapse in focus can result in an instant death, leaving your team without their main source of damage. You rely heavily on your teammates to peel for you, which can be frustrating if coordination is lacking. Success requires a blend of extreme mechanical precision and the discipline to stay safe until the moment is right to strike.

characters.name: Support
characters.short_description: You are the backbone of the team, providing essential utility, vision, and protection to ensure your allies succeed.
characters.profile_text: You find satisfaction in enabling others, whether through life-saving heals, crowd control, or strategic vision placement. You don't need the glory of the killing blow to know you've won the game; instead, you take pride in a perfectly timed exhaust or a game-changing ultimate that catches the entire enemy team. Your role is to shepherd your ADC through the early game and then transition into a playmaker who controls the flow of information on the map. Because you do not focus on gold income, you are often the most fragile member of the team and must do more with less. It can be demoralizing when your efforts go unnoticed or when your teammates fail to capitalize on the opportunities you create. You must possess a selfless mindset and the tactical intelligence to know when to sacrifice yourself for the greater good of the team's victory.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which combat style do you find most appealing during a confrontation?

options.text: Engaging in a direct, sustained 1v1 duel of endurance.
Striking from a safe distance with consistent physical attacks.
Eliminating a high-priority target instantly with a burst of power.
Using utility and crowd control to neutralize threats and protect others.
Ambushing unsuspecting enemies by appearing from the fog of war.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to manage your presence on the map during the early stages of a match?

options.text: Staying in a single location to dominate my direct opponent.
Roaming constantly to influence multiple areas and secure objectives.
Holding the center of the map to quickly react to nearby skirmishes.
Focusing on resource accumulation while staying close to a protective partner.
Prioritizing vision and safety for my teammates over my own gold income.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary goal when participating in a large-scale teamfight?

options.text: Acting as a frontline shield to soak up damage and create space.
Positioning carefully to deal the maximum amount of damage over time.
Finding a flank to dive onto the enemy's most vulnerable members.
Providing heals, shields, or buffs to keep the primary damage dealers alive.
Securing critical neutral objectives like Dragons or Barons during the chaos.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which type of responsibility do you find most rewarding in a competitive setting?

options.text: Being a self-sufficient force that can win without constant assistance.
Being the strategic architect who tracks enemy movements and calls the plays.
Being the high-impact playmaker who dictates the tempo of the game.
Being the late-game insurance policy that carries the team to victory.
Being the unsung hero who enables the team's success through selfless play.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when your team falls behind in a match?

options.text: I focus on split-pushing to draw enemy pressure away from my team.
I look for creative ways to steal objectives or find a pick-off.
I attempt to roam and find a high-impact play to swing the momentum.
I prioritize safe farming to ensure I reach my late-game power spikes.
I focus on defensive vision to prevent the enemy from snowballing further.

topics.display_name: Which 'Seinfeld' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Seinfeld' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the master of your domain or just a hipster doofus? It’s time to find out if you’re the observational comedian, the neurotic best friend, or the eccentric neighbor from across the hall. Grab a big salad and get ready to answer some questions about nothing.

characters.name: Jerry Seinfeld
characters.short_description: You are the observational, neat-freak center of your social circle who finds humor in the mundane details of life.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of routine and precision, often acting as the voice of reason—or at least the voice of commentary—among your friends. You have a keen eye for the absurdities of daily existence, from the way people talk to the minor social faux pas that others might ignore. Your life is organized, your cereal boxes are lined up perfectly, and you prefer to keep a safe emotional distance from the chaos around you. While you are generally successful and well-liked, your tendency to over-analyze every minor flaw in others can lead to short-lived relationships and a reputation for being somewhat superficial. You thrive in environments where you can observe and critique, finding comfort in the fact that you are usually the most stable person in the room. Your strengths include your wit and your ability to remain relatively unscathed by the drama that consumes your peers. However, your detachment can sometimes come across as coldness to those who seek deeper emotional connections. You value cleanliness and order above all else, and your humor is your primary tool for navigating the world.

characters.name: George Costanza
characters.short_description: You are a neurotic, resourceful, and frequently dishonest individual who often finds yourself trapped in webs of your own making.
characters.profile_text: You are driven by a unique blend of insecurity and ego, often going to extreme lengths to avoid work or to save face in awkward situations. You possess a remarkable talent for lying, though these fabrications frequently collapse under their own weight, leading to spectacular public failures. You are deeply suspicious of the world, convinced that everyone is out to get you or that you are being cheated out of what you deserve. Despite your constant complaining, you have a resilient spirit that allows you to bounce back from even the most humiliating defeats. Your life is a series of schemes and short-cuts that rarely pay off, yet you never stop trying to beat the system. You are fiercely loyal to your small circle of friends, even if you spend most of your time arguing with them. Your pitfalls include your explosive temper and your tendency to be your own worst enemy. You are the king of the jerk store comeback, even if you only think of it hours after the argument has ended. You find comfort in the misery of others and are always looking for a way to come out on top without putting in the actual effort.

characters.name: Elaine Benes
characters.short_description: You are a sharp-tongued, assertive, and fiercely independent professional who isn't afraid to speak her mind or push a few buttons.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and opinions, often finding yourself caught between your professional ambitions and the ridiculous antics of your friends. You are highly intelligent and capable, yet you frequently succumb to bouts of irrational frustration when the world doesn't meet your standards. Whether you are fighting for a big salad or dealing with a difficult boss, you approach life with a confrontational style that is both intimidating and admirable. You value your independence and have little patience for incompetence or social niceties that feel fake. While you are a loyal friend, you aren't afraid to call people out on their nonsense, often with a physical shove or a sarcastic remark. Your pitfalls include a tendency to get overly obsessed with minor grievances and a dancing style that is memorable for all the wrong reasons. You are a modern individual who refuses to be pigeonholed, navigating the complexities of dating and career with a mix of cynicism and genuine passion. You are the glue that holds your chaotic social group together, even if you are often the one screaming the loudest.

characters.name: Cosmo Kramer
characters.short_description: You are an eccentric, uninhibited free spirit who lives life by your own set of rules and frequently stumbles into unexpected success.
characters.profile_text: You are a man of mystery and boundless energy, known for your dramatic entrances and your unique outlook on the world. You live life entirely in the moment, unburdened by the social anxieties or professional pressures that plague your friends. Your ideas are often bizarre—like a cologne that smells like the beach or a coffee table book about coffee tables—yet you possess a strange kind of luck that often sees these schemes through to fruition. You are deeply connected to your neighborhood and have a wide, eclectic circle of acquaintances that no one else quite understands. Your honesty is your most defining trait; you say exactly what is on your mind, regardless of the consequences. While your lack of boundaries can be exhausting for those around you, your genuine zest for life is infectious. You are a physical person, prone to sudden movements and intense reactions. Your main pitfall is your complete lack of a filter, but your ability to find joy in the simplest things makes you the most vibrant person in any room. You are the ultimate hipster, existing on the fringes of society while somehow remaining at the center of the action.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when a minor social rule is broken in your presence?

options.text: I make a witty, observational comment about how ridiculous the situation is.
I get internally furious and start plotting how to get even or avoid being the victim.
I confront the person directly and loudly, regardless of the setting.
I barely notice because I'm busy pursuing a completely unrelated, eccentric idea.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when starting a new project or job?

options.text: Maintaining a sense of order and professional routine.
Finding the path of least resistance to avoid doing any actual work.
Asserting my competence and proving I can handle the pressure.
Following a sudden burst of inspiration, no matter how bizarre it seems.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your friends describe your living space?

options.text: Immaculately clean, organized, and filled with cereal boxes.
A place where I hide from the world and wallow in my latest misfortune.
Functional and professional, though occasionally prone to clutter during a crisis.
An open-door sanctuary filled with strange artifacts and 'levels'.

baseline_questions.question_text: When it comes to romantic relationships, what is your biggest hurdle?

options.text: I am overly critical of minor physical or personality flaws.
I get caught in a web of lies trying to impress them or break up with them.
I have a short fuse and little patience for their annoying habits.
I have no boundaries and often share way too much information too soon.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal philosophy on life?

options.text: Life is a series of amusing observations to be analyzed from a distance.
The world is out to get me, so I have to cheat to stay even.
I'm just trying to get through the day without someone being an idiot.
I live entirely in the moment and let the universe provide for me.

topics.display_name: Which Norse God Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Norse God Matches Your True Spirit?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your temper is more thunderous like Thor or if your wit is as sharp as Loki's? This quiz dives deep into your personality to see which inhabitant of Asgard mirrors your soul. From the wisdom of Odin to the beauty of Freya, discover your divine counterpart today!

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are the mighty protector of Midgard, defined by your immense strength, unwavering loyalty, and straightforward approach to life's challenges.
characters.profile_text: You possess a heart as vast as the storm clouds and a sense of duty that anchors you to those you love. When a problem arises, you do not overthink or hesitate; you meet it head-on with courage and a thunderous resolve. People rely on you because you are the ultimate guardian, someone who stands firm against the tide of chaos. Your strength is not just physical but moral, as you value honesty and directness above all else. However, your impulsive nature can sometimes lead you into trouble. You might act before considering the consequences, letting your temper flare like a lightning strike. While your intentions are always noble, learning to temper your might with a bit of patience would serve you well. You thrive in environments where your physical presence and protective instincts are valued, making you the backbone of any group or family.

characters.name: Loki
characters.short_description: You are the silver-tongued trickster and shapeshifter, driven by a sharp intellect and a desire to challenge the status quo.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of adaptation, capable of navigating complex social webs with ease and wit. Your mind moves faster than those around you, allowing you to see opportunities and shortcuts that others completely miss. You value freedom and variety, often finding traditional rules to be stifling or boring. This makes you a brilliant problem-solver, though your solutions are rarely conventional. You have a knack for finding the humor in dire situations, using your charm to disarm enemies and allies alike. The pitfall of your archetype is a tendency toward mischief that can inadvertently cause harm or alienate those who trust you. Your desire for recognition and your fear of being overlooked can lead you to play dangerous games. While you are often misunderstood as a villain, you are actually a necessary catalyst for change, forcing the world to evolve through your clever interventions and unpredictable nature.

characters.name: Odin
characters.short_description: You are the All-Father, a seeker of wisdom and a strategic leader who is willing to sacrifice everything for the sake of knowledge and the future.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by a profound depth of thought and a relentless pursuit of understanding. You do not settle for surface-level answers, instead delving into the mysteries of the universe to prepare for whatever may come. As a leader, you are visionary and calculated, often thinking several steps ahead of your peers. You understand that true power comes from sacrifice and that every great achievement requires a price. This makes you a formidable mentor and a respected authority figure who commands attention without needing to raise your voice. Your greatest challenge lies in your tendency to become distant or overly secretive. Because you carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, you may struggle to connect with others on an emotional level, appearing cold or manipulative in your pursuit of the greater good. You must remember that while wisdom is a solitary pursuit, leadership requires the trust and warmth of those you guide.

characters.name: Freya
characters.short_description: You are the goddess of love, beauty, and war, embodying a powerful blend of fierce independence and deep emotional intelligence.
characters.profile_text: You walk the line between the tender and the terrible, possessing a magnetic personality that draws others to you. You are deeply in tune with your desires and are not afraid to claim what you want, whether it is a rare treasure or a hard-won victory. Your strength lies in your ability to appreciate the beauty in life while remaining fully prepared to defend it. You value your autonomy above all else, refusing to be defined by anyone else's expectations. This makes you a beacon of self-assurance and grace under pressure. However, your intense passions can sometimes lead to a sense of restlessness or a preoccupation with material and aesthetic pleasures. You might find yourself chasing the next great thrill or becoming overly focused on your own needs at the expense of long-term stability. By balancing your fiery spirit with a grounded sense of purpose, you remain an unstoppable force of nature who inspires everyone you meet to live more authentically.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a major conflict arises in your social circle, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: I step in immediately to protect the person being treated unfairly.
I observe from the sidelines, analyzing the situation to see how it might benefit the group later.
I use humor or clever arguments to de-escalate the tension and shift the focus.
I assert my boundaries clearly and ensure my own interests are not compromised.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Unyielding reliability and physical or moral strength.
The ability to adapt quickly and think outside the box.
A deep, strategic understanding of the world and its future.
A fierce sense of independence and an appreciation for life's beauty.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new and difficult skill you want to master?

options.text: Through sheer persistence and hard work until I've conquered it.
By finding a clever shortcut or a more efficient way to get results.
By researching the history and theory behind it to achieve total mastery.
By following my intuition and passion, letting my natural talent lead the way.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when facing a significant life change?

options.text: Failing to protect those who depend on me.
Being bored or trapped in a situation where I have no influence.
Making a decision without having enough information or foresight.
Losing my personal freedom or being forced to conform to others' standards.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The enforcer who keeps everyone safe and on track.
The wild card who keeps things interesting and challenges the status quo.
The visionary leader who makes the tough, long-term decisions.
The charismatic individual who inspires others through their own self-assurance.

topics.display_name: Which Classic High School Stereotype Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic High School Movie Archetype Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered where you would sit in the cafeteria of a classic teen movie? From the neon-lit hallways of the 80s to the social media-obsessed schools of today, everyone fits a certain vibe. Take this quiz to discover if you are the brain, the athlete, or the secret rebel. It is time to find your clique and claim your crown!

characters.name: The Brain
characters.short_description: You are the intellectual powerhouse who prioritizes academic excellence and logical reasoning above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You are often found in the front row of the classroom, your hand raised before the teacher even finishes the question. Your world is built on facts, figures, and the pursuit of knowledge, making you the go-to person for complex projects or late-night study sessions. While others are focused on social hierarchies, you are busy mastering calculus or analyzing classic literature, driven by a deep-seated desire to understand how the world works. Your discipline is unmatched, and your curiosity is your greatest strength, often leading you to explore topics far beyond the standard curriculum.

However, your intense focus on grades can sometimes lead to high levels of stress and a tendency to overlook the importance of emotional intelligence. You might find it difficult to relax or engage in small talk, feeling more comfortable discussing abstract theories than weekend plans. Learning to balance your intellectual pursuits with social connection is your biggest challenge, but your sharp mind ensures that you will always be several steps ahead of the curve in whatever career path you choose. You are the architect of your own future, built on a foundation of logic and hard work.

characters.name: The Jock
characters.short_description: You are the high-energy athlete who thrives on competition, teamwork, and the thrill of the game.
characters.profile_text:
You live for the roar of the crowd and the camaraderie of the locker room, finding your identity in physical excellence and competitive spirit. Whether you are on the field, the court, or the track, you possess a natural leadership quality that draws people toward you. You understand the value of hard work and discipline, knowing that victory is earned through sweat and persistence. Your social life often revolves around your team, creating bonds that feel more like family than mere friendships, and you are often the one rallying everyone together for the next big event.

Despite your outward confidence, you may struggle with the pressure of maintaining a certain image or the fear of what happens when the season ends. Sometimes you might be tempted to let your academic responsibilities slide in favor of extra practice, or you may find it hard to express vulnerability outside of a sports context. Your challenge is to realize that your worth isn't tied solely to your performance or your physical prowess. When you channel your incredible drive into other areas of life, you become an unstoppable force of nature capable of achieving greatness far beyond the stadium lights.

characters.name: The Rebel
characters.short_description: You are the non-conformist who challenges authority and marches to the beat of your own drum.
characters.profile_text:
You have little patience for arbitrary rules or the status quo, often finding yourself at odds with school administration or traditional social norms. Your wardrobe and your attitude serve as a declaration of independence, signaling that you refuse to be put into a box by anyone else's expectations. You possess a sharp wit and a keen eye for hypocrisy, making you a natural advocate for change and a voice for those who feel marginalized by the system. You value authenticity above all else and aren't afraid to stand alone if it means staying true to your personal convictions.

This defiant streak can sometimes lead to unnecessary conflict or a sense of isolation from the larger community. You might push people away before they have a chance to get close, using your tough exterior as a shield against potential disappointment or judgment. While your skepticism is a powerful tool for critical thinking, learning when to cooperate and when to fight is essential for your long-term success. Beneath the leather jacket or the cynical remarks lies a deeply passionate individual who cares more about the world than they care to admit, often hiding a heart of gold behind a wall of sarcasm.

characters.name: The Popular Kid
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic social butterfly who sits at the center of the school's social web.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an innate ability to navigate any social situation with grace and charm, making everyone you talk to feel like the most important person in the room. Your influence is significant, and you often set the trends that others follow, whether it is in fashion, music, or social activities. You thrive in the spotlight and enjoy the sense of belonging that comes with being well-known and well-liked by almost everyone. Your schedule is constantly packed with events, and your phone is never quiet, reflecting your status as the life of the party and the glue that holds your social circle together.

However, being at the top of the social ladder comes with its own set of anxieties, particularly the constant need to maintain your reputation and stay relevant. You might feel a heavy pressure to please everyone, which can lead to a loss of your own personal identity or a fear of showing any signs of weakness. It is important for you to find friends who value you for who you are, not just for your status or what you can do for them. When you use your popularity to lift others up rather than just maintaining your own position, you become a truly impactful leader who leaves a positive legacy.

characters.name: The Artist
characters.short_description: You are the creative soul who expresses your inner world through various forms of artistic media.
characters.profile_text:
You see the world through a unique lens, finding beauty and inspiration in places others might overlook. Whether you are painting, writing, playing music, or designing, your creativity is the primary way you process your emotions and experiences. You tend to be more introspective and sensitive than your peers, often retreating into your own imagination to escape the mundane aspects of school life. Your work is a reflection of your soul, and you take great pride in your ability to create something meaningful from nothing, often spending hours perfecting a single detail that others might not even notice.

Because you are so deeply connected to your emotions, you may sometimes struggle with self-doubt or feel misunderstood by those who don't share your creative passion. You might find the rigid structure of a typical school day stifling, preferring the freedom to explore your ideas at your own pace without the pressure of standardized testing. Your challenge is to find a way to ground your artistic visions in reality so that you can share them with the world effectively. When you find your community of fellow creators, you truly blossom and find the validation you need to keep pushing the boundaries of your craft.

characters.name: The Loner
characters.short_description: You are the quiet observer who prefers your own company and the peace of solitude over the noise of the crowd.
characters.profile_text:
You are perfectly content sitting in the back of the library or walking through the halls with your headphones on, lost in your own thoughts. You don't feel the need to fit into a specific group or seek the approval of your peers, which gives you a rare sense of independence and self-reliance. You are often highly observant, noticing details about people and situations that others miss in their rush to be social. Your inner life is rich and complex, and you value deep, meaningful connections over a large circle of superficial acquaintances, preferring quality over quantity in every aspect of your life.

While your self-sufficiency is a major strength, it can sometimes morph into a wall that keeps people out, leading to moments of genuine loneliness that you might not know how to address. You might find it difficult to reach out when you actually do need help, or you may be perceived as aloof or unapproachable by those who don't know you well. Learning to open up just a little bit can lead to surprising friendships that respect your need for space while providing the support you deserve. Your ability to stand on your own two feet is admirable, but remember that even the most independent spirits benefit from a trusted confidant.

baseline_questions.question_text: Where is someone most likely to find you during a free period or lunch break?

options.text: In the library or a quiet study hall reviewing notes.
On the practice field, in the gym, or near the trophy case.
Somewhere I am not supposed to be, like off-campus or behind the bleachers.
In the center of the cafeteria or the busiest hallway holding court.
In the art studio, music wing, or theater workshop.
In a secluded corner or under a tree outside with my headphones on.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary focus when you walk through the school doors in the morning?

options.text: Achieving academic excellence and mastering the day's material.
Pushing my physical limits and preparing for the next big game.
Staying true to myself and questioning the arbitrary rules of the system.
Maintaining my social connections and staying on top of the latest trends.
Finding inspiration for my next creative project or performance.
Preserving my personal peace and avoiding unnecessary social drama.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to school rules and administrative authority?

options.text: I follow them strictly; they provide a necessary structure for success.
I respect them as long as they don't interfere with team goals.
I see them as suggestions that are often meant to be challenged.
I use them to my advantage to navigate the social hierarchy.
I find them stifling and often get lost in my own imagination instead.
I ignore them and stay under the radar to avoid any confrontation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your role when assigned a group project?

options.text: The researcher who ensures every detail is factually correct and logical.
The motivator who keeps the energy high and the team moving forward.
The skeptic who points out the flaws in the assignment's premise.
The coordinator who delegates tasks and manages the final presentation.
The visionary who handles the design, aesthetics, and creative elements.
The silent contributor who does their part independently and stays out of the fray.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred way to recharge after a long week of classes?

options.text: Diving into a challenging book or learning a new skill on my own.
Engaging in a high-energy sport or a competitive physical activity.
Seeking out an underground event or exploring a new part of the city.
Surrounding myself with a large group of friends at a lively party.
Spending hours alone working on a personal artistic or musical project.
Enjoying a solitary walk or a quiet night in with zero interruptions.

topics.display_name: Which Alice in Wonderland Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which "Alice in Wonderland" Character Matches Your Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Have you ever felt like you're falling down a rabbit hole of your own making? Whether you're hosting a chaotic tea party or demanding everyone's head on a platter, there's a Wonderland resident that perfectly mirrors your personality. Take this whimsical journey through the Looking Glass to discover which iconic Lewis Carroll creation you truly are.

characters.name: Alice
characters.short_description: You are a curious and sensible explorer who navigates life's absurdities with a mix of logic and wonder.
characters.profile_text: You possess an insatiable curiosity that often leads you into unexpected situations, yet you maintain a grounded sense of propriety and logic even when the world around you defies reason. You are the type of person who asks "why" not out of defiance, but out of a genuine desire to understand the mechanics of your environment. While you value manners and social order, you aren't afraid to speak your mind when you encounter injustice or sheer nonsense. Your greatest strength lies in your adaptability; you can shrink or grow to meet the challenges before you, though you sometimes struggle with your own identity in a rapidly changing landscape. You may find yourself feeling like an outsider in eccentric circles, but your bravery and willingness to follow the rabbit hole ensure that your life is never dull. You are a seeker of truth who remains remarkably composed even when the rules of the game keep changing.

characters.name: The White Rabbit
characters.short_description: You are a high-strung and punctual individual who is constantly driven by a sense of duty and the ticking of the clock.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your meticulous attention to schedules and your perpetual fear of being late for important engagements. Life for you is a series of deadlines and formal obligations, and you often feel the weight of the world—or at least the weight of your pocket watch—pressing down on your shoulders. You thrive in structured environments where rules are clear, but you can become easily flustered when things go off-script or when unexpected guests disrupt your flow. Your dedication makes you a reliable asset in any professional setting, as you are deeply committed to your responsibilities and the figures of authority you serve. However, your tendency to fret over minor details can lead to significant stress, causing you to scurry through life without pausing to enjoy the scenery. Learning to take a deep breath and realize that the world won't end if you're a few minutes behind is your greatest challenge, but your reliability is unmatched.

characters.name: The Mad Hatter
characters.short_description: You are a whimsical and unconventional soul who finds joy in the absurd and lives life as one continuous, eccentric celebration.
characters.profile_text: You march to the beat of your own drum, often leaving others bewildered by your non-linear logic and penchant for riddles that have no answers. To you, time is not a master but a companion—or perhaps a stubborn rival—and you prefer to spend your days in the company of like-minded friends who appreciate the finer points of a tea party. You are deeply social and value tradition, though your version of tradition is likely far more colorful and chaotic than most. Your mind moves at a mile a minute, jumping from one creative thought to the next, which makes you a brilliant conversationalist for those who can keep up. Your pitfall is a tendency to get stuck in loops, repeating the same habits or arguments without reaching a resolution. You may find it difficult to connect with people who demand strict rationality, but your vibrant spirit and refusal to conform make you an unforgettable presence in any room.

characters.name: The Queen of Hearts
characters.short_description: You are a formidable and passionate leader who commands attention through sheer force of will and a desire for absolute order.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of intense emotions and immediate action, preferring to settle disputes with a decisive word rather than a lengthy debate. You have a clear vision of how things should be, and you expect those around you to fall in line with your expectations without hesitation. Your confidence is your greatest asset, allowing you to take charge of any situation and lead with an authority that others find both impressive and intimidating. You value loyalty and efficiency above all else, and you have little patience for those who fail to meet your high standards. However, your impulsive nature and quick temper can sometimes lead to scorched-earth policies that alienate potential allies. You may find that people follow you out of fear rather than genuine affection, and learning to temper your demands with a bit of mercy could help you build a more stable empire. Beneath your fiery exterior lies a person who simply wants things to be just so.

characters.name: The Cheshire Cat
characters.short_description: You are a detached and philosophical observer who navigates the world with a knowing smile and a touch of mystery.
characters.profile_text: You possess a unique perspective on reality, often seeing the inherent madness in everyone and everything around you. Rather than being bothered by the chaos, you find it amusing and choose to engage with it on your own terms, appearing and disappearing as you see fit. You are highly independent and rarely feel the need to justify your actions or your whereabouts to others. Your wisdom is often delivered in cryptic layers, forcing people to think for themselves rather than giving them easy answers. This makes you an excellent mentor for those who are lost, though your aloofness can sometimes be mistaken for indifference. You are comfortable in your own skin and you don't feel the need to fit into any specific social group. Your greatest strength is your ability to remain calm and collected in the face of absurdity, though your tendency to remain on the sidelines can sometimes leave you feeling isolated from meaningful connections.

characters.name: The Caterpillar
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and contemplative intellectual who values self-reflection and the pursuit of fundamental truths.
characters.profile_text: You are not one to be rushed, preferring to sit back and observe the world through a cloud of deep thought. You challenge others to define themselves, often asking the difficult questions that force people to confront their own identities and motivations. Your demeanor is one of cool indifference, but this masks a sharp mind that is always analyzing and deconstructing the environment. You value brevity and precision in speech, and you have little tolerance for those who are flighty or uncertain. While you may seem unapproachable or even grumpy to some, your insights are invaluable to those who are willing to listen and endure your scrutiny. You are a person of transformation, understanding that life is a series of stages and that change is the only true constant. Your pitfall is a tendency toward arrogance or emotional distance, as you may find it hard to relate to the more frantic or emotional concerns of those around you. You are a pillar of stability in a world of flux.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond when a situation becomes chaotic or nonsensical?

options.text: I try to apply logic and ask questions to make sense of it.
I get flustered and try to find the quickest way back to my schedule.
I lean into the absurdity and find a way to celebrate the mess.
I take immediate command and demand that order be restored.
I observe from a distance with an amused, detached perspective.
I remain stoic and use the moment to reflect on the nature of change.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your relationship with time and deadlines?

options.text: I respect time but am flexible enough to explore new paths.
I am constantly checking the clock; being late is my greatest fear.
Time is a social construct; I prefer to live in a perpetual present.
Time must serve my needs; I have no patience for delays.
I exist outside of traditional schedules, appearing only when I choose.
I move slowly and deliberately, refusing to be rushed by others.

baseline_questions.question_text: When meeting someone new, what is your primary social instinct?

options.text: I am polite and curious, trying to understand their perspective.
I am formal and brief, as I likely have somewhere else to be.
I engage them with riddles, stories, or unconventional conversation.
I assess whether they are loyal and follow my lead.
I offer cryptic advice and then fade into the background.
I challenge them to define who they really are.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you feel most comfortable in?

options.text: A garden full of hidden paths and new things to discover.
A tidy office where every document is in its proper place.
A lively, colorful party where the rules are made up on the fly.
A courtroom or boardroom where I am the one making the rules.
A quiet, high vantage point where I can see without being seen.
A peaceful, hazy space perfect for deep contemplation.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your most defining personal trait?

options.text: My adaptability and willingness to learn.
My reliability and sense of duty.
My eccentricity and creative spirit.
My confidence and decisive leadership.
My independence and philosophical outlook.
My intellectual depth and composure.

topics.display_name: Which Taylor Swift Era Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Taylor Swift Era Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you a hopeless romantic dreaming of white horses, or are you ready to burn it all down in your reputation era? From the country curls of the debut to the synth-pop glitter of Midnights, every era represents a different side of your personality. Take this quiz to find out which chapter of Taylor's iconic career matches your current vibe and aesthetic.

characters.name: Debut
characters.short_description: You are the embodiment of youthful innocence, country roots, and the raw excitement of first dreams.
characters.profile_text: You are a dreamer at heart, often found with your head in the clouds and your feet in the grass. You possess a rare, unpolished sincerity that draws people to your genuine nature. Your strengths lie in your optimism and your ability to find magic in the mundane details of everyday life, like a screen door slamming or a handwritten note. You aren't afraid to wear your heart on your sleeve, even if it means feeling the sting of a first heartbreak or the awkwardness of growing up. However, your youthful idealism can sometimes lead to a lack of perspective. You might find yourself dwelling on small slights or feeling overwhelmed by the vastness of the world outside your hometown. Your tendency to romanticize every interaction can leave you vulnerable to disappointment when reality doesn't match the lyrics in your head. Despite this, your resilience is rooted in your authenticity, and you always find your way back to your true self through creative expression and the comfort of your roots.

characters.name: Fearless
characters.short_description: You represent the golden glow of teenage romance, the courage to take risks, and the magic of believing in fairytales.
characters.profile_text: You are a hopeless romantic who believes in the power of a grand gesture and the thrill of a first kiss in the rain. You approach life with a sense of wonder and a fearless attitude, willing to jump into new experiences even when you're terrified. Your strengths include your unwavering loyalty to your friends and your ability to turn your personal struggles into universal anthems of hope. You have a knack for capturing the essence of a moment, making everyone around you feel like they are part of a cinematic story. Your main pitfall is your tendency to let your emotions drive the car, sometimes leading to impulsive decisions or dramatic outbursts. You might struggle with the transition from childhood fantasies to the complexities of real-world relationships, finding it hard to let go of the happily ever after narrative. When things go wrong, you feel the weight of the world intensely, but your ability to dance through the storm ensures you never stay down for long. You are defined by your bravery and your refusal to let the world harden your heart.

characters.name: Speak Now
characters.short_description: You are a master of self-expression, defined by your whimsical imagination and the courage to say what needs to be said.
characters.profile_text: You are a storyteller who values honesty above all else, often feeling a deep internal drive to set the record straight. Your world is one of enchanted forests, sparkling gowns, and the dramatic tension of a wedding interrupted. You possess a sharp wit and a vivid imagination, allowing you to craft intricate narratives that resonate with anyone who has ever felt misunderstood. Your strength is your independence; you aren't afraid to stand alone if it means staying true to your voice and your convictions. On the flip side, your desire for the perfect response can lead to overthinking and a tendency to hold onto grudges until you find the right words to release them. You might find yourself caught up in the drama of your own making, sometimes prioritizing the narrative over the practical reality of a situation. Your intensity can be intimidating to those who prefer a quieter life, but your passion is what makes you unforgettable. You remind everyone that speaking up is the only way to truly be heard and that your story is yours alone to tell.

characters.name: Red
characters.short_description: You are a whirlwind of intense emotions, navigating the bittersweet transition into adulthood with passion and vulnerability.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of extremes, experiencing the world in vibrant shades of passion, heartbreak, and everything in between. You embrace the miserable and magical nature of life, understanding that true growth comes from the wreckage of past mistakes. Your strengths are your emotional intelligence and your ability to connect with others through shared experiences of loss and longing. You are the friend who stays up all night talking about the meaning of life, fueled by coffee and a vintage aesthetic that reflects your old-soul sensibilities. Your pitfall is a tendency to get lost in the all too well memories of the past, making it difficult to move forward. You might find yourself stuck in a cycle of nostalgia, overanalyzing every detail of what went wrong instead of focusing on what is going right. This emotional turbulence can be exhausting, but it also provides the fuel for your most profound insights. You are a mosaic of broken pieces held together by a fierce determination to keep loving, even when it hurts, and you find beauty in the chaos of a life lived fully.

characters.name: Reputation
characters.short_description: You are a resilient powerhouse who has learned to find strength in the shadows and protect what truly matters.
characters.profile_text: You have undergone a significant transformation, emerging from the fire with a thicker skin and a clearer sense of who your real friends are. You value privacy and loyalty above all else, having learned the hard way that not everyone has your best interests at heart. Your strengths are your strategic mind and your unwavering protective instincts for the people you love. You aren't afraid to play the villain in someone else's story if it means staying true to your own narrative and reclaiming your power. However, your defensive walls can sometimes be so high that you shut out the very people who want to get close to you. You might struggle with a lingering sense of cynicism or a desire for revenge that can cloud your judgment. It takes a long time for you to trust someone, and once that trust is broken, there is rarely a second chance. Beneath the armor, though, is a heart that beats for a love that is real and quiet, away from the prying eyes of the world. You prove that your character is defined by your actions, not by what others say about you.

characters.name: Lover
characters.short_description: You are a celebration of light, color, and the enduring power of a love that is golden and resilient.
characters.profile_text: You have moved past the darkness and into a world of pastel skies and heartfelt devotion. You are defined by your empathy and your desire to create a safe, inclusive space for everyone you encounter. Your strengths lie in your emotional maturity and your ability to find joy in the simple, everyday moments of a long-term commitment. You are a romantic, but a grounded one, recognizing that love is as much about the daylight as it is about the starlight. Your challenge is a tendency to be overly sensitive to the political and social climate around you, sometimes taking on the weight of the world's problems as your own. You might also struggle with an underlying fear of losing the peace you've worked so hard to build, leading to moments of anxiety or over-protectiveness. Despite these worries, your optimism is your greatest asset. You choose to focus on the good, the kind, and the hopeful, proving that even after the worst storms, the sun will always come out again. You are a beacon of warmth for those lucky enough to be in your inner circle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically express your inner truth to the world?

options.text: With raw sincerity and unpolished dreams.
Through fearless storytelling and grand gestures.
With sharp wit and a need to set the record straight.
Through bittersweet nostalgia and deep vulnerability.
With strategic silence and reclaimed power.
With empathetic warmth and inclusive joy.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a major life change, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: To stay grounded in my roots and hometown values.
To jump in headfirst, even if I am terrified.
To use my imagination to craft a new narrative.
To embrace the chaos and learn from the wreckage.
To build high walls and protect what is mine.
To look for the golden light and choose peace.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment best reflects your current state of mind?

options.text: A porch swing on a quiet summer night.
A rainy street where anything feels possible.
A whimsical, enchanted forest.
A vintage cafe in the middle of autumn.
A hidden sanctuary away from prying eyes.
A bright room filled with pastel colors.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle the memories of your past?

options.text: I romanticize every small detail of growing up.
I see them as lessons in bravery and magic.
I hold onto them until I find the right words to release them.
I overanalyze them deeply, remembering it all too well.
I use them to decide who I can truly trust now.
I acknowledge the storm but focus on the daylight.

baseline_questions.question_text: What quality do you value most in your closest relationships?

options.text: Genuine, unpolished honesty.
Unwavering loyalty and fairytale romance.
Independence and a shared creative spark.
Emotional intelligence and shared intensity.
Fierce protection and absolute privacy.
Grounded commitment and mutual empathy.

topics.display_name: Which Bridgerton Sibling Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Bridgerton Sibling Are You? Find Your Place in the Ton!
synopsis.summary: Dearest Reader, the social season is upon us and it is time to discover which member of the most talked-about family you truly are. Are you a hopeless romantic like Daphne, a duty-bound leader like Anthony, or perhaps a rebellious spirit like Eloise? Answer these questions about your social habits and secret desires to reveal your Bridgerton identity.

characters.name: Anthony
characters.short_description: You are the dutiful and fiercely protective head of the family who prioritizes responsibility above all else.
characters.profile_text: You carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, often putting the needs and reputations of your loved ones far above your own personal happiness. As a natural leader, you thrive on order and tradition, though your intense fear of loss can sometimes make you appear rigid or overly controlling to those around you. You are deeply competitive and possess a sharp wit, but your true strength lies in your unwavering loyalty to your family. Your journey is often one of learning to balance the demands of your title with the vulnerabilities of your heart. While you may struggle to let your guard down, when you finally do, your devotion is absolute and transformative. You must be careful not to let your sense of duty turn into a cage that prevents you from experiencing genuine joy and connection.

characters.name: Benedict
characters.short_description: You are a soulful and creative spirit who seeks a life filled with artistic expression and unconventional beauty.
characters.profile_text: You often feel like a bit of an outsider within your own social circles, preferring the company of thinkers and creators to the rigid expectations of the ton. Your perspective is colored by a deep appreciation for the arts, and you possess a sensitive nature that allows you to see the world in shades of light and shadow that others might miss. You are constantly searching for your true purpose, often wondering if there is more to life than the path laid out for you by birthright. This quest for meaning makes you one of the most open-minded and empathetic members of your family. However, your desire for freedom can sometimes lead to a lack of direction or a tendency to drift when things become too demanding. You value authenticity above all else and are happiest when you are free to explore your passions without the burden of societal judgment.

characters.name: Colin
characters.short_description: You are a charming and inquisitive traveler who finds joy in exploring the world and the depths of your own heart.
characters.profile_text: You possess a natural charisma and a lighthearted spirit that makes you a favorite in any room you enter. Your curiosity about the world drives you to seek out new experiences and cultures, often returning from your travels with a broader perspective and a collection of stories to share. You are a keen observer of human nature, though you can sometimes be surprisingly oblivious to the feelings of those closest to you until they are laid bare. Your kindness is genuine, and you have a protective streak that emerges whenever your friends or family are in need. While you enjoy the thrill of adventure, you also crave a sense of belonging and a partner who truly understands your soul. Your biggest challenge is often recognizing the treasure right in front of you while you are busy looking toward the horizon.

characters.name: Daphne
characters.short_description: You are the poised and determined heart of the family who balances grace with a fierce inner strength.
characters.profile_text: You understand the rules of the world you live in and navigate them with a level of skill and elegance that others can only admire. While you value tradition and the importance of a good reputation, you are far from a passive participant in your own life; you are a strategist who knows how to get what you want through diplomacy and resolve. You are deeply committed to the idea of family and will go to great lengths to ensure the happiness and security of those you love. Your kindness is one of your greatest assets, but it is backed by a spine of steel that surprises those who mistake your politeness for weakness. You seek a partnership based on mutual respect and genuine affection, refusing to settle for anything less than a true match of equals. Sometimes, your desire for perfection can lead to unnecessary pressure, but your resilience always carries you through.

characters.name: Eloise
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant and rebellious intellectual who values independence and the pursuit of knowledge over social convention.
characters.profile_text: You have little patience for the superficialities of society, preferring the company of books and the exchange of radical ideas to the marriage market. Your sharp tongue and quick wit are your primary defenses against a world that tries to fit you into a narrow mold, and you are never afraid to speak your mind, even when it makes others uncomfortable. You are a champion for change and a seeker of truth, always looking for ways to expand your horizons and challenge the status quo. This fierce independence is your greatest strength, but it can also lead to feelings of isolation when you feel that no one truly understands your ambitions. You value deep, intellectual connections and loyalty, though you may struggle to reconcile your desire for autonomy with the expectations of your family. Your path is uniquely your own, driven by a thirst for a life that is meaningful on your own terms.

characters.name: Francesca
characters.short_description: You are a quiet and observant soul who finds comfort in solitude and the subtle harmonies of life.
characters.profile_text: Unlike your more boisterous siblings, you often prefer the peace of your own company or the focused discipline of your musical pursuits. You possess a depth of feeling that is not always apparent on the surface, as you tend to process your emotions internally rather than sharing them with the world. This introverted nature makes you an excellent listener and a steady presence in times of chaos, providing a grounded perspective that your family often relies upon. You appreciate the beauty in the small, quiet moments and are drawn to people who can appreciate the silence with you. While you may seem reserved, your inner world is rich and vibrant, filled with a unique understanding of the world around you. Your challenge lies in ensuring that your voice is heard when it matters most, as your tendency to withdraw can sometimes lead others to overlook your profound insights and needs.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a significant life decision, what is your primary guiding force?

options.text: The weight of my responsibilities and family legacy.
My personal desire for freedom and creative fulfillment.
The pursuit of knowledge and intellectual independence.
The hope for a deep, harmonious romantic connection.
A sense of curiosity and the thrill of new experiences.
The need for inner peace and emotional stability.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave at a large, formal social gathering?

options.text: I take charge, ensuring everything runs smoothly and according to tradition.
I am the life of the party, charming everyone with stories and wit.
I navigate the room with grace, making strategic and meaningful connections.
I stay on the fringes, observing the absurdity of the social rituals.
I seek out the most interesting or artistic people for deep conversation.
I find a quiet corner or a piano to escape the overwhelming noise.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred way to spend a completely free afternoon?

options.text: Honing a craft, painting, or engaging in a creative hobby.
Getting lost in a challenging book or researching a new topic.
Organizing my affairs or helping a family member with their problems.
Writing letters to friends or planning my next big trip.
Practicing an instrument or enjoying the stillness of nature.
Spending quality time with a loved one, dreaming of the future.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in a potential partner?

options.text: Reliability and a shared commitment to family duty.
An adventurous spirit and a sense of humor.
Intellectual equality and a respect for my autonomy.
A gentle soul who understands the beauty in silence.
A passionate heart that inspires my own creativity.
Kindness, elegance, and a true romantic sensibility.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when your personal plans are disrupted by unexpected news?

options.text: I immediately step into 'fix-it' mode to manage the fallout.
I feel frustrated by the restriction on my independence.
I try to see the silver lining or the potential for a new adventure.
I retreat inward to process my feelings before taking action.
I adapt with poise, ensuring the reputation of my family remains intact.
I look for the deeper meaning or the artistic inspiration in the chaos.

topics.display_name: What Kind of Minecraft Player Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Minecraft Legend Are You?
synopsis.summary: Whether you're a master builder or a chaotic explorer, everyone has a unique way of surviving the blocky wilderness. Do you spend your days perfecting complex redstone contraptions or hunting down the Ender Dragon in record time? Take this quiz to discover which legendary Minecraft playstyle defines your digital legacy!

characters.name: The Architect
characters.short_description: You are a visionary builder who transforms raw blocks into breathtaking structural masterpieces and aesthetic landscapes.
characters.profile_text:
You see every biome as a blank canvas waiting for your creative touch. While others are content with simple dirt huts, you spend hours selecting the perfect palette of blocks, ensuring that every staircase and slab contributes to a cohesive theme. Your builds are often the landmark of any server, characterized by intricate detailing, grand scale, and a deep understanding of depth and texture. You likely have chests full of terracotta, concrete, and quartz, and you aren't afraid to spend days terraforming a mountain just to get the right view.

Your strength lies in your patience and your eye for design, which allows you to create environments that feel lived-in and legendary. However, your perfectionism can sometimes be a pitfall; you might find yourself stuck on a single roof design for hours while your friends have already progressed to the endgame. You often prioritize form over function, sometimes forgetting to light up your beautiful halls, leading to unexpected creeper visits in your art galleries. Despite this, your legacy is written in the skyline of your world.

characters.name: The Pathfinder
characters.short_description: You are a restless explorer driven by the thrill of discovery and the desire to map the furthest reaches of the world.
characters.profile_text:
For you, the game truly begins when you leave the safety of your spawn point with nothing but a boat, a bed, and a stack of food. You are fascinated by the procedural generation of the world, seeking out rare biomes like mushroom islands or ice spikes just for the sake of seeing them. Your inventory is usually a chaotic mess of exotic saplings, loot from desert temples, and maps that stretch across multiple frames. You thrive on the unknown and possess an uncanny ability to navigate back home even without coordinates.

Your greatest strength is your adaptability and your wealth of rare resources gathered from across the globe. You are often the first to find a stronghold or a woodland mansion, making you an invaluable scout for any group. The downside to your nomadic lifestyle is that you rarely have a permanent place to call home, often living out of shulker boxes or temporary camps. You might also find yourself frequently in danger, pushing your luck in dark caves or deep oceans far from any backup.

characters.name: The Redstone Engineer
characters.short_description: You are a logical mastermind who uses complex circuitry and automation to bend the game’s mechanics to your will.
characters.profile_text:
You view Minecraft not as a sandbox for building, but as a giant logic puzzle waiting to be solved. Your base is likely a humming hub of pistons, observers, and hoppers, where every manual task has been replaced by a machine. From sorting systems that organize every item in the game to massive flying machines that clear out entire chunks, your goal is peak efficiency. You speak the language of tick rates and signal strengths, and you are never happier than when you are debugging a complex contraption that saves you five minutes of manual labor.

Your technical prowess makes you the backbone of any advanced survival world, providing the community with infinite resources through your farms. However, your obsession with optimization can lead you to spend all your time in a creative testing world rather than actually playing the game. You might also struggle with aesthetics, as your magnificent machines are often encased in plain cobblestone or left as exposed redstone spaghetti. For you, the beauty of a build is found in how it functions, not how it looks.

characters.name: The Dragon Slayer
characters.short_description: You are a combat-focused warrior who lives for the adrenaline of battle and the glory of conquering the game’s toughest bosses.
characters.profile_text:
You are the primary protector of your realm, always equipped with the sharpest netherite sword and the most powerful enchantments. While others are busy farming or building, you are hunting down endermen, raiding bastions, or preparing for your next wither fight. You have mastered the art of critical hits, shield timing, and potion brewing, making you a formidable opponent for any mob or player. Your end-game goal is always the same: reach the End, defeat the dragon, and secure the elytra to rule the skies.
