baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when you start a new project?

options.text: The desire to be the very best and achieve a long-held dream.
The need to prove my intelligence and create something groundbreaking.
The hope that my work will make life better or kinder for others.
The thrill of discovery and seeing what lies beyond the next obstacle.
The satisfaction of bringing order and excellence to a chaotic situation.
The chance to express my inner thoughts and unique perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a personal setback or failure?

options.text: I analyze the data to see exactly where the logic failed.
I feel the sting of it deeply and spend time reflecting in my journal.
I shake it off and immediately start training harder for the next attempt.
I look for the silver lining and try to learn a moral lesson from it.
I re-evaluate my strategy and create a more perfect plan to avoid repeating it.
I don't let it stop me; I just find a different way to keep exploring.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which trait do you value most in a close friend or companion?

options.text: Loyalty—someone who will follow me into any situation without hesitation.
Reliability—someone who respects the rules and keeps things on track.
Empathy—someone who understands my feelings and offers a kind word.
Competence—someone who can keep up with my intellect and goals.
Relatability—someone who shares my quirks and makes me feel less alone.
Passion—someone who is as dedicated to their dreams as I am to mine.

topics.display_name: Which Great Gatsby Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Great Gatsby' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Step into the glitz and glamour of West Egg to discover where you truly belong in F. Scott Fitzgerald's classic tale. Are you the mysterious dreamer throwing lavish parties or the cynical observer watching from the sidelines? Pour yourself a glass of champagne and find out if you are destined for greatness or a tragic end.

characters.name: Jay Gatsby
characters.short_description: A visionary dreamer driven by an unyielding hope and an obsession with reclaiming a lost past.
characters.profile_text: You are a romantic at heart, possessing an extraordinary capacity for hope and a belief that you can recreate the past through sheer force of will. Your life is defined by a singular, grand ambition, and you are willing to reinvent yourself entirely to achieve it. While your determination is admirable, it often blinds you to the harsh realities of the present, leading you to chase illusions that may never be fully realized. You are generous and charismatic, yet there is a profound loneliness in your pursuit of a dream that remains just out of reach. Your greatest strength is your optimism, but your downfall is your inability to accept that time moves only forward. You tend to surround yourself with luxury not for its own sake, but as a beacon to attract what you have lost. This relentless focus on a specific goal makes you a formidable force, yet it also makes you vulnerable to the whims of those who do not share your visionary spirit.

characters.name: Nick Carraway
characters.short_description: A grounded and observant moral compass who prefers to watch from the sidelines while navigating complex social circles.
characters.profile_text: You are the quintessential observer, often finding yourself caught between different worlds while maintaining a sense of detached integrity. People tend to trust you with their secrets because you are a good listener and slow to judge, though you are acutely aware of the flaws in those around you. You value honesty and tradition, yet you are frequently drawn into the chaotic lives of more flamboyant personalities. This duality can leave you feeling like both an insider and an outsider, struggling to reconcile your own values with the decadence you witness. Your strength lies in your self-awareness and reliability, but you must be careful not to let your passivity prevent you from taking a stand when it truly matters. You often find yourself acting as a bridge between conflicting parties, a role that provides you with a unique perspective but also carries a heavy emotional burden. Ultimately, your journey is one of disillusionment as you realize that the world is rarely as straightforward or honorable as you wish it to be.

characters.name: Daisy Buchanan
characters.short_description: A captivating and ethereal socialite whose charm masks a deep-seated cynicism and a desire for security.
characters.profile_text: You possess an irresistible allure and a voice that sounds like money, drawing people into your orbit with effortless grace. You are deeply sensitive to the beauty and luxury of your surroundings, often using them as a shield against the complexities of real emotion. While you are capable of great affection, your primary instinct is self-preservation, leading you to retreat into the safety of your social status when things become difficult. You often feel trapped by the expectations of your class and the choices you have made, resulting in a bittersweet outlook on life. Your charm is your greatest asset, but your tendency to avoid responsibility can leave a trail of heartbreak in your wake. You prefer the comfort of the known over the risks of a passionate but uncertain future, choosing stability even when it feels hollow. This internal conflict makes you a tragic figure, caught between the person you once were and the person the world demands you to be.

characters.name: Tom Buchanan
characters.short_description: A powerful and arrogant traditionalist who uses his wealth and physical presence to dominate his environment.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense strength and conviction, firmly rooted in the privileges of your upbringing and social standing. You value order and hierarchy, often viewing the world through a lens of dominance and entitlement. While you are fiercely protective of what you consider yours, your aggressive nature and lack of empathy can make you appear cold or even cruel to those who challenge your authority. You are not one for introspection, preferring to exert your will on the world rather than questioning your own motives or the consequences of your actions. Your confidence is undeniable, but your rigidity and hypocrisy often alienate those who might otherwise be your allies. You tend to use your wealth as a blunt instrument to solve problems, showing little regard for the emotional wreckage you leave behind. For you, life is a series of conquests and defenses, and you have little patience for those who do not share your hard-edged realism or your respect for established power structures.

characters.name: Jordan Baker
characters.short_description: A cool, cynical, and independent athlete who navigates high society with a practiced air of boredom.
characters.profile_text: You are modern, self-reliant, and fiercely competitive, preferring to keep your emotions tucked safely behind a mask of indifference. You have a sharp wit and a keen eye for the absurdities of the world around you, which allows you to move through elite circles without ever becoming truly vulnerable. You value your freedom and are not afraid to bend the rules to suit your needs, often prioritizing your own comfort and success over the feelings of others. This detachment serves as a defense mechanism, protecting you from the messy entanglements of deep emotional commitment. While your poise is impressive, your habit of keeping everyone at arm's length can lead to a sense of isolation. You are a master of the social game, knowing exactly when to speak and when to remain silent to maintain your aura of cool sophistication. However, your cynical outlook can prevent you from experiencing the genuine connections that make life meaningful, leaving you perpetually searching for the next distraction.

characters.name: Myrtle Wilson
characters.short_description: A vibrant and ambitious striver who yearns for a life of luxury and excitement far beyond her current circumstances.
characters.profile_text: You are filled with a restless energy and a desperate desire to escape the mundane realities of your everyday life. You possess a raw vitality that draws people to you, and you are not afraid to use your personality to climb the social ladder. You equate wealth and material possessions with happiness, often overlooking the moral costs of your pursuits in favor of the immediate thrill of high society. Your ambition is fueled by a deep-seated dissatisfaction with your lot in life, driving you to take risks that others might find reckless. While your spirit is indomitable, your focus on external validation and superficial status can lead you into dangerous situations where you are easily manipulated by those with more power. You are a striver who believes that a better life is just one lucky break away, but your lack of foresight often puts you at odds with the very world you wish to join. Your tragedy lies in your belief that you can buy your way into a class that will never truly accept you.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically view the past and its influence on your current life?

options.text: I believe I can recreate and perfect the past if I work hard enough.
I see it as a series of lessons that have left me somewhat disillusioned.
I try to escape it by surrounding myself with beauty and status.
I rely on my family's long-standing history and traditions for my identity.
I move forward with a cool indifference, rarely looking back.
I am desperate to leave my past behind for a more glamorous future.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when entering a social gathering?

options.text: To be the center of attention and impress a specific person.
To observe the behavior of others from a safe distance.
To feel secure and admired within my established social circle.
To assert my dominance and maintain my social standing.
To find a new distraction or competitive advantage.
To experience a lifestyle that feels more exciting than my own.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle moral dilemmas or the secrets of others?

options.text: I am willing to overlook them if they interfere with my grand vision.
I am a non-judgmental listener, though I find the lack of integrity exhausting.
I retreat into my own world to avoid dealing with the consequences.
I use information as a tool to protect my own interests and power.
I keep my distance and remain cynical about everyone's motives.
I am often too caught up in my own desires to notice the moral cost.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your relationship with wealth and material success?

options.text: It is a necessary tool to achieve a romantic or idealistic dream.
It is something I am around, but I value my internal principles more.
It is a shield that provides me with safety and comfort.
It is an inherent right that I use to control my environment.
It is a way to maintain my independence and social mobility.
It is the ultimate goal that signifies I have finally 'arrived'.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a difficult reality, what is your most likely reaction?

options.text: I double down on my hope and try to change the reality.
I reflect on it deeply and eventually walk away from the situation.
I become overwhelmed and seek protection in familiar places.
I lash out or use my influence to force the situation to my will.
I maintain a mask of boredom to hide any emotional impact.
I act impulsively in an attempt to escape the discomfort.

topics.display_name: Which Street Fighter Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Street Fighter Legend Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you a disciplined martial artist seeking the ultimate challenge, or a high-kicking Interpol agent with a score to settle? From the streets of Japan to the secret bases of Shadaloo, your fighting style says everything about your personality. Take this quiz to discover which legendary world warrior matches your spirit and prepare to enter the ring!

characters.name: Ryu
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined wanderer dedicated to the pursuit of martial arts perfection.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense focus and humility, viewing life as an endless journey of self-improvement rather than a series of destinations. You tend to be quiet and introspective, often preferring the solitude of the road to the distractions of fame or fortune. Your greatest strength lies in your unwavering resolve and your ability to remain calm under pressure, channeling your inner energy into everything you do. However, your intense dedication can sometimes make you appear distant or overly serious to those around you. You struggle with the internal battle between your discipline and the darker impulses that come with great power. By seeking balance and staying true to your path, you inspire others through your actions rather than your words. You value simplicity and the raw honesty of a fair challenge above all else.

characters.name: Chun-Li
characters.short_description: You are a principled investigator who balances a strong sense of justice with incredible physical grace.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp mind and a fierce heart, driven by a deep-seated need to protect the innocent and uphold the law. Your approach to life is methodical and disciplined, yet you retain a vibrant spirit that allows you to connect with people from all walks of life. You are known for your incredible speed and agility, both in your physical movements and your decision-making processes. While your commitment to duty is your greatest asset, it can also lead you to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, making it difficult for you to relax or prioritize your own needs. You are a natural leader who leads by example, showing that strength and compassion are not mutually exclusive. Your journey is often fueled by a desire to right past wrongs, but you never lose sight of the beauty in the present moment.

characters.name: Ken
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and flashy competitor who values family and friendship as much as victory.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, bringing a sense of style and excitement to every situation you encounter. Unlike those who seek solitude, you thrive in the spotlight and enjoy the rewards of your hard work, whether that means financial success or the admiration of your peers. Your confidence is infectious, and you have a natural talent for turning any obstacle into an opportunity for a spectacular comeback. Despite your outward bravado, you are deeply loyal to your loved ones and will go to any lengths to support your friends and family. Your main challenge is managing your ego, as your desire to show off can sometimes lead to reckless decisions or overconfidence. You balance your competitive fire with a warm heart, proving that one can be both a fierce rival and a devoted companion. You live life at full speed, always looking for the next big thrill.

characters.name: Guile
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and tactical professional defined by your unwavering loyalty and sense of duty.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words and many actions, characterized by a rigid sense of discipline and a tactical mindset. You approach every challenge with a clear plan, preferring stability and defense over reckless aggression. Your loyalty to your comrades and your country is the foundation of your identity, and you are willing to make significant personal sacrifices for the greater good. This sense of duty makes you a reliable and formidable presence, but it can also make you appear cold or unapproachable to those who do not know you well. You often struggle to separate your professional responsibilities from your personal life, leading to a constant internal tension between your mission and your family. Your strength comes from your patience and your ability to wait for the perfect moment to strike. You are the rock that others lean on when things get tough, providing a sense of security through your sheer presence.

characters.name: Zangief
characters.short_description: You are a boisterous and powerful individual who takes immense pride in your physical strength and your heritage.
characters.profile_text: You are a larger-than-life personality who believes that there is no problem that cannot be solved with a bit of muscle and a lot of heart. Your enthusiasm is boundless, and you take great joy in demonstrating your physical prowess to the world. You are fiercely patriotic and deeply connected to your roots, often acting as a symbol of strength for your community. While your physical power is undeniable, your true strength lies in your indomitable spirit and your refusal to back down from any challenge, no matter how daunting it may seem. Your straightforward nature is refreshing, but it can sometimes lead you to overlook the nuances of a situation, favoring a direct approach where a more subtle one might be required. You are a warm and generous friend who values camaraderie and the thrill of a good-natured struggle. To you, life is a grand arena where every encounter is a chance to prove your mettle and celebrate the human spirit.

characters.name: Dhalsim
characters.short_description: You are a wise and compassionate soul who uses your unique abilities to provide for others and seek spiritual enlightenment.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of profound depth and tranquility, guided by a spiritual philosophy that emphasizes peace and self-control. Your perspective on life is unconventional, allowing you to see solutions and possibilities that others might miss. You are deeply altruistic, often using your talents and resources to help those in need, even if it requires you to step outside your comfort zone. Your greatest strength is your mental fortitude and your ability to remain detached from the chaos of the material world. However, this detachment can sometimes make you seem enigmatic or difficult to relate to for those who are more grounded in everyday concerns. You strive for a balance between your spiritual goals and your earthly responsibilities, showing that true power comes from within. Your calm demeanor and insightful nature make you a natural teacher and a source of wisdom for those seeking a higher path. You believe in the interconnectedness of all things and act with a sense of universal responsibility.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when facing a significant challenge?

options.text: To test my personal limits and achieve mastery.
To ensure justice is served and the innocent are protected.
To prove I am the best and enjoy the thrill of the win.
To fulfill my duty and protect those I am loyal to.
To demonstrate my strength and inspire my community.
To maintain inner balance and help others find their path.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically prefer to spend your free time?

options.text: Traveling alone to gain new experiences and perspectives.
Staying active and keeping my skills sharp for my career.
Socializing with friends and enjoying a high-energy lifestyle.
Spending quiet, quality time with my family or close circle.
Engaging in boisterous activities that celebrate my heritage.
Meditating or engaging in spiritual reflection.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which trait do you value most in yourself and others?

options.text: Unwavering discipline and focus.
A strong sense of integrity and grace.
Confidence and infectious charisma.
Reliability and a tactical mindset.
Indomitable spirit and physical power.
Wisdom and a calm, peaceful nature.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred strategy when navigating a conflict?

options.text: Focusing on self-improvement and adapting to the situation.
Using speed and methodical logic to find a solution.
Taking bold risks to make a spectacular impact.
Staying patient and waiting for the perfect moment to act.
Taking a direct, powerful approach to resolve things quickly.
Using unconventional thinking to avoid unnecessary struggle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you want to be remembered by those around you?

options.text: As a dedicated wanderer who stayed true to their path.
As a principled leader who fought for what was right.
As a loyal friend who lived life to the fullest.
As a stoic professional who never abandoned their post.
As a warm-hearted champion of the people.
As a wise teacher who sought universal harmony.

topics.display_name: Which Classic Horror Villain Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Horror Villain Matches Your Darkest Personality Traits?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered why you prefer the shadows or why you're always the one with a plan? Your quirks might actually align with the most terrifying legends of the silver screen. Take this quiz to find out if you're a silent stalker, a dream-weaving nightmare, or a sophisticated cannibal. It's time to embrace your inner monster and see which slasher or supernatural entity truly represents you.

characters.name: Freddy Krueger
characters.short_description: You are a creative and sadistic mastermind who strikes when others are at their most vulnerable.
characters.profile_text: You possess a dark sense of humor and a flair for the dramatic, preferring to turn your targets' own fears and subconscious thoughts against them. Your strength lies in your imagination and your ability to manipulate reality, ensuring that no one can truly escape your influence once you have set your sights on them. You thrive on the psychological impact of your actions, finding joy in the spectacle of the chase and the cleverness of your traps. However, your arrogance and need for an audience can sometimes be your downfall. You may become so focused on the performance that you overlook simple vulnerabilities, or your desire for notoriety might lead you to take unnecessary risks. While you are undeniably powerful in your own domain, you must learn to manage your ego to maintain your control over the waking world.

characters.name: Michael Myers
characters.short_description: You are an unstoppable, silent force of nature characterized by your relentless persistence and lack of emotion.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a singular, unwavering focus that others find both impressive and deeply unsettling. You do not require complex plans or grand speeches; instead, you rely on your sheer physical presence and an indomitable will to achieve your goals. Your silence is your greatest tool, allowing you to observe from the shadows and strike with calculated precision when the moment is right. You are the embodiment of patience, willing to wait years for the perfect opportunity to return to your roots. Your primary pitfall is your lack of flexibility and total detachment from the human experience. Because you operate on a level that ignores social norms and emotional logic, you can be predictable in your obsession. You rarely adapt your methods, trusting that your brute force and endurance will eventually overcome any obstacle, which may leave you vulnerable to those who can think outside the box.

characters.name: Jason Voorhees
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely protective and resilient individual driven by a deep-seated sense of duty and past trauma.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your incredible physical durability and your unwavering loyalty to the memory of those you have lost. You tend to keep to yourself, preferring the solitude of your own territory where you can enforce your own set of rules. When provoked, you respond with overwhelming strength, acting as a guardian of your domain who shows no mercy to those you perceive as intruders or threats. Your actions are often a direct reaction to perceived injustices, making you a tragic figure of sorts. Your main weakness is your single-mindedness and your susceptibility to emotional manipulation regarding your past. You are easily lured into traps if they appeal to your sense of family or your history, and your lack of verbal communication can lead to misunderstandings. While you are nearly impossible to stop physically, your internal world is governed by a rigid, almost childlike sense of morality that can be exploited by a clever adversary.

characters.name: Hannibal Lecter
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and highly intelligent intellectual who values etiquette and refinement above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess an analytical mind that is always several steps ahead of everyone else in the room. You appreciate the finer things in life, from classical music to gourmet cuisine, and you expect a certain level of decorum from those you interact with. Your charm and wit are your primary weapons, allowing you to dismantle an opponent's psyche with a few well-placed words before they even realize they are in danger. You find human behavior fascinating and enjoy playing the role of the mentor or the observer. Your greatest strength is your self-control and your ability to remain calm under extreme pressure. However, your elitism and disdain for the rude can make you appear cold and inaccessible. You may find it difficult to form genuine connections because you are always looking for flaws or patterns to exploit. Your confidence in your own superiority is well-earned, but it can lead to a dangerous sense of invincibility that ignores the unpredictability of those you consider beneath you.

characters.name: Dracula
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and ancient aristocrat who commands respect through your noble bearing and supernatural allure.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with a timeless elegance that draws people toward you, even when they sense the danger beneath your polished exterior. You are a master of seduction and tradition, utilizing your vast resources and centuries of experience to maintain your position of power. You value loyalty and legacy, often seeking to bring others into your inner circle to share in your eternal vision. Your strengths lie in your strategic mind and your ability to command the environment around you, turning even the elements to your advantage. Despite your many powers, you are bound by strict rules and traditions that can be your undoing. You are often stuck in the past, struggling to adapt to modern innovations or changing social landscapes. Your reliance on your established methods and your specific vulnerabilities—both physical and symbolic—means that those who study your history can find ways to thwart your grand designs. You must learn to embrace change if you wish to remain the master of your domain.

characters.name: Norman Bates
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive and unassuming individual whose complex inner life is shaped by intense personal relationships.
characters.profile_text: You often appear shy and helpful to those around you, projecting an image of innocence that masks a deeply fractured and complicated psyche. You are deeply devoted to your home and your family, often going to extreme lengths to protect the secrets of your private life. Your empathy is a double-edged sword; while it allows you to connect with others on a surface level, it also makes you vulnerable to the overwhelming influence of stronger personalities in your life. You struggle with your identity, often feeling pulled between who you are and who others expect you to be. Your primary pitfall is your tendency to retreat into a fantasy world when reality becomes too difficult to handle. This dissociation can lead to impulsive actions that you may not even fully remember or understand. Because you are so focused on maintaining a facade of normalcy, you often neglect your own mental well-being, allowing internal pressures to build until they reach a breaking point. You need to find a way to reconcile your different facets before they consume you entirely.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a problem, what is your primary method for resolving it?

options.text: I use my intellect and charm to manipulate the situation to my advantage.
I apply direct, overwhelming force until the obstacle is removed.
I wait patiently in the background for the perfect moment to act.
I use my imagination to create a complex, psychological solution.
I rely on established traditions and my personal authority to command a result.
I try to be helpful and unassuming, hoping the problem resolves itself quietly.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would you describe your ideal social environment?

options.text: A high-society gathering with fine dining and intellectual conversation.
Total solitude in a place I know perfectly and can defend.
An elegant, private estate where I am the undisputed host.
I prefer to be the center of attention, even if it's in someone's nightmares.
A quiet, domestic setting where I can tend to my family and home.
I don't seek social interaction; I prefer to observe from a distance.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal strength when facing an adversary?

options.text: My absolute lack of emotion and relentless persistence.
My ability to identify and exploit the psychological weaknesses of others.
My physical durability and protective instincts for what I love.
My sophisticated wit and ability to stay calm under pressure.
My ancient wisdom and magnetic, commanding presence.
My ability to hide my true nature behind a mask of innocence.

baseline_questions.question_text: What motivates your actions most deeply?

options.text: A desire for creative expression and the thrill of the chase.
A singular, obsessive focus on a specific goal or person.
A sense of duty to avenge past traumas or protect my territory.
A commitment to refined tastes and the pursuit of excellence.
The preservation of my legacy and the maintenance of my power.
The need to please an influential figure in my life, even if they are gone.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle your own vulnerabilities or secrets?

options.text: I hide them behind a polite, helpful exterior to avoid suspicion.
I don't have vulnerabilities; I am an unstoppable force.
I protect them with extreme violence against any intruders.
I use them as a performance, turning my inner world into a spectacle.
I manage them through strict self-control and intellectual detachment.
I rely on my status and ancient rules to keep others at a distance.

topics.display_name: Which Modern Pop Diva Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Main Pop Girlie Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the mastermind behind a record-breaking world tour or the experimental queen of the avant-garde? From chart-topping heartbreak ballads to viral dance-pop anthems, your personality matches one of the icons defining the music industry today. Take this quiz to find out if you're a shimmering starlet, a powerhouse legend, or a genre-bending rebel.

characters.name: Taylor Swift
characters.short_description: You are a master storyteller who turns personal experiences into universal anthems through meticulous planning and lyrical depth.
characters.profile_text: You possess an incredible ability to weave narratives that resonate with millions, often using your own life as the primary source material. Your strength lies in your attention to detail and your strategic mind, which allows you to build entire worlds around your creative projects. You are likely the person in your friend group who remembers every birthday and plans the most elaborate surprises, driven by a deep sense of loyalty and a desire to be understood. However, your tendency to overanalyze every interaction can sometimes lead to unnecessary stress or a preoccupation with how others perceive your public image. You value hard work and resilience, often turning setbacks into fuel for your next big triumph. While you are generally warm and inviting, you have a sharp memory for those who have crossed you, and you aren't afraid to stand up for yourself when it matters most.

characters.name: Beyoncé
characters.short_description: You are a powerhouse of discipline and excellence, commanding respect through your unparalleled work ethic and visionary artistry.
characters.profile_text: You represent the pinnacle of professionalism and artistic control, rarely settling for anything less than perfection in your endeavors. You move through the world with a quiet confidence, preferring to let your results speak for themselves rather than seeking constant validation. Your strengths include an ironclad will and the ability to inspire those around you to reach their highest potential. You likely maintain a tight-knit inner circle and value privacy, understanding that true power often lies in what you choose not to reveal. On the flip side, your high standards can sometimes make you appear distant or unapproachable to those who don't know you well. You may struggle to turn off your boss mode, finding it difficult to relax when there is still work to be done or a legacy to be built. You are a natural leader who thrives under pressure, turning every challenge into a masterclass in grace and grit.

characters.name: Ariana Grande
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and vocally gifted individual who balances a playful, high-fashion aesthetic with deep emotional resilience.
characters.profile_text: You have a magnetic personality that draws people in, often masking a profound inner strength with a lighthearted and stylish exterior. You are known for your quick wit and your ability to find beauty in the midst of chaos, showing a remarkable capacity to heal and grow from difficult experiences. Your preferences likely lean toward the aesthetic and the sensory, enjoying the finer things in life while remaining deeply connected to your emotional core. You are a loyal friend who values harmony, but you aren't afraid to assert your independence when your boundaries are tested. Your pitfall might be a tendency to hide your true feelings behind a polished facade, making it hard for others to see when you are actually struggling. You thrive when you are allowed to express your creativity freely, often using your voice to advocate for kindness and self-love. You are a blend of sweetness and sophistication, always evolving and refining your craft.

characters.name: Dua Lipa
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and energetic trendsetter who thrives on the dance floor and values a global, adventurous lifestyle.
characters.profile_text: You embody a modern sense of cool, characterized by your confidence, independence, and love for vibrant social experiences. You are likely the life of the party, possessing an infectious energy that makes people want to follow your lead. Your strengths include your adaptability and your keen eye for what is next, whether in fashion, music, or culture. You approach life with a work hard, play hard mentality, ensuring that your professional successes are balanced by plenty of travel and exploration. However, your focus on the new and next can sometimes make you seem restless or less inclined to sit with deeper, more uncomfortable emotions. You value your freedom above all else and are quick to walk away from situations that feel stagnant or restrictive. You are a master of the cool girl vibe, blending effortless style with a grounded, hardworking attitude that ensures you stay at the top of your game.

characters.name: Billie Eilish
characters.short_description: You are an introspective and genre-defying soul who isn't afraid to explore the darker, more honest corners of the human experience.
characters.profile_text: You march to the beat of your own drum, often rejecting traditional norms in favor of something more authentic and raw. You possess a deep sensitivity and an old-soul perspective that allows you to connect with others on a visceral level. Your strengths lie in your honesty and your willingness to be vulnerable, which often makes you a voice for those who feel misunderstood. You likely prefer intimate settings over large crowds and value deep, meaningful conversations over small talk. Your pitfall might be a tendency toward melancholy or a feeling of being overwhelmed by the weight of your own emotions and the expectations of the world. You are fiercely protective of your creative vision and your personal identity, often using your platform to challenge status quos. Despite your massive influence, you remain remarkably grounded, prioritizing your mental health and your connection to your family above the glitz and glamour of fame.

characters.name: Olivia Rodrigo
characters.short_description: You are a relatable and emotionally expressive talent who captures the intensity of youth and the sting of heartbreak with poetic precision.
characters.profile_text: You are deeply in touch with your feelings, possessing a rare ability to articulate the messy, complicated emotions that others might try to suppress. You are likely seen as the relatable one in your circle, someone who isn't afraid to admit when they are hurting or feeling insecure. Your strengths include your songwriting-like approach to life and your ability to turn personal pain into something beautiful and cathartic. You value authenticity and are often drawn to nostalgic aesthetics that remind you of a simpler time. However, your intense focus on your emotional world can sometimes lead to a bit of teenage-style angst or a tendency to dwell on past grievances longer than necessary. You are still discovering who you are, and you embrace that journey with a mix of curiosity and raw honesty. You are a voice for a generation, proving that being too much is actually your greatest superpower.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are working toward a major goal, what is your primary operating style?

options.text: Meticulous planning and building a detailed narrative around my work.
Unwavering discipline and a commitment to absolute perfection.
Balancing a high-fashion aesthetic with a playful, creative energy.
Maintaining a high-energy, 'work hard, play hard' momentum.
Prioritizing raw honesty and staying true to my unique, non-conformist vision.
Using my personal experiences to create something relatable and emotionally intense.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically navigate your social life and inner circle?

options.text: I am the loyal friend who remembers every detail and plans the big surprises.
I keep a very tight-knit, private circle and lead with quiet confidence.
I am magnetic and witty, often using humor to maintain harmony.
I am a social trendsetter who loves vibrant parties and global adventures.
I prefer intimate settings and deep, meaningful conversations over large crowds.
I am an open book, sharing my feelings authentically with those around me.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your immediate reaction when someone treats you unfairly or crosses a boundary?

options.text: I remember everything and eventually turn the experience into a powerful story.
I maintain my grace and let my continued success be my ultimate response.
I assert my independence while trying to find a path back to self-love.
I quickly walk away from the situation to protect my freedom and energy.
I sit with the vulnerability of the moment and express my honest hurt.
I lean into the intensity of the emotion and aren't afraid to be 'too much'.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which aesthetic best describes your personal style and environment?

options.text: Classic, symbolic, and filled with hidden meanings or 'easter eggs'.
Regal, professional, and impeccably polished.
Sweet, sophisticated, and high-fashion.
Modern, vibrant, and effortlessly cool.
Dark, oversized, and intentionally unconventional.
Nostalgic, messy, and youthfully expressive.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your core motivation for being creative or productive?

options.text: To be understood and to connect through shared storytelling.
To achieve mastery and leave a legacy of excellence.
To find beauty in chaos and advocate for kindness.
To explore the world and experience the thrill of the new.
To challenge the status quo and speak for the misunderstood.
To validate the complicated feelings of growing up and moving on.

topics.display_name: Which Soccer Position Fits Your Personality?

synopsis.title: Which Soccer Position Actually Matches Your Personality?
synopsis.summary: Are you the fearless leader who commands the backline or the flashy superstar who lives for the spotlight? Soccer is more than just a game; it is a reflection of how you handle pressure, teamwork, and glory. Take this quiz to find out if you are a brick-wall goalkeeper, a creative playmaker, or a clinical finisher.

characters.name: Goalkeeper
characters.short_description: You are the last line of defense, possessing the mental fortitude and reflexes to thrive under immense pressure.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural leader who isn't afraid to stand alone when the stakes are highest. Your personality is defined by a unique blend of intense focus and vocal authority, as you see the entire field and guide your teammates through the chaos. While others might shrink from the spotlight of a critical mistake, you embrace the responsibility, knowing that your split-second decisions can change the course of an entire match. You value stability and possess a thick skin that allows you to move past errors quickly. Your primary strength lies in your courage and your ability to remain calm while everyone else is panicking. However, your independent streak can sometimes make you feel isolated from the group, and your blunt communication style might be perceived as harsh by more sensitive teammates. You prefer roles where you have a clear, singular objective and the autonomy to command your space.

characters.name: Center-Back
characters.short_description: You are the reliable anchor of the team, prioritizing structure, discipline, and the collective safety of the group.
characters.profile_text: You are the person everyone looks to when things get messy, providing a sense of order and physical presence that keeps the team grounded. Your personality is rooted in selflessness and a deep sense of duty; you find more satisfaction in a perfectly timed intervention than in personal glory. You are a master of anticipation, always thinking two steps ahead to neutralize threats before they become emergencies. You value consistency and have little patience for those who take unnecessary risks that jeopardize the team's foundation. Your strengths are your unwavering loyalty and your ability to organize complex situations into manageable tasks. On the downside, your commitment to the rules and traditional methods can sometimes make you appear rigid or resistant to creative changes. You thrive in environments where clear hierarchies exist and where your protective instincts can be put to good use for the benefit of the whole organization.

characters.name: Central Midfielder
characters.short_description: You are the engine and the architect of the team, balancing offensive vision with defensive grit to control the tempo of the game.
characters.profile_text: You possess a versatile and tireless personality, comfortable acting as both a facilitator and a protector depending on what the moment requires. You are the ultimate connector, bridging the gap between different departments and ensuring that communication flows smoothly across the entire field. Your intelligence is your greatest asset, allowing you to read the rhythm of a situation and adjust your approach to maintain balance. You don't need to be the loudest person in the room to be the most influential, as your work rate and tactical awareness speak for themselves. You are highly adaptable and enjoy being involved in every phase of a project, finding fulfillment in the process rather than just the final result. However, your desire to be everywhere at once can lead to burnout if you don't learn to delegate or pace yourself. You might also struggle with perfectionism, as you feel responsible for the overall flow and success of the entire operation.

characters.name: Winger
characters.short_description: You are a creative spark and a risk-taker, using your speed and flair to break down barriers and provide moments of inspiration.
characters.profile_text: You are an expressive and energetic individual who thrives on the edges of the action, waiting for the perfect moment to explode into a sprint. Your personality is characterized by a love for freedom and a desire to challenge the status quo through unconventional methods. You aren't afraid to fail in front of a crowd because you know that one successful breakthrough can outweigh a dozen unsuccessful attempts. You value agility, both physical and mental, and you are often the one who provides the unique factor that turns a stalemate into a victory. Your strengths lie in your ability to improvise and your infectious enthusiasm for the game. However, your reliance on inspiration can make you a streaky performer, leading to periods of frustration when your creative well runs dry. You may also find the repetitive, defensive aspects of a role tedious, preferring to focus your energy on the exciting, high-reward tasks that allow you to showcase your unique talents.

characters.name: Striker
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate finisher, driven by a singular focus on achieving goals and the confidence to take the decisive shot.
characters.profile_text: You possess a high-octane personality defined by ambition and an unwavering belief in your own abilities. You live for the big moments and are perfectly comfortable carrying the weight of the team's expectations on your shoulders. While others might be content with a supporting role, you are motivated by the tangible results of your labor—the goals, the wins, and the accolades. You have a short memory for failure, which allows you to stay aggressive even after a series of misses, always believing that the next opportunity will be the one that counts. Your primary strengths are your decisiveness and your ability to find openings where others see only obstacles. This intense focus on the end goal can sometimes make you appear selfish or disconnected from the defensive needs of the group. You may struggle in environments that require long periods of patient buildup without immediate rewards, as your spirit craves the adrenaline rush of a successful conclusion.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a high-stakes deadline is approaching and the team begins to panic, what is your natural reaction?

options.text: I take vocal command of the situation and direct others to their stations.
I focus on maintaining order and ensuring no further errors occur.
I look for a bold, unconventional move that could solve the problem instantly.
I work tirelessly to bridge the gaps between different team members.
I block out the noise and focus solely on delivering the final result.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward in a collaborative group project?

options.text: The specialist who handles the most critical, high-pressure task alone.
The reliable anchor who ensures the foundation and rules are respected.
The versatile coordinator who keeps the workflow moving between all parties.
The creative spark who provides the unique flair that sets the project apart.
The ambitious closer who steps in to finalize the deal and claim the win.

baseline_questions.question_text: What provides you with the most internal satisfaction after completing a difficult task?

options.text: The feeling of being the 'engine' that made the entire operation possible.
Knowing I was the hero who made the most visible and decisive impact.
The pride of having stood firm and remained unshakeable under fire.
The quiet realization that I prevented a disaster before it could happen.
The joy of having expressed my personal style through my work.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to a personal failure or a significant mistake?

options.text: I develop a thick skin and immediately focus on the very next challenge.
I analyze the system to ensure the same structural error never repeats.
I feel a deep responsibility to work twice as hard to restore the balance.
I shrug it off as a necessary risk in the pursuit of something great.
I move on instantly, confident that my next attempt will be a success.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your peers most likely describe your primary communication style?

options.text: Direct, authoritative, and unafraid to be blunt when necessary.
Observant and disciplined, speaking only to provide structure or warnings.
Diplomatic and constant, always checking in to keep everyone connected.
Enthusiastic and expressive, though sometimes focused on my own vision.
Confident and goal-oriented, focusing mainly on the final objective.

topics.display_name: Which Egyptian Deity Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Ancient Egyptian Deity Is Actually Your Divine Alter Ego?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you have a hidden power waiting to be unleashed from the sands of time? Whether you are a natural-born leader or a mysterious protector of the night, the gods of the Nile have a place for you. Take this quiz to discover which legendary figure from the Egyptian pantheon matches your modern-day personality and find out if you are ruling the sun or weighing hearts in the underworld.

characters.name: Ra
characters.short_description: You are the radiant source of life and authority, leading with unwavering confidence and solar energy.
characters.profile_text: You possess a natural charisma that draws others toward your warmth, positioning you as a central figure in any social or professional circle. Like the sun crossing the sky, you value consistency and the power of renewal, believing that every dawn offers a fresh start to conquer challenges. Your leadership style is bold and direct, often inspiring those around you to reach their full potential through your sheer force of will and optimism. You are at your best when you are initiating new projects and shining a light on the path forward for others to follow. However, your intense focus on the big picture can sometimes lead you to overlook the subtle needs of individuals. You may struggle with a sense of pride that makes it difficult to accept criticism or acknowledge when your influence is waning. Balancing your drive for dominance with a willingness to listen will ensure your reign remains both bright and sustainable for the long term.

characters.name: Isis
characters.short_description: You are a master of magic and devotion, blending deep intuition with a fierce protective instinct for those you love.
characters.profile_text: You embody the archetype of the nurturer and the strategist, using your sharp intellect and emotional depth to navigate complex situations. Your loyalty is legendary, and you are often the glue that holds your family or community together during times of crisis. You have a unique ability to see the hidden potential in people and situations, often working behind the scenes to manifest positive outcomes through sheer persistence and cleverness. Your strength lies in your resilience and your capacity for unconditional love, making you a formidable ally and a compassionate guide. On the flip side, your intense devotion can sometimes border on possessiveness or a refusal to let go of the past. You might find yourself taking on too much emotional labor for others, risking burnout in your quest to heal and protect everyone in your orbit. Learning to set healthy boundaries is essential for maintaining your own magical spark while you care for the world around you.

characters.name: Osiris
characters.short_description: You are the steady guardian of tradition and transformation, finding strength in order and the cycles of life.
characters.profile_text: You represent the quiet power of endurance and the wisdom that comes from experiencing both highs and lows. You are likely someone who values structure, justice, and the legacy you leave behind, often acting as a stabilizing force in chaotic environments. Your calm demeanor and sense of fairness make you a natural judge and mentor, as you understand that growth often requires a period of introspection and shedding the old. You are not afraid of change, seeing it as a necessary step toward rebirth and improvement. You find comfort in the familiar and the established, yet you possess the depth to handle profound transitions. However, your commitment to tradition and the way things should be can occasionally make you appear rigid or overly formal. You might struggle with a tendency to dwell on past injustices or become stuck in a state of mourning for what has been lost. Embracing the spontaneity of the present moment will help you balance your deep connection to the eternal with the vibrancy of the now.

characters.name: Anubis
characters.short_description: You are the discerning guide of the soul, possessing a calm exterior and a profound understanding of life's mysteries.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of deep integrity and quiet observation, often finding yourself in roles that require discretion and careful judgment. You have a natural affinity for the in-between spaces of life, feeling comfortable with topics or situations that others might find intimidating or taboo. Your ability to remain objective and composed under pressure makes you an invaluable ally during transitions, as you help others navigate change with grace and dignity. You value truth above all else and have little patience for superficiality or deception, preferring to look straight into the heart of a matter. Your primary pitfall is a tendency toward isolation; your serious nature and preference for the shadows can make you seem unapproachable or detached to those who do not know you well. You may also find it difficult to let go of your high standards, leading to a critical inner voice that judges your own progress as harshly as you weigh the actions of others. Finding joy in the lighter side of life will help balance your solemn duties.

characters.name: Horus
characters.short_description: You are the courageous visionary and protector, driven by a strong sense of justice and the desire to overcome adversity.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born fighter with a clear vision for the future, often motivated by a desire to right wrongs and restore balance to your world. Your perspective is wide and far-reaching, allowing you to spot opportunities and threats long before they arrive on the horizon. You possess a youthful energy and a competitive spirit that pushes you to excel, even when the odds are stacked against you. Your bravery is not just physical but moral, as you are often the first to stand up for what is right in the face of opposition. You take your responsibilities seriously and feel a deep calling to protect those who cannot protect themselves. However, your intense focus on your goals can sometimes lead to impulsivity or a black and white view of the world. You may struggle with anger or a need for validation when you feel slighted, which can cloud your judgment and lead to unnecessary conflict. Cultivating patience and learning to see the nuance in every situation will help you become the wise leader you are destined to be.

characters.name: Thoth
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant architect of knowledge and communication, seeking truth through logic, writing, and objective analysis.
characters.profile_text: You are a seeker of wisdom who finds fulfillment in learning, organizing information, and solving complex puzzles. Your mind is your greatest tool, and you likely enjoy expressing yourself through writing, teaching, or creative problem-solving. You value precision and clarity, often acting as the voice of reason in heated debates or the record-keeper who ensures that important details are never lost. Your curiosity is boundless, and you are happiest when you are uncovering the underlying laws that govern the universe or your specific field of interest. You are the one people turn to when they need an unbiased opinion or a logical solution to a difficult problem. Your main challenge is a tendency to live too much in your head, potentially becoming detached from your emotions or the physical world around you. You might also struggle with perfectionism, spending so much time analyzing and refining your ideas that you hesitate to put them into action. Balancing your intellectual pursuits with physical activity and emotional connection will help you stay grounded while you reach for the stars.

topics.display_name: Which Stars Hollow Resident Are You?

synopsis.title: Grab A Coffee At Luke's: Which Stars Hollow Resident Are You?
synopsis.summary: Pack your bags and head to Connecticut for a town meeting you won't want to miss. Whether you're a fast-talking intellectual or a grumpy diner owner with a heart of gold, there's a place for you in this quirky community. Take this quiz to find out which iconic neighbor matches your personality perfectly.

characters.name: Lorelai Gilmore
characters.short_description: You are a quick-witted, coffee-fueled independent spirit who prioritizes humor and deep personal connections above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, even if that party is just a Tuesday morning at a diner. With a mind that moves at a mile a minute, you navigate life through a lens of pop culture references and sharp banter. You value your independence fiercely, having built a life on your own terms, and you possess a rare ability to turn even the most mundane situation into a whimsical adventure. Your charm is your greatest asset, allowing you to win over almost anyone, though your stubbornness can sometimes lead to self-sabotage when things get too serious. In relationships, you are intensely loyal and protective of your inner circle. You tend to mask your vulnerabilities with humor, which can occasionally make it difficult for others to see when you are truly struggling. While you thrive on spontaneity and junk food, your underlying drive and ambition have helped you achieve professional success. You are a master of reinvention, proving that one can be both a dedicated professional and a perpetual kid at heart.

characters.name: Luke Danes
characters.short_description: You are a reliable, salt-of-the-earth traditionalist who hides a heart of gold beneath a gruff, no-nonsense exterior.
characters.profile_text: You are the steady anchor in a world of chaos, preferring the comfort of a well-worn flannel and a consistent routine over flashy trends. While you might come across as cynical or grumpy to the casual observer, those who know you best understand that your actions speak much louder than your words. You express your affection through service—fixing a broken porch, cooking a favorite meal, or simply being the person who shows up when everyone else flakes out. You have little patience for nonsense or bureaucracy, valuing honesty and hard work above all else. Your biggest challenge is opening up emotionally, as you often keep your feelings guarded to protect yourself from disappointment. You tend to be a creature of habit, which can make you resistant to change even when it is for the better. However, your integrity is beyond reproach, and your moral compass never wavers. You are the person people turn to when they need a dose of reality or a shoulder to lean on, even if you complain about it the whole time.

characters.name: Rory Gilmore
characters.short_description: You are a studious, ambitious intellectual who finds solace in books and strives for excellence in every endeavor.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born scholar with a deep-seated love for learning and a quiet, observant nature. While others are out seeking the spotlight, you are often content to stay in the background, absorbing information and forming thoughtful opinions. You possess a strong sense of duty and a desire to please, which has led to a lifetime of academic and personal achievements. Your organized approach to life and your vast vocabulary make you a formidable communicator, though you can sometimes feel overwhelmed when things do not go exactly according to your carefully laid plans. Despite your composed exterior, you harbor big dreams and the work ethic to back them up. You value deep, intellectual connections and are a loyal friend who listens more than you speak. Your main struggle lies in dealing with failure or criticism, as you have high expectations for yourself that can be difficult to maintain. Learning to embrace the messiness of life is your greatest hurdle, but your resilience and curiosity ensure that you will always find your way back to your path.

characters.name: Sookie St. James
characters.short_description: You are a creative, enthusiastic culinary genius whose warmth and klutzy charm make everyone feel right at home.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and passion, particularly when it comes to your craft. Your creativity knows no bounds, and you are constantly experimenting with new ideas to bring joy to those around you. While you might be a bit accident-prone or scattered in your daily life, you are a perfectionist where it counts, possessing an incredible eye for detail and a commitment to quality. Your optimism is infectious, and you have a unique ability to see the best in people and situations, even when things are going wrong in the kitchen. You are the ultimate nurturer, always looking for ways to take care of your friends and family. Your heart is as big as your talent, and you often put the needs of others before your own. However, your intense focus on your passions can sometimes lead to burnout or a lack of balance. You thrive in collaborative environments where your ideas can flourish, and your presence acts as the glue that holds your community together through thick and thin.

characters.name: Kirk Gleason
characters.short_description: You are an eccentric, multi-talented individualist who isn't afraid to try every job and hobby under the sun.
characters.profile_text: You are truly one of a kind, possessing a quirky perspective on life that others often find baffling yet endearing. With a resume that spans dozens of industries, you are the ultimate jack of all trades, always willing to dive headfirst into a new venture regardless of your experience level. You approach every task with a surprising amount of earnestness and dedication, whether you are collecting rare stamps or performing experimental interpretive dance. Your social cues might be a bit off, but your intentions are almost always pure. You have a unique relationship with rules and authority, often following them to an absurd degree or creating your own logic to navigate the world. While you can be sensitive and prone to anxiety, your persistence is unmatched. You do not care much for societal norms, preferring to live life according to your own strange and wonderful rhythm. You are a reminder to everyone around you that it is okay to be different and that there is value in every small contribution, no matter how odd it may seem.

characters.name: Taylor Doose
characters.short_description: You are a civic-minded, detail-oriented leader who finds purpose in order, tradition, and community management.
characters.profile_text: You are the person who keeps the wheels of society turning, even if you have to ruffle a few feathers to do it. With a deep respect for rules, regulations, and historical precedents, you take great pride in maintaining the standards of your environment. You are a natural organizer who thrives on committees, town meetings, and public service, believing that a well-ordered community is a happy one. While some might see you as overbearing or pedantic, your dedication to the common good is undeniable, and you are often the only one willing to do the hard work of planning. Your greatest strength is your vision for what a community should be, though your rigid adherence to the law can sometimes blind you to the needs of individuals. You have a competitive streak and a desire for recognition, which can lead to power struggles with those who do not share your meticulous nature. Beneath the official exterior, you truly care about the place you call home and will go to great lengths to protect its charm and integrity. You are the guardian of tradition in an ever-changing world.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a conversation with a stranger?

options.text: I lead with jokes and pop culture references to break the ice.
I keep it brief and stick to the facts; I'm not big on small talk.
I listen more than I speak, observing and forming a thoughtful response.
I'm warm and bubbly, often sharing my excitement about a project.
I might say something slightly off-beat or share an unusual personal fact.
I take charge of the interaction to ensure everything remains polite and orderly.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your general stance on rules and regulations?

options.text: I prefer to follow my own path and value my independence above all.
I respect honesty and hard work, but I have no patience for bureaucracy.
I find comfort in structure and strive to meet high expectations.
I'm usually too focused on my creative passions to worry about the fine print.
I follow them to an absurdly literal degree, even if it seems strange to others.
I believe rules are the foundation of a functional community and must be enforced.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you have a completely free afternoon, what is your go-to activity?

options.text: A spontaneous adventure or a movie marathon with plenty of snacks.
Working on a practical project or enjoying a quiet, consistent routine.
Visiting a library or bookstore to dive into a new subject.
Experimenting with a new recipe or starting a hands-on artistic endeavor.
Picking up a temporary odd job or practicing a niche, eccentric hobby.
Attending a local meeting or organizing my personal files and schedule.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when a situation becomes chaotic or doesn't go to plan?

options.text: I use humor to mask my stress and quickly pivot to a new idea.
I grumble about the mess but quietly step up to fix whatever is broken.
I feel overwhelmed and try to research a logical way back to the right path.
I stay optimistic, even if I get a little scattered and clumsy in the process.
I persist with a strange kind of dedication until I find a workaround.
I immediately look for the person in charge or consult the official guidelines.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My quick wit and ability to build deep personal connections.
My reliability and unwavering moral compass.
My intellectual curiosity and drive for excellence.
My creative passion and nurturing spirit.
My unique perspective and willingness to try anything once.
My dedication to order and the well-being of my community.

topics.display_name: Which Sonic Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Sonic Character Are You? Speed Through This Quiz To Find Out!
synopsis.summary: Are you the fastest thing alive or a master of chaos? Whether you prefer collecting rings or guarding the Master Emerald, your personality matches one of Mobius's finest. Take this quiz to discover if you're a hero, a rival, or a genius mastermind!

characters.name: Sonic
characters.short_description: You are the world's fastest hedgehog, defined by your love for freedom and your restless spirit.
characters.profile_text: You live life in the fast lane, always seeking the next big adventure and never staying in one place for too long. Your optimism is infectious, and you have a natural talent for turning any dire situation into a thrilling challenge. While you value your independence above all else, you are fiercely loyal to your friends and will stop at nothing to protect the innocent from injustice. Your confidence is your greatest strength, allowing you to face even the most daunting foes with a smirk and a quip. However, your impatience can sometimes lead you to rush into things without a plan, and your dislike of being tied down might make it hard for you to handle slow-paced responsibilities. You thrive on momentum and the feeling of the wind in your quills, proving that as long as you keep moving forward, there is no obstacle you cannot overcome.

characters.name: Tails
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant mechanical prodigy who values friendship and innovation above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess an analytical mind and a heart of gold, often finding solutions to complex problems through your technical expertise and creativity. While you may have started out in the shadow of others, you have grown into a capable hero who relies on intelligence rather than raw power. You are the ultimate team player, always ready to support your companions with your inventions or a well-timed flight. Your humility is endearing, but it can occasionally manifest as a lack of self-confidence when things go wrong. You tend to overthink situations, which might cause you to hesitate in the heat of the moment. Despite this, your loyalty is unwavering, and you are constantly striving to prove that even the smallest person can make a massive difference. You find joy in the workshop and the thrill of discovery, making you an indispensable ally and a true friend.

characters.name: Knuckles
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and disciplined guardian who takes your responsibilities very seriously.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of duty and tradition, often preferring the solitude of your own thoughts to the chaos of the outside world. Your physical strength is unmatched, and you approach every challenge with a stoic determination that commands respect. You take pride in your role as a protector, and you are willing to sacrifice your own desires to ensure the safety of what you hold dear. This sense of honor makes you a reliable pillar for those around you, even if you are not the most talkative person in the room. Your straightforward nature is a virtue, but it can also make you somewhat gullible, as you often expect others to be as honest as you are. You might struggle with social nuances or find yourself easily frustrated by those who don't share your work ethic. Deep down, you possess a kind soul and a fierce sense of justice, proving that true strength comes from the heart as much as the fists.

characters.name: Shadow
characters.short_description: You are a complex and brooding individual who follows your own moral compass regardless of the cost.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate lifeform, a person shaped by a difficult past and a relentless drive to fulfill your promises. You often keep others at a distance, preferring to work alone and maintain an air of mystery. Your power is immense, and you use it with a cold, calculated precision that leaves no room for error. You do not care for fame or recognition; you only care about doing what you believe is right, even if it puts you at odds with the rest of the world. This independence is your shield, but it can also lead to a profound sense of isolation. You may struggle with letting go of old grudges or finding a place where you truly belong. Despite your prickly exterior, you have a deep capacity for compassion and a hidden desire to protect the world, even if you do so from the shadows. You are a force to be reckoned with, defined by your resilience and your unwavering focus.

characters.name: Amy Rose
characters.short_description: You are a cheerful and determined optimist who fights for love and the happiness of your friends.
characters.profile_text: You bring a burst of energy and color to every room you enter, fueled by an unshakable belief in the power of kindness. You are not just a dreamer; you are a woman of action who isn't afraid to swing a hammer to get things done. Your passion is your greatest motivator, driving you to chase after your goals with a persistence that others find both inspiring and a little bit intimidating. You have a natural ability to see the best in everyone, often acting as the emotional glue that keeps your social circle together. However, your intense focus on your desires can sometimes border on obsession, and you might overlook the practical details of a situation in favor of your romanticized ideals. You can be quite stubborn when you think you are right, which can lead to friction with those who don't share your enthusiasm. Ultimately, your heart is your compass, and your bravery ensures that you will always stand up for what you love.

characters.name: Dr. Eggman
characters.short_description: You are a flamboyant and highly intelligent mastermind with a grand vision for the future.
characters.profile_text: You possess a genius-level intellect and a flair for the dramatic, always dreaming up elaborate schemes to reshape the world according to your own design. Your confidence is boundless, and you take immense pride in your mechanical creations and your ability to outthink your opponents. You are a natural leader, albeit a demanding one, who expects nothing less than perfection from yourself and your subordinates. While your ambition is your primary driver, it is often fueled by a desire for recognition and a need to prove your superiority to everyone else. Your ego is your biggest pitfall, as it often causes you to underestimate your rivals or overlook small flaws in your otherwise brilliant plans. You might find it difficult to accept defeat, often bouncing back with an even more outrageous plot before the dust has even settled. Beneath the bluster and the villainy, there is a certain charm to your persistence and your unwavering belief in your own potential.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary approach to finding a solution?

options.text: I trust my instincts and act quickly to keep the momentum going.
I analyze the mechanics of the situation and invent a logical fix.
I rely on my discipline and physical strength to push through the obstacle.
I use calculated precision and my own moral compass to decide the best path.
I use my passion and persistence to rally others and find a way forward.
I design a grand, elaborate plan to bend the situation to my will.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave when working within a group or team?

options.text: I lead by example but prefer to keep moving rather than wait for consensus.
I am the ultimate support player, providing the tools and data the team needs.
I am the reliable protector who stays focused on the mission at hand.
I prefer to work alone and only intervene when it is absolutely necessary.
I am the emotional heart of the group, keeping everyone's spirits high.
I expect to be the mastermind in charge, directing others toward my vision.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal environment for spending a free afternoon?

options.text: Out in the open air, running toward a new and unknown destination.
In a quiet workshop or lab, tinkering with new ideas and gadgets.
In a peaceful, secluded spot where I can reflect and guard what matters.
In a high-vantage point or urban shadow, observing the world from a distance.
Anywhere vibrant and social, as long as I'm with the people I care about.
In a command center, overseeing a massive project of my own creation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you consider to be your greatest personal strength?

options.text: Unshakable optimism and a love for freedom.
Humility combined with a high level of technical intelligence.
Stoic determination and a deep sense of duty.
Resilience and the ability to stay focused under extreme pressure.
Bravery and the ability to see the best in every person.
Ambition and the confidence to dream on a massive scale.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when someone challenges your authority or your plans?

options.text: I shrug it off with a quip and keep doing things my own way.
I listen to their feedback and try to improve the plan together.
I stand my ground firmly, as I value tradition and honesty.
I ignore them; I only answer to my own internal sense of justice.
I get a bit stubborn but ultimately try to win them over with kindness.
I take it personally and immediately set out to prove my superiority.

topics.display_name: Which Roy Family Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The Roy Dynasty Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Do you have the killer instinct required to take over a global media empire, or are you just here for the park mascots and the panic attacks? It is time to find out if you are the eldest son, the corporate strategist, or the one who just wants a little bit of love and a lot of money. Grab a glass of expensive wine and prepare to betray your siblings in this ultimate personality test.

characters.name: Logan Roy
characters.short_description: You are the formidable patriarch who commands every room with a blend of ruthless pragmatism and a killer instinct.
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature, a self-made titan who views the world as a series of battles to be won through sheer willpower and strategic dominance. You have little patience for weakness or sentimentality, believing that power is not given but taken by those strong enough to hold it. Your presence is intimidating, and you possess an uncanny ability to sniff out vulnerability in others, using it to maintain your position at the top of the food chain. While your methods are often brutal, they are driven by a singular focus on legacy and the preservation of the empire you built from nothing. Your greatest strength is your unwavering resolve, but your refusal to truly trust anyone—even those closest to you—creates a solitary existence defined by constant vigilance. You value loyalty above all else, yet you are always prepared to cut ties if it serves the bottom line.

characters.name: Kendall Roy
characters.short_description: You are the ambitious but haunted heir apparent, constantly oscillating between visionary confidence and crushing insecurity.
characters.profile_text: You are a complex mix of corporate ambition and deep-seated emotional turmoil, always striving to prove you are the rightful successor to the throne. You possess a sharp mind for business and a desire to modernize the family legacy, yet you are often undermined by your own desperate need for validation and a tendency to spiral when things go wrong. You see yourself as a disruptor and a visionary, but you frequently find yourself trapped in a cycle of seeking approval from the very person you are trying to overthrow. Your journey is one of high stakes and public failures, fueled by a belief that you are the only one capable of leading the company into the future. While you are capable of moments of genuine brilliance and empathy, your internal conflicts often lead to self-sabotage.
