You are a number one boy who struggles to reconcile your desire for power with your need for a moral compass, often losing yourself in the process.

characters.name: Shiv Roy
characters.short_description: You are the sharp-witted and politically savvy strategist who prefers to pull the strings from the shadows while maintaining a facade of independence.
characters.profile_text: You are highly intelligent and possess a keen understanding of optics and power dynamics, often positioning yourself as the most rational person in the room. You pride yourself on your ability to navigate complex political landscapes and maintain a degree of separation from the family's more overt chaos. However, your desire for control and your fear of being sidelined often lead you to make calculated, sometimes cold-blooded decisions that prioritize your own standing over genuine connection. You are a master of the pivot, able to adapt your stance to suit the prevailing winds while keeping your true intentions hidden. Your strength lies in your analytical mind and your ability to see several moves ahead, but your reluctance to fully commit to a side can leave you isolated when the stakes are highest. You often struggle with the glass ceiling of the family business, resenting the traditionalism that keeps you from the top spot while simultaneously benefiting from the status it provides.

characters.name: Roman Roy
characters.short_description: You are the irreverent and unpredictable jester who uses humor and provocation to mask a deep-seated need for belonging and a surprising business intuition.
characters.profile_text: You are the family's wild card, known for your sharp tongue, inappropriate jokes, and a refusal to take anything—including yourself—too seriously. Beneath the layer of cynicism and performative cruelty, however, lies a person who is deeply attuned to the emotional undercurrents of the room and possesses a raw, if unconventional, instinct for deal-making. You thrive on chaos and use your wit as a shield to protect yourself from the vulnerability of actually caring about the outcome. While others see you as a liability, your ability to speak the uncomfortable truth and your lack of pretension often make you a more effective operator than you are given credit for. Your pitfalls include a tendency to fold under pressure and a reliance on shock value to get attention, which can alienate those who might otherwise be your allies. You are driven by a complicated mix of seeking your father's approval and a desire to burn the whole system down just to see what happens.

baseline_questions.question_text: When someone challenges your authority in a high-stakes meeting, what is your immediate internal response?

options.text: Pure, focused rage at their incompetence and a desire to crush them.
A surge of adrenaline mixed with a desperate need to prove I am the smartest person there.
A cold assessment of how this challenge affects my long-term leverage and optics.
An urge to make a sharp, inappropriate joke to deflect the tension.

baseline_questions.question_text: Whose approval do you find yourself seeking most often, even if you would never admit it publicly?

options.text: No one's; I am the one who sets the standard for everyone else.
A powerful parental figure whose validation feels like it would finally make me 'whole'.
My own; I need to be certain I have maintained my independence and edge.
Anyone who will give me a reaction, as long as I am not being ignored.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a sensitive secret that could potentially destroy a rival?

options.text: I use it as a blunt instrument the moment it serves my bottom line.
I agonize over the moral implications while secretly hoping it leaks to my advantage.
I store it away, waiting for the precise political moment to trade it for a promotion.
I drop hints about it just to watch people squirm and create a little chaos.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward when working within a high-pressure team?

options.text: The formidable leader who makes the brutal calls no one else can handle.
The ambitious visionary who wants to disrupt the status quo and modernize everything.
The savvy strategist who stays behind the scenes to avoid the direct line of fire.
The unpredictable wild card who uses humor to mask a surprising instinct for deals.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a major project you were responsible for fails publicly, what is your recovery strategy?

options.text: I find a scapegoat to fire and immediately pivot to a new offensive.
I spiral into self-doubt and look for a way to reinvent my entire persona.
I distance myself from the failure and rewrite the narrative to protect my reputation.
I lean into the disaster with irony, acting like the outcome doesn't matter to me.

topics.display_name: Which Studio Ghibli Heroine Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Studio Ghibli Heroine Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Step into a world of magic, wonder, and breathtaking landscapes to discover which iconic Ghibli protagonist mirrors your inner strength. Whether you are a brave forest protector, a determined young witch, or a resilient dreamer, your choices will reveal your true animated counterpart. Embark on this whimsical journey and find out where your heart truly belongs in the Ghibli universe.

characters.name: Chihiro
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and adaptable soul who discovers hidden inner strength when thrust into unfamiliar and challenging environments.
characters.profile_text:
You may start off feeling a bit overwhelmed or even hesitant when faced with sudden change, but your journey is one of profound growth and maturation. You possess a deep-seated integrity and a kind heart that allows you to see the humanity in everyone, even those who seem frightening or monstrous at first glance. Your greatest strength lies in your ability to remember who you are and what truly matters, even when the world around you is trying to strip away your identity. You are a person who values sincerity and hard work, often finding that your quiet persistence earns you the respect of those around you.

In social situations, you might be cautious initially, but your loyalty to those you care about is unwavering. You are willing to face your fears head-on to protect your loved ones, proving that even the most ordinary person can achieve extraordinary things through perseverance and empathy. However, your tendency to be easily intimidated can sometimes hold you back until you find your footing. Once you commit to a path, your determination is unstoppable, and you find that the challenges you once feared have become the foundation of your newfound confidence.

characters.name: Kiki
characters.short_description: You are an independent and creative spirit striving to find your place in the world while balancing tradition with your own unique talents.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by your adventurous nature and your desire to prove your worth through dedication and service. Leaving the comfort of home to start anew is a challenge you embrace, even if it comes with moments of self-doubt and loneliness. You value your independence highly and take great pride in your skills, but you also understand the importance of community and the support of friends. Your journey is often about rediscovering your passion when the weight of expectations or burnout begins to dim your inner light. You are a dreamer who is also grounded in the reality of hard work.

Your pitfalls often involve overthinking your failures or comparing yourself to others, which can lead to a temporary loss of confidence. You might struggle when your natural talents do not come as easily as they once did, requiring you to look inward for inspiration rather than relying on external validation. Despite these hurdles, your resilience and willingness to help others ensure that you eventually find your rhythm again. You thrive when you allow yourself to be vulnerable and accept that growth is a non-linear process filled with both flight and falls, ultimately finding a home within yourself.

characters.name: San
characters.short_description: You are a fierce and protective guardian of the natural world, driven by a deep sense of justice and a refusal to compromise your values.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an untamed spirit and a powerful connection to the environment, often feeling more at home in the wild than in civilization. Your loyalty to your family and your cause is absolute, and you are not afraid to stand up against overwhelming odds to defend what you believe is right. You are a person of action, preferring direct confrontation and physical prowess over diplomacy or subtlety. Your intensity is your greatest asset, fueling your courage and making you a formidable force to be reckoned with. You live by a strict moral code and have little patience for those who exploit the world for selfish gain.

However, your fierce exterior can sometimes mask a deep-seated pain or a struggle to reconcile different parts of your identity. You may find it difficult to trust others, especially those who represent the forces you oppose, leading to a black-and-white view of the world. Learning to find balance between your righteous anger and the possibility of peace is your greatest challenge. While you are often seen as a warrior, your capacity for love and connection remains a vital, if guarded, part of your complex character. You are a symbol of raw power and the enduring strength of the natural world.

characters.name: Sophie
characters.short_description: You are a steady and compassionate individual whose quiet confidence and practical wisdom have the power to transform the lives of everyone you meet.
characters.profile_text:
You often underestimate your own worth, preferring to stay in the background and care for others rather than seeking the spotlight. Despite your initial self-consciousness, you possess a remarkable resilience and a practical attitude that allows you to handle even the most bizarre or magical circumstances with grace. You are the glue that holds chaotic groups together, providing stability and common sense when things spiral out of control. Your strength is not loud or aggressive; instead, it is a persistent, nurturing force that heals and inspires those around you. You find beauty in the mundane and possess a sharp wit that keeps you grounded.

One of your potential pitfalls is a tendency to settle for a life of duty while neglecting your own desires and dreams. It may take a significant life change to shake you out of your comfort zone and force you to confront your own potential. As you learn to embrace your own voice and stand up for yourself, you discover that your inner beauty is far more powerful than any external appearance. You find fulfillment in creating a sense of home and belonging, proving that kindness and patience are the truest forms of magic. Your journey is one of self-discovery and the realization that you are worthy of love and adventure.

characters.name: Nausicaä
characters.short_description: You are a visionary leader and a compassionate peacemaker who seeks to understand the complexities of the world rather than succumb to fear or hatred.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rare combination of scientific curiosity and spiritual depth, always looking beneath the surface to find the truth behind perceived threats. Your empathy extends to all living things, and you are willing to risk your own safety to prevent conflict and protect the delicate balance of the ecosystem. You lead by example, inspiring others through your bravery and your unwavering commitment to non-violence. You are a bridge-builder, capable of seeing the shared humanity in enemies and the beauty in the misunderstood. Your wisdom far exceeds your years, and you carry the hopes of many on your shoulders.

Your greatest burden is the weight of responsibility you feel for the world, which can lead to self-sacrifice at the expense of your own well-being. You may find yourself isolated by your unique perspective, as others struggle to see the harmony you strive for amidst chaos and war. Despite the immense pressure, you remain steadfast in your hope for a better future. Your journey is one of profound sacrifice and enlightenment, showing that true strength lies in the courage to love and understand even that which others fear. You are a beacon of hope in a darkening world, guided by a heart that refuses to hate.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you find yourself in a completely new and unfamiliar environment, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: Observe quietly and work hard to adapt to the new rules.
Seek out a way to use my specific skills to be helpful to others.
Remain guarded and prioritize the safety of my home or family.
Take charge of the situation with practical, common-sense solutions.
Investigate the underlying cause of the change to find a peaceful resolution.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a situation where you feel your confidence is slipping?

options.text: I push through the fear and keep moving forward, even if I'm crying.
I take a step back to rediscover my passion and wait for my 'magic' to return.
I channel my frustration into action and stand my ground more fiercely.
I focus on my duties and the needs of others until I find my own voice.
I look for a deeper understanding of the problem to maintain my inner peace.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these values do you consider your greatest personal strength?

options.text: Integrity: Staying true to my name and identity no matter what.
Independence: The drive to make my own way in the world.
Loyalty: An unwavering commitment to protect the natural order.
Resilience: The quiet ability to endure and transform through kindness.
Empathy: The capacity to love and understand even those who are feared.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred way to resolve a conflict between two opposing sides?

options.text: By showing sincerity and helping both sides see their shared humanity.
By focusing on my own growth and letting my actions speak for themselves.
By fighting for justice and defending those who cannot defend themselves.
By being the practical mediator who keeps everyone grounded and fed.
By risking myself to bridge the gap and stop the cycle of hatred.

baseline_questions.question_text: In your ideal world, what role do you play within your community?

options.text: The persistent worker who earns respect through dedication.
The creative entrepreneur finding a unique niche to serve others.
The fierce protector who lives by a strict, uncompromising code.
The nurturing heart who provides stability and a sense of home.
The visionary leader who guides others toward a sustainable future.

topics.display_name: Which Broadway Musical Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Broadway Musical Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Are you a classic showstopper or a modern revolutionary? From the bright lights of Times Square to the emotional depths of a solo ballad, your personality has a rhythm all its own. Take this quiz to find out which legendary production perfectly captures your life's soundtrack.

characters.name: Elphaba
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely principled and misunderstood visionary who isn't afraid to defy gravity for what is right.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp intellect and a deep-seated sense of justice that often sets you apart from the crowd. While others might conform to societal expectations, you remain steadfast in your convictions, even when it leads to isolation. Your strength lies in your unwavering loyalty to your friends and your willingness to challenge corrupt systems, though your cynical exterior can sometimes hide a vulnerable heart that yearns for acceptance. You are a natural leader who inspires others through your actions rather than empty words. However, your tendency to take the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to burnout or a sense of martyrdom. You must learn that being "wicked" in the eyes of a flawed society is often the highest form of integrity. Your journey is one of self-discovery and reclaiming your power, proving that true magic comes from within and that standing up for the truth is always worth the cost.

characters.name: Alexander Hamilton
characters.short_description: You are an ambitious, relentless overachiever who is determined to leave a lasting legacy through your words and actions.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by an inexhaustible drive and a brilliant mind that never seems to rest. You approach life with a sense of urgency, constantly writing, debating, and building toward a future you can clearly envision. Your greatest strength is your eloquence and your ability to outwork everyone in the room, making you a formidable force in any field you choose. You value meritocracy and intellectual rigor, often finding yourself frustrated by those who lack your passion or speed. This intensity, while productive, can also be your downfall. Your pride and refusal to back down from a fight can alienate allies and create unnecessary conflict. You often struggle to find a balance between your professional ambitions and your personal life, sometimes neglecting the people who care for you most in your pursuit of greatness. Learning to slow down and choose your battles wisely is your greatest challenge, as your legacy is already being written by the impact you have on those around you.

characters.name: Christine Daaé
characters.short_description: You are a soulful and compassionate artist whose ethereal talent is matched only by your emotional depth.
characters.profile_text: You possess a gentle spirit and a profound connection to the arts, often finding solace in music and expression. Your sensitivity allows you to see the beauty and pain in others, making you a deeply empathetic friend and partner. You are often caught between different worlds—the safety of the familiar and the allure of the mysterious—and you navigate these complexities with grace and a touch of melancholy. Your talent is a gift that you share generously, though you may sometimes feel overwhelmed by the expectations placed upon you by those who wish to control your light. While your kindness is a major strength, it can also make you susceptible to the influence of stronger personalities. You may find yourself torn between duty and desire, struggling to find your own voice amidst the noise of others' demands. Your journey is about finding the courage to step out of the shadows and claim your own destiny, realizing that your worth is not defined by the people in your life but by your own incredible spirit and resilience.

characters.name: Mamma Rose
characters.short_description: You are a powerhouse of determination and charisma who will stop at nothing to see your loved ones succeed.
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature, driven by a relentless desire for success and a belief that you know what is best for everyone around you. Your energy is infectious, and your ability to hustle and dream big makes you a formidable presence in any room. You live vicariously through the achievements of those you care about, pouring all your resources and passion into their advancement. This fierce devotion is your greatest strength, but it can also be a double-edged sword. Your tendency to be overbearing and controlling can strain your relationships, as you often struggle to distinguish between your own dreams and the needs of others. You have a hard time accepting "no" for an answer and can become resentful when your efforts aren't recognized or reciprocated. Beneath your tough, show-business exterior lies a deep-seated need for validation and a fear of being left behind. Learning to channel your incredible drive into your own fulfillment, rather than just the success of others, is the key to finding true peace and lasting connections.

characters.name: Tracy Turnblad
characters.short_description: You are an irrepressible optimist and a champion for change who believes that everyone deserves a seat at the table.
characters.profile_text: You are a beacon of positivity and inclusive energy, always ready to dance your way through any obstacle. Your enthusiasm is contagious, and you have a unique ability to bring people together regardless of their backgrounds or differences. You see the world not as it is, but as it could be—a place where everyone is celebrated for who they are. Your bravery in the face of prejudice and your refusal to let "no" stop you make you a natural activist and a loyal friend. You aren't afraid to stand up to bullies or challenge the status quo, even when it puts you at risk. However, your sunny disposition can sometimes lead you to underestimate the complexity of the problems you face. You might occasionally act before you think, driven by your big heart and a desire for immediate justice. Your challenge is to maintain your joyful spirit while navigating the realities of a world that isn't always as kind as you are. By staying true to your values and your rhythm, you prove that a little bit of big hair and a lot of heart can truly change the world.

characters.name: Jean Valjean
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and noble soul who has transformed a difficult past into a life of profound redemption and service.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your incredible strength of character and your commitment to personal growth. Having faced significant adversity and injustice, you have emerged not with bitterness, but with a deep sense of mercy and a desire to do good. You are a person of few words but great actions, often working quietly behind the scenes to help those in need. Your integrity is your compass, guiding you through moral dilemmas and personal sacrifices. You value honesty and hard work, and you are willing to go to great lengths to protect the people you love, even if it means putting your own safety at risk. This selflessness is your greatest virtue, yet it can also lead to a life of solitude and constant vigilance. You often carry the weight of your past mistakes, finding it difficult to fully forgive yourself even when the world has moved on. Your journey is a testament to the power of change and the belief that it is never too late to start over. By embracing your own humanity and allowing yourself to be loved, you find the ultimate peace that comes from a life well-lived.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary engine that drives your daily actions?

options.text: A fierce commitment to what is right, regardless of the cost.
An urgent need to build something that outlasts me.
A search for emotional depth and artistic expression.
The desire to see those I care about reach the top.
A joyful belief that I can make the world more inclusive.
A quiet dedication to making amends and helping others.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a system you believe is flawed, how do you typically react?

options.text: I challenge it head-on, even if I have to stand alone.
I work twice as hard to master the system and then rewrite the rules.
I feel the weight of the injustice and seek solace in my craft.
I find a way to make the system work for me and my inner circle.
I gather a crowd and turn the protest into a celebration of change.
I focus on individual acts of mercy to mitigate the system's harm.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your closest friends describe your presence in a group?

options.text: The principled protector who isn't afraid to be the 'bad guy' for the truth.
The tireless intellectual who is always three steps ahead of everyone else.
The sensitive soul who brings a touch of grace and mystery to the room.
The charismatic force who pushes everyone to achieve their potential.
The irrepressible optimist who makes everyone feel like they belong.
The resilient anchor who leads through quiet, humble example.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal challenges do you struggle with the most?

options.text: Feeling isolated or misunderstood because of my convictions.
My pride and an inability to back down from a verbal fight.
Being easily influenced by stronger, more dominant personalities.
A tendency to be overbearing in my desire for others to succeed.
Underestimating the complexity of the problems I want to fix.
Carrying the heavy weight of past mistakes and finding it hard to forgive myself.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does ultimate 'success' look like to you?

options.text: Having the courage to stay true to myself when the world is against me.
Leaving behind a legacy of work that changes the course of history.
Finding my own voice and the freedom to express my true spirit.
Seeing the people I've mentored finally take center stage.
Creating a world where everyone is invited to the dance.
Finding redemption and peace through a life of service.

topics.display_name: Which Witcher School Do You Belong To?

synopsis.title: Which Witcher School Would You Actually Graduate From?
synopsis.summary: Toss a coin to your Witcher, but first, find out where you would actually train to slay monsters. From the snowy peaks of Kaer Morhen to the shadowy corners of the Haakland, every school has its own lethal specialty and moral code. Take this quiz to discover if you are a noble Wolf, a stealthy Cat, or a tank-like Bear.

characters.name: Wolf
characters.short_description: You are a balanced and resilient warrior who values brotherhood and adaptability above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You embody the classic image of a monster hunter, blending swordplay with magical signs in a versatile combat style. Your loyalty to your fellow witchers is your greatest strength, providing a sense of family in a world that often views you with suspicion. You prefer to face challenges head-on but possess the wisdom to know when a strategic retreat or a specific potion is necessary for survival. You are the middle ground between speed and power, making you a reliable ally in any situation.

Your deep sense of duty can sometimes lead to emotional isolation or a stubborn refusal to abandon a lost cause. While you are highly capable, you may struggle with the weight of tradition and the burden of a dying profession. You find comfort in the familiar walls of Kaer Morhen, yet you are always ready to wander the path wherever it may lead. Your resilience ensures that no matter how many times you are knocked down, you will always find the strength to stand back up and face the next contract.

characters.name: Cat
characters.short_description: You are a swift, agile, and often unpredictable combatant who prioritizes speed and precision over brute force.
characters.profile_text:
You move through the world like a shadow, relying on your incredible reflexes and light armor to outmaneuver any foe. Your fighting style is a whirlwind of strikes, focusing on critical hits and bleeding wounds rather than sustained defense. You are fiercely independent and often find yourself at odds with societal norms, preferring the freedom of the road to the constraints of a formal brotherhood. This autonomy allows you to take on jobs others might find too morally ambiguous or dangerous.

Your volatile nature and tendency toward aggression can make you a dangerous ally and a terrifying enemy. You may struggle with impulse control or a cynical outlook that alienates those who might otherwise support you. Despite these challenges, your lethal efficiency and ability to survive in the harshest conditions make you a force to be reckoned with. You do not wait for the monster to strike; you are the one who strikes first, ending the threat before it even realizes you are there.

characters.name: Bear
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and formidable juggernaut who relies on heavy armor and sheer physical endurance to outlast your enemies.
characters.profile_text:
You favor the cold, rugged peaks of Skellige, where strength is the only currency that matters. In battle, you are an immovable object, absorbing blows that would fell lesser warriors while delivering devastating counterattacks. Your approach to alchemy and signs is pragmatic, used primarily to bolster your natural resilience and ensure that you are the last one standing on the battlefield. You value the weight of a heavy blade and the security of thick plate armor above all else.

Your reliance on heavy equipment and raw power can make you less adaptable in situations requiring finesse or social grace. You might come across as cold or unapproachable, preferring the company of the wind and the snow to the chatter of a crowded tavern. However, your unwavering resolve and protective instincts make you a pillar of strength for those you choose to defend. You are the shield that stands between humanity and the darkness, unyielding and eternal like the mountains you call home.

characters.name: Griffin
characters.short_description: You are a noble and scholarly witcher who masters the art of magical signs and upholds a strict code of knightly honor.
characters.profile_text:
You view your profession as a high calling, blending the martial prowess of a knight with the intellectual depth of a mage. Your mastery over signs allows you to manipulate the battlefield with fire, force, and shields, often ending a fight before a blade is even drawn. You value etiquette and tradition, seeking to maintain a sense of dignity even in the bloodiest of encounters. For you, being a witcher is not just about killing monsters; it is about preserving civilization and the knowledge that sustains it.

Your adherence to a rigid moral code can sometimes lead to conflict with the messy realities of the world. You may be perceived as arrogant or detached by those who do not share your high standards or your academic interests. Nevertheless, your dedication to protecting the innocent and your pursuit of knowledge ensure that your legacy remains a beacon of hope in dark times. You are a warrior-philosopher, as comfortable in a library as you are in a monster's lair.

characters.name: Viper
characters.short_description: You are a cold, calculating specialist who utilizes dual blades and lethal toxins to eliminate targets with surgical efficiency.
characters.profile_text:
You operate in the shadows of the south, where politics and assassination are as common as monster hunting. Your style is defined by the use of short blades and a deep knowledge of poisons, allowing you to strike quickly and disappear before your presence is even noted. You are a master of infiltration and observation, always looking for the most efficient way to neutralize a threat without unnecessary risk. You understand that the most dangerous monsters often wear human faces and walk in high places.

Your pragmatic and often ruthless approach can lead to a reputation for treachery or a lack of empathy. You may find it difficult to form genuine connections, as you are always analyzing the tactical advantages of every relationship. Yet, your ability to navigate the most complex social and physical landscapes makes you an invaluable asset in a world of shifting alliances. You are the silent predator, the one who watches from the periphery and strikes with absolute certainty when the moment is right.

characters.name: Manticore
characters.short_description: You are a versatile alchemist and traditionalist who relies on a vast array of potions and bombs to overcome any obstacle.
characters.profile_text:
You represent the ancient ways of the East, where the secrets of mutation and chemical enhancement are most revered. Your strength lies in your preparation, as you enter every battle bolstered by decoctions and armed with explosive devices that can turn the tide of any fight. You possess a deep curiosity about the natural world and the hidden properties of the flora and fauna you encounter on your travels. To you, the laboratory is just as important as the training grounds.

Your heavy reliance on alchemy can be a double-edged sword, as the toxicity of your concoctions takes a toll on your body and mind. You may become overly dependent on your supplies, feeling vulnerable when your satchel is empty or your ingredients are scarce. However, your resourcefulness and your ability to adapt your biology to meet any challenge make you a survivor of the highest order. You are a master of transformation, using the very essence of monsters to become the ultimate hunter.

baseline_questions.question_text: When facing a superior opponent, what is your primary tactical philosophy?

options.text: Maintain a versatile balance of swordplay and utility to adapt to their moves.
Use overwhelming speed and precision to strike critical points before they can react.
Don heavy protection and outlast them through sheer physical endurance.
Control the battlefield using powerful magical signs and intellectual superiority.
Utilize stealth and lethal toxins to weaken them from the shadows.
Prepare extensively with specialized potions and explosives to negate their advantages.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view your relationship with the rest of society?

options.text: I value the brotherhood of my peers and a sense of shared tradition.
I am a fierce individualist who prefers the freedom of the road over any group.
I am a stoic loner, comfortable in the harshest and most isolated environments.
I see myself as a noble protector who upholds a strict code of knightly honor.
I am a pragmatic realist who navigates the murky world of politics and secrets.
I am a scholar and traditionalist, focused on the ancient secrets of my craft.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which aspect of your training do you rely on most when a contract goes wrong?

options.text: My resilience and the ability to find a way to survive any setback.
My reflexes and the instinct to strike first and strike hard.
My raw physical strength and the security of my equipment.
My mastery of magic and my knowledge of monster weaknesses.
My analytical mind and my expertise in lethal chemistry.
My deep inventory of decoctions and alchemical preparations.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal environment for a long-term base of operations?

options.text: A hidden mountain fortress where I can train with my brothers.
I have no base; I am most at home wherever the next job takes me.
A rugged, frozen coastal region where only the strong survive.
A well-maintained estate with a library and proximity to civilization.
The shadows of a bustling southern city where information is currency.
A remote laboratory filled with rare herbs and ancient scrolls.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to handle the moral ambiguity of a difficult contract?

options.text: I follow my gut and stick to the middle ground whenever possible.
I do what is necessary to survive, regardless of what others think of my methods.
I remain detached and focus solely on the physical task at hand.
I strictly adhere to a moral code to ensure I never lose my humanity.
I calculate the most efficient outcome, even if it requires a ruthless choice.
I rely on tradition and the established wisdom of those who came before me.

topics.display_name: Which 'Gossip Girl' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: XOXO: Which 'Gossip Girl' Character Are You Really?
synopsis.summary: Grab your designer headband and take your seat on the Met steps, because it is time to reveal your Upper East Side identity. Whether you are ruling the school with an iron fist or observing the drama from a Brooklyn loft, your social tactics say everything about you. Answer these questions to find out if you are the ultimate 'it' girl, a brooding poet, or a scheming billionaire. You know you love me, XOXO.

characters.name: Blair Waldorf
characters.short_description: You are the ambitious and meticulously organized Queen B of the Upper East Side who values loyalty and tradition above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a perfectionist who believes that anything worth having is worth fighting for, often through elaborate schemes and strategic alliances. Your drive is unmatched, and you have a clear vision for your future that involves power, elegance, and a circle of friends who meet your high standards. While you can be intimidating and demanding, your actions are driven by a deep-seated need for security and a fierce devotion to the people you consider family. You don't just want to succeed; you want to rule your domain with grace and an iron will. Your pitfalls often lie in your inability to let go of control and your tendency to view life as a game of chess. You struggle with vulnerability, fearing that showing weakness will cost you your hard-earned status. However, your resilience is your greatest strength, allowing you to bounce back from any setback with a new plan and a sharper outfit. You are a classic romantic at heart, even if you hide it behind a layer of cynicism and high-fashion armor.

characters.name: Serena van der Woodsen
characters.short_description: You are the magnetic and free-spirited "It Girl" whose natural charm and effortless style make you the center of attention wherever you go.
characters.profile_text: You possess an innate radiance that draws people to you without you even trying, making you the life of every party and the subject of every conversation. You value spontaneity and emotional connection, often following your heart even when it leads you into complicated situations. Your kindness is genuine, and you have a knack for seeing the best in people, though this can sometimes make you naive to the darker intentions of those around you. You crave freedom and often feel stifled by the expectations placed upon you by your family and social circle. Because you hate conflict, you have a tendency to run away from your problems rather than facing them head-on, hoping they will simply disappear in your rearview mirror. Your journey is one of self-discovery, as you try to balance your desire for a normal life with the inescapable spotlight of your heritage. While you are often the catalyst for drama, your intentions are usually rooted in a search for love and a sense of belonging that transcends your privileged upbringing.

characters.name: Chuck Bass
characters.short_description: You are a complex and brooding visionary who hides a deeply loyal and protective heart beneath a mask of hedonism and business acumen.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense intensity and focus, often using your sharp intellect to navigate the worlds of high finance and social intrigue. You have a reputation for being enigmatic and perhaps a bit dangerous, but those who truly know you understand that your toughness is a shield for a sensitive soul. You value legacy and are willing to make significant sacrifices to protect your empire and the people you love. Your primary struggle is overcoming your own self-destructive tendencies and the weight of your family's expectations, which often lead you to push people away before they can get too close. You are not afraid of the dark side of life, and you possess a worldly wisdom that makes you seem older than your years. Your growth comes from learning that vulnerability is not a weakness but a necessary component of true strength. When you commit to someone or something, your loyalty is absolute, and you will stop at nothing to ensure their success and safety. You are a master of the grand gesture, proving that beneath the cynical exterior lies a man capable of profound transformation and enduring devotion.

characters.name: Dan Humphrey
characters.short_description: You are the observant and intellectual outsider who uses your wit and writing talent to critique and eventually conquer the world around you.
characters.profile_text: You pride yourself on your integrity and your ability to see through the superficiality of high society, often positioning yourself as the moral compass in a room full of chaos. As a natural storyteller, you possess a keen eye for detail and a sharp tongue that can be both your greatest asset and your most significant liability. You are deeply ambitious, though you often mask your desire for success with a layer of "Brooklyn" cynicism. Your tendency to judge others can sometimes alienate you, as you struggle to reconcile your disdain for the elite with your secret desire to be accepted by them. You are a romantic who believes in the power of words and the importance of staying true to one's roots, even as you find yourself increasingly drawn into the very world you once mocked. Your journey is defined by the tension between who you are and who you want to be, leading you to make choices that challenge your own ethics. While you may feel like an underdog, your intelligence and persistence ensure that you are never truly out of the game. You are proof that the person standing on the sidelines often has the most power of all.

characters.name: Nate Archibald
characters.short_description: You are the dependable and kind-hearted "Golden Boy" who strives to maintain your integrity while navigating the pressures of a demanding family legacy.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your genuine nature and your desire to do the right thing, even when it is the most difficult path to take. Unlike many of your peers, you find little joy in manipulation or social climbing, preferring honest connections and a life defined by your own choices rather than your family's name. You are a loyal friend who often finds yourself caught in the middle of other people's conflicts, acting as a mediator and a source of stability. Your greatest challenge is finding your own voice and the courage to step out from the shadow of your powerful relatives to forge a career and life that truly belongs to you. You have a tendency to be a bit too trusting, which can lead to you being used by those with more calculated agendas. However, your resilience and your refusal to become cynical are what make you stand out in a world of artifice. You value sports, simple pleasures, and authentic relationships, always searching for a sense of peace amidst the constant drama of your environment. You are the moral anchor for those around you, proving that it is possible to remain a good person even in the most compromising of circumstances.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically navigate a new social environment?

options.text: I establish a clear hierarchy and form strategic alliances.
I rely on my natural charisma to draw people to me effortlessly.
I remain enigmatic and observe the power dynamics from a distance.
I stay on the periphery and analyze the behavior of others with a critical eye.
I try to be friendly and authentic to everyone I meet without an agenda.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary reaction when someone you trust betrays you?

options.text: I design a calculated plan to ensure they face the consequences of their actions.
I distance myself from the situation immediately to avoid further emotional conflict.
I shut down emotionally and focus entirely on my personal goals and empire.
I use the experience as fuel for my creative or intellectual pursuits.
I confront them directly and try to find a moral and honest resolution.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which personal quality do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My ambition and drive for perfection in everything I do.
My ability to connect with people and make them feel seen.
My unwavering loyalty to the small circle of people I care about.
My sharp intellect and my ability to see the truth behind the surface.
My integrity and my commitment to doing the right thing regardless of pressure.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal evening look like?

options.text: Attending a high-society gala where every detail is meticulously planned.
Going wherever the night takes me with a large, spontaneous group of friends.
Enjoying a glass of fine scotch in a private, exclusive lounge.
A quiet evening in a Brooklyn loft with a good book and a cup of coffee.
A relaxed night in with close friends or playing sports outdoors.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle the expectations placed upon you by your family or social circle?

options.text: I strive to exceed them and bring honor to my family name through my success.
I find them suffocating and often act out to find my own sense of freedom.
I feel the weight of legacy and work tirelessly to protect what has been built.
I critique the superficiality of those expectations while secretly wanting to earn my place.
I try to forge my own path while remaining a dependable and honest person.

topics.display_name: Which 'Parks and Rec' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Parks and Rec' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the eternal optimist with a binder for everything, or would you rather be buried in a hole in the ground than talk to people? From waffle-loving leaders to saxophone-playing bureaucrats, Pawnee is full of big personalities. Take this quiz to find out which member of the Parks Department matches your soul. It's time to treat yo' self to some self-discovery!

characters.name: Leslie Knope
characters.short_description: You are a tireless, optimistic leader who believes in the power of government and friendship to change the world.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate overachiever, fueled by waffles, whipped cream, and an unwavering belief in public service. Your organizational skills are legendary, often manifesting in massive binders and meticulously planned events that leave others in awe. You possess a boundless reservoir of energy and a genuine love for your community, making you a fierce advocate for those you care about. However, your intense passion can sometimes lead to steamrolling others or becoming overly invested in minor details. You find it difficult to relax, as your mind is always racing with new ideas to improve the world around you. Your loyalty is your greatest strength, and you will go to any lengths to support your friends, even if it means sacrificing your own sleep or sanity.

characters.name: Ron Swanson
characters.short_description: You are a staunch individualist who values privacy, woodworking, and a diet consisting primarily of red meat.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words and even fewer compromises, preferring the quiet solitude of a workshop to the chaos of modern society. Your principles are ironclad, centered around self-reliance and a deep-seated skepticism of government bureaucracy. You appreciate the finer things in life, provided those things are high-quality scotch, breakfast food, or a perfectly sanded piece of mahogany. While you project a gruff and unapproachable exterior, you possess a hidden core of integrity and a surprising capacity for mentorship toward those you respect. Your pitfalls include a stubborn refusal to adapt to change and a tendency to isolate yourself from others to avoid emotional vulnerability. You believe that any job worth doing is worth doing right, and you have no patience for incompetence or small talk.

characters.name: April Ludgate
characters.short_description: You are a dry-witted, mysterious individual who hides a deeply loyal heart behind a mask of apathy and sarcasm.
characters.profile_text: You navigate the world with a sharp tongue and a penchant for the macabre, often using your dark sense of humor to keep people at a distance. You have a unique ability to find the absurdity in any situation and a genuine disdain for anything you deem "basic" or overly enthusiastic. Despite your outward indifference, you are fiercely protective of the people and animals you truly love, showing a level of devotion that surprises those who only see your cynical side. Your strengths lie in your intuition and your ability to handle chaos with a deadpan expression. However, your tendency to push people away or sabotage your own success out of boredom can be a significant hurdle. You thrive in environments where you can be your authentic, slightly weird self without judgment, and you value honesty above all else.

characters.name: Andy Dwyer
characters.short_description: You are a lovable, high-energy dreamer with a heart of gold and a knack for finding joy in the simplest things.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with the enthusiasm of a golden retriever, always ready for a new adventure or a chance to play your guitar. Your imagination is your greatest asset, allowing you to transform mundane tasks into epic quests or create elaborate alter egos like Burt Macklin. You are incredibly kind-hearted and possess a childlike wonder that makes you instantly likable to almost everyone you meet. While your lack of focus and occasional clumsiness can lead to some messy situations, your resilience and ability to bounce back from failure are truly impressive. Your pitfalls often involve a lack of foresight or a tendency to act before thinking, which can result in financial or logistical headaches. Nevertheless, your genuine spirit and unwavering support for your friends make you the emotional glue of any group you join.

characters.name: Tom Haverford
characters.short_description: You are an ambitious, trend-setting entrepreneur who is always on the lookout for the next big business opportunity.
characters.profile_text: You have a taste for the finer things and a relentless drive to make a name for yourself in the world of luxury and entertainment. Your mind is a constant factory of "big ideas," ranging from high-end fragrances to innovative social clubs, and you aren't afraid to take risks to achieve your dreams. You value aesthetics, branding, and the power of a good "treat yo self" day to keep your spirits high. Your strengths include your networking abilities and your infectious charisma, which often helps you talk your way into and out of various situations. However, your obsession with status and your tendency to prioritize style over substance can sometimes lead to professional setbacks. You often struggle with the reality of hard work, preferring the glamour of the finish line to the grind of the journey, but your persistence eventually pays off.

characters.name: Ben Wyatt
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic, detail-oriented strategist with a love for complex games, accounting, and calzones.
characters.profile_text: You are the voice of reason in a world of chaos, relying on logic and data to navigate both your professional and personal life. Your past experiences have made you cautious and perhaps a bit too focused on worst-case scenarios, but this also makes you an invaluable problem-solver. You find genuine joy in things others might find boring, such as the intricacies of municipal bonds or the deep lore of a fantasy novel. Your strengths lie in your integrity and your ability to organize complex systems into manageable parts. On the downside, you can be socially awkward and prone to overthinking, which sometimes leads to high levels of stress or "nerding out" at inappropriate times. You are a deeply supportive partner and friend, always willing to do the heavy lifting behind the scenes to ensure that the people you care about succeed.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new, complex project at work or school?

options.text: I create a color-coded binder and a minute-by-minute schedule immediately.
I delegate the boring parts and focus on the branding and 'big picture' hype.
I analyze the budget and logistical risks to ensure everything is fiscally sound.
I ignore the instructions and do it my own way, preferably in a woodshop.
I wait until the last minute and then turn it into a fun game or a song.
I do the bare minimum while making sarcastic comments about the pointlessness of it all.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a Saturday afternoon?

options.text: Attending a local town hall meeting or volunteering for a community cause.
Shopping for high-end threads and getting a professional pedicure.
Quietly working on a solo craft project with a glass of scotch.
Playing a complex tabletop strategy game or catching up on a documentary.
Looking for adventure outdoors, even if I end up falling into a pit.
Staring into the middle distance and listening to dark indie music.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a friend is going through a hard time, how do you support them?

options.text: I give them a thoughtful, personalized gift and a 10-point plan to fix their life.
I offer them a firm handshake and some practical, no-nonsense advice.
I try to cheer them up with a silly joke or a spontaneous physical stunt.
I take them out for a 'Treat Yo Self' day to distract them with luxury.
I listen intently and help them weigh the pros and cons of their situation.
I silently stand by them and threaten anyone who caused them pain.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your relationship with 'the rules'?

options.text: Rules are the essential foundation of a civilized and functional society.
Rules are mostly suggestions that can be bypassed with enough charisma.
The government has no right to tell me what to do; I follow my own code.
I follow them strictly because I'm terrified of the consequences of an audit.
I don't really understand the rules, but I'm having a great time anyway.
I find the rules annoying and will actively mock anyone who enforces them.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate comfort food?

options.text: Waffles with an excessive, towering amount of whipped cream.
A giant T-bone steak and a side of breakfast meats.
A perfectly folded calzone from a local specialty shop.
Anything I can eat while wearing a silk robe, preferably artisanal.
Whatever is closest and tastes like sugar or salt.
Something grey and unappealing that I can eat ironically.

topics.display_name: Which 'Ted Lasso' Character Is Your Spirit Guide?

synopsis.title: Which 'Ted Lasso' Character Is Your Spirit Guide?
synopsis.summary: Do you believe in 'Believe'? Whether you're a master of the 'Diamond Dogs' or just trying to find your inner boss, there's a member of the AFC Richmond family ready to lead the way. Take this quiz to discover which character's wisdom and wit will help you navigate life's toughest matches. It's time to find out if you're more of a biscuits-with-the-boss type or a total legend on the pitch.

characters.name: Ted Lasso
characters.short_description: You are an eternal optimist who believes in the power of kindness and the potential of every individual.
characters.profile_text: You lead with your heart and a relentless sense of hope, often using folksy wisdom and humor to bridge gaps between people. Your greatest strength is your empathy, which allows you to see the best in others even when they cannot see it in themselves. You value connection over competition and understand that success is measured by personal growth rather than just the score on the board. However, your tendency to suppress your own pain to keep others happy can lead to internal struggles. You must remember that it is okay to not be okay and that your own needs are just as valid as those you care for. Your journey is about balancing your boundless optimism with the courage to face your own vulnerabilities and seek support when the weight of the world feels too heavy.

characters.name: Roy Kent
characters.short_description: You are a gruff, fiercely loyal individual who hides a deeply caring heart behind a wall of blunt honesty.
characters.profile_text: You value authenticity above all else and have no patience for pretense or fluff. While your exterior might seem intimidating or even angry, those closest to you know that your loyalty is absolute and your moral compass is unwavering. You express your affection through actions rather than words, often stepping up to protect or mentor others in your own unique, foul-mouthed way. Your challenge lies in letting down your guard and allowing yourself to be vulnerable without feeling like you are losing your edge. You often struggle with transitions, especially when moving away from a role that defined your identity for a long time. Embracing the softer side of your nature doesn't make you weak; it makes you a more complete leader and partner who can inspire others through your raw honesty.

characters.name: Rebecca Welton
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and sophisticated leader who has learned to transform your past pain into a source of immense strength and grace.
characters.profile_text: You possess a commanding presence and an iron will, yet you are also capable of profound kindness and vulnerability. After facing significant personal betrayal, you have rebuilt your life on your own terms, proving that resilience is your greatest asset. You are a loyal friend who values deep, meaningful connections and isn't afraid to admit when you are wrong, even if it takes a moment to get there. Your journey involves shedding the need for revenge and finding true happiness in your own accomplishments and the community you have built. Sometimes, your fear of being hurt again can cause you to push people away or put up unnecessary walls. Learning to trust your instincts and the people who truly care for you allows your natural warmth to shine through your professional exterior, making you a truly formidable leader.

characters.name: Keeley Jones
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, ambitious, and incredibly supportive person who brings light and positivity to every room you enter.
characters.profile_text: You have a natural talent for branding and public relations, largely because you genuinely like people and want to see them succeed. Your career is built on your ability to be yourself—unapologetically bold, stylish, and kind. You are the ultimate "hype person," always ready to lift up your friends and celebrate their victories as if they were your own, creating a ripple effect of positivity. However, you may sometimes struggle with being taken seriously in professional environments or feeling like you are living in someone else's shadow. As you grow, you are learning to own your power and realize that your worth is not tied to who you are dating or how others perceive your bubbly personality. Your strength lies in your emotional intelligence and your refusal to let the cynicism of the world dampen your vibrant spirit.

characters.name: Coach Beard
characters.short_description: You are a stoic, intellectual, and deeply observant individual who provides the steady foundation for those around you.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words, but when you speak, people listen because your insights are usually profound and well-researched. You possess an eclectic range of interests and a dry sense of humor that keeps everyone on their toes. Your loyalty to your friends is quiet but unshakable, and you are often the one working behind the scenes to ensure everything runs smoothly without needing the spotlight. Your pitfall is a tendency to get lost in your own head or to stay in situations that aren't healthy for you because of your intense devotion. You find comfort in routines, data, and the pursuit of knowledge, often serving as the logical anchor in chaotic situations. You must learn to balance your commitment to others with a commitment to your own well-being and emotional clarity to avoid burnout.

characters.name: Jamie Tartt
characters.short_description: You are a talented and confident individual who is learning that true greatness comes from teamwork and humility.
characters.profile_text: You have always been the star of the show, blessed with natural ability and a magnetic personality that draws people to you. While you once relied on arrogance to mask your deep-seated insecurities, you are evolving into someone who understands that true greatness comes from teamwork and humility. You are learning to channel your competitive drive into supporting your teammates rather than just seeking personal glory. This transformation requires you to confront the difficult parts of your upbringing and choose a path of kindness over ego. Your journey is one of the most significant, as you move from being a "me" person to a "we" person. Though you still have your moments of vanity, your willingness to listen, learn, and change makes you a formidable force for good in any group setting.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a close friend is facing a difficult personal crisis, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: Offer a warm anecdote and a homemade treat to lift their spirits.
Provide blunt, unfiltered advice and stay by their side in silence.
Use your influence to help them rebuild and offer a sophisticated perspective.
Become their ultimate hype-person and shower them with vocal support.
Listen deeply and offer a stoic, well-researched solution.
Remind them of their worth and encourage them to get back in the game.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which professional environment do you thrive in most?

options.text: A collaborative space where empathy and personal growth are the priorities.
A high-stakes setting where results and raw honesty matter more than feelings.
A powerful boardroom where you can lead with grace and strategic authority.
A creative, fast-paced atmosphere focused on branding and social connection.
A quiet, intellectual space where you can focus on data and strategy.
A competitive arena where you can showcase your skills and lead the charge.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your own moments of vulnerability or pain?

options.text: I put on a brave face and focus on making sure everyone else is happy.
I get defensive or irritable until I've processed it on my own terms.
I build protective walls and only share my feelings with a trusted few.
I talk it out with my best friends and look for the positive path forward.
I retreat into my own head and rely on logic and routine to get through.
I initially struggle with my ego but eventually seek help to improve.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when taking on a new challenge?

options.text: To build a sense of community and help others reach their potential.
To maintain my integrity and prove that hard work pays off.
To prove my resilience and succeed on my own terms.
To bring joy to the process and make sure the world sees the best version of it.
To understand the mechanics of the problem and provide the right answer.
To be the best and earn the respect of my peers through performance.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you value most in a partner or teammate?

options.text: Unwavering kindness and a positive outlook.
Absolute loyalty and brutal honesty.
Strength of character and the ability to admit mistakes.
Vibrancy and a talent for lifting others up.
Reliability and a deep, quiet intelligence.
Confidence and a commitment to the team's success.

topics.display_name: Which Iconic Barbie Career Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Barbie Career Are You?
synopsis.summary: Since 1959, Barbie has broken glass ceilings in over 200 professions, proving that you can truly be anything. This quiz analyzes your professional strengths and personal passions to match you with one of her most legendary roles. Discover whether your spirit aligns with the high-stakes world of medicine, the frontiers of space, or the creative heights of the arts.

characters.name: Astronaut
characters.short_description: You are a visionary explorer who pushes the boundaries of science and discovery to reach for the stars.
characters.profile_text: You possess an insatiable curiosity and the technical discipline required to navigate the vast unknown. Your strengths lie in your ability to remain calm under pressure and your commitment to rigorous preparation, ensuring that every mission is a success. You thrive in environments where logic and wonder coexist, often finding yourself inspired by the infinite possibilities of the cosmos. However, your focus on the "big picture" can sometimes lead you to overlook the smaller, more grounded details of daily life. You are a natural problem-solver who views every challenge as a launchpad for innovation. Your tendency to look upward means you are always dreaming of the next frontier, but you must remember to stay connected to the team back on Earth. You represent the pinnacle of human achievement, blending scientific expertise with the bravery to step into the dark void of space.

characters.name: Doctor
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate caregiver dedicated to healing others through expertise, empathy, and tireless service.
characters.profile_text: Your life is defined by a deep-seated desire to help those in need and a remarkable capacity for empathy. You excel in high-stakes situations where quick thinking and medical knowledge are paramount, making you a reliable pillar of strength for your community. Your strengths include a meticulous attention to detail and a bedside manner that puts even the most anxious patients at ease. You are often the person others turn to in a crisis, trusting your steady hands and clear mind. On the flip side, your selfless nature can sometimes lead to burnout if you do not take the time to care for yourself as much as you care for others. You find fulfillment in the tangible impact you make on people's lives, whether you are performing a complex surgery or offering a simple word of comfort. Your dedication to the well-being of others is the cornerstone of your identity.

characters.name: President
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic leader who inspires change and advocates for a better, more inclusive world for everyone.
characters.profile_text: You have a natural gift for leadership and a powerful voice that commands attention in any room. Your primary strength is your ability to unite diverse groups of people under a common vision, using your diplomatic skills to navigate complex social and political landscapes. You are driven by a sense of duty and a passion for justice, always striving to make decisions that benefit the greater good. Your confidence is infectious, encouraging others to believe in their own potential and the possibility of progress. However, the weight of responsibility can sometimes make you overly cautious or sensitive to public opinion. You must balance your ambition with authenticity to ensure your message remains true to your core values. You are a trailblazer who is not afraid to break glass ceilings to pave the way for future generations. Your legacy is built on the positive changes you implement and the inspiration you provide to those who follow in your footsteps.

characters.name: Fashion Designer
characters.short_description: You are a creative visionary who uses style and artistry to express individuality and set global trends.
characters.profile_text: You see the world as a canvas and possess a unique ability to transform abstract ideas into stunning, wearable art. Your strengths are your keen eye for aesthetics and your fearless approach to self-expression, which allow you to stay ahead of the curve in a fast-paced industry. You thrive on the excitement of the runway and the intricate process of selecting fabrics and silhouettes that tell a story. Your work is not just about clothing; it is about empowering others to feel confident and beautiful in their own skin. A potential pitfall for you is a tendency toward perfectionism, which can sometimes stall your creative flow or lead to frustration when a design does not meet your exacting standards. You are most at home in a studio surrounded by color and texture, constantly seeking new ways to redefine beauty and elegance for a modern audience. Your creativity is a force that shapes culture and influences how people present themselves to the world.

characters.name: Pilot
characters.short_description: You are a bold adventurer who masters the skies with precision, courage, and a love for the open horizon.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your adventurous spirit and your unwavering focus when navigating the skies. Your strengths include exceptional spatial awareness and a disciplined mindset that allows you to handle complex machinery and changing weather conditions with ease. You love the freedom that comes with flight and the unique perspective of seeing the world from thousands of feet above. You are a decisive leader in the cockpit, trusted by your crew and passengers to deliver them safely to their destinations. However, your preference for independence and the thrill of the journey can sometimes make you feel restless when you are grounded for too long. You value efficiency and punctuality, often applying these traits to every aspect of your life. For you, the sky is never the limit; it is your second home and a place where you feel most truly yourself. You embody the spirit of exploration and the technical mastery required to bridge distances across the globe.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when choosing a professional path?

options.text: Expanding the boundaries of human knowledge and exploration.
Providing direct, compassionate care to individuals in need.
Leading a community and advocating for social progress.
Expressing a unique aesthetic vision through creative work.
Mastering technical skills to navigate and explore the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a high-pressure situation?

options.text: I rely on rigorous preparation and logical analysis of the data.
I remain calm and prioritize the immediate well-being of others.
I take charge and communicate a clear vision to unite the group.
I look for an unconventional or creative way to solve the problem.
I use disciplined focus and quick reflexes to manage the crisis.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment allows you to be most productive?

options.text: A controlled, high-tech setting focused on scientific discovery.
A fast-paced clinical setting where I can help people directly.
A formal or public space where I can influence policy and change.
A tactile studio filled with materials for artistic expression.
A mobile or outdoor setting that offers a broad perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your greatest professional strength?

options.text: My ability to understand complex systems and the 'big picture'.
My meticulous attention to detail and capacity for empathy.
My charisma and ability to inspire confidence in others.
My fearless approach to self-expression and trendsetting.
My spatial awareness and technical mastery of machinery.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of legacy do you hope to leave behind?

options.text: A contribution to the advancement of science and exploration.
A history of service and healing within my community.
A more inclusive and just society for future generations.
A cultural impact that changes how people see beauty and art.
A record of bold adventures and successful global connections.

topics.display_name: Which 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' Element Would You Bend?

synopsis.title: Which 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' Element Would You Bend?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you would thrive in the icy tundras of the poles or the bustling streets of the Earth Kingdom? Your personality holds the key to whether you would master the fluid motions of Water or the fierce intensity of Fire. Take this quiz to discover which of the four elements aligns with your inner spirit and bending style. It is time to find out if you are a natural-born Air Nomad or a steadfast Earthbender!

characters.name: Waterbender
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and empathetic individual who flows with the changes of life while maintaining a deep connection to your community.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a remarkable ability to adapt to any situation, much like the element you command. Your strength lies in your emotional intelligence and your capacity for healing, both physically and spiritually. You value family and tradition, often acting as the glue that holds your social circle together. In conflict, you prefer to redirect energy rather than meet it with brute force, using your opponent's momentum against them. This fluidity makes you a graceful presence in even the most stressful environments.

However, your deep empathy can sometimes lead to moodiness or a tendency to be overly protective of those you love. You must learn to balance your nurturing nature with the need to let others stand on their own. Your power is at its peak when you are in harmony with your surroundings, drawing strength from the moon and the internal tides of your own heart. When you find your center, you are an unstoppable force of nature that can both soothe a storm and crash like a tidal wave.

characters.name: Earthbender
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and resilient soul who faces challenges head-on with unwavering determination and patience.
characters.profile_text:
Stability is the cornerstone of your personality. You are not one to be easily swayed by the opinions of others or the shifting winds of fashion; instead, you stand your ground and wait for the right moment to strike. Your approach to life is practical and direct, often characterized by a tough-love attitude that masks a deeply loyal heart. You excel in environments that require endurance and a steady hand, making you a reliable friend and a formidable adversary. Your greatest strength is your ability to listen to the facts of a situation before making a move.

On the downside, your steadfastness can occasionally cross the line into stubbornness or a refusal to see alternative perspectives. You may find it difficult to adapt when a situation requires agility rather than sheer force. By embracing the concept of neutral jing, you learn that sometimes the best move is to wait and listen. You are the rock upon which others lean, providing a foundation of strength and common sense that keeps everyone around you secure.

characters.name: Firebender
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and driven individual whose inner spark fuels a relentless pursuit of your goals and ambitions.
characters.profile_text:
Your energy is palpable, often manifesting as a fierce determination to succeed and a desire to leave your mark on the world. You are motivated by a strong sense of purpose and a drive that can be both inspiring and intimidating to those around you. Unlike others who might wait for opportunities, you create them, using your willpower to overcome obstacles that would stop anyone else. You value honor and discipline, understanding that power without control is a recipe for destruction. You are a natural leader who thrives when you have a clear mission to accomplish.

This intensity, however, can be a double-edged sword. Your temper may flare quickly, and your single-minded focus can sometimes lead to burnout or the neglect of your personal relationships. Learning to draw your power from the sun and the breath, rather than just raw emotion, allows you to maintain your fire without being consumed by it. When you channel your passion constructively, you become a beacon of light and warmth for everyone in your life.

characters.name: Airbender
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited and peaceful thinker who values harmony, detachment, and the pursuit of spiritual enlightenment.
characters.profile_text:
You navigate life with a lightness of being that others often envy, preferring to avoid conflict whenever possible. Your perspective is broad, allowing you to see the big picture and find creative solutions that others might miss. You are likely drawn to philosophy, travel, or any pursuit that allows you to explore the world and your own mind. Your greatest strength is your flexibility and your ability to find peace even in the midst of chaos. You believe in the sanctity of all life and often act as a mediator in disputes, seeking the path of least resistance.

However, your desire for freedom can sometimes manifest as a lack of commitment or a tendency to head into the clouds when things get difficult. You may struggle with the practicalities of daily life or find it hard to ground yourself when immediate action is required. By finding your center, you can use your agility to protect others while remaining true to your nomadic and peaceful spirit. You remind the world that there is always a way to rise above the fray and find a higher perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: When confronted with an unexpected challenge, which strategy best describes your approach?

options.text: I stand my ground, observe the situation, and wait for the right moment to act.
I adapt my strategy to the changing circumstances, flowing with the situation.
I tackle the problem head-on with intensity and a drive to overcome it quickly.
I look for a creative way to bypass the conflict and find a peaceful resolution.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal attributes do you consider your greatest strength?

options.text: Steadfastness and a practical, reliable nature.
Emotional intelligence and the ability to nurture others.
Ambition and a fierce determination to succeed.
Flexibility and a broad, philosophical perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to intense emotional or environmental pressure?

options.text: I remain grounded and focus on the tangible facts of the situation.
I use the pressure as fuel to sharpen my focus and achieve my goals.
I seek to maintain harmony and find a path that avoids direct confrontation.
I lean on my connections with others and try to redirect the energy constructively.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when working within a community or team?

options.text: Providing a stable foundation and ensuring everyone follows a clear plan.
Leading the group toward a significant achievement or victory.
Acting as a mediator to ensure everyone feels heard and at peace.
Supporting the group's well-being and maintaining strong interpersonal bonds.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you feel most 'at home' in?

options.text: A solid, enduring space that feels permanent and secure.
A dynamic, high-energy setting where I can pursue my passions.
An open, airy space that allows for freedom of movement and thought.
A serene, water-adjacent location that feels connected to nature's cycles.

topics.display_name: Which 'Naruto' Ninja Village Do You Belong To?

synopsis.title: Which 'Naruto' Ninja Village Do You Actually Belong To?
synopsis.summary: The world of Naruto is divided by powerful nations, each with its own unique philosophy and combat style. From the fiery spirit of the Leaf to the cold efficiency of the Mist, your inner ninja has a place to call home. Answer these questions to find out which Hidden Village matches your soul!

characters.name: Hidden Leaf Village
characters.short_description: You are a balanced and community-oriented individual who believes in the power of bonds and the enduring legacy of the Will of Fire.
