characters.profile_text: You possess a natural warmth and a deep-seated belief that the strength of a group is found in the love and protection members offer one another. Like the lush forests surrounding your home, you are versatile and adaptable, capable of excelling in various disciplines while maintaining a core of moral integrity. You value friendship above all else, often putting the needs of your comrades before your own personal gain. This selflessness is your greatest strength, fostering a sense of unity that can overcome even the most daunting obstacles.  However, your idealistic nature can sometimes be a pitfall. You might find yourself overly trusting or prone to internal conflicts when your personal values clash with the harsh realities of the world. You tend to carry the weight of the past on your shoulders, striving to live up to the legends that came before you. While this drives you to achieve greatness, it can also lead to a fear of failure. Embracing your own unique path while honoring tradition is the key to your growth, ensuring that your inner flame never flickers out.

characters.name: Hidden Sand Village
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and pragmatic survivor who thrives in harsh conditions through sheer willpower and tactical ingenuity.
characters.profile_text: Life has taught you that nothing comes easily, and you have developed a stoic, iron-clad resolve as a result. You are not one for flashy displays of emotion; instead, you focus on efficiency and the preservation of resources. Like the shifting dunes, you are patient and observant, waiting for the perfect moment to strike or reveal your true intentions. You likely have a talent for intricate tasks that require precision and foresight, much like a master puppeteer controlling the battlefield from the shadows.  Your independence is a formidable asset, but it can also lead to isolation. You may struggle to open up to others, viewing vulnerability as a weakness in a world that demands constant vigilance. This defensive mindset protects you from harm but can prevent you from forming the deep alliances necessary for long-term stability. By learning to trust in the reliability of others, you can transform your solitary strength into a foundation for a lasting legacy that withstands the test of time.

characters.name: Hidden Mist Village
characters.short_description: You are a mysterious and formidable individual with a sharp edge, shaped by a history of intense struggle and a mastery of the unseen.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a quiet intensity that others find both intriguing and intimidating. You are comfortable in the shadows and the fog, preferring to keep your true motives hidden until the decisive moment. Your strengths lie in your adaptability and your ability to remain calm under extreme pressure. You possess a certain cold pragmatism that allows you to make difficult decisions without hesitation, a trait born from a culture that values results and survival above all else.  Despite your formidable exterior, there is often a deep well of emotion or a complex sense of honor beneath the surface. Your pitfall is a tendency toward cynicism or a belief that you must stand alone to be truly safe. This can lead to a reputation for being unpredictable or even treacherous, even if your intentions are noble. Finding a cause or a person worth your absolute loyalty is your greatest challenge, but once committed, your dedication is as relentless and unstoppable as the rising tide.

characters.name: Hidden Cloud Village
characters.short_description: You are a bold and ambitious powerhouse who values strength, pride, and the unbreakable bonds of brotherhood.
characters.profile_text: You radiate confidence and energy, often acting as a natural leader who inspires those around you to reach new heights. You have little patience for subtlety or hesitation, preferring to meet challenges head-on with overwhelming force and speed. Your pride is not just personal; it extends to your community and your heritage, making you a fierce protector of your own. You value physical and mental excellence, constantly pushing yourself to be the strongest version of yourself possible.  However, your high-spirited nature can sometimes manifest as arrogance or a stubborn refusal to back down even when the odds are against you. You might overlook the nuances of a situation in your haste to achieve victory, leading to avoidable conflicts. Your desire for expansion and dominance can also create friction with those who value peace over progress. Learning to balance your immense power with a touch of humility and diplomatic tact will ensure that your influence is as enduring as a mountain peak.

characters.name: Hidden Stone Village
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and disciplined traditionalist who provides an unyielding foundation of loyalty and defensive strength.
characters.profile_text: You are the rock upon which others lean, known for your unwavering consistency and your commitment to duty. You value structure, hierarchy, and the wisdom of those who came before you. Your approach to life is methodical and deliberate; you do not rush into action without a solid plan and the certainty that you can withstand any counterattack. This defensive mindset makes you an incredible ally, as you are willing to endure any hardship to protect what you hold dear.  Your greatest pitfall is a tendency toward stubbornness and a resistance to change. You may find it difficult to adapt to new ideas or to see perspectives that challenge your established worldview. This rigidity can lead to stagnation if you are not careful, causing you to miss out on opportunities for growth that require a more flexible approach. By recognizing that even the hardest stone can be shaped by the elements, you can learn to integrate new experiences without losing the core of who you are.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden and difficult challenge, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: To find a solution that protects my friends and keeps the group together.
To analyze the situation pragmatically and find the most efficient way to survive.
To remain calm and wait for the perfect moment to strike from the shadows.
To meet the challenge head-on with overwhelming energy and confidence.
To rely on a disciplined, proven plan and stand my ground firmly.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Compassion and the ability to build strong emotional bonds.
Resilience and the tactical ingenuity to thrive in harsh conditions.
Adaptability and the ability to keep my true motives hidden.
Ambition and the drive to reach the absolute peak of my potential.
Loyalty and an unwavering commitment to my duties and traditions.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically prefer to interact with a team or community?

options.text: I treat my comrades like family and believe our unity is our greatest strength.
I am self-reliant and prefer to work alone or in small, efficient units.
I keep a professional distance and observe others before deciding to trust.
I enjoy leading the charge and inspiring others with my pride and energy.
I respect the established hierarchy and focus on fulfilling my specific role.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when it comes to your life's journey?

options.text: Losing the people I love or failing to live up to the legacy of my mentors.
Being vulnerable or finding myself without the resources to survive.
Being exposed or losing control of a situation I've carefully managed.
Being seen as weak or failing to make a significant impact on the world.
Seeing the stable foundations and traditions I value fall into chaos.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments makes you feel most at home?

options.text: A warm, bustling village surrounded by lush, protective forests.
A vast, quiet landscape where only the most resourceful can endure.
A mysterious, shrouded place where secrets are kept and the air is thick with intensity.
A high-altitude city reaching for the clouds, filled with power and ambition.
A sturdy, ancient fortress built into the rock that has stood for centuries.

topics.display_name: Which 'SpongeBob SquarePants' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'SpongeBob SquarePants' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you ready, kids? It's time to dive deep into Bikini Bottom and discover which iconic resident matches your unique personality. Whether you're an eternal optimist or a grumpy neighbor, there is a sea creature that perfectly captures your vibe. Take this quiz to find out if you're the life of the party or just waiting for the Krusty Krab to close!

characters.name: SpongeBob SquarePants
characters.short_description: You are an eternally optimistic, hardworking individual who finds joy in the simplest aspects of life and work.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an infectious enthusiasm that can brighten even the gloomiest of days. Your dedication to your craft is unparalleled, and you take immense pride in every task you undertake, no matter how small. You are a loyal friend who always sees the best in others, often going to great lengths to ensure everyone around you is happy and well-fed.

Your boundless energy and naivety can sometimes lead you into trouble or make you a bit overwhelming for those who prefer a quieter pace. You tend to take things literally and may struggle with boundaries, but your heart is always in the right place. Your greatest strength is your resilience; no matter how many times you fall, you always bounce back with a smile and a ready attitude.

characters.name: Patrick Star
characters.short_description: You are a laid-back, loyal companion who values relaxation and the simple pleasures of friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You live life at your own pace, unburdened by the stresses of the modern world or the complexities of high-stakes ambition. Your philosophy is centered on comfort, snacks, and spending quality time with your best friends. You have a unique perspective on the world that others might find confusing, but your insights often possess a surprising, if accidental, wisdom.

While your carefree nature makes you a fun person to be around, your lack of focus and occasional bouts of stubbornness can be challenging for those trying to get things done. You are prone to oversimplifying problems and might miss the bigger picture, yet your loyalty is unwavering. You are the ultimate support system, always ready to join in on an adventure or simply sit under a rock and do nothing at all.

characters.name: Squidward Tentacles
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated, artistic soul who appreciates the finer things in life and often feels misunderstood by the world around you.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a refined taste for art, music, and culture, often finding yourself at odds with the chaotic energy of your environment. You value your personal space and peace of mind, striving for a life of quiet dignity and creative expression. Your dry wit and realistic outlook provide a necessary balance to the unbridled optimism of others, even if you come across as cynical at times.

Your high standards and desire for recognition can lead to feelings of frustration when things don't go as planned. You may struggle with a sense of superiority that alienates you from potential friends, but deep down, you just want to be appreciated for your talents. Despite your outward grumpiness, you have a hidden depth and a persistent hope that one day your genius will finally be acknowledged by the masses.

characters.name: Mr. Krabs
characters.short_description: You are a savvy, goal-oriented entrepreneur with a sharp eye for profit and a deep protective instinct for your business and family.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a strong work ethic and a desire for financial security, often seeing the world through the lens of opportunity and investment. Your leadership skills are undeniable, and you have a knack for turning a struggling venture into a goldmine through sheer willpower and frugality. You are fiercely protective of your assets and those you care about, showing a softer side primarily to your closest kin.

Your obsession with the bottom line can sometimes make you appear greedy or insensitive to the needs of others. You might prioritize a nickel over a nuance, which can lead to friction in your professional and personal relationships. However, your resourcefulness and ability to weather any economic storm make you a formidable force. You understand the value of a hard-earned dollar and the importance of building a legacy that lasts.

characters.name: Sandy Cheeks
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, adventurous polymath who combines scientific intellect with physical prowess and a competitive spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are a powerhouse of talent, excelling in everything from advanced physics to martial arts. Your thirst for knowledge is matched only by your love for a good challenge, and you are never one to back down from a fight or a difficult experiment. You bring a sense of logic and bravery to every situation, often acting as the voice of reason when things spiral out of control.

Your intense drive and competitive nature can sometimes make you appear intimidating or overly aggressive to those who don't share your stamina. You have high expectations for yourself and others, which can lead to impatience when things move too slowly. Nevertheless, your heart is as big as your home state, and you are always willing to use your skills to protect your friends and the environment you call home.

characters.name: Plankton
characters.short_description: You are a highly ambitious, misunderstood genius who is constantly dreaming up grand schemes to achieve success and recognition.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a brilliant mind capable of inventing complex machinery and elaborate strategies. Your determination is your greatest asset; despite facing constant setbacks and failures, you never give up on your goals. You are a visionary who refuses to settle for mediocrity, always looking for a way to rise above your current circumstances and prove your worth to the world.

Your single-minded focus on your objectives can lead you to ignore the ethical implications of your actions or the value of genuine connection. You often feel like an underdog, which fuels a sense of bitterness that can cloud your judgment and push others away. If you could learn to channel your incredible intellect into more collaborative efforts, there is no limit to what you could achieve, but for now, you remain a lone wolf on a quest for greatness.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach your professional or daily responsibilities?

options.text: With boundless enthusiasm and a desire to be the most helpful person in the room.
By doing the absolute bare minimum required to get back to my leisure time.
With a sense of reluctant obligation, feeling that my true talents are being wasted.
With a laser focus on efficiency, profit, and protecting my hard-earned assets.
By applying rigorous logic and physical discipline to master every challenge.
With a strategic mindset, constantly looking for a way to seize control and prove my genius.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a completely free afternoon?

options.text: Engaging in high-energy social activities or community service.
Napping, snacking, or simply staring at a wall in total peace.
Practicing a refined art form, like playing the clarinet or painting.
Counting my savings and looking for new investment opportunities.
Testing my limits through extreme sports or scientific experimentation.
Drafting elaborate plans to finally achieve the success I deserve.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when you find yourself in a chaotic or noisy environment?

options.text: I embrace the energy and try to make everyone laugh.
I am completely unfazed and might even fall asleep in the middle of it.
I become deeply irritated and vocalize my need for peace and quiet.
I look for a way to monetize the situation or minimize the cost of the disruption.
I take charge of the situation and use my skills to restore order.
I use the confusion as a cover to advance my own secret agenda.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Unwavering optimism and loyalty to my friends.
The ability to remain completely relaxed regardless of the circumstances.
Sophistication, refined taste, and artistic integrity.
Resourcefulness and a sharp eye for financial security.
Intelligence, bravery, and a competitive spirit.
Ambition and the persistence to never give up on my goals.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you face a significant setback or failure, what is your immediate response?

options.text: I stay positive and try again immediately with even more effort.
I usually don't let it bother me and move on to something easier.
I dwell on the unfairness of the world and retreat into my shell.
I calculate the losses and immediately look for a way to recoup them.
I analyze what went wrong and train harder to ensure it never happens again.
I vow revenge and immediately begin plotting a more complex scheme.

topics.display_name: Which 'Stranger Things' Teen Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Stranger Things' Teen Are You?
synopsis.summary: Grab your walkie-talkie and hop on your bike because things are about to get strange in Hawkins. Whether you are the strategic leader of the party or the babysitter with the best hair, your choices in the Upside Down reveal your true self. Take this quiz to find out which iconic teen hero matches your personality before the Mind Flayer finds you.

characters.name: Mike Wheeler
characters.short_description: You are the heart and natural leader of the group, driven by loyalty and a deep sense of responsibility for your friends.
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural-born leader who thrives when you have a mission to protect those you love. Your loyalty is your greatest strength, often acting as the glue that holds your social circle together during times of crisis. You possess a strategic mind, often viewing life through the lens of a grand adventure or a high-stakes game where every move counts. However, your intense focus on the big picture can sometimes make you appear stubborn or dismissive of others' feelings when they do not align with your immediate goals.

You tend to wear your heart on your sleeve, which makes you incredibly sincere but also vulnerable to emotional burnout. While you are brave in the face of supernatural threats, your real challenge lies in navigating the complexities of growing up and maintaining your connections as people change. You value tradition and consistency, often struggling when the dynamics of your group shift. Despite these hurdles, your unwavering commitment to your friends ensures that no one is ever left behind.

characters.name: Eleven
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and protective individual who values freedom and the deep bonds of your chosen family above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an inner strength that is both awe-inspiring and intimidating to those who do not know you well. Having faced significant adversity, you have developed a fierce protective instinct for the people who showed you kindness when you needed it most. You are a person of few words, preferring to let your actions speak for your character. Your journey is one of self-discovery, as you learn to navigate a world that is often confusing and overwhelming while trying to define who you are outside of others' expectations.

Your primary pitfall is a tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, often feeling that you must solve every problem alone to keep others safe. This can lead to isolation and a fear of vulnerability. However, when you allow yourself to trust, you are the ultimate ally. You find joy in the simple things—like a favorite snack or a quiet moment with a loved one—which helps ground you amidst the chaos of your extraordinary life.

characters.name: Dustin Henderson
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant and charismatic intellectual of the group, using your curiosity and logic to solve the most complex puzzles.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your insatiable curiosity and your remarkably sharp intellect. Whether you are tinkering with electronics or decoding secret transmissions, you approach every challenge with a blend of scientific rigor and infectious enthusiasm. You are often the mediator in your friend group, using logic and humor to de-escalate tensions and keep everyone focused on the task at hand. Your confidence in your own abilities is one of your greatest assets, allowing you to forge unique paths and make friends in the most unexpected places.

While your optimism is a beacon for others, your desire to see the best in everything can sometimes lead you into risky situations, such as trying to domesticate things that are better left alone. You might occasionally feel overlooked because you do not fit a traditional mold, but your unique perspective is exactly what makes you indispensable. You value honesty and intellectual integrity, and you are never afraid to speak your mind, even if it means going against the grain.

characters.name: Lucas Sinclair
characters.short_description: You are the pragmatic and courageous realist who balances a strong sense of duty with an evolving open-mindedness.
characters.profile_text:
You are the voice of reason and the backbone of your community, always prioritizing safety and practical solutions. You possess a strong moral compass and a disciplined approach to life, which makes you an incredibly reliable friend and ally. While others might get lost in fantasy or emotion, you keep your feet firmly on the ground, assessing risks and preparing for the worst-case scenario. This pragmatism is your shield, but it can also make you skeptical of new ideas or people who have not yet earned your trust.

As you grow, you are learning to balance your natural skepticism with a newfound appreciation for the extraordinary. You are not afraid to stand up for what is right, even if it means standing alone or challenging your closest friends. Your journey involves finding your own identity while staying true to your roots. You are a person of action, and your bravery is most evident when you are defending your home and the people you care about from any threat, human or otherwise.

characters.name: Max Mayfield
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and independent spirit who hides a deeply caring heart behind a tough, cynical exterior.
characters.profile_text:
You are a fiercely independent individual who has learned to rely on yourself above all others. Your sharp wit and cynical edge serve as a defense mechanism, protecting you from a world that has not always been kind. You are a natural athlete and a thrill-seeker, finding solace in movement and the wind in your face. Beneath your guarded exterior lies a person who feels things very deeply, though you often struggle to express those emotions for fear of appearing weak or being hurt again.

Your greatest challenge is letting people in and allowing yourself to be part of a team. You value your autonomy, but you are slowly discovering that sharing your burdens does not make you less strong. You have a low tolerance for nonsense and a keen eye for spotting insincerity, which makes you a loyal and honest friend once someone manages to break through your walls. Your resilience is unmatched, and you have the rare ability to face your fears head-on, even when the odds are stacked against you.

characters.name: Steve Harrington
characters.short_description: You are a reformed socialite who has transformed into a selfless protector and a surprisingly nurturing mentor.
characters.profile_text:
You have undergone a significant transformation, evolving from a person concerned with status and popularity into a selfless guardian of those younger and more vulnerable than yourself. You possess a natural charm and a protective streak that makes you the ultimate mentor and older sibling figure. While you might not always be the smartest person in the room, your heart is always in the right place, and you are willing to put yourself in harm's way without a second thought to ensure the safety of your friends.

Your pitfalls often involve a lingering sense of insecurity about your future and your place in the world as you transition into adulthood. You can be a bit vain at times, but this is usually overshadowed by your genuine kindness and willingness to admit when you are wrong. You thrive in roles where you can provide support and guidance, finding a new sense of purpose in being the person others can count on. Your journey is a testament to the fact that people can change for the better, proving that true heroism is found in everyday sacrifices.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your friend group is faced with a difficult decision, what is your natural role?

options.text: The strategic leader who keeps everyone focused on the mission.
The quiet protector who acts as the group's secret weapon.
The logical mediator who uses humor and intellect to solve the problem.
The pragmatic realist who assesses risks and keeps everyone grounded.
The independent observer who prefers to handle things on their own.
The nurturing guardian who prioritizes the safety of the younger ones.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you find yourself in a high-pressure or scary situation?

options.text: I take charge immediately, even if I'm feeling stubborn about my plan.
I rely on my inner strength and instincts to shield those I love.
I look for a scientific or technical solution to outsmart the threat.
I stay disciplined and follow a practical, step-by-step defense.
I put up a tough exterior and rely on my own resilience to get through.
I jump into the fray to protect others, regardless of the personal cost.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in a close friendship?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty and a shared sense of adventure.
A deep, unspoken bond and a feeling of being safe.
Intellectual honesty and the freedom to be curious.
Reliability and a strong, shared moral compass.
Total honesty and respect for my personal independence.
The opportunity to support and mentor someone I care about.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest personal challenge when navigating social dynamics?

options.text: Struggling to accept change when the group's dynamic shifts.
Feeling like I have to carry the weight of the world alone.
Being so optimistic that I occasionally overlook real dangers.
Being overly skeptical of new people until they prove themselves.
Difficulty letting my guard down and showing vulnerability.
Dealing with lingering insecurities about my place in the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which activity would you most likely choose for a relaxing afternoon?

options.text: Organizing a complex game or planning a group outing.
Enjoying a quiet moment and a favorite snack in peace.
Tinkering with gadgets or learning a new, obscure fact.
Practicing a skill or working on a practical project.
Going for a solo ride on a skateboard or bike to clear my head.
Giving advice to a friend or looking after someone in need.

topics.display_name: Which Original Pokémon Starter Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Kanto Starter Pokémon Matches Your True Personality?
synopsis.summary: Are you a fiery leader who never backs down from a challenge, or a cool-headed strategist who goes with the flow? Maybe you're the grounded type who provides stability for your friends no matter the weather. Take this nostalgia-fueled journey back to Pallet Town to discover which of the iconic original trio—or the secret fourth option—best represents your spirit.

characters.name: Charmander
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and determined individual who burns with an inner fire and a constant desire to prove your worth.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an intense drive that fuels your ambitions, often making you the most hardworking person in any room. Like the flame on a Charmander's tail, your energy is a direct reflection of your emotional state; when you are excited, you are unstoppable, but you must be careful not to let your temper or stress extinguish your spirit. You value loyalty and growth, always looking for the next challenge that will help you evolve into a more powerful version of yourself. You are a natural trailblazer who isn't afraid to take the heat if it means reaching your goals.

Your competitive nature is a double-edged sword. While it pushes you to achieve greatness, it can also lead to burnout if you do not take the time to rest and recharge. You tend to wear your heart on your sleeve, making you incredibly sincere but also vulnerable to the opinions of those you respect. Learning to balance your fiery passion with a bit of patience will ensure that your light continues to shine brightly for everyone around you. You thrive when you have a clear objective and a team that supports your burning ambition.

characters.name: Squirtle
characters.short_description: You are a cool-headed and reliable leader who knows how to navigate life's challenges with a mix of playfulness and protection.
characters.profile_text:
You have a natural ability to stay calm under pressure, often acting as the anchor for your group of friends or colleagues. You approach life with a certain level of swagger and confidence, much like a member of the Squirtle Squad, but beneath that tough exterior lies a deeply caring heart. You are highly adaptable, able to go with the flow when necessary or stand your ground firmly when your values or loved ones are threatened. Your sense of humor is often your best tool for diffusing tension and making others feel at ease.

Your primary strength is your defensive mindset; you are excellent at anticipating problems before they arise and shielding others from harm. However, your tendency to hide behind a shell can sometimes make you appear distant or emotionally guarded to those who don't know you well. By opening up and sharing your vulnerabilities, you allow others to see the genuine warmth you provide. You thrive in environments where you can lead by example and use your quick wit to solve complex problems while keeping the atmosphere light and fun.

characters.name: Bulbasaur
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and nurturing soul who values stability, growth, and the quiet strength of nature.
characters.profile_text:
You are often seen as the most mature and dependable member of your circle, preferring to take a steady and methodical approach to life. Like the seed on a Bulbasaur's back, you carry a wealth of potential and wisdom that grows over time through patience and care. You are deeply connected to your environment and find peace in the simple things, often acting as a mediator who brings harmony to chaotic situations. You prefer to think before you act, ensuring that every step you take is on solid ground.

While you are incredibly resilient and capable of handling heavy burdens, you sometimes struggle with a resistance to change. You find comfort in your routines and may be hesitant to step out of your comfort zone unless you feel fully prepared for the consequences. Your loyalty is unmatched, and you are the type of person who will always be there to support a friend in need with practical advice and a listening ear. By embracing the occasional transformation, you can blossom into a leader who inspires others with your quiet confidence and enduring strength.

characters.name: Pikachu
characters.short_description: You are an energetic and charismatic spark who lights up every room with your vibrant personality and unwavering spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You have a magnetic personality that draws people toward you, making you a natural center of attention even when you aren't trying to be. Your energy is infectious, and you have a unique ability to turn a dull situation into an exciting adventure just by being yourself. You are fiercely independent and possess a strong sense of justice, never hesitating to stand up for what you believe is right, even if it means going against the grain. You are small but mighty, proving that heart and determination matter far more than physical stature.

Despite your unassuming presence, you pack a powerful punch when it comes to your talents and convictions. Your main challenge lies in managing your high energy levels; if you don't find a productive outlet for your internal electricity, you can become restless or impulsive. You value deep, meaningful connections over superficial ones and are known for being a lifelong friend who stays true to your roots. When you focus your intensity toward a specific goal and work in harmony with those you trust, there is almost nothing that can stand in your way.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a high-pressure situation at work or school?

options.text: I dive in head-first with intense focus, determined to conquer the task immediately.
I stay calm and use quick wit to keep the atmosphere light while I solve the problem.
I take a step back to assess the situation and follow a steady, methodical plan.
I rely on my instincts and high energy to find a creative, unconventional solution.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred role when working on a team project?

options.text: The ambitious visionary who pushes everyone to achieve the best possible results.
The reliable anchor who ensures everyone is protected and the plan is executed smoothly.
The grounded mediator who keeps the peace and provides practical support to others.
The independent spark who brings unique ideas and stands up for the team's values.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to recharge after a long, exhausting week?

options.text: By engaging in a competitive activity or setting a new personal goal to conquer.
By hanging out with a close group of friends and going with the flow of the evening.
By spending time in a peaceful environment or sticking to a relaxing, familiar routine.
By seeking out a spontaneous adventure that lights up my spirit and energy.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My unwavering determination and the fire I have for my passions.
My ability to stay cool under pressure and protect those I care about.
My reliability and the steady growth I have achieved through patience.
My charismatic energy and the strength of my personal convictions.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest concern when facing a major life change?

options.text: Losing my momentum or failing to prove that I have what it takes to succeed.
Being unable to adapt quickly enough or losing my sense of composure.
Being forced out of my comfort zone before I feel fully prepared for the consequences.
Having my independence restricted or losing the spark that makes me unique.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Simpsons' Family Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The Simpsons Family Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're the glue holding your family together or the one causing all the chaos? From saxophone solos to donut cravings, your daily habits reveal which resident of 742 Evergreen Terrace matches your soul. Take this quiz to find out if you're a mastermind, a mischief-maker, or just looking for a nap.

characters.name: Homer Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a fun-loving, donut-craving family man who prioritizes comfort and leisure over the complexities of modern life.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who finds joy in the simplest pleasures, whether it is a cold beverage after work or a long afternoon on the couch. While you might struggle with impulse control and a short attention span, your heart is usually in the right place when it comes to your family. You tend to approach problems with a mix of accidental genius and total bewilderment, often relying on luck to get through the day. Your enthusiasm for life’s basic comforts makes you approachable and relatable to those around you.

However, your tendency to act before thinking can lead to some chaotic situations. You might find yourself caught in get-rich-quick schemes or neglecting responsibilities in favor of a nap, but your resilience is unmatched. No matter how many times you stumble, you always manage to bounce back with a smile and a snack. Your loyalty to your loved ones is your greatest strength, even if you have a funny way of showing it sometimes.

characters.name: Marge Simpson
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate and patient glue that holds your social circle together through unwavering support and moral guidance.
characters.profile_text:
You are the ultimate caregiver, possessing a level of patience that others find truly remarkable. You take pride in maintaining order and harmony in your environment, often putting the needs of others far above your own. Your moral compass is strong, and you aren't afraid to speak up when you feel something isn't right, even if it makes you the "killjoy" of the group. You find fulfillment in domestic stability and the small, quiet moments of domestic bliss that others might overlook.

Despite your calm exterior, you harbor a creative spirit and a deep well of inner strength. You are the person everyone turns to in a crisis because they know you will remain level-headed and resourceful. Your main pitfall is a tendency to suppress your own frustrations to keep the peace, which can lead to occasional outbursts or stress. Learning to carve out time for your own hobbies and interests is essential for your well-being, as your identity is often deeply intertwined with your role as a protector.

characters.name: Bart Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a spirited rebel and a natural prankster who lives for the next big thrill and challenges the status quo.
characters.profile_text:
You are a high-energy individual who views the world as a playground designed for your amusement. Rules and authority figures often feel like obstacles to your personal freedom, and you have a knack for finding the loopholes in any system. Your wit is sharp, and your sense of humor is your primary tool for navigating social hierarchies. You are often the life of the party, bringing a sense of spontaneity and excitement to every situation you encounter.

While your mischievous nature makes you incredibly charismatic, it can also lead to a lack of focus on long-term goals. You might struggle with academic or professional settings that demand rigid conformity, preferring instead to forge your own path. Deep down, you possess a strong sense of loyalty to your friends and a surprising amount of empathy for the underdog. Your challenge is to channel your immense creativity and energy into something productive without losing that signature spark of rebellion.

characters.name: Lisa Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, principled intellectual who strives to make the world a better place through logic, art, and activism.
characters.profile_text:
You are a deep thinker who often feels like an outsider due to your advanced intellect and strong convictions. You value knowledge, culture, and social justice above all else, frequently advocating for causes that others might ignore. Your integrity is your defining trait; you refuse to compromise your values even when it would be easier to fit in. Whether you are mastering a musical instrument or researching a complex topic, you approach everything with a level of dedication and passion that is truly inspiring.

However, your high standards for yourself and the world can sometimes lead to feelings of isolation or cynicism. You may find it difficult to relate to people who don't share your intellectual curiosity or moral urgency. It is important for you to remember that it is okay to let loose and enjoy the moment occasionally. Your strength lies in your ability to see the big picture and your unwavering commitment to doing what is right, making you a natural leader and a voice for change.

characters.name: Maggie Simpson
characters.short_description: You are a quiet observer with a hidden depth of resourcefulness and a surprising ability to handle high-stakes situations.
characters.profile_text:
You are the silent but powerful presence in the room, often underestimated by those who focus only on the loudest voices. You possess a keen sense of observation, taking in every detail of your surroundings while others are distracted. While you may not say much, your actions speak volumes, and you have a surprising knack for getting yourself—and others—out of tight spots. You are remarkably self-sufficient and adaptable, navigating the world with a calm confidence that belies your outward appearance.

Your strength lies in your independence and your ability to remain unfazed by the chaos surrounding you. You don't feel the need to be the center of attention, finding contentment in your own thoughts and small victories. Occasionally, your quiet nature means your needs or talents go unrecognized, but you are perfectly capable of taking care of yourself. You are a reminder that true power doesn't always need to announce itself; sometimes, the most capable person in the room is the one who is simply watching and waiting for the right moment to act.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically feel about following the rules?

options.text: I value them because they maintain order and keep everyone safe.
Rules are just obstacles designed to be challenged or bypassed.
I respect rules that are logical and just, but I will protest those that aren't.
I follow them when I have to, but I'd much rather be relaxing.
I quietly navigate around them while no one is paying attention.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a completely free afternoon?

options.text: Curled up on the couch with my favorite snacks and the TV on.
Practicing a complex hobby, reading, or advocating for a cause.
Catching up on household tasks and making sure my loved ones are happy.
Looking for a thrill, a prank to pull, or a new adventure.
Exploring my surroundings independently and observing the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a social setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The peacemaker who ensures everyone is getting along and feels included.
The entertainer who uses wit and mischief to keep the energy high.
The intellectual who enjoys deep conversations about culture or ethics.
The easy-going guest who is mostly there for the food and good vibes.
The quiet observer who stays in the background but sees everything.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a sudden crisis occurs, what is your first instinct?

options.text: To take charge and provide emotional support and stability for others.
To find a creative, unconventional shortcut to solve the problem quickly.
To analyze the situation logically and find the most principled solution.
To panic briefly, then hope it resolves itself while I find a distraction.
To handle the situation efficiently and silently without seeking credit.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal traits do you consider your greatest strength?

options.text: My unwavering loyalty and ability to find joy in simple things.
My patience and dedication to the well-being of my family.
My rebellious spirit and ability to make any situation exciting.
My integrity and commitment to making the world a better place.
My resourcefulness and ability to thrive even when underestimated.

topics.display_name: Which 'Rick and Morty' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Wubba Lubba Dub Dub: Which 'Rick and Morty' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Prepare to traverse the multiverse and confront your deepest existential anxieties. Whether you're a cynical super-scientist or a high schooler just trying to survive, your choices reveal your true interdimensional identity. Take this quiz to find out if you're the smartest person in the room or just another Jerry.

characters.name: Rick Sanchez
characters.short_description: The smartest man in the universe who balances nihilism with high-concept sci-fi adventures.
characters.profile_text: You are a brilliant, cynical, and fiercely independent individual who views the world through a lens of cold logic and cosmic indifference. Your intellect is your greatest weapon, allowing you to solve impossible problems, yet it often alienates you from those who cannot keep up with your rapid-fire thoughts. You value freedom above all else, frequently rebelling against authority and societal norms that you find tedious or restrictive. You are the ultimate disruptor, always looking for the next thrill or scientific breakthrough to distract from the inherent chaos of existence. Your tendency to mask your emotions with sarcasm and substance use can lead to profound loneliness. While you claim not to care about anything, your occasional flashes of loyalty to your family suggest a buried heart. You must learn to balance your god-like ego with the realization that even the smartest person needs a connection to others to keep from drifting into total despair. You are a force of nature, capable of reshaping reality, but your greatest challenge remains conquering your own internal void.

characters.name: Morty Smith
characters.short_description: A compassionate and anxious teenager who often serves as the moral compass in chaotic situations.
characters.profile_text: You are a sensitive soul who often finds yourself dragged into situations far beyond your comfort zone. Despite your frequent protests and visible anxiety, you possess a surprising amount of resilience and a growing sense of pragmatism. You are the one who notices the human cost of grand schemes, often acting as the voice of reason when things spiral out of control. Your empathy is your greatest strength, even if it makes you vulnerable in a multiverse that rewards ruthlessness. You struggle with self-confidence and often let more dominant personalities dictate your path. However, as you gain experience, you are learning to stand your ground and assert your own values. Your journey is one of finding your own voice in a multiverse that often feels indifferent to your existence, proving that even an average person can have a massive impact. You represent the heart of your social circle, providing the necessary grounding for those who have lost their way in the clouds of high-concept theory. Your growth comes from realizing that your perspective is just as valid as the geniuses around you.

characters.name: Summer Smith
characters.short_description: A savvy and pragmatic young woman who navigates social hierarchies and interdimensional chaos with equal ease.
characters.profile_text: You are sharp, observant, and far more capable than people often give you credit for. Unlike others who might panic in the face of the unknown, you approach challenges with a level-headed coolness and a desire to prove your worth. You have a keen understanding of social dynamics, which you use to your advantage whether you are at a high school party or on a distant alien planet. You value being included and respected for your unique skills, often showing a surprising aptitude for leadership when the situation demands it. Your desire for validation can sometimes lead you to seek approval from the wrong people, but your internal compass usually points you back to what matters. You have a bit of a cynical streak yourself, which can make you appear detached or judgmental to those who don't know you well. However, your fierce loyalty to your family and your ability to handle high-pressure situations make you an indispensable ally. You are carving out your own identity, refusing to be just another face in the crowd or a sidekick in someone else's story.

characters.name: Jerry Smith
characters.short_description: A simple-minded but well-meaning individual who seeks security and validation in a world he rarely understands.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who finds comfort in the mundane and the familiar, often feeling overwhelmed by the complexities of the modern world. Your primary goals are to be liked and to maintain a sense of domestic stability, even if you lack the skills to achieve them effectively. You possess a certain kind of innocence and a desperate need for external approval, which often makes you the target of ridicule, yet you remain remarkably persistent in your quest for a normal life. You find joy in the small things that others might overlook, like a well-mowed lawn or a classic film. Your insecurity often leads you to make poor decisions or to play the victim in order to gain sympathy. You struggle with a lack of self-awareness, which can prevent you from growing or learning from your mistakes. Despite these flaws, your occasional moments of genuine bravery and your simple love for your family show that there is more to you than meets the eye. You just want to belong and feel like you have a place in a universe that feels increasingly alien. Your resilience is found in your ability to keep trying, even when the odds are stacked against you.

characters.name: Beth Smith
characters.short_description: A complex and ambitious professional who struggles to balance her domestic life with her deep-seated desire for significance.
characters.profile_text: You are a highly intelligent and capable individual who often feels trapped by the choices you have made. As a high achiever, you take great pride in your work and your ability to keep your household running, yet you harbor a lingering sense of dissatisfaction and a fear of being ordinary. You share a sharp wit and a streak of independence with your father, which often puts you at odds with the more conventional aspects of your life. You are a protector at heart, but your methods can be intense and uncompromising. Your need for control and your fear of abandonment can make you appear cold or demanding to those closest to you. You often struggle with your own identity, wondering if you are living the life you truly wanted or if you are merely reacting to the expectations of others. By acknowledging your vulnerabilities and your need for connection, you can find a way to reconcile your ambitious nature with your role as a pillar of your family. You are a woman of substance who is constantly evolving, seeking a way to be both a brilliant individual and a loving presence in the lives of those you care about.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, life-threatening interdimensional crisis, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: Use my superior intellect to invent a way out while mocking the absurdity of the situation.
Panic visibly but eventually try to do the most moral thing possible to save everyone.
Stay calm, assess the social dynamics, and find a pragmatic way to ensure my own survival.
Hide and hope someone else fixes it so I can go back to my comfortable, normal routine.
Take command of the situation immediately and ensure everything stays under my strict control.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle the internal fear of being 'ordinary' or 'unimportant'?

options.text: I don't; I already know I am the most unique and capable person in any room.
I'm actually fine with being ordinary as long as I am safe, liked, and have a nice lawn.
It is my biggest fear, so I push myself to achieve high-status professional goals and significance.
I try to stand out by being cooler, more savvy, and more capable than my peers.
I'm usually too busy worrying about surviving the day to care about being 'special.'

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a free afternoon when no one is making demands of you?

options.text: Tinkering with a dangerous experiment or traveling to a different reality for a thrill.
Doing something simple and safe, like watching a classic movie or organizing my collection.
Trying to get invited to the best social event or hanging out with the 'right' crowd.
Just trying to have a quiet, normal day without any traumatic events occurring.
Working on a complex project or managing my household affairs to absolute perfection.

baseline_questions.question_text: When someone you care about is in serious trouble, how do you respond?

options.text: I solve the problem efficiently, though I might complain about their incompetence the whole time.
I offer genuine emotional support and try to help, even if I am terrified of the consequences.
I look for a practical solution that keeps our reputation intact and solves the issue quickly.
I make it about how their trouble is affecting my stress levels and seek pity for my situation.
I fiercely protect them while making sure they know exactly what they did wrong to get there.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal philosophy on the nature of the universe?

options.text: Nothing matters, so you might as well be the smartest person in the room and do what you want.
The universe is scary and weird, but being kind to the people around you is what counts.
You have to play the social game and look good doing it to get the respect you deserve.
I just want everyone to like me and for things to stay exactly the way they are.
Success, competence, and control are the only ways to keep the surrounding chaos at bay.

topics.display_name: What Is Your Role in the 'One Piece' Straw Hat Crew?

synopsis.title: What Is Your Role in the 'One Piece' Straw Hat Crew?
synopsis.summary: Set sail for the Grand Line and discover where you fit in Monkey D. Luffy's legendary crew. Whether you are navigating treacherous seas or cooking up a feast for your nakama, every member brings a vital skill to the Thousand Sunny. Answer these questions to reveal which iconic Straw Hat pirate matches your personality and role.

characters.name: Monkey D. Luffy
characters.short_description: You are the fearless and charismatic Captain who leads with instinct and an unwavering commitment to freedom.
characters.profile_text: You possess an indomitable spirit and a natural ability to draw people to your cause, making you the heart and soul of the crew. Your leadership style is unconventional; you do not micromanage your friends but instead trust them implicitly to handle their own roles while you focus on the big picture and the next big adventure. You are driven by a simple yet profound desire for liberty, often acting on gut feeling rather than complex strategy, which can lead you into dangerous situations that require your immense physical strength to resolve. Your greatest strength lies in your resilience and your capacity to inspire hope in the darkest of times. However, your impulsive nature and lack of foresight can sometimes put your crew at risk, as you often charge headfirst into conflict without considering the logistical consequences. Despite these pitfalls, your loyalty is absolute, and you would go to the ends of the earth to protect anyone you consider a comrade. You thrive in the heat of battle and find joy in the simplest pleasures, embodying the true essence of a pirate seeking the ultimate treasure.

characters.name: Roronoa Zoro
characters.short_description: You are the disciplined and stoic Combatant who serves as the crew's primary powerhouse and the Captain's right hand.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your iron will and a rigorous commitment to your personal goals, often spending your free time training to become the world's greatest swordsman. As the first member to join the crew, you hold a position of deep respect, acting as the voice of reason and the enforcer of discipline when the situation turns dire. You prefer to let your blades do the talking, maintaining a stern exterior that masks a deep-seated sense of honor and a willingness to sacrifice yourself for the sake of your friends. In high-pressure scenarios, you are the one everyone looks to for stability and raw power. Your focus is legendary, allowing you to overcome seemingly impossible odds through sheer determination and martial skill. Your main pitfall is a literal and metaphorical lack of direction, as you frequently find yourself lost in simple environments, and your bluntness can sometimes come across as coldness. Nevertheless, your reliability is unmatched, and your presence ensures that the crew remains grounded and prepared for the most formidable enemies the sea has to offer.

characters.name: Nami
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant and resourceful Navigator who manages the crew's survival through expert weather prediction and financial oversight.
characters.profile_text: You serve as the brains behind the operation, utilizing your vast knowledge of cartography and meteorology to guide the ship through the most treacherous waters. While others might focus on combat, you are the one ensuring the crew actually reaches their destination safely, often acting as the de facto manager of the ship's daily life and budget. You have a sharp wit and a keen eye for opportunity, which makes you an expert negotiator and a vital asset when it comes to gathering information or securing resources. Your strengths lie in your intelligence and your ability to think several steps ahead of everyone else. You are often the one to pull the crew out of chaos with a well-timed plan or a stern command. However, your love for treasure and your tendency to be bossy can sometimes lead to friction with your more laid-back crewmates. Despite your occasional pragmatism, you possess a deeply compassionate heart and will use every ounce of your cleverness to protect those you love, proving that knowledge is just as powerful as any physical weapon.

characters.name: Usopp
characters.short_description: You are the creative and sharp-eyed Sniper who uses ingenuity and storytelling to overcome your fears and support the team.
characters.profile_text: You are the crew's resident tinkerer and marksman, often relying on your imagination to invent gadgets and strategies that bridge the gap between your physical strength and the monsters you face. While you are prone to bouts of cowardice and tall tales, these traits stem from a deep-seated desire to be a brave warrior of the sea despite your insecurities. You excel at long-range combat and psychological warfare, using your precision and quick thinking to turn the tide of battle from the sidelines where others might not even notice your contribution. Your greatest asset is your versatility and your ability to see solutions that more straightforward fighters might miss. You bring a sense of levity and humanity to the crew, often being the most relatable member due to your very real fears. Your pitfall is your tendency to doubt yourself or retreat when things get tough, but you consistently find the courage to stand your ground when it truly matters. Your journey is one of constant growth, proving that true bravery is not the absence of fear, but the decision to act in spite of it.

characters.name: Sanji
characters.short_description: You are the chivalrous and sophisticated Cook who provides both essential sustenance and powerful tactical support in battle.
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of the crew's physical health, dedicated to the art of culinary excellence and the belief that no one should ever go hungry. Beyond the kitchen, you are a formidable fighter who utilizes a unique kick-based style to protect your hands for cooking. You carry yourself with a certain level of refinement and tactical awareness, often acting as a secret agent for the crew by slipping away to sabotage enemy plans or provide timely reinforcements. Your devotion to your craft is matched only by your unwavering code of chivalry. Your strengths include your strategic mind and your intense passion, which fuels both your cooking and your combat prowess. You are often the most observant member of the group, noticing details that others overlook. However, your extreme weakness for romance and your refusal to ever harm a woman can be significant liabilities in certain confrontations. Despite these quirks, your loyalty is fierce, and you take immense pride in serving your friends, ensuring they are always well-fed and ready for whatever challenges the Grand Line throws their way.

characters.name: Tony Tony Chopper
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate and gifted Doctor who uses your medical expertise and transformative abilities to heal and protect your family.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart of the crew's well-being, possessing an incredible depth of medical knowledge and a sincere desire to cure every disease in the world. As a reindeer who ate the Human-Human Fruit, you occupy a unique position, often acting as the bridge between different worlds and species. You are naturally curious and somewhat naive, which gives you a pure-hearted outlook that often endears you to everyone you meet. In combat, you utilize various transformations to adapt to the situation, shifting from a small, agile scout to a massive, powerful defender. Your primary strength is your empathy and your unwavering dedication to your role as a healer, often putting yourself in harm's way to treat a patient. You are a diligent student of science and medicine, always looking for ways to improve your skills. Your main pitfall is your lack of confidence and your tendency to be easily intimidated or fooled by obvious lies. However, when your friends are in danger, you cast aside your fears and tap into a hidden well of strength, proving that even the smallest member of the crew can be a giant when it comes to protecting their family.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your group is faced with a difficult decision, what is your primary approach?

options.text: I follow my instincts and choose the path that feels the most exciting.
I remain stoic and support the decision that requires the most discipline.
I analyze the facts and choose the most pragmatic, resource-efficient option.
I look for a creative or unconventional way to avoid unnecessary risks.
I observe the situation carefully and suggest a refined, strategic move.
I prioritize the safety and emotional well-being of everyone involved.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most significant contribution to a collective effort?

options.text: Providing the inspiration and energy to keep the team moving forward.
Taking on the most grueling tasks through sheer willpower and strength.
Managing the logistics, finances, and navigation of the project.
Inventing clever solutions and providing support from a distance.
Handling essential daily needs while executing tactical side-missions.
Offering specialized expertise and caring for those who are struggling.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to a high-pressure or frightening situation?

options.text: I confront it head-on without hesitation, regardless of the danger.
I stand my ground with iron resolve and focus on my duty.
I stay level-headed and look for the quickest way to regain control.
I feel the fear deeply but use my ingenuity to find a way to survive.
I remain composed and look for a hidden advantage to exploit.
I focus on protecting others and ensuring no one gets hurt.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal values is most important to you?

options.text: Absolute freedom and the ability to follow my own path.
Personal honor and the mastery of my chosen craft.
Intelligence and the security of my future and my friends.
The courage to overcome my insecurities and grow as a person.
A strict personal code and dedication to serving others.
Compassion and the pursuit of knowledge to help the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to spend your time when you aren't working toward a goal?

options.text: Looking for a new adventure or a way to have fun with my friends.
Engaging in rigorous self-improvement or physical training.
Reviewing my progress and planning for upcoming challenges.
Tinkering with new ideas or sharing stories of my experiences.
Indulging in my passions and ensuring my environment is refined.
Studying new topics or checking in on the health of my peers.

topics.display_name: Which 'Dragon Ball Z' Warrior Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Dragon Ball Z' Warrior Matches Your Power Level?
synopsis.summary: Are you the type to train in 100x gravity or do you prefer to wait for the perfect moment to strike? From the fiery pride of the Saiyan Prince to the pure-hearted determination of Earth's greatest hero, your personality reveals your inner Z-Fighter. Take this quiz to find out which legendary warrior you truly are before the next world-ending threat arrives!

characters.name: Goku
characters.short_description: You are the pure-hearted hero who finds joy in the thrill of a fair fight and the pursuit of self-improvement.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unquenchable thirst for growth and a legendary optimism that inspires everyone around you. Your approach to life is simple: you see every challenge as an opportunity to test your limits and every enemy as a potential friend. While others might be driven by pride or fear, you are motivated by the pure love of the journey, often prioritizing a good match over practical safety. However, your naive nature and tendency to give others the benefit of the doubt can sometimes lead to trouble. You might overlook the complexities of a situation because you are so focused on the excitement of the moment. Despite this, your resilience is unmatched, and you have a unique ability to break through your own ceilings when the stakes are highest. You represent the ultimate ideal of perseverance and the belief that there is always a higher level to reach if you just keep training.

characters.name: Vegeta
characters.short_description: You are a proud and disciplined warrior driven by an intense desire to be the absolute best through sheer willpower.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your fierce independence and a relentless work ethic that borders on obsession. Your pride is your greatest strength and your most significant burden, pushing you to surpass your rivals while making it difficult for you to accept help from others. You value strength and merit above all else, often maintaining a cold or aloof exterior to protect your inner vulnerabilities. Beneath that hardened shell lies a deep sense of loyalty to those you eventually deem worthy of your respect. Your journey is one of constant evolution, moving from a self-centered worldview to one where you protect what you love with unmatched ferocity. Your biggest pitfall is your ego, which can lead to frustration when things do not go according to your plan, but your ability to reinvent yourself ensures you never stay down for long. You are a testament to the power of self-transformation and the dignity of the underdog.

characters.name: Gohan
characters.short_description: You are a gentle soul with immense hidden potential who fights only when necessary to protect the people you love.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of great intellect and kindness, preferring peace and scholarly pursuits over the heat of battle. Unlike those who seek out conflict for fun, you only step into the fray when the safety of your friends and family is on the line. This protective instinct unlocks a level of power that often surprises even you, making you a formidable force when pushed to your limit. You struggle with the balance between your desire for a normal life and the heavy expectations placed upon your shoulders. Your greatest strength is your empathy, which allows you to see the value in life that others might overlook. However, your reluctance to fight can sometimes lead to hesitation at critical moments. When you finally commit to a path, your focus is absolute, proving that true power comes from a heart that cares deeply for others. You show that one can be both soft-hearted and incredibly powerful.

characters.name: Piccolo
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and tactical thinker who values wisdom, discipline, and the growth of those you mentor.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate strategist, often observing from the sidelines before making a decisive and calculated move. Your personality is marked by a stern exterior and a solitary nature, but this masks a profound sense of duty and a surprisingly nurturing spirit. You take pride in your self-sufficiency and your ability to remain calm under pressure, often serving as the voice of reason when others lose their heads. Your growth from a loner to a trusted guardian shows your capacity for change and your deep-seated integrity. While you may seem unapproachable, you are fiercely loyal to your students and allies, often sacrificing your own well-being for their success. Your main challenge is your tendency to isolate yourself, which can prevent you from fully connecting with the community you help protect. Nevertheless, your wisdom and tactical brilliance make you an indispensable pillar of strength. You are the quiet force that keeps the team grounded and prepared.

characters.name: Krillin
characters.short_description: You are a courageous and resourceful friend who faces overwhelming odds with heart and cleverness.
characters.profile_text: You may not be the strongest person in the room, but you are undoubtedly one of the bravest and most reliable. You understand your limitations better than anyone, which forces you to rely on your wits, technique, and unwavering loyalty to bridge the gap. You are the glue that holds your social circle together, always ready with a joke or a helping hand when things get tense. Your life is a testament to the power of persistence, as you continue to stand your ground against threats that would terrify most people. Your biggest strength is your relatability and your capacity for joy, finding happiness in the small things like family and friendship. Sometimes you struggle with self-doubt when comparing yourself to those with natural advantages, but your ability to overcome fear is what truly defines your character. You prove that being a hero is not about how much power you have, but how much heart you bring to the fight. You are the ultimate companion and a true warrior of the spirit.

characters.name: Frieza
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and ambitious leader who commands respect through elegance, intellect, and absolute authority.
characters.profile_text: You possess a refined sense of style and a sharp, calculating mind that places you several steps ahead of your competition. You are driven by a desire for control and a belief in your own inherent superiority, often viewing the world as a game where you are the rightful master. Your charisma is undeniable, but it is often used to manipulate or intimidate those who stand in your way. You value order and results, and you have little patience for incompetence or those who challenge your status. Your greatest pitfall is your arrogance, which can blind you to the rising potential of your enemies or the flaws in your own plans. Despite your ruthless reputation, you are a master of self-preservation and can be surprisingly diplomatic when it serves your long-term interests. You are a force of nature who demands the spotlight, and your presence is felt in every room you enter, leaving a lasting impression of power and precision. You represent the cold, calculating side of ambition.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when facing a difficult task?

options.text: The thrill of testing my own limits and improving my skills.
The need to prove I am the best through sheer willpower.
Ensuring the safety and well-being of those I care about.
Fulfilling a strategic duty or responsibility with discipline.
Supporting my friends and doing my part despite the odds.
Establishing my authority and achieving total control.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave in a team setting?

options.text: I lead by example and keep everyone's spirits high.
I prefer to work alone and only cooperate when it is necessary.
I contribute my skills but prefer to stay out of the spotlight.
I act as the strategist and mentor to the other members.
I am the reliable glue that keeps the group together.
I expect others to follow my lead and execute my vision.

baseline_questions.question_text: When confronted with an unexpected obstacle, what is your first instinct?

options.text: To face it head-on with excitement and energy.
To push through it with intense focus and aggression.
To try and find a peaceful or intellectual solution first.
To step back and analyze the situation for weaknesses.
To use my wits and find a clever way to bypass the problem.
To eliminate the obstacle efficiently and decisively.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to spend your ideal downtime?

options.text: Practicing a hobby or sport to reach the next level.
Pushing myself physically in a private, intense workout.
Reading, studying, or spending quiet time with family.
Meditating in a quiet, secluded location to find balance.
Relaxing and laughing with a close circle of friends.
Planning my next big move in a comfortable, high-end setting.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you consider your greatest personal strength?

options.text: My boundless optimism and resilience.
My unwavering pride and determination.
My hidden potential and capacity for empathy.
My wisdom and tactical mind.
My courage in the face of overwhelming odds.
My sophisticated intellect and commanding presence.

topics.display_name: Which 'Sailor Moon' Scout Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Sailor Moon Scout Matches Your Cosmic Energy?
synopsis.summary: Are you a natural-born leader with a love for justice, or do you prefer the quiet strength of the outer planets? From the bubbly optimism of Usagi to the fierce determination of Rei, every Scout brings a unique power to the team. Take this quiz to discover which celestial warrior is your true kindred spirit. It's time to transform and find your place among the stars!

characters.name: Sailor Moon
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate leader who believes in the power of love and friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense heart and empathy, often putting the needs of others before your own. While you might struggle with procrastination or a bit of clumsiness in your daily life, your true strength shines when those you care about are in danger. You possess an uncanny ability to see the good in everyone, even your enemies, which makes you a beacon of hope in the darkest times. Your emotional intelligence is your greatest asset, allowing you to forge deep connections with a diverse array of people. However, your sensitivity can sometimes lead to self-doubt or emotional overwhelm. You thrive when surrounded by a supportive team that appreciates your warmth and sincerity. Your journey is one of growth, transforming from a reluctant hero into a courageous protector who leads not through force, but through the purity of your spirit and your unwavering belief in a better world.

characters.name: Sailor Mercury
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant strategist who uses logic and intelligence to protect your friends and solve complex problems.
characters.profile_text: You are the intellectual backbone of your group, characterized by your sharp mind and calm demeanor. You value knowledge and education, often spending your free time immersed in books or technology to better understand the world around you. While others might act on impulse, you prefer to analyze the situation and find the most efficient solution. Your quiet nature can sometimes be mistaken for shyness, but beneath that exterior lies a fiercely loyal friend who will go to any lengths to ensure the safety of your companions. Your primary challenge is learning to balance your analytical side with your emotions. You may occasionally feel pressured by high expectations, whether they come from others or your own internal drive for perfection. Despite this, your ability to remain level-headed under pressure makes you an indispensable ally. You prove that true power comes from clarity of thought and a kind heart, showing that wisdom is just as vital as physical strength in any battle.

characters.name: Sailor Mars
characters.short_description: You are the fiery and disciplined guardian who possesses deep spiritual insight and a strong sense of duty.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of intense passion and unwavering focus, often serving as the voice of reason and discipline within your circle. Your spiritual awareness gives you a unique perspective on the world, allowing you to sense hidden truths and impending dangers that others might miss. You are not afraid to speak your mind, even if it leads to occasional friction with those you love, because you value honesty and integrity above all else. This directness is a sign of your deep investment in the well-being of your friends. While your exterior may seem tough or even intimidating, you possess a deeply traditional and elegant soul. You find solace in rituals and personal discipline, which help you channel your inner fire into constructive action. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward stubbornness or a quick temper when things don't go as planned. However, your loyalty is absolute, and your protective instincts are unmatched. You are the flame that lights the way, providing both warmth and a fierce defense against the shadows.

characters.name: Sailor Jupiter
characters.short_description: You are the powerful and nurturing warrior who balances physical strength with a love for domestic arts and nature.
characters.profile_text: You are a unique blend of toughness and tenderness, possessing the physical strength to stand up to any bully and the gentle hands required to bake a perfect cake. Your independence was forged through personal challenges, making you self-reliant and incredibly resilient. You have a big heart and a romantic spirit, often dreaming of a future filled with love and beauty while remaining grounded in the practicalities of the present. You are the person your friends turn to when they need a protector or a comforting meal, as your nurturing instincts are as strong as your lightning strikes. Your tendency to be protective can sometimes border on overbearing, and your past experiences might make you hesitant to fully open up at first. However, once you consider someone a friend, you are their most steadfast defender. You find joy in the simple things, like gardening or cooking, which provide a necessary balance to your more adventurous and combative side.
