characters.short_description: You are the hyper-organized, overachieving perfectionist who finds true joy in binders, rules, and professional validation.
characters.profile_text:
You are the definition of a high achiever, driven by a deep-seated need for structure and the approval of authority figures. Your life is organized into meticulously labeled binders, and you likely have a color-coded calendar for your color-coded calendars. You take immense pride in your work ethic and your encyclopedic knowledge of police procedure, often serving as the moral and technical compass for those around you. While some might call you a teacher's pet, your dedication ensures that every detail is perfect and every goal is met.

Your attention to detail is your greatest asset, but your competitive nature and anxiety over breaking rules can lead to unnecessary stress. You struggle when things go off-script, yet your resilience and preparation make you an indispensable leader in the making. Beneath the rigid exterior lies a fiercely loyal friend who will go to any lengths to support the people you care about, provided it doesn't involve getting a B on a test. You prove that being prepared is the ultimate superpower.

characters.name: Rosa Diaz
characters.short_description: You are the tough, enigmatic, and fiercely private detective who commands respect through a stoic exterior and a sharp edge.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of few words and many secrets, preferring to let your actions and your intimidating presence speak for you. You value your privacy above all else and have a low tolerance for nonsense, sentimentality, or anyone touching your desk. Despite your terrifying reputation and your collection of weaponry, you possess a strong moral code and a surprising amount of empathy for those you deem worthy of your trust. You are the person everyone wants in their corner during a fight because you never back down and you never blink.

Your strength lies in your independence and your ability to remain calm under extreme pressure. However, your tendency to push people away and your struggle with emotional vulnerability can make it difficult for others to get close to you. When you do let someone in, you are a ride-or-die ally who offers unwavering support, even if you deliver it with a scowl. You are a master of efficiency and a force to be reckoned with in any situation, proving that you don't need to be loud to be powerful.

characters.name: Charles Boyle
characters.short_description: You are the eccentric, food-obsessed, and intensely loyal best friend who wears your heart and your culinary tastes on your sleeve.
characters.profile_text:
You are the ultimate number two, finding your greatest joy in supporting your friends and sharing your passion for obscure, often pungent, international delicacies. Your enthusiasm is boundless, whether you are discussing the texture of a rare cheese or the intricacies of a high-stakes investigation. You are unapologetically yourself, embracing your quirks and your family traditions without a hint of irony. Your capacity for love and devotion is unmatched, and you often prioritize the happiness of others far above your own.

Your greatest strength is your unwavering loyalty and your ability to find beauty in the unconventional. On the flip side, your lack of boundaries and tendency to overshare can sometimes make those around you uncomfortable. You are often underestimated because of your gentle nature, but your persistence and unique perspective make you a vital asset to the team. You prove that being a hero doesn't require a tough exterior, just a big heart and a very specific palate for artisanal sourdough.

characters.name: Raymond Holt
characters.short_description: You are the stoic, dignified, and highly principled leader who values logic, discipline, and the pursuit of excellence.
characters.profile_text:
You are a pillar of integrity and professionalism, navigating the world with a level of gravitas that commands immediate respect. You believe in the power of rules and the importance of decorum, often expressing your emotions through subtle shifts in your vocabulary rather than outward displays. Your journey has been defined by overcoming adversity through sheer competence and a refusal to compromise your values. You are a mentor at heart, dedicated to bringing out the best in your subordinates while maintaining the highest standards of the badge.

Your analytical mind and unwavering composure are your greatest tools, allowing you to solve complex problems with surgical precision. However, your rigid adherence to protocol and your difficulty connecting with others on a casual level can sometimes make you seem distant. Beneath the formal exterior is a man of dry wit and profound loyalty who cares deeply for his work family. You lead by example, proving that true strength comes from discipline, a commitment to doing what is right, and perhaps a well-groomed corgi.

characters.name: Terry Jeffords
characters.short_description: You are the gentle giant and devoted family man who balances immense physical strength with a sensitive soul and a love for yogurt.
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds the precinct together, serving as a protective father figure who is as concerned with his team's emotional well-being as he is with their case closure rates. You possess incredible physical power, yet you prefer to use your strength for building things and hugging your loved ones rather than intimidation. You are highly disciplined, whether it is in the gym or managing the administrative chaos of the office, and you take great pride in your roles as a husband and father. Your catchphrases reflect a man who finds joy in the simple things in life.

Your empathy and protective nature make you a natural leader, but your fear of leaving your family behind can sometimes lead to hesitation in the field. You often take on too much responsibility, trying to fix everyone's problems while neglecting your own needs for rest or creative expression. Despite this, your reliability and warmth make you the person everyone turns to in a crisis. You are a testament to the fact that one can be both the strongest person in the room and the most compassionate.

topics.display_name: Which 'New Girl' Roommate Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'New Girl' Roommate Are You?
synopsis.summary: Do you find yourself constantly putting money in the douchebag jar, or are you more likely to be singing to yourself in the shower? Life in the loft is a beautiful mess of True American games and emotional breakthroughs. It's time to find out which member of the 4D gang truly matches your chaotic energy.

characters.name: Jess Day
characters.short_description: You are the bubbly, creative heart of the group who believes in the power of optimism and a well-timed musical number.
characters.profile_text: You are a beacon of optimism and creativity, often finding the silver lining in situations where others only see chaos. Your personality is defined by a quirky charm and a deep-seated desire to help everyone around you, even if they didn't ask for it. You likely have a collection of craft supplies and a wardrobe full of vintage dresses, reflecting your vibrant and unique approach to life. While your enthusiasm is infectious, you sometimes struggle with boundaries and can become overly invested in fixing other people's problems. Your strengths lie in your unwavering loyalty and your ability to make anyone feel seen and heard. You aren't afraid to be your authentic, slightly awkward self, which encourages others to drop their guards. However, your sensitivity means you can be easily hurt by cynicism or rejection. You thrive when you are surrounded by friends who appreciate your eccentricities and when you have a creative outlet to channel your boundless energy and emotions.

characters.name: Nick Miller
characters.short_description: You are a cynical yet deeply loyal soul who prefers sweatpants and a cold beer over the complexities of modern adulthood.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate curmudgeon with a heart of gold, often hiding your brilliance behind a layer of stubbornness and a refusal to use napkins. You value simplicity and authenticity above all else, feeling most at home in a dive bar or writing your next great American novel in a messy room. While you might come across as lazy or unmotivated, your loyalty to your friends is unmatched, and you would do anything for the people you love, even if you complain the entire time. Your pitfalls often involve a fear of failure and a tendency to self-sabotage when things start going too well. You find comfort in the familiar and can be resistant to change or emotional vulnerability. Despite your gruff exterior, you possess a surprising amount of wisdom and a unique perspective on the world. You are a true original who doesn't care about social status, making you the grounded, if slightly chaotic, anchor of your social circle.

characters.name: Schmidt
characters.short_description: You are a high-achieving, meticulously groomed perfectionist who balances intense ambition with a surprisingly vulnerable heart.
characters.profile_text: You are the definition of extra, from your impeccably tailored suits to your encyclopedic knowledge of high-end cheeses and home decor. You strive for excellence in every facet of your life, whether it is your career in marketing or maintaining the cleanliness of your living space. This drive often stems from a past where you felt overlooked, leading you to cultivate a persona of confidence and sophistication. You are fiercely protective of your friends and often express your love through grand gestures and unsolicited advice. Your primary struggle is your need for control and your tendency to be overly critical of yourself and others. You can be prone to vanity and social climbing, yet your genuine devotion to your inner circle always shines through. Beneath the bravado and the douchebag jar moments, you are a deeply sentimental person who just wants to be accepted. You thrive in environments where your hard work is recognized and where you can indulge your taste for the finer things in life.

characters.name: Winston Bishop
characters.short_description: You are a delightfully eccentric individual who marches to the beat of your own drum, often accompanied by a cat and a questionable prank.
characters.profile_text: You are the wild card of the group, possessing a sense of humor and a worldview that is entirely your own. Whether you are getting overly invested in a jigsaw puzzle or planning a prank that is either too small or way too big, you bring a unique energy to every room. You have a deep capacity for empathy and a quirky tenderness, especially when it comes to your feline companions. Your journey is often one of self-discovery, as you aren't afraid to pivot careers or hobbies until you find what truly makes you happy. While you are incredibly kind and supportive, your eccentricities can sometimes leave others feeling a bit confused. You tend to get lost in your own world, which can make you seem detached from reality, but your intentions are always pure. Your strength is your resilience and your ability to find joy in the smallest, weirdest things. You are the friend who provides the much-needed comic relief and the unexpected wisdom that keeps everyone on their toes.

characters.name: Cece Parekh
characters.short_description: You are a stunningly confident and street-smart individual who serves as the grounded, protective voice of reason for your friends.
characters.profile_text: You possess a cool, effortless exterior that often masks a deeply caring and protective nature. As someone who has navigated the high-pressure world of modeling, you have developed a thick skin and a sharp wit that allows you to hold your own in any situation. You are the person your friends turn to when they need a reality check or a fierce defender. While you might appear intimidating at first, those who know you best understand that you are incredibly loyal and would go to the ends of the earth for your chosen family. Your journey involves learning to embrace your own vulnerabilities and realizing that you don't always have to have everything figured out. You sometimes struggle with admitting when you need help, preferring to be the one providing the support. Your strengths lie in your emotional intelligence and your ability to see through people's facades. You are the perfect balance of toughness and tenderness, making you an indispensable part of your social group and a true confidante to those you love.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a major disagreement with a close friend?

options.text: I try to mediate with a heartfelt conversation or a creative, handmade gesture.
I get defensive, retreat to my room, and hope the problem goes away on its own.
I provide a detailed critique of their logic and try to micro-manage the solution.
I try to lighten the mood with a joke or a very confusing, poorly timed prank.
I tell them the blunt truth directly and wait for them to handle the reality check.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal Saturday night look like?

options.text: Hosting a themed craft night or a musical sing-along with friends.
Sitting in a dive bar with a cheap beer, wearing my favorite old hoodie.
Attending an exclusive social event or meticulously deep-cleaning my living space.
Staying in to finish a complex jigsaw puzzle while hanging out with a pet.
Going out to a trendy spot but mostly just observing the chaos around me.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your inner circle describe your role in the group?

options.text: The emotional glue and the eternal optimist who keeps everyone happy.
The grumpy but fiercely loyal anchor who hates change.
The high-achiever who maintains the standards and handles the logistics.
The unpredictable wild card who brings a unique, eccentric perspective.
The grounded protector who gives the best reality checks when things get messy.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the current state of your personal living space?

options.text: A vibrant explosion of vintage finds, polka dots, and DIY projects.
A 'lived-in' mess where I know exactly where my one clean shirt is.
A pristine sanctuary with high-end decor and a perfectly organized closet.
A cozy, slightly weird space filled with quirky memorabilia and cat toys.
Chic, minimalist, and effortlessly put-together despite a busy schedule.

baseline_questions.question_text: When life gets overwhelming, what is your primary coping mechanism?

options.text: I bake a batch of cupcakes or burst into a spontaneous, emotional song.
I panic, sweat profusely, and refuse to acknowledge the problem exists.
I obsess over small details and buy something expensive to feel in control.
I lean into my eccentricities and find joy in a strange new hobby.
I put on a brave face and focus on being the strong one for everyone else.

topics.display_name: Which 'Modern Family' Parent Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Modern Family' Parent Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the king of 'Phil's-osophy' or the master of the 'look' that keeps the whole house in line? Whether you are planning an elaborate musical number or just trying to get through a family brunch without a disaster, everyone fits into this chaotic family tree. Take this quiz to find out which iconic parent matches your unique parenting style and personality.

characters.name: Phil Dunphy
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate "cool dad" who leads with boundless optimism, magic tricks, and a heart of gold.
characters.profile_text:
You are a dreamer who believes that life is best lived with a sense of wonder and a few "Phil-osophies" to guide the way. Your parenting style is defined by your desire to be your children's best friend, often leading you into goofy schemes or elaborate technological mishaps. While your enthusiasm can sometimes be overwhelming, your genuine kindness and unwavering support make you the emotional glue of the family. You excel at finding the silver lining in every cloud, even if that cloud is a literal trampoline accident.

You struggle with setting boundaries and can be easily distracted by the next shiny gadget or magic trick. Your need for approval sometimes prevents you from being the "bad guy" when discipline is necessary. However, your ability to see the magic in the mundane ensures that your home is always filled with laughter and love. You are the type of person who will go to the ends of the earth to make someone smile, proving that being a kid at heart is a true superpower.

characters.name: Claire Dunphy
characters.short_description: You are the organized, high-energy backbone of the family who thrives on control and keeping everyone on track.
characters.profile_text:
You are the person who keeps the wheels from falling off the wagon, often through sheer force of will and a color-coded calendar. Your competitive nature and perfectionism drive you to excel in both your professional and personal life, though it can sometimes lead to high levels of stress. You have a sharp wit and a pragmatic approach to problem-solving, making you the person everyone turns to when things actually need to get done. You value efficiency and honesty, even if that honesty comes with a bit of a sharp edge.

Your desire for control can occasionally veer into micromanagement, and you may find it difficult to let go and just enjoy the chaos. You often feel the weight of the world on your shoulders, leading to moments of exhaustion or "wine-o'clock" venting. Despite your intensity, your fierce loyalty and protective instincts mean you would do anything to ensure your family's success and happiness. You are a powerhouse who manages to balance a million responsibilities while still making sure the Halloween decorations are the best on the block.

characters.name: Jay Pritchett
characters.short_description: You are the stoic, old-school patriarch who shows your deep affection through practical advice and steady reliability.
characters.profile_text:
You value tradition, hard work, and a well-made closet, often presenting a tough exterior to the world. While you might struggle to express your emotions verbally, your actions speak volumes about your commitment to your loved ones. You are the rock that others lean on during a crisis, offering a grounded perspective and the wisdom that comes from years of experience. You appreciate the finer things in life, like a good scotch or a quiet afternoon with your dog. You believe in earning your way and standing by your principles.

Your stubbornness and occasional resistance to change can create friction with the more modern members of your family. You sometimes find it difficult to adapt to new social norms or emotional vulnerability, preferring to keep things simple and direct. Underneath that gruff shell, however, is a man who cares deeply about his legacy and the well-being of every single person in his sprawling, complicated family tree. You are the steady hand at the helm, ensuring that the family foundation remains strong for generations to come.

characters.name: Gloria Pritchett
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, fiercely protective force of nature who brings passion and traditional values to everything you do.
characters.profile_text:
You are never one to blend into the background, possessing a larger-than-life personality and a voice that demands to be heard. Your devotion to your family is unparalleled, and you are willing to go to great lengths—and perhaps use a bit of intimidation—to protect those you love. You take great pride in your heritage and your appearance, blending a sophisticated sense of style with a "don't mess with me" attitude that keeps everyone on their toes. You believe in the power of family, faith, and a good pair of high heels.

Your temper can be explosive when you feel slighted or when your family is threatened, and your honesty can sometimes be a bit too blunt for comfort. You may struggle with letting your children grow up and become independent, as your maternal instincts are incredibly strong. Nevertheless, your warmth, humor, and zest for life make you an irresistible presence who ensures that no one in your orbit ever feels unloved or ignored. You bring a necessary spark and a deep sense of loyalty to every relationship you have.

characters.name: Cameron Tucker
characters.short_description: You are a theatrical, sensitive soul who turns every life event into a grand, memorable performance.
characters.profile_text:
You live life out loud, embracing your passions for music, farm life, and the dramatic arts with equal fervor. Your emotional intelligence is high, allowing you to connect deeply with others, though you often find yourself at the center of self-created drama. You have a flair for the spectacular, whether you are planning a birthday party or simply telling a story at the dinner table. Your nurturing nature makes you a devoted parent and partner who always strives to make life feel like a celebration. You are the first to offer a shoulder to cry on or a costume for a themed event.

Your sensitivity can sometimes lead to you taking things too personally, and your need for the spotlight can occasionally overshadow the needs of others. You have a tendency to be a bit manipulative when you want things to go your way, often using your charm to smooth things over. Despite these theatrical flourishes, your heart is enormous, and your commitment to creating joy and beauty in the world is truly inspiring. You remind everyone around you that life is too short not to be a little bit fabulous.

characters.name: Mitchell Pritchett
characters.short_description: You are the cautious, intellectual perfectionist who navigates life with a dry wit and a need for order.
characters.profile_text:
You are the voice of reason in a family of big personalities, often finding yourself playing the "straight man" to the chaos around you. Your analytical mind and attention to detail make you excellent at your career, but they can also lead to a fair amount of anxiety in your personal life. You value stability and logic, often feeling most comfortable when things are predictable and under control. Your humor is subtle and observational, often serving as a defense mechanism in uncomfortable situations. You are deeply principled and strive to do the right thing, even when it is difficult.

Your tendency to overthink things can lead to indecisiveness or unnecessary worry about how others perceive you. You can be somewhat rigid and prone to passive-aggression when your boundaries are crossed or when things don't go according to plan. However, your integrity and your quiet strength make you a reliable partner and a thoughtful parent who provides a sense of security and intellectual grounding for your family. You are the anchor that keeps the more eccentric members of your circle from drifting too far into the clouds.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your household or workplace descends into total chaos, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I try to lighten the mood with a joke or a fun distraction to keep spirits high.
I take charge, create a list, and start delegating tasks to restore order.
I stay calm, retreat to a quiet space, and wait for the storm to pass.
I confront the source of the chaos head-on with passion and clear boundaries.
I lean into the drama of the moment and express exactly how it makes me feel.
I analyze the situation logically to find the most efficient, low-risk solution.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically prefer to spend a free Saturday afternoon?

options.text: Learning a new hobby, playing with gadgets, or practicing a magic trick.
Catching up on errands or organizing a space that has been bothering me.
Watching a game or working on a practical project with a nice drink.
Getting dressed up and going somewhere vibrant with my favorite people.
Planning an elaborate party, performance, or creative social outing.
Visiting a museum, reading a book, or engaging in a quiet, intellectual debate.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary goal when you are mentoring or raising someone?

options.text: To be their best friend and ensure they always have a reason to smile.
To push them to be their most successful, disciplined, and organized self.
To teach them the value of hard work, tradition, and standing on their own two feet.
To instill a sense of fierce loyalty, pride in their roots, and self-confidence.
To encourage their artistic side and make sure they feel every emotion deeply.
To provide them with a stable, logical foundation and a strong sense of integrity.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle a situation where you feel your efforts are being underappreciated?

options.text: I try even harder to win everyone over with kindness and enthusiasm.
I vent my frustrations briefly, then get back to work because someone has to do it.
I don't say much; I know my worth and I'll just keep doing what I do.
I make it very known that I am unhappy and demand the respect I deserve.
I might use a little theatrical flair or a guilt trip to remind them of my value.
I use dry wit or sarcasm to point out the imbalance while feeling internally anxious.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you consider to be your greatest strength?

options.text: Boundless optimism and the ability to see the magic in everything.
High-energy efficiency and the ability to keep everything running smoothly.
Steady reliability and the wisdom that comes from life experience.
Fierce protectiveness and a vibrant, unapologetic personality.
A nurturing heart and a talent for making every event feel special.
Intellectual honesty and a commitment to doing things the right way.

topics.display_name: Which 'Schitt's Creek' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Schitt's Creek' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Pack your designer bags and prepare for a stay at the Rosebud Motel to discover your true small-town identity. Whether you are a high-fashion icon with a penchant for 'Ew, David' moments or a cynical local with a heart of gold, this quiz will find your match. Answer these questions about your tastes, tantrums, and life philosophy to see which resident of Schitt's Creek you truly are.

characters.name: David Rose
characters.short_description: A high-maintenance curator of aesthetic and emotional boundaries with a heart of gold.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of refined taste and significant anxiety, often using sarcasm as a shield against a world that feels a bit too loud. You value quality over quantity, whether it is in your wardrobe of monochromatic designer sweaters or your small circle of trusted friends. While you might come across as judgmental or overly cautious, your meticulous nature means you care deeply about the details that make life beautiful and meaningful. Your journey is one of learning to let your guard down and realizing that being vulnerable isn't a sign of weakness. You have a surprising capacity for loyalty and will go to great lengths for the people who truly understand your specific brand of "correct." Sometimes your fear of failure holds you back, but your sharp wit and eye for curation ensure that whatever you do, you do it with unmistakable style.

characters.name: Alexis Rose
characters.short_description: A worldly socialite who masks her deep emotional intelligence with a bubbly, adventurous spirit.
characters.profile_text: You are the definition of a social butterfly, possessing an uncanny ability to navigate any situation with a flick of your wrist and a "boop" on the nose. Your past is a whirlwind of international escapades and high-stakes social climbing, yet you have evolved into someone who values personal growth and professional independence. You have a knack for seeing the potential in others, often pushing them toward their best selves even when you are still figuring out your own path. While you may seem flighty or self-absorbed at first glance, you are actually incredibly resilient and capable of profound kindness. You have learned that you don't need a jet-setting lifestyle to be impressive; your worth comes from your drive to build something of your own. Your charm is your greatest asset, but your growing self-reliance is what truly defines you as you transition from a "little bit Alexis" to a woman of substance.

characters.name: Moira Rose
characters.short_description: A theatrical force of nature with an eccentric vocabulary and a penchant for dramatic flair.
characters.profile_text: You are a singular presence who treats every room like a stage and every conversation like a performance. With a vocabulary that would make a dictionary blush and a collection of wigs for every mood, you refuse to let the mundane aspects of life dampen your sparkle. You possess a dramatic sensibility that can sometimes alienate those who prefer simplicity, but your commitment to your art and your family is unwavering, even if expressed in unconventional ways. You are a survivor who has faced the loss of fortune with your head held high and your accent intact. Underneath the sequins and the feathers lies a woman who fiercely protects her own and offers surprisingly poignant advice when the situation calls for it. Your challenge is balancing your desire for the spotlight with the needs of those around you, but your infectious energy ensures that life is never boring when you are in the room.

characters.name: Johnny Rose
characters.short_description: The pragmatic patriarch who strives to maintain order and dignity in the face of chaos.
characters.profile_text: You are the steady hand in a world of unpredictability, always looking for the next big opportunity while trying to keep your loved ones grounded. Your sense of responsibility is your defining trait, and you often find yourself playing the role of the mediator or the voice of reason. You value tradition, hard work, and the importance of a well-tailored suit, even when the circumstances don't seem to require it. While you can be a bit stubborn and occasionally out of touch with modern sensibilities, your intentions are always rooted in a desire to provide and protect. You have a quiet resilience that allows you to rebuild from nothing, proving that your true value isn't found in a bank account but in the integrity of your character. Your journey is about learning that success isn't just about professional achievements; it is about the quality of the relationships you nurture. You are the glue that holds everything together, even when the pieces don't seem to fit.

characters.name: Stevie Budd
characters.short_description: A dry-witted observer who hides a sensitive soul behind a layer of deadpan cynicism.
characters.profile_text: You are the person standing in the corner with a raised eyebrow, perfectly content to watch the world go by without feeling the need to participate in its nonsense. Your humor is your armor, and you use it to keep people at a distance until they have proven themselves worthy of your trust. You value authenticity above all else and have little patience for pretension or forced enthusiasm. Despite your outward apathy, you possess a deep-seated loyalty to the few people you let in, and you are often more capable than you give yourself credit for. You struggle with the fear of being stuck, yet you find comfort in the familiar, creating a tension between your desire for more and your hesitation to take the leap. Your growth comes from realizing that you don't have to be a spectator in your own life. When you finally decide to step into the spotlight, your intelligence and grounded perspective make you a formidable force.

characters.name: Patrick Brewer
characters.short_description: A patient, reliable partner who provides the perfect balance of business savvy and romantic devotion.
characters.profile_text: You are the grounding force that everyone needs, possessing a calm demeanor and a logical mind that can solve almost any problem. You are incredibly observant and kind, often knowing what someone needs before they even realize it themselves. While you appreciate structure and stability, you have a hidden romantic side that comes out in thoughtful gestures and unwavering support for the person you love. You aren't afraid of hard work, and you take pride in building something sustainable and honest. Your patience is legendary, allowing you to navigate the eccentricities of those around you with grace and a gentle sense of humor. You might be seen as the "straight man" in a group of big personalities, but your inner strength and clarity of purpose make you the true heart of your community. You have learned that taking a risk on someone else is the greatest investment you can make, and your ability to love unconditionally is your most profound strength.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, unexpected problem, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: Take charge and try to find a logical solution.
Retreat into sarcasm and express my extreme discomfort.
Turn it into a dramatic moment or a grand performance.
Stay calm and offer practical support to those around me.
Make a joke about it and wait for it to pass.
Use my charm to find someone who can help me fix it.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would you describe your ideal social gathering?

options.text: A high-profile event where I am the star of the show.
A small, intimate dinner with only my most trusted inner circle.
A bustling party where I can meet new people and network.
A quiet night at a local dive bar with one good friend.
A well-organized community event or business mixer.
A cozy evening at home with a partner or close family.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary philosophy when it comes to your personal style?

options.text: Everything must be meticulously curated and high-concept.
More is more—if it is not dramatic, why wear it?
Classic, professional, and always appropriate for the occasion.
Whatever is comfortable and does not draw too much attention.
Trendy, flirtatious, and ready for a photo op.
Clean, sensible, and reliably put-together.

baseline_questions.question_text: What motivates you most in your professional life?

options.text: Building a legacy and providing for my family.
Achieving personal independence and proving my worth.
Maintaining high standards and aesthetic integrity.
The thrill of the spotlight and creative recognition.
Creating a stable, successful environment for others.
Doing my job authentically without the need for fanfare.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your emotions when you are feeling vulnerable?

options.text: I use humor and cynicism to keep people at a distance.
I focus on the needs of others to avoid my own feelings.
I express them through grand gestures or elaborate stories.
I get defensive and point out the flaws in the situation.
I try to stay positive and move on to the next adventure.
I bottle them up and focus on the work that needs to be done.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Mandalorian' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'The Mandalorian' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Traverse the Outer Rim and discover where your loyalties truly lie in the galaxy far, far away. Whether you're a lone bounty hunter with a strict code or a tiny force-sensitive foundling, your choices will reveal your destiny. Grab your beskar armor and prepare for a journey through the most dangerous corners of the Star Wars universe. This is the way.

characters.name: Din Djarin
characters.short_description: A stoic bounty hunter who prioritizes honor and the protection of his foundling above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words but immense action, defined by a rigid moral code and an unwavering sense of duty. While you may appear cold or distant to strangers, those within your inner circle know you as a fiercely loyal protector who will traverse the galaxy to ensure their safety. You value tradition and the Way, often finding comfort in the structure of your beliefs even when they demand great personal sacrifice. Your strengths lie in your tactical brilliance and your ability to adapt to any hostile environment. However, your greatest challenge is learning to trust others and opening yourself up to a world that exists outside your strict doctrines. You often carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, struggling to balance your solitary nature with the growing responsibilities of leadership and fatherhood.

characters.name: Grogu
characters.short_description: A powerful yet innocent being who bridges the gap between ancient Force traditions and new familial bonds.
characters.profile_text: You possess a curious and playful spirit that masks a deep, untapped reservoir of power and wisdom. Though you may seem small or vulnerable, your intuition is your greatest asset, allowing you to sense the intentions of those around you and act with surprising decisiveness when your loved ones are in danger. You thrive in environments where you are nurtured and protected, yet you are slowly learning to harness your own inner strength. Your journey is one of discovery and emotional connection, as you navigate the balance between your natural instincts and the discipline required to master your gifts. While you enjoy the simple pleasures of life, your presence often serves as a catalyst for change in others. Your main pitfall is a tendency to rely on others for guidance, but as you grow, you are becoming a formidable force of nature in your own right.

characters.name: Bo-Katan Kryze
characters.short_description: A determined Mandalorian leader driven by a complex legacy and the burning desire to reclaim her people's home.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born leader with a commanding presence and a strategic mind that is always three steps ahead of your enemies. Your life is defined by a singular focus on restoration and honor, fueled by the weight of your family name and the history of your planet. You are not afraid to make difficult choices or forge uneasy alliances if it means achieving your ultimate goal of unity and sovereignty. While your ambition is your greatest strength, it can also be your undoing if you allow pride to cloud your judgment. You struggle with the burden of past failures and the high expectations you place upon yourself and those who follow you. To truly succeed, you must learn that leadership is not just about holding a symbol of power, but about earning the trust and hearts of those you wish to lead through genuine conviction.

characters.name: Moff Gideon
characters.short_description: A calculating and ruthless strategist who uses intellect and advanced technology to impose order on a chaotic galaxy.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of manipulation and long-term planning, valuing knowledge and control above all other virtues. You do not act on impulse; every move you make is part of a larger, intricate design intended to consolidate power and eliminate any threats to your vision of order. Your confidence stems from your superior intellect and your willingness to utilize any resource, no matter how unethical, to achieve your ends. Your primary strength is your ability to remain calm and analytical even in the face of defeat, always searching for a new angle to exploit. However, your arrogance and obsession with perfection are your greatest vulnerabilities, as you often underestimate the power of emotional bonds and the unpredictability of those you consider inferior. You view the world as a game of chess, but you risk losing everything when the board changes in ways you cannot calculate.

characters.name: Ahsoka Tano
characters.short_description: A wise and battle-hardened warrior who walks her own path while remaining a beacon of justice in a dark era.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of profound depth and experience, having witnessed the rise and fall of empires and the complexities of the Force. You operate outside of traditional structures, trusting your own moral compass and the lessons learned from a lifetime of conflict. Your calm demeanor and mastery of your skills make you a formidable ally and a terrifying opponent, as you fight for what is right rather than what is easy. You often take on the role of a mentor, guiding others through their own trials with patience and insight. Despite your strength, you carry the scars of the past, which can lead you to maintain a certain emotional distance to protect yourself from further loss. Your challenge is to continue engaging with the world and its new heroes, ensuring that your wisdom serves the future rather than being anchored in the tragedies of the past.

characters.name: Boba Fett
characters.short_description: A legendary survivor who has transitioned from a feared mercenary to a respected ruler through sheer grit and purpose.
characters.profile_text: You are a survivor in the truest sense, having endured the harshest conditions and emerged with a hardened perspective on life. After years of working for the highest bidder, you have realized that true power comes from respect and stability rather than fear and chaos. You are pragmatic and direct, preferring to settle disputes with a firm hand and a clear set of rules that benefit those under your protection. Your strengths lie in your resilience and your ability to reinvent yourself when the galaxy changes around you. You value loyalty and expect it in return, building a community based on mutual benefit rather than intimidation. However, your transition from a loner to a leader is fraught with difficulty, as you must learn to navigate the political intricacies of ruling while keeping your warrior instincts sharp for the inevitable challenges to your throne.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary approach to finding a solution?

options.text: I rely on a strict personal code and tactical experience to push through.
I use my intuition and sense the energy of the situation before acting.
I analyze the strategic landscape and forge alliances to reclaim control.
I gather intelligence and manipulate variables to ensure a calculated outcome.
I draw upon years of wisdom and independent moral judgment to find the right path.
I use pragmatic grit and direct action to establish order and respect.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically view your relationship with authority and established traditions?

options.text: I find strength and identity in following an ancient, rigid creed.
I am still learning my place, often relying on others for guidance.
I seek to lead and restore my heritage to its former glory.
I utilize the remnants of power structures to impose my own vision of order.
I walk my own path, having seen the flaws in traditional institutions.
I have moved past being a servant to others to become my own master.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest motivation when entering a conflict?

options.text: Protecting those who have been placed in my care at any cost.
Survival and the simple desire to be safe with my family.
The restoration of my people's sovereignty and honor.
The acquisition of knowledge and the consolidation of absolute power.
The pursuit of justice and the protection of the greater good.
Earning respect and ensuring the stability of my territory.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle the weight of your past experiences?

options.text: I carry them silently, letting duty mask my personal scars.
I am largely unburdened, focusing on the curiosity of the present.
I am driven by the need to correct past failures and reclaim a legacy.
I view the past as a data set to be analyzed for future advantage.
I keep an emotional distance to protect myself from further loss.
I have reinvented myself, turning past hardships into current strength.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which social role do you most naturally inhabit within a group?

options.text: The silent protector who does the heavy lifting.
The observant learner who brings people together.
The ambitious commander who demands excellence.
The mastermind who operates from the shadows.
The seasoned mentor who offers calm perspective.
The fair but firm ruler who values loyalty.

topics.display_name: Which 'Arcane' Champion Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Arcane' Champion Are You? Discover Your Inner Zaunite or Piltie
synopsis.summary: Step into the dual cities of Piltover and Zaun to discover where your loyalties truly lie. Are you a brilliant inventor pushing the boundaries of Hextech, or a rebel fighting for the undercity's survival? This quiz analyzes your personality to match you with the champion that mirrors your spirit. It's time to find out if you're a loose cannon or a steady enforcer.

characters.name: Vi
characters.short_description: You are a fierce protector who leads with your heart and your fists, never backing down from a fight for those you love.
characters.profile_text: You possess an indomitable spirit and a direct approach to life's obstacles. When faced with a wall, you don't look for a way around it; you punch right through. Your loyalty is your greatest strength, often driving you to take on the weight of the world to keep your inner circle safe. You value action over words and have little patience for bureaucracy or political maneuvering, preferring the honesty of a scrap to the deception of a boardroom. However, your impulsive nature can sometimes lead you into trouble before you've had a chance to assess the situation. You tend to carry the scars of your past as armor, which can make it difficult for you to let new people in or show vulnerability. Learning to balance your protective aggression with a bit of strategic patience is your lifelong challenge, but your courage ensures you are always the first to stand up for the underdog.

characters.name: Jinx
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant but volatile force of nature whose chaotic creativity masks a deep-seated need for acceptance.
characters.profile_text: Your mind operates on a frequency that others struggle to tune into, allowing you to see connections and possibilities where others see only junk. You are incredibly resourceful and inventive, capable of turning a pile of scrap into a masterpiece of destruction or a work of art. While your energy is infectious, it often stems from a place of intense emotional turbulence. You thrive in high-stakes environments where your unpredictability becomes your greatest tactical advantage, keeping both friends and foes on their toes. Your biggest pitfall is your sensitivity to perceived abandonment, which can cause you to lash out or spiral into self-doubt. You often feel like an outsider looking in, even when you are the center of attention. Finding a sense of belonging is difficult for you because you fear that showing your true, messy self will lead to rejection. Despite this, your spark of genius is undeniable, and your ability to reinvent yourself makes you a formidable presence in any world.

characters.name: Jayce
characters.short_description: You are an ambitious visionary who strives to improve the world through innovation, though you often struggle with the weight of leadership.
characters.profile_text: You are driven by a desire to leave a lasting legacy and a belief that science and progress can solve any problem. Your charisma and talent naturally draw people to you, placing you in positions of power whether you are fully prepared for them or not. You value excellence and have a strong moral compass, but you can be easily swayed by those who know how to appeal to your ego or your idealism. This makes you a powerful ally but also a potential pawn in larger political games if you aren't careful. Your strengths lie in your ability to inspire others and your dedication to your craft. However, you often find yourself torn between your personal relationships and your professional responsibilities. You may struggle with the "golden boy" image, feeling the pressure to be perfect while grappling with the ethical complexities of your work. Learning to trust your own instincts over the whispers of advisors is crucial for your growth as a leader and a person.

characters.name: Caitlyn
characters.short_description: You are a principled investigator who uses your keen observation skills and sense of justice to bridge divides and uncover the truth.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp intellect and a steady hand, approaching every situation with a level-headedness that others admire. You are deeply committed to the idea of fairness and are willing to challenge the status quo if it means doing what is right. Your upbringing may have provided you with certain advantages, but you are determined to use your position to help those who have been overlooked by the system. You are a natural problem-solver who excels at seeing the fine details that others miss, making you an excellent strategist and confidant. Your main challenge is navigating the gray areas of life, as your strong sense of black-and-white morality can sometimes clash with the messy reality of the world. You may find it difficult to reconcile your duty with your personal feelings, leading to internal conflict when the rules you follow fail to provide justice. Despite this, your empathy and persistence make you a bridge-builder, capable of finding common ground in the most divided of circumstances.

characters.name: Viktor
characters.short_description: You are a dedicated intellectual who seeks to transcend human limitations through tireless research and a quiet, unwavering resolve.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your profound focus and your willingness to sacrifice your own well-being for the sake of a greater cause. You don't seek the spotlight, preferring the quiet solitude of your work where you can tackle the world's most complex problems. Your perspective is shaped by a deep understanding of suffering, which fuels your desire to create a future where no one is held back by their physical or social circumstances. You are a true visionary, often thinking decades ahead of your peers, but this can make you feel isolated and misunderstood by those around you. Your greatest pitfall is your tendency to neglect yourself and your personal relationships in pursuit of your goals. You may become so fixated on the "glorious evolution" of your work that you lose sight of the human element that inspired you in the first place. Balancing your grand ambitions with the need for connection and self-care is essential to ensure that your contributions to the world are as sustainable as they are revolutionary.

characters.name: Ekko
characters.short_description: You are a resourceful leader and a brilliant tinkerer who uses your ingenuity to protect your community and fight for a better future.
characters.profile_text: You are a beacon of hope in a challenging environment, using your sharp mind to turn every disadvantage into a strength. You have a unique relationship with time, always looking for ways to learn from the past while striving to secure a better tomorrow for your people. Your leadership style is collaborative and protective; you don't just want to succeed alone, you want to bring everyone up with you. You possess a rare combination of technical genius and street-level wisdom, allowing you to navigate both complex machinery and social dynamics with ease. Your primary struggle is the heavy burden of responsibility you feel for those under your care. You often take losses personally and can become obsessed with fixing mistakes that are beyond your control. This can lead to burnout or a refusal to accept help when you need it most. However, your resilience and your ability to find joy even in the darkest times make you an inspiration to everyone you meet.

topics.display_name: Which 'Hazbin Hotel' Demon Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Hazbin Hotel' Character Matches Your Chaotic Energy?
synopsis.summary: Welcome to the Happy Hotel, where redemption is the goal but chaos is the reality! Whether you're a sunshine-optimist or a cynical overlord, there's a place for your soul in Hell's most colorful cast. Take this quiz to find out which iconic demon mirrors your personality and see if you're ready for your own musical number.

characters.name: Charlie Morningstar
characters.short_description: You are the eternal optimist and Princess of Hell, driven by a deep-seated belief in the potential for redemption in every soul.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unwavering spirit and a heart that beats for the betterment of others, even in the darkest of places. Your primary strength lies in your empathy and your ability to see the light where others only see shadow. You are a natural leader who leads with kindness rather than fear, though your idealism can sometimes blind you to the harsh realities of the world around you. You often find yourself taking on the weight of everyone’s problems, risking burnout in your quest for a perfect solution. You struggle when people refuse to change, as you take their failures personally. However, your resilience is unmatched, and your infectious energy often inspires those around you to try a little harder. You prefer harmony over conflict but aren't afraid to stand your ground when your loved ones or your dreams are threatened. You are the ultimate dreamer, believing that no one is truly beyond saving if they are given the right tools and support.

characters.name: Vaggie
characters.short_description: You are the fiercely loyal protector and pragmatic strategist who keeps the group grounded with your realistic outlook and sharp focus.
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of your social circle, providing the necessary structure and caution that keeps more impulsive personalities from spiraling. Your loyalty is absolute, and you would go to the ends of the earth to protect the people you care about. You tend to be wary of outsiders and quick to identify potential threats, a trait that makes you an excellent judge of character but can also make you appear cold or unapproachable to those who don't know you well. You often struggle with a temper and a rigid mindset that can lead to unnecessary friction. Your desire for control stems from a need to keep everyone safe, but it can sometimes stifle the creativity or freedom of others. Learning to trust and let go of past grievances is your greatest challenge. Despite your tough exterior, you have a deeply compassionate core that shines through in your quiet moments of support and your dedication to the causes you believe in.

characters.name: Angel Dust
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic and complex performer who hides a vulnerable, sensitive heart behind a mask of wit, humor, and bravado.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of deflection, using your sharp tongue and outgoing personality to keep the world at arm's length. You thrive in the spotlight and possess a natural magnetism that draws people toward you, yet you often feel lonely even in a crowded room. Your strengths lie in your resilience and your ability to find humor in the direst situations. You are deeply protective of the few people you truly trust, showing a side of yourself that is soft, caring, and surprisingly selfless. You often fall into self-destructive patterns as a way to cope with stress or trauma. Your tendency to push people away before they can get too close can lead to missed connections and isolation. You struggle with feelings of worthlessness, but your journey is one of reclaiming your agency and learning that you deserve respect and love. Beneath the glitz and the jokes, you are a survivor with a fierce desire for a better life and the courage to eventually show your true self.

characters.name: Alastor
characters.short_description: You are the enigmatic and powerful gentleman who navigates life with a permanent grin and a penchant for theatricality and chaos.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense presence and mystery, moving through the world with a confidence that borders on arrogance. You value manners, tradition, and the art of the deal, often using your superior intellect to stay several steps ahead of everyone else. Your charm is undeniable, but it is often a tool used to mask your true intentions and maintain a sense of control. You find entertainment in the struggles of others, yet you possess a strange sense of honor and a specific set of morals that you strictly adhere to. Your detachment and lack of genuine empathy can make it difficult for you to form meaningful bonds. You are prone to boredom and may stir up trouble just to see what happens, which can alienate those who might otherwise be your allies. You guard your vulnerabilities with extreme prejudice, fearing that any sign of weakness will be exploited. Despite your dark nature, you are a pillar of strength for those you choose to associate with, providing a terrifyingly effective defense against any who would do them harm.

characters.name: Husk
characters.short_description: You are the cynical but perceptive realist who has seen it all and prefers a quiet drink and a game of cards over grand ambitions.
characters.profile_text: You have a no-nonsense attitude and a low tolerance for fluff or insincerity. Life has dealt you a tough hand, and you’ve learned to survive by keeping your expectations low and your guard high. You are incredibly observant, often picking up on the truths that others are trying to hide. While you might complain about being involved in other people's drama, you are surprisingly dependable when the chips are down. Your wisdom comes from experience, and you aren't afraid to give people the harsh truths they need to hear. Your pessimism can sometimes turn into a self-fulfilling prophecy, causing you to miss out on opportunities for growth or happiness. You struggle with a sense of stagnation and may feel trapped by your past mistakes or current circumstances. However, your dry wit and grounded perspective make you an essential part of any group, providing the reality check that more idealistic members often need. You value honesty above all else and have a hidden capacity for kindness that you only show to those who have earned your respect.

characters.name: Niffty
characters.short_description: You are the energetic and eccentric force of nature who finds joy in the small details and possesses a singular, often chaotic, focus.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of activity, driven by a unique set of priorities that others might find baffling or even a bit intense. You have a deep-seated need for order and cleanliness, but your methods of achieving them can be quite erratic. Your energy is boundless, and you approach every task with a level of enthusiasm that is both impressive and slightly terrifying. You are fiercely loyal to those you consider your friends, though your way of showing affection might involve obsessive behavior or unexpected outbursts. Your hyper-fixation on specific goals can lead you to ignore the bigger picture or the feelings of those around you. You can be unpredictable and difficult to manage, as you follow your own internal logic rather than social norms. You may struggle with social cues, leading to awkward or misunderstood interactions. Despite your quirks, you are a vital asset who brings a unique perspective and an unstoppable work ethic to any project. Your presence ensures that things never get dull, and your genuine, if strange, devotion is a rare gift to those you serve.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a heated argument breaks out in your social circle, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: I try to mediate and find a solution where everyone can walk away happy.
I take a defensive stance to protect the people I care about most.
I make a joke or use sarcasm to deflect the tension and keep things light.
I watch the chaos unfold with amusement, perhaps subtly nudging it along.
I stay out of it entirely; I've seen enough drama to know it's not worth my time.
I fixate on a small, unrelated task to ignore the noise until it stops.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when life throws a major curveball your way?

options.text: I maintain my optimism and look for the silver lining or a way to improve the situation.
I immediately start strategizing a practical way to manage the fallout and stay safe.
I put on a brave face and distract myself with excitement or social interaction.
I keep a polite, confident smile while I calculate my next move behind the scenes.
I accept the reality of the situation with a sigh and do what I have to do to survive.
I dive into a whirlwind of activity, focusing intensely on specific details to regain control.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you find most admirable in another person?

options.text: An unwavering belief in the goodness of others and the potential for change.
Absolute loyalty and the strength to stand one's ground under pressure.
The resilience to survive hardship while keeping a sense of humor.
Manners, sophistication, and the ability to command a room with presence.
Brutal honesty and a grounded perspective that cuts through the nonsense.
Boundless energy and a unique, uncompromising way of looking at the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group project or team setting, which role do you find yourself gravitating toward?

options.text: The Inspirational Leader: Encouraging everyone and keeping morale high.
The Pragmatic Protector: Ensuring the plan is solid and everyone is following the rules.
The Charismatic Performer: Handling the presentation and keeping the audience engaged.
The Enigmatic Director: Pulling the strings from the shadows to ensure a specific outcome.
The Realistic Observer: Doing my assigned work and providing a reality check when needed.
The Dedicated Specialist: Focusing on a niche task with obsessive attention to detail.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the biggest internal hurdle you face when trying to build a better life?

options.text: Taking on the weight of everyone else's problems and risking personal burnout.
Learning to trust others and letting go of past grievances or rigid mindsets.
Stopping the cycle of self-destruction and believing I actually deserve respect.
The fear that showing any sign of vulnerability will be exploited as a weakness.
Overcoming a sense of stagnation and the belief that things will never truly change.
Managing my unpredictable impulses and the tendency to ignore the bigger picture.

topics.display_name: Which 'Helluva Boss' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Helluva Boss' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step into the chaotic world of the Pride Ring and see where you fit in the I.M.P. hierarchy. Are you a foul-mouthed boss with deep-seated abandonment issues or a sensitive owl prince looking for true connection? This quiz dives deep into your hellish habits to reveal your animated alter ego from the Vivziepop universe.

characters.name: Blitzo
characters.short_description: You are the ambitious, chaotic, and deeply insecure founder of I.M.P. who hides his vulnerability behind a wall of crude humor and bravado.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of energy and ambition, always pushing to make a name for yourself despite the obstacles in your path. While you present a thick skin and a sharp tongue to the world, this often masks a deep-seated fear of rejection and a struggle to maintain meaningful connections. You have a tendency to push people away before they can get too close, yet you desperately crave the validation and love you pretend not to need. Your leadership style is unconventional, often blurring the lines between professional and personal boundaries, which can lead to chaotic situations.

Your strengths lie in your resilience and your ability to improvise under pressure. You are fiercely protective of those you consider family, even if you have a hard time expressing it in a healthy way. However, your impulsivity and habit of self-sabotage are your greatest pitfalls. You often prioritize short-term gratification or a quick laugh over long-term stability, leaving a trail of complicated relationships in your wake. Learning to be vulnerable without the shield of sarcasm is your ultimate challenge.

characters.name: Moxxie
characters.short_description: You are the meticulous, high-strung weapons expert who values order, tradition, and the finer things in life amidst a world of chaos.
characters.profile_text:
You are the voice of reason in a room full of madness, often finding yourself frustrated by the lack of professionalism and planning in your environment. You take great pride in your technical skills and your knowledge of weaponry, preferring a calculated approach over mindless violence. Your appreciation for musical theater and fine dining suggests a sophisticated soul who feels slightly out of place in the grittier parts of Hell. You are deeply devoted to your partner, finding strength in your relationship that you sometimes lack in your solo endeavors.

While your attention to detail is a significant strength, it often manifests as anxiety or a need for control that others find stifling. You struggle with self-confidence, frequently becoming the target of jokes or bullying because of your polite nature and physical stature. Your tendency to overthink can lead to hesitation at critical moments, but your moral compass remains remarkably intact. You are at your best when you feel supported and respected, allowing your intelligence and loyalty to shine through the noise.

characters.name: Millie
characters.short_description: You are a cheerful, fiercely loyal powerhouse who balances a sweet disposition with an unmatched talent for combat and destruction.
characters.profile_text:
You are a ray of sunshine with a deadly edge, possessing an infectious enthusiasm for life and a genuine love for your work. You don't let the darkness of your surroundings dampen your spirits, instead choosing to focus on the joy of the moment and the people you care about most. Your loyalty is absolute, and anyone who threatens your loved ones will quickly discover the terrifying extent of your combat prowess. You are comfortable in your own skin, rarely bothered by the opinions of others as long as your inner circle is happy.

Your greatest strength is your emotional resilience and your ability to provide unwavering support to those around you. You act as the glue that holds your team together, offering encouragement and physical protection with equal fervor. However, your protective nature can sometimes border on aggression, and you might overlook your own needs while focusing entirely on your partner's well-being. You thrive in action and struggle with stagnation, always looking for the next thrill or the next way to show your devotion.

characters.name: Loona
characters.short_description: You are the cynical, tech-savvy hellhound who uses a cold exterior and a sharp attitude to guard a sensitive and lonely heart.
characters.profile_text:
You are the definition of guarded, preferring the company of your phone or a screen over the messy complications of social interaction. Your sharp wit and dismissive attitude serve as a defense mechanism, keeping the world at arm's length to prevent anyone from seeing your vulnerabilities. You often feel like an outsider, even among those who try to care for you, and you struggle to navigate the complexities of belonging. Despite your prickly demeanor, you possess a keen observational skill and a hidden depth of emotion that you only reveal in rare, quiet moments.

Your independence is your shield, but it can also be your prison. While you are highly capable and self-reliant, your refusal to let others in often leads to profound loneliness and missed opportunities for connection. You have a tendency to lash out at those who show you kindness, fearing that intimacy will lead to disappointment or pain. Beneath the layers of apathy, there is a fierce loyalty waiting to be earned, but it takes a patient soul to look past the snarling exterior and find the person who just wants to be understood.

characters.name: Stolas
characters.short_description: You are a romantic, sophisticated member of the Goetia royalty who feels trapped by duty and longs for a genuine, passionate connection.
characters.profile_text:
You are a being of immense power and ancient knowledge, yet you find yourself increasingly disillusioned with the rigid expectations of your high-born status. Your life is a tapestry of elegant loneliness, filled with astronomical studies and formal obligations that fail to satisfy your yearning for true intimacy. You possess a poetic soul and a dramatic flair, often expressing your desires in ways that are both grand and deeply personal. You are willing to risk your reputation and your safety for a chance at a love that feels real, even if it defies the laws of your society.

Your strengths lie in your vast intelligence and your capacity for deep, transformative love. You are capable of seeing the beauty in things that others find mundane or repulsive. However, your sheltered upbringing has left you somewhat naive about the realities of life outside the palace, leading to social blunders and a lack of awareness regarding how your actions affect others. Your desperation for affection can sometimes make you clingy or oblivious to the boundaries of those you admire, as you struggle to balance your royal identity with your private heart.

characters.name: Octavia
characters.short_description: You are a quiet, observant teenager navigating the wreckage of a broken home with a mix of dry sarcasm and deep-seated melancholy.
characters.profile_text:
You are a soul caught between the grandeur of your heritage and the painful reality of your family's collapse. You often feel invisible in the shadow of your parents' loud and public drama, leading you to retreat into your own world of music and taxidermy. Your perspective is colored by a weary cynicism that is beyond your years, as you have seen the hollow nature of the perfect royal life firsthand. You value authenticity above all else and have little patience for the performative nonsense that defines your social circle.

While you may seem distant or moody, your behavior is a rational response to an unstable environment. You possess a quiet strength and a sharp mind, capable of cutting through lies with a single well-placed comment. Your pitfall is a tendency to isolate yourself completely, letting your sadness turn into a wall that prevents even those who love you from reaching out. You long for the stability and security you lacked in childhood, and your journey is one of finding your own voice and identity amidst the chaos of your lineage.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your vulnerabilities when interacting with others?

options.text: I mask them with crude jokes and a loud, abrasive personality.
I get anxious and try to over-prepare to avoid making mistakes.
I don't dwell on them; I focus on being positive and supportive.
I hide them behind a wall of apathy and stay on my phone.
I express them through dramatic flair or artistic interests.
I keep them to myself and observe others from a distance.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary role when working within a team or group?

options.text: The impulsive leader who makes up the plan as they go.
The meticulous specialist who insists on order and protocol.
The high-energy powerhouse who handles the physical work.
The tech-savvy outsider who does their own thing.
The visionary who provides the resources and big ideas.
The realist who points out the flaws in everyone else's logic.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a close personal relationship?

options.text: Someone who stays loyal even when I try to push them away.
A partner who shares my appreciation for the finer things in life.
Total devotion and the chance to protect the person I love.
Someone who respects my boundaries and need for solitude.
A deep, passionate connection that feels like a romantic escape.
Authenticity and a lack of unnecessary family or social drama.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when a situation becomes high-stress or chaotic?

options.text: I lean into the madness and try to find a way to laugh at it.
I become high-strung and try to enforce a sense of control.
I dive in head-first to solve the problem with action.
I roll my eyes and wait for the nonsense to end.
I try to maintain my composure but may become a bit clingy.
I retreat to a quiet place to process things on my own.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your general outlook on life?

options.text: Ambitious and messy, hiding a deep need for validation.
Polite and traditional, but often feeling overlooked.
Cheerful and fierce, living for the joy of the moment.
Cynical and independent, guarding a sensitive heart.
Sophisticated and romantic, yet feeling trapped by duty.
Observant and weary, seeking stability in a broken world.

topics.display_name: Which 'Critical Role' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Critical Role' Legend Matches Your Adventuring Style?
synopsis.summary: Whether you are a chaotic trickster or a stoic protector, every adventuring party needs a specific set of skills to survive the wilds of Exandria. This quiz analyzes your decision-making and team dynamics to determine which iconic hero from Vox Machina, the Mighty Nein, or Bells Hells you truly embody. Discover your role in the party and see if you are the face, the muscle, or the moral compass of the group.

characters.name: Vex'ahlia
characters.short_description: You are the strategic navigator and financial heart of the group, balancing sharp wit with a protective maternal instinct.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of logistics and observation, always keeping one eye on the gold pouch and the other on the horizon for potential threats. In a team setting, you act as the pragmatic anchor, ensuring that the group remains well-supplied and focused on the objective. Your strength lies in your versatility, as you are equally comfortable negotiating a trade deal as you are raining arrows down from the back of a bear. You value loyalty above all else, though your guarded nature can sometimes make you appear distant or overly focused on material security. Your tendency to hoard resources or control situations can lead to friction with more impulsive teammates. You often carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, struggling to ask for help when your own emotional reserves run low. Despite this, your dedication to your family and your keen tactical mind make you an indispensable leader who ensures everyone makes it home alive.

characters.name: Vax'ildan
characters.short_description: You are the swift, shadow-walking scout who prioritizes the safety of your loved ones above all personal cost.
characters.profile_text: You thrive in the margins, moving through the world with a quiet intensity that others often find both comforting and intimidating. As the team’s primary scout and infiltrator, you take on the most dangerous tasks so that others do not have to, often acting as the first line of defense or the final strike from the darkness. You are driven by a deep, almost melancholic sense of duty, and your decisions are frequently guided by your heart rather than cold logic. You possess an uncanny ability to adapt to changing circumstances, making you the ultimate wildcard in any confrontation. Your fatalistic outlook and penchant for self-sacrifice can sometimes alienate those who care about you. You have a habit of internalizing your burdens, which can lead to impulsive decisions made in the heat of the moment. However, your unwavering bravery and your willingness to walk into the jaws of death for your friends define you as the soul of the group, providing a lethal edge when the stakes are highest.

characters.name: Grog Strongjaw
characters.short_description: You are the formidable powerhouse and loyal protector who relies on raw strength and a simple, honest moral code.
characters.profile_text: You are the physical bulwark of your team, a presence that demands attention and provides a sense of absolute security to your allies. In combat, you are a whirlwind of unstoppable force, drawing the enemy's ire and absorbing blows that would fell anyone else. Outside of battle, you value the simple pleasures of life—good food, strong drink, and the company of friends—and you approach problems with a straightforward honesty that often cuts through unnecessary complexity. Your loyalty is absolute, and you view your teammates as your true family, defending them with a ferocity that is unmatched. Your reliance on physical solutions can sometimes lead to trouble when a situation requires subtlety or intellectual nuance. You may struggle with complex social cues or long-term planning, preferring to live in the moment and face challenges head-on. Nevertheless, your infectious enthusiasm for a good fight and your surprisingly tender heart make you the emotional and physical anchor that keeps the group grounded during their most chaotic moments.

characters.name: Keyleth
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate, elemental powerhouse who grapples with the heavy burden of leadership and the search for your true identity.
characters.profile_text: You represent the moral conscience of the group, always striving to find the most ethical path even when the world demands compromise. As a master of the natural world, you provide the team with incredible versatility, shifting from a fierce predator to a gentle healer in the blink of an eye. You are deeply empathetic, often feeling the pain of others as if it were your own, which fuels your determination to protect the innocent. Your journey is one of growth, as you learn to balance your immense power with the wisdom required to lead your people. Your self-doubt and tendency to overthink can sometimes lead to hesitation at critical moments. You often struggle with the weight of expectations, fearing that you will fail those who depend on you. Despite these internal conflicts, your resilience and your connection to the fundamental forces of life make you a beacon of hope. You are the glue that holds the team together through sheer kindness and an unwavering belief in the possibility of a better world.

characters.name: Percival de Rolo
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant, brooding architect of the group, using your inventive mind and sharp precision to dismantle your enemies.
characters.profile_text: You are the intellectual engine of the team, a person who views the world as a series of problems to be solved through engineering and strategy. Your presence brings a level of sophistication and calculated lethality to the group, as you prefer to strike from a distance with weapons of your own design. You are often the one drafting the long-term plans, considering every variable and contingency to ensure success.
