Your refined exterior masks a complex inner world shaped by past trauma, which drives your relentless pursuit of justice and order. Your obsession with perfection and your tendency toward secrecy can create a barrier between you and your companions. You may find it difficult to let go of old grudges, and your cold, analytical approach can sometimes come across as detached or even arrogant. However, your brilliance is matched only by your hidden capacity for deep affection, and your ability to innovate under pressure ensures that your team is always one step ahead of their adversaries.

characters.name: Scanlan Shorthalt
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic, quick-witted performer who uses humor and inspiration to mask a profound tactical brilliance.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party and the master of misdirection, using your words and music to manipulate the battlefield and boost the morale of your allies. While others might see only a flamboyant entertainer, you are actually one of the most observant and strategically minded members of the team. You have a knack for finding the perfect spell or the right joke to turn the tide of a desperate situation, often saving the day in ways that no one else could have predicted. Your confidence is your greatest weapon, allowing you to bluff your way through impossible odds. Your reliance on humor as a defense mechanism can sometimes prevent you from forming deeper, more honest connections with those around you. You may struggle with feelings of inadequacy or the fear that you are only valued for your utility rather than who you are. Yet, beneath the bravado lies a fiercely protective friend who will go to the ends of the earth for his family. Your ability to find light in the darkest places makes you the indispensable heart and spirit of the group.

baseline_questions.question_text: When the party is faced with a complex obstacle, what is your primary approach to finding a solution?

options.text: Analyze the mechanics of the problem to engineer a precise, logical solution.
Assess the available resources and logistics to find the most pragmatic path forward.
Rely on immediate physical action and straightforward intuition to break through.
Use social engineering or creative misdirection to bypass the obstacle entirely.
Consult your moral compass and consider the natural or ethical impact of your choices.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most critical contribution during a high-stakes combat encounter?

options.text: Acting as a front-line bulwark to absorb damage and protect more vulnerable allies.
Operating from the shadows to scout threats and deliver high-impact precision strikes.
Providing essential utility, such as healing or environmental control, to support the team.
Utilizing long-range weaponry and tactical positioning to maintain battlefield control.
Boosting party morale and disrupting enemy focus through inspiration and performance.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these motivations most closely aligns with your reason for adventuring?

options.text: A deep-seated sense of duty to protect your family and secure their future.
The pursuit of justice and the need to rectify past traumas or systemic wrongs.
A commitment to a higher calling or the heavy responsibility of leadership.
The desire for camaraderie, simple pleasures, and the thrill of a good challenge.
A fatalistic drive to sacrifice yourself for the safety of those you love.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically communicate your ideas or concerns within the group dynamic?

options.text: With blunt honesty and a focus on the immediate, tangible reality.
Through sophisticated, often guarded language that prioritizes technical accuracy.
By using humor and charm to make difficult truths easier for others to hear.
With empathetic consideration, often questioning your own perspective to avoid conflict.
Directly and assertively, focusing on efficiency and the bottom line.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you internally process a significant failure or a mistake made by the team?

options.text: You internalize the guilt and become more withdrawn or fatalistic about the future.
You obsess over the technical details of the failure to ensure it never happens again.
You experience intense self-doubt and worry about your worthiness as a member of the group.
You mask your disappointment with bravado while privately calculating a comeback.
You focus on the immediate needs of the survivors and the practical steps for recovery.

topics.display_name: What Kind of 'Drag Race' Queen Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic 'RuPaul's Drag Race' Legend Are You?
synopsis.summary: Gentlemen, start your engines, and may the best woman win! From the high-fashion runways to the hilarious Snatch Game performances, every queen brings a unique flavor to the Werk Room. Take this quiz to find out which legendary superstar matches your charisma, uniqueness, nerve, and talent.

characters.name: Bianca Del Rio
characters.short_description: You are the sharp-tongued insult comic with a heart of gold and a Rolodex of hate that hides a deeply professional work ethic.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a razor-sharp wit and a no-nonsense attitude that commands respect in any room you enter. While others might get bogged down in drama or insecurity, you rely on your seasoned experience and impeccable timing to cut through the noise. You are the master of the read, but your barbs are usually grounded in a harsh truth that helps others grow, even if it stings at first. Your technical skills are just as polished as your comedy, ensuring that you always look the part while you are tearing the house down.

Your greatest strength is your unwavering confidence and your ability to stay three steps ahead of the competition. You do not just participate; you dominate through sheer competence and a refusal to suffer fools. However, your defensive shell can sometimes make it difficult for people to see the genuine kindness you offer behind the scenes. You prefer to show your love through practical help and professional advice rather than sentimental displays, making you the ultimate tough-love mentor of the group.

characters.name: Jinkx Monsoon
characters.short_description: You are the quirky, vintage-inspired powerhouse who blends theatrical camp with undeniable vocal talent and a resilient spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are a true chameleon of the stage, drawing inspiration from the golden age of Hollywood and the eccentricities of Broadway. Your approach to your craft is deeply rooted in character work and storytelling, often making you the underdog who surprises everyone with a sudden burst of brilliance. You have a unique ability to find humor in the macabre and beauty in the bizarre, which sets you apart from those who focus solely on traditional glamour. Your whimsical energy and old-soul charm make you an instantly lovable presence.

While you may appear soft or easily rattled, you possess a core of steel that allows you to thrive under pressure. You handle criticism with a water-off-a-duck's-back mentality, focusing on your art rather than the opinions of detractors. Your pitfall lies in your tendency to get lost in your own head or your specific aesthetic, which can occasionally lead to misunderstandings with those who do not share your theatrical vision. Ultimately, your talent is undeniable, proving that being the weirdo is often the key to lasting success.

characters.name: Sasha Velour
characters.short_description: You are the intellectual visionary who uses drag as a medium for high-concept performance art and radical self-expression.
characters.profile_text:
You view the world through a lens of history, philosophy, and art, constantly seeking to deconstruct traditional norms and rebuild them into something profound. Your style is avant-garde and meticulously planned, often incorporating multimedia elements or symbolic reveals that leave audiences breathless. You are not just looking for a laugh or a round of applause; you want to spark a conversation and challenge the status quo. This intellectual depth makes you a formidable strategist who understands the power of a well-timed metaphor.

Your strengths lie in your creativity and your ability to curate a cohesive, meaningful brand. You are a leader who inspires others to think more deeply about their own identities and the impact of their work. However, your serious nature can sometimes be perceived as pretension, and you may struggle to let go of your meticulous control to enjoy the more spontaneous, messy aspects of life. By balancing your high-brow concepts with genuine emotion, you create moments of pure magic that transcend the boundaries of typical performance.

characters.name: Trixie Mattel
characters.short_description: You are the hyper-stylized, business-savvy mogul who combines a plastic aesthetic with a dry, self-deprecating sense of humor.
characters.profile_text:
You have turned a specific, exaggerated look into a global empire, proving that you are as much a marketing genius as you are a performer. Your aesthetic is a bold mix of 1960s mod and childhood nostalgia, creating a living doll persona that is instantly recognizable. Beneath the pink paint and massive hair lies a sharp comedic mind and a talent for folk music, showing a versatility that keeps your audience guessing. You are highly driven and focused on the big picture, always looking for the next opportunity to expand your brand.

Your dry wit and ability to laugh at your own failures make you incredibly relatable, even when you are at the top of your game. You value hard work and consistency above all else, which can sometimes lead to burnout if you do not take time to step away from the persona. While you might seem cynical on the surface, your dedication to your craft and your friends is unwavering. Your challenge is learning to trust your instincts when things do not go according to plan, as your best moments often come from the most unexpected places.

characters.name: Bob the Drag Queen
characters.short_description: You are the hilarious, politically active powerhouse who leads with purse-first confidence and a quick-witted tongue.
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural-born entertainer who thrives in the spotlight, using your platform to both entertain and educate. Your comedy is observational, loud, and incredibly fast, allowing you to command any stage with ease. You do not need a million-dollar wardrobe to prove your worth; your charisma and talent speak for themselves. You are often the loudest voice in the room, but you use that volume to advocate for what you believe in and to lift up those around you. Your energy is infectious, making you the life of every party.

Your greatest asset is your authenticity and your refusal to be anything other than yourself. You are a master of improvisation, able to turn any situation into a comedic goldmine. However, your extreme confidence can sometimes border on arrogance, and your desire to always have the last word can lead to unnecessary friction. When you channel your competitive drive into your performances, you are virtually unstoppable. You remind everyone that drag is not just about the look, but about the message and the laughter you leave behind.

characters.name: Alyssa Edwards
characters.short_description: You are the high-energy, quote-machine pageant legend whose unintentional humor and dance floor dominance make you a true icon.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of personality, known for your tongue pops, dramatic facial expressions, and a relentless work ethic. As a natural mentor and teacher, you have a flair for the dramatic that makes even the simplest task feel like a grand performance. You live your life in the spotlight, and your competitive nature is fueled by a deep desire to be the best in everything you do. Whether you are teaching a dance routine or walking a runway, your presence is impossible to ignore, and your quirks have become the stuff of legend.

Your charm lies in your lack of a filter and your ability to be completely earnest, even when you are being ridiculous. You are fiercely loyal to your dynasty and take great pride in your professional accomplishments. Your pitfall is often your own ego or a tendency to get distracted by the drama of the moment, which can occasionally cloud your judgment. Despite any setbacks, your resilience and star power always bring you back to the top. You are a reminder that being yourself at maximum volume is the most powerful thing you can be.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a high-stakes challenge, what is your primary weapon of choice?

options.text: A razor-sharp wit and a library of insults.
Theatrical storytelling and character immersion.
Intellectual concepts and avant-garde visuals.
A meticulously crafted brand and business strategy.
Pure charisma and loud, observational comedy.
High-energy performance and dramatic flair.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle criticism from your peers?

options.text: I ignore it; I'm too busy being professional and winning.
Water off a duck's back—I stay in my own whimsical world.
I analyze it deeply to see if it aligns with my artistic vision.
I make a self-deprecating joke and keep building my empire.
I argue my point until they see I'm right, then move on.
I take it personally for a moment, then dance it off.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward in a group project?

options.text: The seasoned expert who keeps everyone on task.
The creative underdog who brings the weird ideas.
The visionary director who focuses on the 'why'.
The marketing lead who ensures the aesthetic is consistent.
The outspoken spokesperson who commands the room.
The star performer who motivates through energy.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your philosophy regarding personal style and presentation?

options.text: Polished, professional, and always ready for the job.
Vintage-inspired, campy, and full of character.
Deconstructed, symbolic, and boundary-pushing.
Hyper-stylized, pink, and instantly recognizable.
Authentic and functional; the talent matters more than the labels.
Pageant-perfect with a side of over-the-top drama.

baseline_questions.question_text: What drives you to succeed in your creative endeavors?

options.text: A refusal to suffer fools and a drive for perfection.
The need to express my inner eccentricities.
A desire to spark conversation and challenge the status quo.
The ambition to turn my passion into a global business.
The platform to advocate for my beliefs and make people laugh.
The thrill of the spotlight and the legacy of my name.

topics.display_name: What Kind of 'Bake Off' Contestant Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Great British Bake Off' Contestant Archetype Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step into the iconic white tent and see if you have what it takes to win the Star Baker apron. From the technical challenge perfectionist to the chaotic baker who forgets to turn on the oven, every contestant brings a unique flavor to the competition. Answer these questions about your kitchen habits and flavor preferences to discover your true 'Bake Off' identity. Will you get a Hollywood Handshake or a soggy bottom?

characters.name: The Technical Whiz
characters.short_description: You are a precision-driven baker who thrives on logic, chemistry, and mastering the most complex traditional methods.
characters.profile_text: You approach the tent with a ruler in your pocket and a deep understanding of the science behind every rise and crumb. While others panic over vague instructions, you rely on your encyclopedic knowledge of pastry and bread to fill in the gaps. Your bakes are consistently uniform, perfectly timed, and technically flawless, earning you high marks during the blind challenges where execution is everything. However, your focus on perfection can sometimes stifle your creative flair. You might struggle when a challenge asks for a personal story or an abstract concept, as you prefer the safety of a proven recipe over the uncertainty of improvisation. Your biggest pitfall is overthinking the simple things, but your steady hand and calm demeanor under pressure make you a formidable competitor who rarely sees a soggy bottom.

characters.name: The Experimentalist
characters.short_description: You are a culinary pioneer who loves pushing boundaries by combining unusual flavors and modern techniques.
characters.profile_text: You see the kitchen as a laboratory where rules are meant to be bent, if not entirely broken. Whether you are infusing sponges with botanical extracts or using liquid nitrogen to set a mousse, your goal is always to surprise the judges with something they have never tasted before. You are the contestant who brings ingredients that make the hosts raise an eyebrow, yet you often manage to pull off a flavor profile that is as sophisticated as it is daring. This boldness is your greatest strength, but it also carries significant risk. Your tendency to prioritize innovation over the basics can lead to structural failures or flavors that are just a bit too polarizing for a traditional palate. When your gambles pay off, you are the talk of the tent, but when they fail, you are left with a conceptual mess that lacks the fundamental heart of a classic bake.

characters.name: The Disaster Artist
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy baker whose chaotic process often results in last-minute miracles or spectacular, heart-wrenching collapses.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart and soul of the tent, known for your frantic energy, flour-covered apron, and the trail of dirty bowls you leave in your wake. Your baking style is intuitive and messy, often involving a race against the clock that leaves the judges holding their breath. You have a knack for turning a near-catastrophe into a charming success through sheer willpower and quick thinking, often presenting a "rustic" version of what was intended. Your resilience is unmatched, and your ability to laugh off a fallen cake makes you a fan favorite. Despite your charm, your lack of organization is your Achilles' heel. You frequently forget to turn on the oven or misread the measurements, leading to moments of pure drama that keep everyone on the edge of their seats. You bake with your heart on your sleeve, and while your results are inconsistent, they are always filled with personality and a story to tell.

characters.name: The Comfort Baker
characters.short_description: You excel at creating warm, nostalgic treats that focus on traditional flavors and the simple joy of sharing food with loved ones.
characters.profile_text: You are the baker who reminds everyone why they started baking in the first place, focusing on recipes passed down through generations. Your strengths lie in hearty breads, perfectly spiced biscuits, and cakes that taste like a warm hug. You don't care much for flashy decorations or molecular gastronomy; instead, you prioritize texture and the kind of deep, satisfying flavor that comes from high-quality, simple ingredients. Your workspace is usually the tidiest in the tent, reflecting your methodical and grounded approach to the craft. While your bakes are consistently delicious, you may find yourself criticized for being too safe or lacking a "wow" factor. The judges might push you to step outside your comfort zone and try something more ambitious or modern. Your challenge is to maintain that soulful, homemade quality while proving you can handle the high-concept demands of the competition without losing your signature warmth.

characters.name: The Showstopper
characters.short_description: You are a visual storyteller who treats every bake as a canvas for elaborate designs and breathtaking edible architecture.
characters.profile_text: You are in your element when the brief calls for height, color, and intricate detail. To you, a cake isn't just food; it is a sculpture that should command the room and leave everyone in awe. You spend hours planning your aesthetics, from hand-painted fondant to delicate sugar work, ensuring that your final product is Instagram-ready before it even hits the judging table. Your ambition is your engine, driving you to attempt feats of engineering that seem impossible within the time limits. However, this focus on the exterior can sometimes come at the expense of the interior. You might find yourself rushing the actual baking process to leave more time for decorating, leading to dry sponges or under-set fillings. Your path to victory depends on balancing your artistic vision with the fundamental requirement that the bake must taste as good as it looks. When you find that equilibrium, you are virtually unstoppable.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you receive a recipe with vague instructions, what is your first move?

options.text: Consult a baking textbook to calculate the missing variables and ratios.
Use the ambiguity as an excuse to try a completely new flavor combination.
Skim it quickly and start mixing; I'll figure it out as I go.
Rely on my intuition and memories of how my family used to make it.
Focus on the assembly and how I can make the final structure look impressive.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which tool or ingredient is most essential to your baking process?

options.text: A high-precision digital scale and a probe thermometer.
A collection of rare spices, extracts, and botanical infusions.
A large spatula for scraping up last-minute saves.
High-quality butter and a well-worn wooden spoon.
An airbrush kit and a set of intricate sculpting tools.

baseline_questions.question_text: The timer is at ten minutes and your bake isn't quite set. How do you react?

options.text: Analyze the oven's heat distribution and adjust the rack height precisely.
Decide to serve it as a 'molten' version of the original concept.
Panic slightly, then laugh it off while frantically fanning the cake to cool it.
Stay calm; a slightly soft center just makes it more homemade and comforting.
Start prepping a heavy layer of decoration to mask any structural issues.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your workspace look like halfway through a 'Showstopper' challenge?

options.text: Immaculate; every bowl is washed and every ingredient is pre-measured.
A laboratory filled with test tubes and experimental flavor trials.
A total disaster zone with flour on the ceiling and sticky handles.
Tidy and organized, with a clear focus on the task at hand.
Covered in sketches, color swatches, and edible gold leaf.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the most important feedback you hope to hear from the judges?

options.text: "The crumb structure and bake are technically perfect."
"I have never tasted such a bold and unexpected flavor profile."
"I don't know how you pulled this off, but it's a miracle!"
"This tastes like a warm hug; it's pure nostalgia."
"This is a breathtaking masterpiece that belongs in a gallery."

topics.display_name: Which 'Gilmore Girls' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Gilmore Girls' Character Are You? Grab A Coffee And Find Out!
synopsis.summary: Are you more of a fast-talking caffeine addict or a stoic diner owner with a heart of gold? Whether you're navigating the halls of Chilton or planning the next Stars Hollow town meeting, your personality matches one of these iconic residents. Take this quiz to see if you're a Lorelai, a Rory, or maybe even a Kirk. It’s time to head to the gazebo and discover your true Stars Hollow identity!

characters.name: Lorelai Gilmore
characters.short_description: You are a quick-witted, coffee-obsessed independent spirit who values family and community above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, known for your lightning-fast banter and an encyclopedic knowledge of pop culture. Your independence is your greatest strength, having built a successful life and career on your own terms after breaking away from a rigid upbringing. You approach every challenge with humor and a massive cup of coffee, often using your charm to navigate tricky social situations or to convince your friends to join in on your latest whimsical scheme.  While your spontaneity makes you a beloved friend and mother figure, your fierce self-reliance can sometimes manifest as a stubborn refusal to accept help or admit when you are wrong. You tend to avoid emotional vulnerability by masking your feelings with jokes, which can occasionally lead to misunderstandings with those closest to you. Despite these hurdles, your loyalty is unwavering, and you will go to the ends of the earth to protect the people you love and the small-town life you have carefully cultivated.

characters.name: Rory Gilmore
characters.short_description: You are an intellectual, ambitious high-achiever who finds comfort in books and the pursuit of academic excellence.
characters.profile_text: You are often described as the "golden child," possessing a rare blend of intelligence, kindness, and a quiet determination to succeed. Your nose is almost always in a book, and you find deep satisfaction in learning new things and organizing your life around clear goals. You are a thoughtful listener and a reliable friend, often acting as the voice of reason in chaotic situations. Your academic prowess and journalistic integrity are central to your identity, driving you to push yourself toward prestigious institutions and high-pressure careers.  However, your desire for perfection can be a double-edged sword, leading to significant stress when things do not go according to plan. You may struggle with the fear of failure or the pressure of living up to high expectations, which can cause you to freeze up when faced with unexpected criticism. Learning to embrace the messiness of life is your greatest challenge, but your resilience and strong moral compass always guide you back to your path.

characters.name: Luke Danes
characters.short_description: You are a reliable, salt-of-the-earth individual who hides a heart of gold beneath a gruff, no-nonsense exterior.
characters.profile_text: You are the person everyone turns to when they need something fixed, whether it is a broken toaster or a broken heart. You value simplicity, hard work, and tradition, often preferring the comfort of a routine and a backwards baseball cap to anything flashy or modern. While you might come across as cynical or grumpy to strangers, those who know you understand that this is just a protective shell for your deeply caring and sensitive nature. You express your love through acts of service rather than words, showing up for your community in countless quiet ways without ever asking for credit.  Your biggest pitfall is your tendency to bottle up your emotions until they boil over, or your stubbornness when it comes to changing your ways. You are fiercely protective of your peace and your loved ones, often putting their needs far above your own. Though you claim to hate the drama of small-town life, you are the very foundation that keeps it standing, proving that your bark is much worse than your bite.

characters.name: Sookie St. James
characters.short_description: You are a creative, enthusiastic culinary genius whose warmth and passion brighten every room you enter.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and imagination, constantly dreaming up new recipes and ways to make people happy through food. Your kitchen is your sanctuary, and your perfectionism there is driven by a genuine desire to provide the best possible experience for others. You are incredibly supportive and empathetic, always ready with a hug or a gourmet snack to cheer up a friend in need. Your optimism is infectious, and you have a unique ability to see the beauty in the small details of everyday life.  On the flip side, your intense focus on your craft can sometimes lead to a lack of spatial awareness or a tendency to get overwhelmed by the logistics of reality. You might find yourself prone to minor accidents or getting lost in your own thoughts when you should be paying attention to the world around you. Despite these quirks, your heart is enormous, and your dedication to your friends and family is the secret ingredient that makes you such an essential part of their lives.

characters.name: Kirk Gleason
characters.short_description: You are an eccentric, multi-talented individual who approaches every odd job and social interaction with earnest dedication.
characters.profile_text: You are truly one of a kind, possessing a resume that spans dozens of different professions and a personality that defies easy categorization. Whether you are selling jewelry, managing a movie theater, or performing experimental dance, you commit one hundred percent to the task at hand. You have a unique perspective on the world that often leads to hilarious or baffling situations, yet you navigate them all with a strange sort of dignity. Your presence is a constant in your community, and while people might find you odd, they also find you indispensable.  Your main struggle is a lack of social boundaries and a tendency to take things far too literally, which can lead to awkward moments or unintended conflicts. You often seek validation through your work and your various hobbies, sometimes overextending yourself in an attempt to be everything to everyone. Underneath your many hats, however, is a person who just wants to belong and contribute, making you a quirky but vital thread in the fabric of your social circle.

characters.name: Paris Geller
characters.short_description: You are a fierce, hyper-competitive intellectual powerhouse who demands excellence from yourself and everyone around you.
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature, driven by an unparalleled work ethic and a sharp, analytical mind that rarely rests. You do not just want to succeed; you want to dominate whatever field you enter, whether it is student government, medicine, or law. Your honesty is brutal and your standards are impossibly high, which can make you an intimidating presence to those who do not share your intensity. You value competence above all else and have little patience for small talk or inefficiency.  While your exterior is tough and often abrasive, it frequently masks a deep-seated insecurity and a fear of being overlooked or underprepared. You struggle with social nuances and can sometimes alienate potential allies with your aggressive approach to problem-solving. However, once someone earns your respect and loyalty, you are a formidable protector and a surprisingly steadfast friend. Your journey is one of learning to balance your ambition with human connection, proving that even the most driven individuals need a support system to truly thrive.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a social gathering where you don't know many people?

options.text: I use humor and fast-paced banter to break the ice with everyone.
I find a quiet corner or a book to observe the room from a distance.
I stay near the food or offer to help the host in the kitchen.
I stand in the back and wonder why I agreed to come in the first place.
I assert my presence and look for people who seem intellectually stimulating.
I treat it as a networking opportunity for my latest business venture.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your immediate reaction when a major plan falls through?

options.text: I make a self-deprecating joke and pivot to a spontaneous backup plan.
I experience a brief crisis of confidence and then over-analyze what went wrong.
I get frustrated and demand to know exactly who is responsible for the failure.
I get flustered and clumsy, but my passion for the project keeps me going.
I grumble about the incompetence of others and fix the mess myself.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your approach to work and career?

options.text: I am a jack-of-all-trades, willing to try any job no matter how eccentric.
I am hyper-competitive and won't stop until I am at the top of my field.
I value a steady, reliable routine and doing things the right way every time.
I am driven by academic excellence and a desire to document the world.
I use my creativity and warmth to build something unique and welcoming.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal afternoon of relaxation look like?

options.text: A movie marathon with an endless supply of coffee and takeout.
Curled up in a library with a stack of classic literature.
Working on a hands-on project or fixing something around the house.
Experimenting with complex new recipes in a busy kitchen.
Practicing a niche hobby or preparing for a local town event.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you show the people in your life that you care about them?

options.text: Through constant communication, shared jokes, and fierce loyalty.
By being a reliable listener and providing thoughtful, researched advice.
Through quiet acts of service and always being there to fix their problems.
By making them something incredible and sharing my creative passions.
By pushing them to achieve their full potential, even if it requires tough love.

topics.display_name: Are You a Carrie, Miranda, Charlotte, or Samantha?

synopsis.title: Which 'Sex and the City' Icon Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the hopeless romantic, the cynical lawyer, the PR powerhouse, or the girl-about-town writer? Your brunch orders and dating habits reveal more about your personality than you think. Take this quiz to find out which member of the core four truly matches your soul.

characters.name: Carrie
characters.short_description: You are a romantic dreamer and creative soul who navigates the complexities of modern love with curiosity and a flair for fashion.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural storyteller who views the world through a lens of what-ifs and could-be's, often finding yourself caught between your idealistic heart and the messy reality of relationships. Your life is a series of questions rather than answers, and you thrive on the emotional highs and lows that come with living in a fast-paced environment. You value friendship above all else, relying on your inner circle to help you process your latest heartbreak or career milestone over brunch. While your creativity and vulnerability make you incredibly relatable, you can sometimes become overly self-absorbed or indecisive when faced with difficult choices. Your penchant for luxury and aesthetic beauty often serves as a shield against the harsher aspects of life, but your true strength lies in your ability to keep searching for that elusive great love despite the odds. You are the glue that holds your social circle together, always ready to analyze a text message or a chance encounter until the early hours of the morning.

characters.name: Miranda
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent and pragmatic professional who values logic, hard work, and intellectual honesty above all else.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with a sharp wit and a healthy dose of skepticism, preferring to rely on your own capabilities rather than waiting for someone else to save the day. Your career is a central pillar of your identity, and you take pride in your ability to excel in high-pressure environments where others might falter. You have little patience for fluff or pretense, often serving as the voice of reason among your friends, even if your delivery can be a bit cynical or blunt. Beneath your tough exterior lies a deeply loyal heart and a surprising capacity for growth, though you often struggle to balance your need for control with the unpredictability of human emotions. You may find it difficult to let your guard down or accept help, fearing that vulnerability might compromise your hard-won independence. However, your resilience and grounded nature make you the person everyone turns to when they need a dose of reality or a solid plan of action. You are the ultimate realist who knows that success is earned, not given.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.short_description: You are a traditionalist at heart who believes in the power of etiquette, classic beauty, and the eventual triumph of a happily ever after.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unwavering faith in the institutions of marriage and family, often striving for a life that mirrors the polished perfection of a gallery opening. Your manners are impeccable, and you place a high value on social graces and the preservation of tradition, believing that a little bit of optimism can go a long way in a cynical world. You are the ultimate nurturer, always ready to support your friends with a kind word or a perfectly planned event, and you view your personal relationships as your greatest achievement. While your idealism is your greatest strength, it can also be a pitfall when reality fails to meet your high standards. You may find yourself struggling with disappointment when things do not go according to plan, or you might become overly judgmental of those who do not share your conservative values. Despite these challenges, your persistence and capacity for unconditional love allow you to find joy in the small, beautiful moments of life. You prove that being a romantic is a choice that requires immense strength and dedication.

characters.name: Samantha
characters.short_description: You are a bold, unapologetic powerhouse who lives life on your own terms with confidence, charisma, and a refusal to be shamed.
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature who commands attention wherever you go, fueled by an ironclad sense of self-worth and a total lack of interest in societal expectations. You prioritize your own pleasure and professional success, viewing the world as a playground where you are the lead player. Your honesty is legendary, and you have no time for games or hidden agendas, preferring to lay all your cards on the table and expecting others to do the same. You are the most fiercely protective friend in the group, offering unwavering support without the baggage of judgment or moralizing. Your primary pitfall is a tendency to keep people at arm's length to avoid emotional entanglement, as you fear that deep intimacy might limit your freedom or expose a vulnerability you are not ready to share. Nevertheless, your infectious energy and refusal to apologize for who you are make you an inspiration to those who wish they had half your courage. You are the living embodiment of the idea that the most important relationship you will ever have is the one you have with yourself.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a close friend makes a life decision you strongly disagree with, how do you react?

options.text: I spend hours analyzing the 'why' with them, trying to see every emotional angle.
I give them my blunt, honest opinion immediately—even if it's hard to hear.
I keep my disapproval quiet to maintain harmony and offer my unconditional support.
I tell them they're being ridiculous, then take them out to distract them from the drama.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary focus when you are pursuing a new career opportunity?

options.text: Finding a role that allows me to express my unique voice and creativity.
Achieving a position of power and proving my intellectual superiority.
Ensuring the role is prestigious and aligns with a traditional, stable path.
Maximizing my influence and making sure I'm the one calling the shots.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal philosophy on modern dating?

options.text: It's a series of beautiful, painful stories that eventually lead to 'The One.'
It's often a waste of time, but a necessary evil if you want a partner.
It's a formal process of finding someone who shares my values and vision for a family.
It's a playground for fun and pleasure; I don't need a soulmate to feel complete.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a major personal setback or disappointment?

options.text: I ruminate on it and write or talk through my feelings until I find a lesson.
I get angry, look at the facts, and immediately start building a practical defense.
I try to keep a brave face and focus on fixing the situation with grace.
I refuse to let it get me down; I move on to the next big thing without looking back.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your 'must-have' quality in a long-term partner?

options.text: Someone who challenges me intellectually and understands my quirks.
Someone who is self-sufficient and doesn't require constant emotional maintenance.
Someone who is a true gentleman with traditional values and a good family background.
Someone who is adventurous, confident, and doesn't try to stifle my freedom.

topics.display_name: Which 'Euphoria' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Euphoria' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Step into the glitter-filled, high-stakes world of East Highland to discover where you fit in the drama. Are you the narrator of your own chaotic life like Rue, or do you rule the hallways with Maddy’s confidence? This quiz dives deep into your aesthetic, your loyalty, and how you handle the pressure of being a teenager today. Answer these questions to find out which iconic character matches your vibe.

characters.name: Rue Bennett
characters.short_description: You are a deeply introspective and observant soul who often finds yourself navigating the complexities of mental health and the search for inner peace.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp, dry wit and a perspective that cuts through the superficiality of the world around you. While you are incredibly intelligent and empathetic, you often struggle with internal battles that make you feel isolated from your peers. You tend to observe life from the sidelines, finding comfort in your own thoughts even when they lead you down difficult paths. Your journey is defined by a search for stability and a way to cope with the overwhelming intensity of your emotions. You are fiercely loyal to those who truly understand you, though you may push them away when you are at your lowest. Your strength lies in your resilience and your ability to find beauty in the darkest moments, even if you do not always see it in yourself. You must learn to trust that you are worthy of the love and support offered to you, and that your value is not tied to your mistakes. By embracing your vulnerability, you can find the clarity you need to move forward.

characters.name: Jules Vaughn
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, creative spirit who constantly seeks out new experiences and authentic connections in an ever-changing world.
characters.profile_text: You are a dreamer who views the world through an artistic lens, always looking for ways to express your unique identity. You value freedom and self-discovery above all else, often pushing the boundaries of what is expected of you to find your own truth. Your presence is magnetic and colorful, drawing people in with your openness and your willingness to be vulnerable. However, this same openness can sometimes lead you into complicated situations where your desire for intimacy clashes with your need for independence. You are a pioneer of your own life, unafraid to reinvent yourself as you grow and learn. While you may occasionally feel like an outsider, your ability to embrace change is your greatest asset. You thrive when you are allowed to create and explore without restriction, but you must be careful not to lose yourself in the pursuit of the next big thrill. Finding a balance between your adventurous spirit and your emotional safety is the key to your long-term happiness.

characters.name: Maddy Perez
characters.short_description: You are a confident and fiercely loyal individual who knows exactly what you want and is not afraid to command the room to get it.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with an undeniable sense of style and authority, making it clear to everyone that you are not someone to be trifled with. You value loyalty and respect above all else, and you are willing to go to great lengths to protect the people you care about. Your exterior is polished and tough, but underneath lies a heart that feels things very deeply. You have a talent for reading people and situations, allowing you to navigate social dynamics with ease and grace. Your pitfalls often involve your pride and a tendency to hold onto toxic situations longer than you should because of your intense devotion. You believe in the power of aesthetics and presentation, using them as both a shield and a weapon in equal measure. To truly find happiness, you must learn to balance your desire for control with the realization that you deserve a love that does not require you to fight every single day. Your confidence is your superpower, but your true strength is your capacity for growth.

characters.name: Cassie Howard
characters.short_description: You are a hopeless romantic with a kind heart who often finds yourself searching for validation and love in the eyes of others.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who loves with everything you have, often putting the needs and desires of others before your own. You have a gentle and nurturing spirit, but your deep-seated need to be wanted can sometimes lead you to make impulsive decisions that compromise your own well-being. You are frequently misunderstood by those who only see your surface, missing the complexity and the longing that drive your actions. Your vulnerability is both your greatest strength and your most significant challenge, as it allows you to connect deeply with others but also leaves you open to being hurt. You often feel like you are performing a version of yourself that you think people will love, rather than just being who you are. Learning to love yourself independently of anyone else's opinion is your ultimate hurdle. When you finally realize your own worth, you become an unstoppable force of compassion and resilience. You have so much to offer the world, but you must first offer that same kindness to yourself.

characters.name: Nate Jacobs
characters.short_description: You are a complex and disciplined individual who struggles with the weight of expectations and the pressure to maintain a perfect image.
characters.profile_text: You possess an intense drive and a need for control that often stems from a turbulent internal landscape. You are highly observant and strategic, always thinking several steps ahead to ensure that you remain in a position of power. While you appear composed and successful on the outside, you are often haunted by the secrets and pressures of your upbringing. This internal conflict can manifest as aggression or a refusal to show any sign of weakness, making it difficult for you to form genuine, healthy connections with others. You are a perfectionist who holds yourself and those around you to impossible standards, which often leads to isolation and frustration. Your path to growth requires a difficult confrontation with your own vulnerabilities and the shadows of your past. Only by letting go of the need to dominate your environment can you find the peace and authenticity you secretly crave. True strength comes from honesty, not from the walls you build to keep the world at a distance.

characters.name: Lexi Howard
characters.short_description: You are a thoughtful, observant, and intellectual individual who often finds yourself playing the role of the reliable narrator in the lives of others.
characters.profile_text: You are the person who sees everything, often noticing the details that everyone else misses while they are caught up in their own drama. You are incredibly smart and creative, preferring to channel your energy into projects and observations rather than seeking the spotlight for yourself. While you are a loyal friend and a steady presence, you sometimes feel like a background character in your own life, waiting for the right moment to step forward. You have a rich inner world and a sharp sense of humor that you only share with those you truly trust. Your strength lies in your ability to analyze and understand the world around you, but your pitfall is a tendency to overthink and hesitate when it comes to taking risks. You are the glue that holds things together, but you must remember that your story is just as important as anyone else's. When you finally decide to take center stage and express your truth, your voice is powerful, insightful, and impossible to ignore.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically navigate a high-pressure social situation, like a crowded party?

options.text: I find a quiet corner to observe the dynamics from a distance.
I command the room and make sure my presence is felt by everyone.
I look for a specific person to latch onto for emotional security.
I drift between groups, looking for the most interesting or artistic energy.
I stay on the move, trying to manage my anxiety or find an exit.
I strategically monitor the room to maintain my status and influence.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary instinct when you feel your life is spiraling out of control?

options.text: I retreat inward and isolate myself from the people who care.
I reinvent my look or environment to feel a sense of newness.
I double down on rules and discipline to regain a sense of power.
I seek immediate validation and affection from others to feel worthy.
I confront the source of the chaos head-on with fierce confidence.
I analyze the situation objectively and channel my feelings into a project.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which quality do you value most in your closest relationships?

options.text: Intellectual compatibility and a shared sense of observation.
Unwavering loyalty and a 'us against the world' mentality.
Total freedom to be my authentic, changing self without judgment.
The feeling of being deeply needed and intensely loved.
A deep, unspoken understanding of my internal struggles.
Discretion and the ability to maintain a perfect image together.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would you describe your personal aesthetic and self-presentation?

options.text: Polished, sharp, and designed to command respect.
Eclectic, vibrant, and constantly evolving with my mood.
Low-effort and comfortable, prioritizing function over fashion.
Hyper-feminine and curated to be as attractive as possible.
Classic, understated, and practical for any situation.
Bold, trend-setting, and intentionally intimidating.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when it comes to your future?

options.text: Being exposed as someone who isn't as perfect as they seem.
Being stuck in a cycle of my own self-destructive habits.
Living a life that is mundane, restricted, or uninspired.
Ending up alone without anyone to love or care for me.
Being betrayed by the people I have given my loyalty to.
Remaining a background character in other people's stories.

topics.display_name: Which 'Wednesday' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Wednesday' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step into the shadows of Nevermore Academy and discover where you truly belong among the outcasts. Are you a brooding mastermind with a penchant for the macabre, or a colorful ball of sunshine who loves a good gossip session? Take this quiz to find out if you're a psychic, a siren, or something far more dangerous.

characters.name: Wednesday Addams
characters.short_description: A stoic, macabre intellectual with a sharp wit and a penchant for the dark arts.
characters.profile_text: You are a fiercely independent soul who thrives in the shadows and values logic over sentimentality. Your razor-sharp intellect and deadpan delivery often intimidate those around you, but you view social niceties as a distraction from your true pursuits. You possess an unwavering sense of justice, even if your methods are unconventional or outright morbid. Your emotional detachment can alienate potential allies, and your obsession with solving mysteries might lead you into dangerous isolation. While you pride yourself on your self-reliance, learning to trust others is your greatest challenge. You find solace in the cello, writing, and the occasional graveyard stroll, preferring the company of your own thoughts to the mindless chatter of your peers.

characters.name: Enid Sinclair
characters.short_description: A vibrant, optimistic werewolf who radiates warmth and color in every situation.
characters.profile_text: You are a burst of sunshine in a world that can often feel too serious, known for your unwavering loyalty and infectious enthusiasm. While others might see your love for gossip and bright colors as superficial, it is actually a shield for your deep-seated desire to belong and be accepted for who you are. You are a late bloomer who finds strength in community and the bonds of friendship. Your need for approval can sometimes make you overly sensitive to criticism, and you may struggle to stand your ground when your kindness is taken for granted. However, when pushed to your limit, you possess a fierce protective instinct that surprises everyone. You believe that even the darkest days can be brightened with a little bit of glitter and a lot of heart.

characters.name: Bianca Barclay
characters.short_description: A competitive and ambitious leader who masks her inner vulnerabilities with a regal exterior.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born leader with a commanding presence and a drive to be the absolute best in everything you do. Your confidence is your greatest weapon, but it often hides a complex history and the pressure of living up to high expectations. You value excellence and have little patience for those who do not take their responsibilities seriously, making you a formidable rival and a powerful ally. Your competitive nature can sometimes border on arrogance, causing you to push people away before they can see the real you. You struggle with the fear that your success is tied to your status rather than your character. Beneath the siren's song and the polished surface, you are searching for genuine connections that aren't based on manipulation or power.

characters.name: Xavier Thorpe
characters.short_description: A sensitive and brooding artist whose visions often blur the line between reality and nightmare.
characters.profile_text: You are a deeply creative individual who processes the world through your art, often feeling things more intensely than those around you. Your quiet demeanor and mysterious aura draw people in, yet you remain somewhat of an enigma, preferring the company of your sketches to the noise of a crowd. You possess a unique ability to see the hidden truths in the world, even when those truths are haunting. Your tendency to dwell on the past and your own dark premonitions can lead to a sense of melancholy and isolation. You may find it difficult to express your feelings directly, leading to misunderstandings with those you care about. Despite your guarded nature, you are a loyal friend who will go to great lengths to protect the people you let into your inner circle.

characters.name: Tyler Galpin
characters.short_description: A seemingly charming and helpful individual who navigates the complexities of a dual identity.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who presents a friendly and approachable face to the world, often acting as a bridge between different social circles. Your ability to blend in and offer a helping hand makes you well-liked, but there is a layer of complexity beneath your polite exterior that few truly understand. You are skilled at reading people and situations, allowing you to adapt quickly to changing circumstances. Your greatest struggle lies in the conflict between who you want to be and the darker impulses that occasionally surface. This internal battle can make you feel like an outsider even when you are surrounded by people. You must learn to reconcile your different sides before they tear you apart, as your desire for a normal life often clashes with the secrets you are forced to keep.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond when you find yourself in a high-pressure social situation?

options.text: I remain stoic and detached, observing the room with critical logic.
I dive in with high energy, trying to make everyone feel included and happy.
I take charge of the room, ensuring my presence and status are acknowledged.
I retreat to the edges, preferring to observe and process my thoughts privately.
I act as a friendly mediator, blending in easily to keep things running smoothly.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when pursuing a difficult goal?

options.text: Uncovering the objective truth, regardless of how dark or morbid it may be.
Gaining the approval and support of my closest friends and community.
Proving my superiority and maintaining my reputation as the best.
Expressing my internal visions and making sense of my complex emotions.
Finding a sense of normalcy and belonging while managing internal conflicts.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these creative outlets or hobbies most appeals to your personality?

options.text: Writing dark prose or playing a haunting melody on a cello.
Decorating with vibrant colors and keeping up with the latest social trends.
Engaging in competitive sports or activities that require strategic mastery.
Sketching or painting vivid, sometimes unsettling, artistic visions.
Working a steady job and trying to build a simple, helpful life.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle secrets—either your own or those of others?

options.text: I value them as pieces of a puzzle to be solved or protected with ironclad silence.
I find them hard to keep because I love sharing information and connecting with others.
I use them as leverage to maintain my social standing and protect my image.
I keep them buried deep inside, often letting them fuel my art and melancholy.
I carry them as a heavy burden, struggling with the duality of my hidden self.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when it comes to interpersonal relationships?

options.text: Being forced to rely on others and losing my fierce independence.
Being rejected or left alone by the community I work so hard to please.
Having my vulnerabilities exposed and losing my position of strength.
Being misunderstood or having my loyalty questioned by those I trust.
Having my darker impulses discovered by the people who think I'm normal.

topics.display_name: Which 'Squid Game' Player Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Squid Game' Player Are You?
synopsis.summary: The games are about to begin, and your survival depends on your strategy and spirit. Are you a selfless protector, a ruthless strategist, or a quiet observer waiting for the right moment to strike? Take this quiz to find out which player from the hit series matches your personality and whether you would make it to the final round.

characters.name: Seong Gi-hun
characters.short_description: You are a resilient optimist whose deep-seated empathy and moral compass guide you even in the most desperate circumstances.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense heart and complicated circumstances, often finding yourself torn between your personal failings and your inherent desire to do the right thing. While others might see a gambler or someone who has lost their way, your true strength lies in your refusal to abandon your humanity when the stakes are at their highest. You possess a natural charisma that draws people to you, often becoming the glue that holds a group together through shared vulnerability and hope. Your tendency to trust others is both your greatest virtue and your most significant pitfall. You often prioritize the well-being of the collective over your own survival, which can lead to immense emotional burdens. You struggle with the guilt of your past mistakes, yet you possess an incredible capacity for growth and resilience. In a world that demands ruthlessness, you choose to remain kind, proving that even the most broken individuals can find the strength to stand up for what is right.

characters.name: Kang Sae-byeok
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and fiercely independent survivor who hides a deeply protective nature behind a cold, guarded exterior.
characters.profile_text: You have learned from a young age that the world is a harsh place where trust is a luxury you cannot afford. This has made you incredibly self-reliant, observant, and quick to react to any perceived threat. You move through life with a quiet intensity, rarely speaking unless necessary and always keeping your true intentions close to your chest. Your primary motivation is the safety and reunification of your family, a goal that drives every calculated move you make. Beneath your hardened shell lies a profound sense of loyalty to those few who manage to earn your respect. You are a master of reading people and situations, allowing you to navigate dangerous environments with a level head. However, your extreme isolation can be a double-edged sword, as your refusal to lean on others can leave you physically and emotionally exhausted. You must learn that while self-preservation is vital, true strength can also be found in the rare moments of connection you allow yourself to experience.

characters.name: Cho Sang-woo
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant and pragmatic strategist who prioritizes logic and efficiency above all else to achieve your goals.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your sharp intellect and your ability to remain calm under extreme pressure. As someone who has often been the pride of your community, you carry the heavy weight of high expectations, which fuels your drive to succeed at any cost. You view the world through a lens of probability and outcome, often making the difficult choices that others are too sentimental to consider. This analytical mindset makes you a formidable leader and a master of strategy, but it can also lead you down a path of cold-blooded pragmatism. Your greatest pitfall is your willingness to sacrifice your moral integrity for the sake of survival or success. You often justify your actions as necessary evils, distancing yourself from the emotional consequences of your decisions. While your intelligence is undeniable, your internal struggle between your former self and the person you have become creates a profound sense of isolation. You are a reminder that the pursuit of victory can sometimes cost more than the prize is worth.

characters.name: Ali Abdul
characters.short_description: You are a hardworking and exceptionally loyal individual whose innate goodness and physical strength are matched only by your trusting nature.
characters.profile_text: You represent the purest form of selflessness, often putting the needs of your family and your friends far above your own safety. Your journey is defined by your immense physical capability and your unwavering politeness, even toward those who may not deserve it. You are the type of person who looks for the best in everyone, believing that hard work and honesty will eventually be rewarded. This optimism makes you a beloved companion, but it also makes you vulnerable to those who would exploit your kindness for their own gain. Your strength is not just in your muscles but in your capacity for gratitude and devotion. You are a pillar of support for those around you, providing stability and hope in the darkest of times. However, your tendency to be overly trusting can be a significant weakness in a competitive or deceptive environment. You often find it difficult to believe that others could harbor ill intentions, which can lead to devastating betrayals. Your story is one of profound dignity and the tragic beauty of a heart that remains open despite the world's cruelty.

characters.name: Oh Il-nam
characters.short_description: You are an enigmatic and whimsical presence who finds joy in the thrill of the game and possesses a perspective shaped by a lifetime of experience.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with a sense of playfulness and curiosity that belies your age and the gravity of your situation. To others, you may appear fragile or out of place, but you possess a hidden depth and a sharp mind that observes everything with keen interest. You find beauty in the simplest moments and often act as a source of unexpected wisdom or comfort to those who take the time to listen. Your philosophy is centered on the idea that life is meant to be experienced fully, regardless of the risks involved. This perspective allows you to face challenges with a unique lack of fear, often finding excitement where others find only terror. However, your detachment from the conventional rules of society can make you appear unpredictable or even callous to the suffering of others. You operate on a different frequency, one that prioritizes the fun of the experience over the moral implications of the game. Your complexity lies in the duality of your nature: you are both a gentle mentor and a master of a much larger, more dangerous reality.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a high-stakes decision that affects a group, what is your primary focus?

options.text: The most logical and efficient outcome, regardless of the emotional cost.
Ensuring that the most vulnerable people are protected and included.
My own survival and the safety of my immediate family.
Being a loyal teammate and following the lead of someone I trust.
Finding the most interesting or entertaining path through the chaos.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond when you realize someone has intentionally misled you?

options.text: I feel deeply hurt but try to find a way to forgive them and move forward.
I am not surprised; I rarely trust people fully to begin with.
I analyze why they did it and determine if they can still be useful to me.
I am devastated because I always try to see the best in everyone.
I find the deception to be a clever and amusing part of the social game.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest asset when navigating a high-pressure environment?

options.text: My sharp intellect and ability to calculate risks in real-time.
My resilience and refusal to lose my humanity, even when I'm losing.
My physical strength and unwavering dedication to my duties.
My stealth, observation skills, and ability to work alone.
My unique perspective that allows me to stay calm and have fun.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were forced to compete in a game where only one person could win, what would be your strategy?

options.text: Form a strong alliance based on mutual trust and shared morals.
Stay in the shadows and wait for others to eliminate each other.
Take a leadership role and make the hard tactical sacrifices necessary to win.
Work as hard as possible and hope that my sincerity is rewarded.
Treat every round as a thrilling challenge and enjoy the process.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these philosophies best describes your view on human nature?

options.text: People are fundamentally good but often driven to desperation by the world.
People are predictable and can be managed through logic and incentives.
People are generally untrustworthy, so it is best to rely only on yourself.
People deserve kindness and help, no matter where they come from.
People are performers in a grand, complex game designed for amusement.

topics.display_name: Which 'Cowboy Bebop' Crew Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Member Of The Bebop Crew Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you a cool-headed bounty hunter with a tragic past or a high-energy hacker who marches to their own beat? Life on the Bebop is never dull, especially when you're chasing woolong and dodging your own memories. Take this quiz to find out which iconic member of the galaxy's most dysfunctional family matches your soul. See you space cowboy!

characters.name: Spike Spiegel
characters.short_description: A cool, nonchalant bounty hunter with a haunted past and unmatched martial arts skills.
characters.profile_text:
You are the embodiment of the phrase "whatever happens, happens," moving through life with a detached grace that masks a deep, lingering melancholy. Your relaxed demeanor and lanky frame hide a sharp mind and lightning-fast reflexes, allowing you to navigate dangerous situations with a cigarette in your mouth and a smirk on your face. While you often claim to be indifferent to the world around you, your actions reveal a hidden core of loyalty and a stubborn refusal to let go of the ghosts that define your history.

You tend to live in the moment, yet you are constantly pulled back by the weight of your memories, making you a bit of a dreamer who sees the world through a hazy, cinematic lens. Your strengths lie in your adaptability and your ability to stay calm under pressure, but your fatalistic outlook can sometimes lead you toward self-destruction. You prefer the thrill of the chase and the solitude of your own thoughts, often pushing others away to protect them from the chaos that follows in your wake.

characters.name: Jet Black
characters.short_description: The disciplined, fatherly anchor of the Bebop who balances a tough exterior with a passion for bonsai and jazz.
characters.profile_text:
You are the reliable foundation of your social circle, a person who values order, responsibility, and the wisdom gained from a long, often difficult career. As a former lawman, you carry a sense of justice that has been tempered by the harsh realities of the galaxy, leading you to take on the role of the pragmatic caretaker for your more chaotic companions. You find solace in meticulous hobbies like tending to bonsai trees or cooking for your friends, showing a nurturing side that contrasts sharply with your rugged, cybernetic appearance.

Your greatest strength is your unwavering loyalty and your ability to keep a level head when everything else is falling apart. However, your tendency to dwell on past betrayals can make you cynical or overly cautious, sometimes preventing you from fully embracing new opportunities. You are the one who keeps the ship running and the bellies full, providing the necessary structure that allows others to thrive, even if you rarely get the credit you deserve for your quiet sacrifices.

characters.name: Faye Valentine
characters.short_description: A bold, opportunistic survivor who uses her wit and charm to navigate a world that once left her behind.
characters.profile_text:
You are a firecracker of energy and ambition, driven by a fierce need for independence and a deep-seated fear of being vulnerable. Having woken up in a world that felt alien to you, you learned quickly that the only person you can truly rely on is yourself, leading you to develop a sharp tongue and a knack for high-stakes gambling. You present a glamorous, self-assured front to the world, but beneath the bravado lies a longing for a place to belong and a history that you are still trying to piece together.

Your resourcefulness and quick thinking make you a formidable presence in any situation, as you are always looking for the next big score or a way to turn the odds in your favor. While your defensive nature can make you appear selfish or flighty, those who look closer see a person who is deeply resilient and capable of surprising acts of kindness. You struggle with trust, often running away before anyone can get too close, yet you find yourself repeatedly drawn back to the makeshift family that accepts you for exactly who you are.

characters.name: Edward
characters.short_description: A brilliant, eccentric hacker who experiences the universe through a lens of pure curiosity and playful chaos.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of unconventional energy, moving through life with a unique rhythm that others often find baffling but undeniably charming. Your mind operates on a level far beyond the ordinary, allowing you to navigate complex digital landscapes with the same ease that you navigate a physical room—usually on all fours or while standing on your head. You don't care for social norms or material possessions, finding joy instead in the simple pleasures of a good data stream, a tasty snack, or a new friend to play with.

Your strengths lie in your incredible intellect and your ability to see patterns where others see only noise, making you an indispensable asset in any technical challenge. However, your short attention span and lack of traditional focus can make it difficult for you to engage with the serious concerns of the adult world. You live in a state of perpetual wonder, reminding everyone around you that life doesn't always have to be a grim struggle; sometimes, it is just a big, beautiful game waiting to be played.

characters.name: Ein
characters.short_description: An extraordinarily intelligent data dog who observes the world with silent wisdom and a gentle spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are the quiet observer, possessing a level of intelligence and intuition that far exceeds what others might assume at first glance. While you may not speak in words, your presence is a calming influence on the chaotic environment around you, and you often understand the emotional state of your companions better than they do themselves. You are content to stay in the background, offering support through your loyalty and your uncanny ability to solve problems in ways that go unnoticed by the more boisterous members of your group.

Your strengths are your patience, your keen senses, and your ability to find contentment in the simple moments of life. You don't feel the need to prove yourself or seek the spotlight, finding fulfillment instead in the bonds you share with those you trust. Though you are often underestimated, your contributions are vital to the harmony of your pack, and your silent wisdom serves as a reminder that sometimes the most important things in life are the ones that do not need to be said out loud.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a high-stakes situation suddenly turns chaotic, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I stay detached and move with the flow, trusting my reflexes to get me through.
I step up to provide structure and try to manage the fallout for everyone involved.
I look for the quickest way to turn the chaos into a personal gain or a clean escape.
I dive right into the middle of it, treating the confusion like a giant playground.
I observe silently from a safe distance, waiting for the right moment to offer quiet support.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal philosophy regarding your history and memories?

options.text: I am haunted by a past that feels more real than the present moment.
I carry my past experiences as lessons that have made me more disciplined and cautious.
I feel disconnected from my past and am fiercely focused on securing my own future.
The past doesn't interest me; there is too much data and fun to be had right now.
I live entirely in the present, guided by my intuition and the bonds I have today.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred way to spend a quiet afternoon with no responsibilities?

options.text: Smoking or daydreaming while reflecting on things that might have been.
Engaging in a meticulous hobby like gardening, cooking, or repairing something broken.
Seeking out excitement and high-stakes entertainment to keep the boredom at bay.
Exploring new technology, hacking into interesting streams, or just making up games.
Finding a comfortable spot to rest and watching the world go by with those I trust.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, what role do you typically find yourself occupying?

options.text: The cool, nonchalant loner who contributes when necessary but keeps their distance.
The reliable anchor who keeps the group organized and looks after everyone's well-being.
The bold wildcard who isn't afraid to speak their mind or challenge the status quo.
The eccentric genius who brings a unique, often baffling perspective to every problem.
The quiet, intuitive member who understands the group's mood without saying a word.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for working or pursuing a goal?

options.text: I'm just passing the time until I can finally settle an old score.
I believe in doing a job right and maintaining a sense of order and justice.
I want to ensure I have enough resources to remain completely independent.
I am driven by pure curiosity and the desire to see how things work.
I simply want to be useful to my pack and enjoy the security of a shared home.

topics.display_name: Which 'Fullmetal Alchemist' Homunculus Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Deadly Sin From 'Fullmetal Alchemist' Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Are you driven by a hunger for power or a deep-seated resentment of humanity? In the world of alchemy, the Homunculi represent the darkest facets of the human spirit, each bound by a singular, overwhelming desire. Take this quiz to discover which of Father's children mirrors your personality. Will you be the prideful leader or the ultimate glutton?

characters.name: Pride
characters.short_description: You are the first-born and most powerful of the Homunculi, hiding a terrifying, shadow-based power behind a facade of innocence.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an air of absolute superiority and a cold, calculating intellect that allows you to manipulate those around you with ease. While you often present yourself as a polite and dutiful individual, this is merely a mask for your true nature as a ruthless predator who views humans as nothing more than insects. Your strength lies in your mastery over shadows, using them to observe and strike from the darkness with lethal precision. You are a master of psychological manipulation, often using your youthful appearance to disarm others before revealing your true, ancient malice.

Your arrogance is your greatest weakness, as you often underestimate the resilience and ingenuity of those you deem inferior. You demand perfection and loyalty from your subordinates, yet you struggle to understand the genuine emotional bonds that drive others to achieve the impossible. Because you view yourself as a god-like being, you are prone to frustration when your plans are disrupted by the very 'lesser beings' you despise. Your journey is one of maintaining control, but your inability to empathize often leaves you isolated in your own shadow.

characters.name: Envy
characters.short_description: You are a shapeshifting master of deception who harbors a deep-seated resentment toward humanity's capacity for connection.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of infiltration and psychological warfare, capable of assuming any form to sow discord and chaos among your enemies. Your true power lies in your ability to exploit the insecurities of others, yet this stems from your own profound sense of inadequacy and jealousy. You find yourself constantly comparing your existence to the vibrant, messy lives of humans, leading to a cycle of bitterness that fuels your destructive tendencies.
