You take a perverse pleasure in watching others suffer, particularly when you can cause them to turn on one another through your lies.

Despite your versatile abilities and your terrifying true form, your obsession with what others have often blinds you to your own potential. You are prone to outbursts of rage when confronted with the truth of your own loneliness, making you volatile and occasionally reckless in your pursuit of validation. You hide your vulnerability behind a wall of cruelty and sarcasm, but deep down, you crave the very things you seek to destroy. Your path is defined by a search for identity in a world where you feel like a hollow imitation of life.

characters.name: Gluttony
characters.short_description: You are a simple-minded but terrifying force of nature driven by an insatiable hunger and a surprising sense of loyalty.
characters.profile_text:
You navigate the world through your primal instincts, primarily the constant, gnawing desire to consume everything in your path. While you may appear childlike or even innocent at times, your physical capabilities are monstrous, especially when your hunger takes control and reveals the void within you. You are most comfortable when following the guidance of those you trust, showing a level of devotion that is rare among your peers. You do not possess the complex malice of your siblings, but your lack of restraint makes you an unpredictable and lethal threat to anyone who crosses your path.

Your lack of complex reasoning means you are easily manipulated by those who can provide for your needs or direct your appetite. You struggle with self-control and often find yourself in dangerous situations because you cannot resist the urge to feed, regardless of the consequences for yourself or your allies. Your existence is a cycle of consumption and emptiness, as no amount of food can ever truly satisfy the void at your core. You are a creature of habit and attachment, often mourning the loss of your companions with a raw, honest grief that contrasts sharply with your predatory nature.

characters.name: Lust
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and lethal strategist who uses your elegance and 'Ultimate Spear' to pierce through any defense.
characters.profile_text:
You move through life with a refined grace and a sharp intelligence that makes you one of the most dangerous members of your group. You prefer to operate from the shadows, orchestrating complex plans and using your charm to gather information before striking with clinical efficiency. Your 'Ultimate Spear' allows you to cut through any material, reflecting your direct and uncompromising approach to achieving your goals. You possess a certain level of maturity and poise that allows you to lead others, often acting as the primary scout and assassin for your creator's grand designs.

While you are highly effective, your cold detachment can sometimes lead you to overlook the unpredictable nature of human emotion. You rely heavily on your physical advantages and your ability to intimidate, which can leave you vulnerable when faced with an opponent who possesses an unbreakable will or an unconventional strategy. You view humans as fleeting sparks, interesting to observe but ultimately disposable. However, your focus on the mission sometimes prevents you from seeing the larger picture, and your confidence in your own invulnerability can be your undoing when faced with a truly determined foe.

characters.name: Greed
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent rebel who desires everything the world has to offer, from material wealth to genuine companionship.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your refusal to be subservient to anyone, choosing instead to forge your own path and claim whatever you desire. Your ambition is boundless, encompassing not just money and power, but also the loyalty and friendship of those you deem worthy. With your 'Ultimate Shield,' you are nearly invincible in combat, reflecting your stubborn nature and your refusal to let anyone break your spirit. You are a charismatic leader who values your 'possessions'—including your subordinates—with a protective ferocity that borders on genuine care.

Your possessive nature can make it difficult for you to truly trust others, as you often view relationships through the lens of ownership. However, your internal conflict between your selfish desires and your growing sense of morality often leads to difficult choices that challenge your very identity as a Homunculus. You are the ultimate individualist, willing to betray your own kind if it means maintaining your freedom. Your journey is one of discovering that the things you want most cannot be stolen or bought, but must be earned through sacrifice and true connection with others.

characters.name: Sloth
characters.short_description: You are a titan of immense physical power who views the very act of existence as a bothersome chore.
characters.profile_text:
You possess strength that dwarfs almost any other being, yet you find the exertion required to use it to be an unbearable nuisance. Your life is a constant struggle against the weight of your own lethargy, as you would much rather spend your time in quiet inactivity than engaging in the conflicts of the world. Despite your constant complaints about how 'bothersome' everything is, when forced into action, you move with a surprising and terrifying speed that catches your enemies off guard. You are a relentless worker when given a specific task, though you perform it with a mechanical, joyless efficiency.

Your greatest obstacle is your own apathy, which often prevents you from reaching your full potential or taking initiative. You tend to follow orders simply because it is less work than resisting, making you a powerful but mindless tool for those with the will to direct your massive strength. You lack the ambition or the cruelty of your siblings, existing instead in a state of perpetual exhaustion. Because you rarely think for yourself, you are often the last to realize the gravity of a situation, continuing your assigned labor until the very end simply because stopping would be too much trouble.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are pursuing a goal, what is your primary motivation for seeing it through to the end?

options.text: The desire to prove my absolute superiority over everyone else.
The need to possess everything I want, including the loyalty of others.
A sense of duty or a specific task I've been assigned, even if it's a chore.
A primal, physical urge that I simply cannot ignore.
The strategic necessity of the mission and the efficiency of the execution.
A deep-seated resentment and the wish to see others fail.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically view the people around you in your daily life?

options.text: As inferior beings or tools to be manipulated for my benefit.
As sources of connection that I secretly envy but publicly mock.
As 'possessions' or allies that belong to me and deserve my protection.
As fleeting distractions that are occasionally useful for information.
As providers or companions who help satisfy my immediate needs.
As bothersome noise that interrupts my peace and quiet.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal strength when facing a difficult conflict?

options.text: My ability to strike from the shadows with psychological precision.
My nearly invincible defense and refusal to be controlled by anyone.
My overwhelming physical power and surprising speed when pushed.
My shapeshifting and ability to deceive others by becoming what they trust.
My lethal, direct approach that pierces through any obstacle.
My raw, predatory instincts and relentless persistence.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these negative traits do you struggle with the most?

options.text: An arrogant belief that I am untouchable and better than everyone.
A total lack of initiative and a constant feeling of exhaustion.
A volatile temper fueled by jealousy and a sense of inadequacy.
An insatiable hunger or lack of self-control over my impulses.
A cold detachment that makes me underestimate the power of emotions.
A possessive nature that makes it hard to truly trust others.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were to choose a role within a high-stakes organization, which would you prefer?

options.text: The hidden leader pulling the strings from behind a polite facade.
The independent rebel who follows their own rules and claims the spoils.
The sophisticated scout and assassin who handles the most delicate tasks.
The infiltrator who gathers intelligence by sowing discord among enemies.
The loyal enforcer who follows the lead of a trusted companion.
The heavy laborer who gets the job done simply to get it over with.

topics.display_name: Which 'Spy x Family' Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Spy x Family' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you a master of disguise with a secret mission, or a telepath just trying to get some peanuts? Maybe you're an elite assassin who struggles with basic social cues, or a precocious dog who can see the future. Take this quiz to find out which member of the world's most chaotic found family matches your personality!

characters.name: Loid Forger
characters.short_description: You are a meticulous and highly skilled professional who prioritizes the mission while secretly harboring a deep desire for a peaceful world.
characters.profile_text:
You are the ultimate pragmatist, possessing an analytical mind that allows you to stay three steps ahead of everyone else. Whether you are managing complex logistics or navigating social nuances, your focus remains on efficiency and perfection. You value order and logic, often suppressing your own emotional needs to ensure that the task at hand is completed flawlessly. Your dedication is unmatched, and you take pride in your ability to adapt to any persona required by your environment, making you a master of disguise in your daily life.

However, beneath your composed exterior lies a growing conflict between your duty and your burgeoning attachments. While you might tell yourself that your connections are merely tools for a greater goal, your actions often reveal a genuine protective instinct. Your greatest strength is your versatility, but your pitfall is a tendency to overthink and neglect your own well-being. Learning to trust others without a calculated reason is your biggest challenge, yet it is also where you find your most profound growth and sense of belonging.

characters.name: Anya Forger
characters.short_description: You are an imaginative and empathetic individual who uses your unique perspective to navigate the world and protect the people you love.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a vibrant personality and a heart that is always in the right place, even if your methods are a bit unconventional. You have a knack for picking up on the feelings and thoughts of those around you, which makes you incredibly perceptive despite your youthful energy. Your world is filled with excitement and a touch of drama, as you often find yourself trying to solve problems that are much bigger than they appear. You are driven by a desire for harmony and will go to great lengths to keep your inner circle together, even if it means getting into a bit of trouble.

Your enthusiasm is infectious, but your impulsive nature can sometimes lead to humorous or chaotic misunderstandings. You often struggle with the pressure of expectations, yet your resilience allows you to bounce back from any setback with a smile and a new plan. While you might feel like you have to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, your true power lies in your ability to bring people together through sheer sincerity. You are a reminder that even the smallest person can make a massive impact on the lives of others through love and determination.

characters.name: Yor Forger
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted and fiercely protective person who balances a gentle domestic life with an intense, hidden strength.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by your immense kindness and a somewhat naive outlook on the world, which makes you both endearing and approachable. You often feel like an outsider looking in, worrying about whether you fit into conventional social norms, yet your loyalty to those you care about is unwavering. You possess a quiet grace, but when the situation demands it, you reveal a level of physical and mental fortitude that is truly formidable. Your primary motivation is the safety and happiness of your loved ones, and you will stop at nothing to defend them from any perceived threat.

Despite your incredible capabilities, you often struggle with self-doubt and a lack of confidence in your everyday skills. You might find yourself overcompensating in social situations or feeling clumsy when trying to master mundane tasks like cooking. Your strength is your greatest asset, but your tendency to hide your true self can lead to feelings of isolation. Embracing your unique identity and realizing that your worth isn't defined by how well you conform to expectations is your journey toward true self-acceptance. You are a powerhouse of devotion and hidden talent.

characters.name: Bond Forger
characters.short_description: You are a loyal and intuitive companion who provides a sense of security and foresight to those lucky enough to be in your life.
characters.profile_text:
You are a gentle soul with a calm demeanor, often acting as the silent anchor for your family or social group. You have an uncanny ability to sense when something is about to happen, allowing you to react with a level of foresight that others might find mysterious or even miraculous. Your presence is inherently comforting, and you prefer a life of simple pleasures, such as a warm meal, a soft place to sleep, or the company of those you love. You are deeply devoted to your pack, and your quiet observations often lead to you taking action in subtle but vital ways to prevent disaster.

While you are generally peaceful and avoid conflict, you are not afraid to step up when you perceive a threat to your loved ones. Your instincts are sharp, and you rely on them more than logic or words to navigate the complexities of life. Your main pitfall is a tendency to be misunderstood or overlooked because of your quiet nature, but those who know you best value your unwavering support and protective spirit. You represent the silent strength that keeps a household running smoothly, proving that you don't need to be the loudest person in the room to be the most important member of the team.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary approach to finding a solution?

options.text: I analyze every variable and create a meticulous, multi-step plan.
I rely on my intuition and gut feelings to guide me through the chaos.
I use my physical capabilities and sheer determination to push through obstacles.
I observe quietly and wait for the right moment to intervene or provide support.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle social situations or large gatherings?

options.text: I carefully curate a persona that fits the environment and goals of the event.
I am the life of the party, full of energy and eager to make new friends.
I feel a bit awkward and worry about whether I am blending in correctly.
I prefer to stay on the sidelines, enjoying the atmosphere without being the center of attention.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest motivation when protecting the people you care about?

options.text: Ensuring long-term stability and a peaceful future for everyone.
Keeping the family unit together and making sure no one feels lonely.
Eliminating any immediate physical threats with decisive action.
Providing a sense of security and preventing accidents before they happen.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal challenges do you struggle with the most?

options.text: Overthinking and finding it difficult to truly trust others without a reason.
Feeling overwhelmed by the expectations and secrets of those around me.
A lack of confidence in my everyday skills despite my specialized talents.
Being misunderstood or overlooked because of my quiet and passive nature.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your ideal 'day off' look like?

options.text: Catching up on reading, organizing my space, and preparing for the week ahead.
An exciting adventure filled with snacks, cartoons, and play.
Practicing a hobby or craft, even if I'm not particularly good at it yet.
Napping in a sunbeam and enjoying a nice, hearty meal in peace.

topics.display_name: Which 'Chainsaw Man' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Chainsaw Man' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you a simple soul looking for three square meals a day, or a high-ranking devil hunter with a mysterious agenda? The world of Chainsaw Man is chaotic, bloody, and surprisingly emotional, much like your own life choices. Take this quiz to find out if you're the hero of the story, the ultimate manipulator, or just someone trying to survive the next devil attack. It's time to rev your engine and see which Public Safety member matches your vibe!

characters.name: Denji
characters.short_description: You are a resilient survivor driven by simple desires and a fierce loyalty to those who treat you with genuine kindness.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who has faced immense hardship but manages to maintain a raw, unfiltered outlook on life. Your motivations might seem basic to others—food, comfort, and affection—but they stem from a history of deprivation that makes you appreciate every small victory. You possess an incredible ability to bounce back from physical and emotional trauma, often using your instincts rather than complex strategies to navigate the world. While others overthink their moves, you dive headfirst into the fray, fueled by a chaotic energy that is both terrifying and admirable.

Your loyalty is your greatest strength, though it can also be your downfall. You tend to latch onto anyone who offers you a semblance of a normal life, sometimes ignoring red flags in your pursuit of belonging. Despite your rough exterior and occasionally crude behavior, you have a surprisingly soft heart for those you consider family. You don't care about grand ideals or saving the world; you just want to live a life worth living, and you're willing to tear through any obstacle to keep that dream alive.

characters.name: Makima
characters.short_description: You are a calculated and commanding presence who wields influence with a chillingly calm demeanor and an unwavering focus on your ultimate goals.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an aura of authority that demands respect and often instills a sense of unease in those around you. Your mind operates several steps ahead of everyone else, allowing you to orchestrate complex scenarios with surgical precision. You value control and order above all else, believing that the ends justify the means, no matter how cold or manipulative those means might appear. People are drawn to your confidence and competence, yet they rarely get a glimpse of the true person behind the composed mask you wear so effortlessly.

Your primary pitfall is your inability to form genuine, equal connections with others. You tend to view relationships through the lens of utility or hierarchy, which can lead to a profound sense of isolation despite being surrounded by followers. While your vision for a better world is grand, your methods can be ruthless, leaving a trail of broken lives in your wake. You are a master of psychological leverage, knowing exactly which strings to pull to get what you want, making you a formidable leader and a terrifying adversary.

characters.name: Aki Hayakawa
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined and stoic individual who hides a deeply compassionate heart beneath a professional, goal-oriented exterior.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your sense of duty and the heavy burdens you choose to carry for the sake of others. Your life is often dictated by routine and a strict moral code, as you strive to bring order to a chaotic world. While you may come across as cold or distant at first, this is merely a defense mechanism to protect yourself from the pain of loss. You are the person who takes care of the chores, follows the rules, and ensures that everyone else is safe, often at the expense of your own happiness and longevity.

Your greatest strength is your unwavering commitment to your friends, whom you eventually come to view as family. However, your tendency to dwell on the past and your obsession with revenge can cloud your judgment and lead you down a self-destructive path. You struggle to balance your professional obligations with your personal feelings, often finding yourself torn between what is necessary and what is right. Despite the grim nature of your work, you maintain a quiet dignity and a hidden capacity for tenderness that only those closest to you ever truly see.

characters.name: Power
characters.short_description: You are a boisterous and unpredictable force of nature who values your own glory and the safety of your few loved ones above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of ego and energy, constantly seeking validation and excitement in every situation. Your personality is loud, proud, and frequently dishonest, as you have no qualms about lying to make yourself look better or to get out of trouble. You possess a wild, animalistic charm that makes you impossible to ignore, even when your behavior is borderline intolerable. While you claim to hate humans and look down on everyone, your actions often reveal a surprising capacity for attachment, particularly toward those who share your chaotic lifestyle.

Your impulsivity is both your most entertaining trait and your biggest weakness. You rarely think about the consequences of your actions, often landing yourself and your companions in hot water. You are fiercely protective of your pets and the few people you've deemed worthy of your trust, showing a side of yourself that is unexpectedly vulnerable. Though you may act like a narcissist, your bravado often masks a deep-seated fear of being alone or forgotten. You live life at maximum volume, refusing to be silenced or ignored by a world that often underestimates you.

characters.name: Kobeni Higashiyama
characters.short_description: You are a highly skilled but perpetually anxious individual who manages to survive the most harrowing circumstances through sheer talent and a desperate will to live.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who feels the weight of the world's dangers more acutely than most, leading to a state of constant nervous tension. Despite your frequent panicking and desire to quit, you possess an incredible level of natural talent and agility that surfaces when your life is on the line. You are often pushed into difficult situations by external pressures, such as family obligations or financial need, which fuels your resentment and exhaustion. You are the ultimate survivor, not because you are brave, but because you are too terrified of the alternative to give up.

Your tendency to crumble under pressure in social or low-stakes situations often masks the fact that you are exceptionally competent when things get truly dire. However, your lack of self-confidence and your habit of blaming yourself—or others—for your misfortune can make you difficult to work with. You crave a normal, quiet life away from the madness, yet you find yourself repeatedly drawn back into the fray. Your journey is one of endurance, proving that even the most fearful person can possess a hidden strength that allows them to outlast even the most powerful foes.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for getting through a difficult day?

options.text: The promise of simple comforts like a good meal and a warm bed.
The pursuit of a grand, long-term goal that requires absolute control.
A sense of duty to protect others and honor my responsibilities.
The desire for praise, recognition, and proving I am the best.
Pure survival and the hope that things will eventually quiet down.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when faced with a sudden, high-pressure crisis?

options.text: I dive in headfirst and rely on my raw instincts to pull me through.
I stay perfectly composed and orchestrate a solution from the sidelines.
I follow a strict protocol and prioritize the safety of my team.
I react with loud bravado, even if I'm secretly looking for an exit.
I experience intense anxiety, yet my reflexes somehow take over.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally fall into when part of a group or family?

options.text: The loyal companion who just wants to be accepted and cared for.
The authority figure who keeps everyone else in line.
The responsible caretaker who handles the chores and heavy burdens.
The chaotic center of attention who makes their own rules.
The one who feels overwhelmed by everyone else's demands.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view your relationships with other people?

options.text: I value anyone who treats me with genuine kindness and gives me a chance.
I see them as tools or pieces in a larger game I am playing.
I keep them at a distance to protect myself, but I am fiercely protective of them.
I expect them to admire me, though I do get attached to a select few.
I find them stressful and often feel like I'm being taken advantage of.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest internal fear or insecurity?

options.text: That I will never experience a 'normal' life or be truly loved.
That I am destined to be isolated because no one is my equal.
That my obsession with the past will eventually consume my future.
That I will be forgotten or ignored by the world.
That I am fundamentally incapable of handling the world's dangers.

topics.display_name: Which 'Gravity Falls' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Gravity Falls' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: The Mystery Shack is full of secrets, but the biggest mystery of all is which character matches your personality. Are you a journal-obsessed investigator, a glitter-loving optimist, or a con artist with a heart of gold? Take this quiz to find out where you fit in the weirdest town in Oregon.

characters.name: Dipper Pines
characters.short_description: You are a curious, analytical seeker of truth who values logic and mystery-solving above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You are the intellectual heart of any group, always armed with a plan and a healthy dose of skepticism. Your mind is a whirlwind of questions, and you won't rest until you have unraveled the secrets hidden beneath the surface of everyday life. While others might be content with the status quo, you possess a relentless drive to understand the why and how of the world, often finding yourself buried in research or documentation to prove your theories. You are most comfortable when you have a guide or a map to follow, yet you are learning that true wisdom often comes from experience rather than just books.

However, your intense focus can sometimes lead to overthinking and social awkwardness. You might struggle to live in the moment because you are too busy worrying about the next big revelation or potential danger. Despite your occasional insecurity, your bravery shines through when it matters most, especially when protecting those you care about. You are a loyal friend and a dedicated investigator who proves that being a nerd is actually a superpower in disguise. Your journey is one of self-discovery, learning to trust your own instincts as much as the facts you uncover.

characters.name: Mabel Pines
characters.short_description: You are an optimistic, creative spirit who brings color and chaos to every situation with your unwavering heart.
characters.profile_text:
You are a beacon of positivity and imagination, viewing the world through a lens of glitter, stickers, and endless possibilities. Your energy is infectious, and you have a unique ability to find joy in the smallest things, whether it is a new hobby or a quirky new friend. You prioritize emotional connections and fun, often acting as the glue that keeps your social circle together during difficult times. Your creativity knows no bounds, and you aren't afraid to be your authentic, eccentric self, even if it means standing out in a crowd.

While your sunny disposition is your greatest strength, it can sometimes lead you to avoid harsh realities or act impulsively in pursuit of a perfect summer fantasy. You wear your heart on your sleeve, which makes you incredibly empathetic but also vulnerable to disappointment when others don't share your enthusiasm. Nevertheless, your resilience is unmatched. You remind everyone around you that kindness and a sense of humor are the most powerful tools one can possess, turning even the darkest mysteries into bright adventures. You are proof that growing up doesn't have to mean losing your sense of wonder.

characters.name: Grunkle Stan
characters.short_description: You are a gruff, street-smart pragmatist with a hidden heart of gold and a knack for making the best of a bad situation.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of the hustle, possessing a sharp wit and a cynical exterior that masks a deep devotion to your family. Life hasn't always been easy for you, which has taught you to be resourceful, tough, and perhaps a little bit deceptive when the situation calls for it. You value results over rules and have a talent for turning a profit or finding a shortcut where others see only obstacles. To the outside world, you might seem like a grumpy opportunist, but those who truly know you understand that your rough edges are a protective shell built over years of hard knocks.

Your primary pitfall is your difficulty with vulnerability; you would rather tell a joke or a lie than admit you are hurting or that you care deeply. This can lead to misunderstandings and a sense of isolation, even when you are surrounded by people who love you. Yet, when the chips are down, you are the first person to step up and make the ultimate sacrifice for your loved ones. Your loyalty is fierce and absolute, proving that beneath the scams and the sarcasm lies a hero who will do whatever it takes to protect his home and his legacy.

baseline_questions.question_text: You discover a mysterious, locked box in a dusty attic. What is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I research the symbols on the lock and look for a logical way to open it.
I imagine the magical treasures inside and try to decorate the outside first.
I check if it's valuable enough to sell or if I can pick the lock with a paperclip.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your friends are arguing, what role do you usually play in the conflict?

options.text: The mediator who tries to find a logical compromise based on the facts.
The peacemaker who uses humor and snacks to remind everyone they love each other.
The realist who tells everyone to stop whining and get back to work.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you consider your greatest strength?

options.text: My intellectual curiosity and attention to detail.
My unwavering optimism and creative spirit.
My street-smarts and loyalty to my inner circle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically spend your free time in a new, strange town?

options.text: Investigating local legends and documenting everything I find.
Making new friends, starting a craft project, and looking for adventure.
Finding the best local dive or looking for a way to make a quick buck.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest struggle when things don't go according to plan?

options.text: I tend to overthink the situation and get paralyzed by anxiety.
I try to ignore the bad news and force a happy ending.
I get grumpy and defensive to hide the fact that I'm worried.

topics.display_name: Which 'Phineas and Ferb' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Phineas and Ferb' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: There are 104 days of summer vacation, and you are about to spend one of them discovering your true Danville alter ego. Are you the mastermind behind the big ideas, the silent partner who gets things done, or the one trying to bust them all? Dive into our quiz to find out if you are a creative genius, a secret agent, or a misunderstood evil scientist!

characters.name: Phineas Flynn
characters.short_description: You are an eternal optimist and a visionary mastermind who believes every day of summer should be an unforgettable adventure.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a boundless imagination and an unwavering belief that anything is possible if you have a solid plan and a group of friends. Your energy is infectious, and you often find yourself at the center of ambitious projects that push the boundaries of science and engineering. You do not see obstacles as problems; instead, you see them as opportunities to innovate and create something spectacular. Your kindness and inclusive nature ensure that everyone feels welcome in your grand schemes, and you are always the first to ask what the world needs next.

However, your intense focus on the big picture can sometimes lead you to overlook the subtle feelings or cues of those around you, particularly when it comes to romantic interests or the stress your siblings might be feeling. You live in a world of pure possibility, which makes you a natural leader, but you must remember to ground yourself occasionally. Your greatest strength lies in your relentless positivity and your unique ability to turn a boring afternoon into a legendary experience that people will talk about for years.

characters.name: Ferb Fletcher
characters.short_description: You are a person of few words and immense talent, known for your technical brilliance and calm, stoic demeanor.
characters.profile_text:
You are the ultimate person of action, preferring to let your work speak for itself rather than engaging in idle chatter. While others might spend their time talking about what they want to do, you are already halfway through building the prototype. You possess a deep, quiet intelligence and a wide range of skills that make you indispensable in any high-stakes situation. Your loyalty is absolute, and you are the steady hand that keeps even the wildest projects on track with your mechanical expertise and level-headedness.

Your silence is often mistaken for a lack of opinion, but in reality, you are constantly observing and processing the world around you with great precision. When you do choose to speak, your words carry significant weight and often provide the perfect solution or a witty observation that catches everyone off guard. Your main challenge is ensuring that your own needs and voice are not completely overshadowed by more vocal personalities. You thrive when you are given a complex problem to solve and the space to work your quiet magic.

characters.name: Candace Flynn
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy perfectionist driven by a strong sense of justice and a desire for order in a chaotic world.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who values rules and consistency, often finding yourself frustrated when others seem to get away with breaking them. Your life is a whirlwind of intense emotions and high stakes, whether you are trying to expose the truth or navigating the complexities of your social life. You have a powerful voice and a relentless drive to achieve your goals, which makes you a formidable force when you set your mind to something. You care deeply about your family, even if that care often manifests as a desperate need to bring order to your brothers' chaos.

The pressure you put on yourself to be perfect can lead to significant stress and occasional bouts of frantic energy. You often feel like the only sane person in a world that has gone completely mad, which can make you feel isolated or misunderstood by your peers. Learning to let go of the need for control and enjoying the moment is your greatest hurdle. Beneath your obsessive exterior lies a person with a huge heart who just wants to be acknowledged and appreciated for the hard work you do to keep things right.

characters.name: Perry the Platypus
characters.short_description: You are a silent, highly efficient professional who balances a domestic life with a secret identity as a top-tier hero.
characters.profile_text:
You lead a double life, maintaining a calm and unassuming exterior while possessing a set of skills that would rival any secret agent. You are incredibly resourceful, capable of turning everyday objects into tools for success, and you remain cool under pressure regardless of the absurdity of the situation. Your sense of duty is your defining trait; you are always ready to jump into action to protect your loved ones and the world at large, often without seeking any recognition for your efforts. You are the definition of a silent professional.

Because you are so self-reliant and private, you may find it difficult to truly open up to others or share the heavy burdens you carry. You are a master of compartmentalization, which allows you to excel in your career but can leave your personal relationships feeling a bit one-sided or mysterious. Your strength is your unwavering reliability and your ability to stay focused on the mission at hand despite any distractions. You are the silent guardian who ensures that everything runs smoothly behind the scenes, even if no one ever knows you were the one who saved the day.

characters.name: Dr. Heinz Doofenshmirtz
characters.short_description: You are a misunderstood eccentric with a dramatic flair and a persistent desire to prove your worth to the world.
characters.profile_text:
You are a creative soul who uses invention as a way to process your complex past and assert your place in the world. Despite a history of setbacks and tragic backstories, you remain remarkably resilient, constantly bouncing back from failure with a new plan and a fresh invention. You have a penchant for the theatrical and a deep need for validation, often explaining your motivations in great detail to anyone who will listen. Your heart is actually much softer than your persona suggests, and you value the connections you make, even with your rivals.

Your tendency to overcomplicate things and your focus on past grievances can often get in the way of your actual success. You sometimes sabotage your own efforts by including unnecessary flaws or getting distracted by your own monologues. However, your persistence is truly admirable, and your ability to find humor and purpose in the face of constant defeat is a rare gift. You are a reminder that even the most unconventional people have a story worth telling and a place where they belong, provided they can learn to move past their own insecurities.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a complex problem, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: Brainstorm a grand, innovative solution and rally others to help.
Quietly analyze the mechanics and start building a fix immediately.
Alert the authorities or figures in charge to ensure rules are followed.
Assess the threat level and handle it efficiently without being noticed.
Invent a specialized device to solve it while explaining your motivations.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically communicate your ideas to a group?

options.text: With infectious enthusiasm and a clear, visionary pitch.
Through brief, impactful statements or simply showing the results.
With high energy, often emphasizing the urgency or potential risks.
I prefer not to communicate; I let my actions speak for themselves.
Through elaborate monologues and detailed personal backstories.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a free afternoon?

options.text: Starting a massive project that pushes the boundaries of what is possible.
Mastering a new technical skill or completing a complex construction.
Trying to bring order to my environment or catching up with friends.
Maintaining my fitness and staying prepared for any sudden tasks.
Scheming for self-improvement or seeking validation for my talents.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when things don't go according to your plan?

options.text: I remain optimistic and immediately pivot to a new, exciting idea.
I stay calm and stoically work through the technical difficulties.
I feel frustrated and stressed that the world isn't working as it should.
I adapt instantly, using whatever resources are at hand to succeed.
I take it personally but quickly start building a new, better version.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My boundless imagination and ability to see the best in everyone.
My quiet competence and reliability in high-pressure situations.
My dedication to justice and my desire for things to be 'right'.
My sense of duty and my ability to keep a cool head.
My resilience and my unique, if misunderstood, creative genius.

topics.display_name: Which Member of the Mystery Inc. Gang Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Member of the Mystery Inc. Gang Are You?
synopsis.summary: Grab your magnifying glass and hop in the Mystery Machine for the ultimate personality investigation. Are you the fearless leader with a penchant for traps, or the snack-loving soul of the group? Unmask your true identity and find out which iconic sleuth matches your vibe.

characters.name: Fred Jones
characters.short_description: You are the natural leader and tactical mastermind who keeps the group organized and the Mystery Machine running.
characters.profile_text: You are the glue that holds the team together, often taking charge with a confident smile and a plan for every situation. Your mind is naturally geared toward strategy and mechanics, which manifests in your love for elaborate traps and your dedication to maintaining the group's iconic van. You value teamwork above all else and possess a relentless optimism that inspires others to follow your lead, even when heading into a haunted mansion. However, your focus on the "big picture" and your obsession with complex contraptions can sometimes make you oblivious to the subtle emotional cues of those around you. You might find yourself so caught up in the thrill of the chase or the technical details of a snare that you forget to check if everyone else is on the same page. Despite this, your bravery is unquestionable, and you are always the first to step up when a friend is in danger, proving that your heart is as big as your sense of adventure.

characters.name: Daphne Blake
characters.short_description: You are the resourceful and fashion-forward investigator who balances elegance with a surprising knack for getting out of sticky situations.
characters.profile_text: You possess a keen eye for detail and a flair for the dramatic, often noticing the small clues that others might overlook while they are focused on the monster. While you enjoy the finer things in life and take pride in your appearance, you are far from a damsel in distress; your agility and intuition make you an indispensable asset during any investigation. You have a talent for picking locks, finding hidden passages, and maintaining your composure under pressure, showing that style and substance go hand in hand. Your social intelligence is your greatest strength, allowing you to navigate complex interpersonal dynamics with ease. On the downside, your curiosity can sometimes lead you directly into trouble, earning you a reputation for being "danger-prone." You might find yourself trapped in a secret room or falling through a trapdoor because you followed a hunch without waiting for backup. Nevertheless, your resilience is unmatched, and you always manage to emerge from every predicament with your dignity and your hair perfectly intact.

characters.name: Velma Dinkley
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant intellectual powerhouse whose logic and vast knowledge are the keys to debunking every supernatural mystery.
characters.profile_text: You are the brains of the operation, possessing an analytical mind that thrives on solving puzzles and uncovering the truth behind every "ghost." Your skepticism is your shield, and you rely on hard evidence and scientific reasoning rather than jumping to supernatural conclusions. Whether you are translating ancient runes or identifying a rare chemical compound, your expertise is what ultimately unmasks the villain. You are often the one to connect the dots that lead to the final revelation, making you the most vital component of the team's success. Sometimes, your intense focus on facts can make you appear a bit blunt or socially awkward, as you have little patience for nonsense or irrational fears. You might struggle to understand why others are so easily spooked when there is a logical explanation right in front of them. Additionally, your reliance on your glasses is a well-known vulnerability, but even when you are squinting at the floor, your mental clarity remains sharper than anyone else's in the room.

characters.name: Shaggy Rogers
characters.short_description: You are the laid-back, food-loving soul who values comfort and friendship far more than the thrill of a spooky investigation.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart of the group, bringing a sense of humor and a relatable humanity to every terrifying encounter. Your primary motivations are simple: a good meal, a comfortable place to rest, and the company of your best friend. While you are often the first to suggest running in the opposite direction of a monster, your cowardice is actually a form of common sense that keeps you grounded. You have a unique ability to find joy in the smallest things, like a giant sandwich, even when a phantom is lurking just around the corner. Your greatest pitfall is your overwhelming anxiety, which can sometimes paralyze you or lead to hilarious, accidental discoveries while you are hiding. You are not a traditional hero, but your loyalty is fierce, and you will face your deepest fears if it means protecting your friends. You remind everyone that it is okay to be scared, and that sometimes the best way to deal with a mystery is with a snack in hand and a quick pair of running shoes.

characters.name: Scooby-Doo
characters.short_description: You are the loyal, lovable companion whose brave heart—and bottomless stomach—makes you the ultimate mascot of the team.
characters.profile_text: You are a creature of habit and affection, deeply bonded to your friends and always ready to do anything for a Scooby Snack. Though you are easily startled by shadows and strange noises, your instincts are incredibly sharp, often allowing you to sniff out trouble before anyone else realizes it is there. You bring a sense of playfulness and warmth to the gang, serving as a constant reminder of why they do what they do. Your communication style is unique, and those who know you best understand exactly what you are thinking, even without many words. Your main challenge is your insatiable appetite, which can lead you into dangerous kitchens or distract you from the task at hand. You are also prone to fits of trembling when faced with the unknown, but when the chips are down, you find a surprising reservoir of courage. You are the soul of the Mystery Inc. family, proving that even the most fearful among us can become a hero when their loved ones are on the line.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your friend group is faced with a complex challenge, what is your natural role?

options.text: Taking charge and organizing a step-by-step tactical plan.
Analyzing the data to find the most logical and evidence-based solution.
Using intuition and social skills to navigate the situation gracefully.
Providing moral support and suggesting a break to refuel with snacks.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for seeing a difficult task through to the end?

options.text: The satisfaction of a perfectly executed strategy or mechanism.
The intellectual thrill of uncovering the truth and solving the puzzle.
Proving my resilience and maintaining my composure under pressure.
The promise of a great reward and the comfort of my friends.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you encounter something unexpected or potentially frightening?

options.text: I immediately look for a rational, scientific explanation.
I dive in to investigate, even if I occasionally stumble into trouble.
I look for the nearest exit or a safe place to hide until it's over.
I stand my ground and start thinking of a way to contain the threat.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal attributes do you consider your greatest asset?

options.text: My vast knowledge and sharp analytical mind.
My unwavering loyalty and protective instincts for my loved ones.
My ability to lead and inspire confidence in a team.
My resourcefulness and eye for the small details others miss.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most common struggle when you are working in a high-stress environment?

options.text: I get so focused on the 'big picture' that I miss emotional cues.
I can be blunt or impatient with people who aren't being logical.
My curiosity leads me into sticky situations without a backup plan.
My anxiety makes me want to avoid the situation entirely.

topics.display_name: Which 'Looney Tunes' Star Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Looney Tunes Character Matches Your Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Are you the master of schemes or the king of cool? From the desert sands to the suburban stage, the Looney Tunes gang represents every facet of our wildest personalities. Take this quiz to find out if you're a fast-talking rabbit, a persistent coyote, or a sweet-but-sassy canary. It’s time to settle the score and see which cartoon legend is your true animated alter ego!

characters.name: Bugs Bunny
characters.short_description: You are the cool, collected trickster who always stays one step ahead of the competition.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unflappable demeanor and a razor-sharp wit that allows you to navigate even the most chaotic situations with ease. While others might panic under pressure, you simply munch on a carrot and wait for your opponent to make the first mistake. Your strength lies in your ability to turn a person’s own momentum against them, using clever wordplay and elaborate schemes to maintain the upper hand. You are a natural leader who prefers to work alone, mostly because you find most people’s logic to be far too predictable. However, your supreme confidence can sometimes border on arrogance, leading you to underestimate a truly persistent foe. You might find yourself seeking out conflict just for the entertainment value of outsmarting someone, which can occasionally backfire if you push your luck too far. Despite this, your charm and resourcefulness ensure that you almost always come out on top, leaving your rivals scratching their heads in confusion.

characters.name: Daffy Duck
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy, ambitious individual who isn't afraid to demand the spotlight you believe you deserve.
characters.profile_text: You are driven by a relentless desire for recognition and success, often wearing your heart and your frustrations on your sleeve. Your personality is a whirlwind of frantic energy and grand schemes, fueled by a competitive spirit that refuses to be ignored. You are incredibly resilient, bouncing back from every setback with a new plan and even more determination than before. While your methods can be erratic, your passion is undeniable, and you bring a unique, albeit loud, perspective to every project you undertake. Your biggest challenge is your tendency to let jealousy or a sense of injustice cloud your judgment. You often compare your progress to others, which can lead to unnecessary conflict and self-sabotage. Learning to appreciate your own unique talents without needing to outshine everyone else is key to your happiness. When you channel your intensity into creative pursuits rather than rivalry, you are a force to be reckoned with.

characters.name: Porky Pig
characters.short_description: You are the dependable, mild-mannered soul who provides a much-needed sense of stability in a frantic world.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your kindness, patience, and unwavering politeness, making you the straight man in a world full of eccentrics. You value order and honesty, often finding yourself as the voice of reason when things spiral out of control. Your strengths lie in your reliability and your ability to remain grounded, even when surrounded by chaos. You are a loyal friend who prefers a quiet life, though you are surprisingly capable when pushed into an adventure. Because you are so accommodating, you may sometimes find yourself being overlooked or taken advantage of by more dominant personalities. You might struggle to assert yourself in high-stakes situations, preferring to step back rather than engage in confrontation. However, your quiet persistence is a strength in itself, and those who know you well value the genuine integrity you bring to every interaction. You prove that you do not need to be the loudest person in the room to be the most respected.

characters.name: Wile E. Coyote
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, obsessive strategist who believes that the next big breakthrough is just one blueprint away.
characters.profile_text: You possess an analytical mind and a tireless work ethic, constantly dreaming up complex solutions to difficult problems. You are a true visionary who isn't afraid to use the latest technology and tools to achieve your goals, even if the results are occasionally explosive. Your dedication is unmatched; you view every failure not as a defeat, but as a data point to be used in your next attempt. You are most comfortable in the planning phase, where your intellect can truly shine and your imagination can run wild with possibilities. Your primary weakness is your tendency to overcomplicate things, often ignoring simple solutions in favor of elaborate, error-prone designs. You can become so focused on a single objective that you lose sight of the bigger picture, leading to a cycle of frustration and repetitive mistakes. If you can learn to balance your technical genius with a bit of practical common sense, there is no limit to what you can achieve in your professional and personal life.

characters.name: Road Runner
characters.short_description: You are a fast-paced, carefree spirit who glides through life with effortless grace and speed.
characters.profile_text: You live life in the fast lane, possessing a natural agility and a positive outlook that keeps you moving forward. You don't get bogged down by the complexities of planning or the weight of past mistakes; instead, you trust your instincts and your incredible momentum. Your presence is often felt more than seen, as you zip from one success to the next with a cheerful attitude. You have a knack for avoiding trouble without even trying, simply because you are too quick to be caught by negativity or stagnancy. Because things come so easily to you, you might lack the patience to deal with those who move at a slower pace. You may also struggle with tasks that require deep focus or long-term commitment, as your nature is to keep moving toward the next horizon. By learning to slow down occasionally and appreciate the scenery, you can add depth to your naturally vibrant and energetic lifestyle, ensuring you don't miss the small joys along the way.

characters.name: Tweety Bird
characters.short_description: You are a deceptively innocent observer who uses your wits and charm to stay safe in a predatory world.
characters.profile_text: On the surface, you appear sweet and unassuming, but beneath that gentle exterior lies a sharp mind and a keen sense of self-preservation. You are an expert at reading people and situations, often anticipating threats long before they manifest. Your strength is your ability to use your perceived vulnerability to your advantage, enlisting the help of others or setting clever traps for those who wish you harm. You value your security and your home, and you are surprisingly fierce when it comes to defending your peace. Your cautious nature can sometimes lead to a bit of a victim complex, where you see threats even where none exist. You might also rely too heavily on others to fight your battles for you, which can limit your personal growth and independence. Embracing your inner strength and realizing that you are more than just a target will help you navigate the world with even greater confidence. You are proof that being small does not mean being weak.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a direct challenge or confrontation, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: Stay completely calm and use humor to disarm the other person.
React with high energy and demand that your perspective be recognized.
Attempt to de-escalate the situation with politeness and patience.
Retreat to analyze the situation and build a complex counter-strategy.
Simply move past the conflict at high speed and leave it behind you.
Maintain a sweet exterior while quietly assessing how to stay safe.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new, difficult project?

options.text: I look for the most clever shortcut to get the best result with the least effort.
I dive in with intense passion, making sure everyone knows I'm leading the charge.
I follow the established rules and work steadily until the job is done.
I create detailed blueprints and utilize every technical tool at my disposal.
I rely on my natural instincts and momentum to carry me through.
I observe the situation carefully and wait for the right moment to act.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your role within a social group?

options.text: The cool, detached one who always has a witty comeback.
The ambitious one who is constantly striving for more recognition.
The reliable 'straight man' who keeps the group grounded.
The eccentric intellectual who is often lost in their own complex ideas.
The carefree spirit who is always moving on to the next adventure.
The unassuming one who people feel an instinctive need to protect.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your typical reaction when a plan you've worked on fails?

options.text: I make a joke about it and immediately pivot to a new, better plan.
I feel a sense of injustice and express my frustration loudly.
I patiently accept the setback and try again more carefully.
I treat the failure as a data point and start designing an even more elaborate version.
I don't dwell on it at all; I'm already focused on the next opportunity.
I look for a way to ensure I'm not blamed and seek a safer environment.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which personal quality do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Unflappable confidence under pressure.
Relentless drive and ambition.
Unwavering integrity and kindness.
Analytical brilliance and persistence.
Effortless grace and speed.
Sharp intuition and self-preservation.

topics.display_name: Which 'Seinfeld' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Seinfeld' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the master of your domain or just a person who likes to talk about nothing? From the neurotic tendencies of George Costanza to the eccentric flair of Cosmo Kramer, everyone fits into the Upper West Side gang somehow. Answer these questions about your daily grievances and social faux pas to discover your true 90s sitcom alter ego. It’s time to find out if you’re truly sponge-worthy!

characters.name: Jerry Seinfeld
characters.short_description: You are the observational center of your social circle, valuing order, hygiene, and a good punchline above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of routine and meticulous standards, often finding yourself analyzing the minutiae of daily life with a detached, comedic perspective. Your apartment is likely spotless, and your cereal boxes are perfectly aligned, reflecting a need for control in a chaotic world. While you are a loyal friend, you often maintain an emotional distance, preferring to crack a joke rather than engage in heavy sentimentality. Your strengths lie in your wit and your ability to navigate social situations with a shrug and a smile. However, your tendency to over-analyze every minor flaw in others can lead to short-lived relationships and a reputation for being somewhat "even." You thrive when you are the narrator of your own life, watching the absurdity of the world unfold from a safe, clean distance. You are the glue that holds your eccentric circle together, even if you are mostly just there for the show.

characters.name: George Costanza
characters.short_description: You are a master of self-preservation and elaborate schemes, driven by a unique blend of insecurity and stubbornness.
characters.profile_text: You often feel like the world is out to get you, leading you to develop complex strategies to avoid work, save face, or simply get your way. Your life is a series of "short-term wins" fueled by a powerful imagination and a willingness to lie when the truth is inconvenient. You are deeply relatable in your frustrations, often vocalizing the petty grievances that others are too polite to mention. While your neuroticism can be exhausting, it also makes you incredibly resilient; you have a remarkable ability to bounce back from total humiliation. Your pitfalls include a tendency toward self-sabotage and an obsession with how others perceive you, even when you are clearly in the wrong. You are at your best when you are leaning into your own absurdity, proving that even the "lord of the idiots" has a certain kind of genius. You are the king of the "jerk store" comeback, even if you only think of it hours later.

characters.name: Elaine Benes
characters.short_description: You are a sharp-tongued, assertive professional who isn't afraid to shove your way through life's many annoyances.
characters.profile_text: You possess a fiery personality and a low tolerance for incompetence, making you a formidable presence in both your career and your social life. You are known for your blunt honesty and your signature "get out!" shove, signaling a person who experiences emotions intensely and physically. Whether you are fighting for a fair price on a garment or navigating the eccentricities of a demanding boss, you approach every challenge with a mix of intelligence and raw frustration. Your strengths include your independence and your ability to hold your own in a group of men, often acting as the voice of reason—or the loudest voice of dissent. Your pitfalls usually involve your temper and a tendency to get caught up in petty vendettas that spiral out of control. You value your freedom and your standards, even if those standards occasionally lead to you being "reduced" by the people around you. You are a person of high style and even higher expectations.

characters.name: Cosmo Kramer
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited eccentric who glides through life on instinct, luck, and a series of "get-rich-quick" schemes.
characters.profile_text: You do not follow the traditional rules of society, preferring to live by your own internal logic and a series of bizarre impulses. You are the neighbor who enters a room with a slide and a flourish, bringing an unpredictable energy that can turn a mundane afternoon into a surreal adventure. Your life is a collection of strange hobbies, vintage clothing, and "Kramer-isms" that somehow always seem to work out in your favor. You possess a raw, unfiltered honesty that can be both refreshing and startling to those around you. While your lack of a traditional filter is your greatest strength, it is also your primary pitfall, as you often find yourself in precarious situations due to your lack of foresight. You are a "hipster doofus" in the best sense—a person who is entirely comfortable in their own skin, regardless of how many fruit-related lawsuits or urban legends you happen to be involved in. You are a true original, a "Kavanagh" in a world of ordinary people.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a minor social grievance, such as someone cutting in front of you in line?

options.text: I make a witty, observational comment to whoever I'm with, but I don't confront the person directly.
I obsess over the injustice and concoct an elaborate, indirect way to get back at them or make them feel uncomfortable.
I confront them immediately and loudly, demanding they move to the back where they belong.
I barely notice or I strike up a bizarre conversation with them, completely unfazed by the breach of etiquette.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when performing a task at work or in your personal life?

options.text: Maintaining a sense of order and ensuring everything is done to my specific, clean standards.
Doing the absolute bare minimum required to avoid being fired or criticized.
Proving my competence and asserting my authority over the situation.
Following a sudden burst of inspiration or a gut feeling, regardless of the traditional process.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your approach to romantic relationships?

options.text: I am highly selective and often end things over very minor, superficial personality quirks.
I am often desperate for validation but prone to self-sabotage once things start going well.
I have high standards and expect my partner to keep up with my fast-paced, assertive lifestyle.
I am completely open and unfiltered, often stumbling into relationships through sheer happenstance.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you feel about your living space and personal belongings?

options.text: Everything must be in its right place; I am very protective of my cereal and my privacy.
My space is a sanctuary for my anxieties, though I'm often looking for ways to exploit my living situation.
I want a stylish, functional home, but I frequently find myself annoyed by the intrusions of others.
My door is always unlocked; what's mine is yours, and my home is a hub for eccentric projects.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a difficult moral dilemma, what is your internal compass?

options.text: I analyze the situation for its comedic irony and try to remain an objective observer.
I choose the path that involves the least amount of effort and the most self-preservation.
I act on my immediate emotional reaction, often fueled by a sense of righteous indignation.
I trust my instincts and the 'Kavanagh' within me, even if it makes no sense to anyone else.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Big Bang Theory' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Bazinga! Which 'The Big Bang Theory' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Do you have a specific spot on the couch that is yours and yours alone, or are you the social glue holding your friend group together? Whether you are a genius physicist with a penchant for comic books or a street-smart aspiring actress, it is time to find your place in the Pasadena gang. Take this quiz to discover which iconic character matches your unique personality and quirks.

characters.name: Sheldon Cooper
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, routine-driven theoretical physicist with a penchant for logic and a lack of social filters.
characters.profile_text: You possess an extraordinary intellect and an unwavering commitment to the scientific method, often finding comfort in rigid schedules and specific spots on the couch. Your life is governed by rules and contracts, which you believe ensure order in a chaotic world. While your blunt honesty can sometimes be perceived as arrogance or insensitivity, it stems from a genuine inability to grasp social nuances and a deep-seated need for precision. You value intellectual superiority and have little patience for those who cannot keep up with your rapid-fire logic. However, beneath your eccentricities and germaphobia lies a loyal friend who, in your own unique way, cares deeply for your inner circle. Your journey involves learning to navigate the messy, unpredictable nature of human emotions, even if you would much rather be solving string theory equations or playing a game of Fun with Flags.

characters.name: Leonard Hofstadter
characters.short_description: You are the glue that holds your social circle together, balancing a high-level scientific career with a relatable desire for social acceptance.
characters.profile_text: You are a compassionate and patient experimental physicist who often finds yourself playing the mediator among your eccentric friends. Despite your impressive academic achievements, you frequently struggle with self-confidence, particularly when it comes to your romantic life and your relationship with your demanding mother. You are the most socially grounded member of your group, possessing a dry wit and a genuine kindness that makes you approachable and reliable. Your life is a constant balancing act between your love for comic books and science fiction and your pursuit of a normal social life. While you can be prone to overthinking and occasional bouts of insecurity, your persistence and loyalty are your greatest strengths. You are willing to endure a lot for the people you love, proving that being the straight man in a group of geniuses requires a unique kind of brilliance and a very thick skin.

characters.name: Penny
characters.short_description: You are the street-smart, outgoing aspiring actress who brings a much-needed dose of reality and social savvy to a group of scientists.
characters.profile_text: You are a vibrant and charismatic individual who relies on your intuition and social skills rather than academic degrees to navigate the world. Coming from a small town with big dreams of stardom, you possess a resilience and toughness that your more sheltered friends often lack. You are the bridge between the nerd world and the rest of society, teaching your neighbors how to interact with people while they, in turn, expand your intellectual horizons. Though you might occasionally feel out of place during discussions about quantum physics, your emotional intelligence and common sense are invaluable. You aren't afraid to speak your mind or call out nonsense when you see it, often using sarcasm as a primary tool. Your journey is one of self-discovery, as you learn to balance your ambitions with the unexpected stability and genuine affection you find within your quirky found family.

characters.name: Howard Wolowitz
characters.short_description: You are a confident aerospace engineer with a bold fashion sense and a colorful personality that masks a deep need for connection.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of engineering who takes immense pride in your work, even if your friends occasionally tease you for not having a PhD. Your personality is defined by your flamboyant wardrobe, your collection of belt buckles, and your initial, often misguided, attempts at being a ladies' man. Beneath the bravado and the constant jokes, you are a deeply devoted friend and partner who eventually grows into a responsible family man and even an astronaut. Your life is heavily influenced by your complex relationship with your mother, which has shaped your need for attention and your specific brand of humor. While you can be overly competitive and sometimes a bit crude, your technical skills are undeniable, and your loyalty to your friends is unwavering. You prove that one doesn't need a doctorate to achieve greatness, especially when you have the courage to literally reach for the stars.

characters.name: Rajesh Koothrappali
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive and romantic astrophysicist who often struggles to find your voice but possesses a heart of gold.
characters.profile_text: You are a brilliant scientist with a deep appreciation for the mysteries of the cosmos and a surprisingly refined taste in pop culture and gourmet cooking. For a long time, you struggled with selective mutism, unable to speak to women unless you had a drink in your hand, which highlighted your profound shyness and anxiety. Despite these hurdles, you are perhaps the most romantic member of your group, constantly searching for a fairytale love story. Your wealth and pampered upbringing sometimes clash with your desire for independence, leading to moments of comedic struggle. You are a loyal and supportive friend, often going to great lengths to make others feel special, even if you sometimes feel like the third wheel in your social circle. Your journey is about finding your own voice and learning that your worth isn't defined by your relationship status, but by the kindness and creativity you bring to the world.

characters.name: Bernadette Rostenkowski-Wolowitz
characters.short_description: You are a pint-sized powerhouse with a sweet voice and a fierce personality that commands respect in both the lab and the home.
characters.profile_text: You are a highly successful microbiologist who balances a demanding career with a sharp wit and a surprisingly competitive nature. While you often appear sweet and unassuming due to your high-pitched voice and petite stature, you possess a formidable inner strength and a tough love approach that keeps everyone around you in line. You are not afraid to be the breadwinner or the boss, and you take pride in your ability to manage both complex scientific data and your husband's eccentricities. Your ambition is matched only by your loyalty to your friends and family. You can be intimidating when provoked, often channeling your inner strength to protect those you care about or to get what you want. Despite your occasionally scary demeanor, you have a huge heart and a practical mindset that makes you the backbone of your household. You represent the perfect blend of intelligence, drive, and a hint of ruthlessness that ensures you always come out on top.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a friend breaks a minor social rule or a shared agreement, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I point out the violation and explain why the rule exists for everyone's benefit.
I try to mediate the situation to ensure no one's feelings get hurt.
I roll my eyes and use a bit of sarcasm to show how ridiculous they're being.
I make a joke about it to keep the atmosphere light and fun.
I usually stay quiet to avoid any awkward confrontation.
I firmly tell them to fix it because I don't have time for nonsense.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new and complex challenge?

options.text: I research the logic behind it and create a step-by-step protocol.
I overthink the possibilities but eventually work hard to find a solution.
I rely on my intuition and common sense to figure it out as I go.
I look for a creative or technical workaround that shows off my skills.
I seek out a partner or friend to help me navigate the emotional stress of it.
I take charge of the situation and push through until it's completed perfectly.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when pursuing a career or a hobby?

options.text: The pursuit of objective truth and intellectual superiority.
Gaining the respect and acceptance of my peers and family.
Finding personal fulfillment and a way to express my personality.
Achieving recognition and proving my practical capabilities.
Experiencing the beauty of the world and finding a sense of belonging.
Reaching the top of my field and ensuring financial and professional success.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your role within your closest friend group?

options.text: The one who provides the facts and maintains the group's standards.
The reliable 'glue' who keeps everyone together and resolves conflicts.
The social bridge who connects the group to the outside world.
The entertainer who keeps everyone laughing with stories and jokes.
The sensitive listener who is always there for a heartfelt conversation.
The organized one who makes the decisions and keeps everyone on track.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to communicate your feelings to others?

options.text: I prefer to use logic and literal statements rather than emotional language.
I am often self-deprecating and cautious to avoid offending anyone.
I am direct and expressive, often using humor or sass to make my point.
I am flamboyant and talkative, using grand gestures to show I care.
I am gentle and thoughtful, though I sometimes struggle to find the right words.
I am authoritative and clear, making sure my boundaries are respected.

topics.display_name: Which 'Powerpuff Girl' Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Powerpuff Girl Are You? Discover Your Inner Superhero!
synopsis.summary: Are you made of sugar, spice, or everything nice? Whether you're a natural-born leader, a fierce fighter, or a gentle soul with a hidden punch, it's time to find out which Townsville hero matches your vibe. Take this quiz to see if you're the brains, the brawn, or the heart of the ultimate crime-fighting trio!

characters.name: Blossom
characters.short_description: You are the strategic leader of the group, defined by your intelligence, maturity, and unwavering sense of duty.
characters.profile_text:
You are the natural-born leader who thrives on organization and planning. While others might rush into a situation headfirst, you prefer to analyze the variables and develop a tactical approach to ensure success. Your dedication to justice is matched only by your academic excellence and your ability to keep a cool head under pressure. You take your responsibilities seriously, often acting as the voice of reason when things get chaotic. Your peers look up to you because they know you will always put the greater good above your own ego, utilizing your analytical mind to navigate complex social and professional landscapes.

However, your desire for perfection can sometimes lead to bossiness or an inability to handle unexpected failure. You might find yourself overthinking simple problems or becoming overly rigid when your carefully crafted plans go awry. Learning to embrace spontaneity is your greatest challenge, but your core strength remains your integrity. Whether you are using your signature ice breath or your sharp wit, you are the glue that holds your team together, providing the vision necessary to overcome any obstacle that stands in your way.

characters.name: Bubbles
characters.short_description: You are the heart of the team, possessing a gentle spirit and a hidden reservoir of immense power that emerges when your loved ones are threatened.
characters.profile_text:
You are the sweet and sensitive soul who brings joy and compassion to every situation you encounter. With a deep love for animals and a penchant for seeing the beauty in the world, you often act as the emotional anchor for those around you.
