You are frequently underestimated because of your polite demeanor and youthful innocence, but beneath that soft exterior lies a fierce warrior. When pushed too far or when your friends are in danger, you tap into a raw, hardcore energy that surprises even your toughest adversaries. Your ability to bridge gaps through empathy and multilingualism makes you a unique asset in any group.

Your main pitfall is a tendency to be overly emotional or easily manipulated by those who mistake your kindness for weakness. You might struggle with being taken seriously in high-stakes environments where aggression is favored over diplomacy. Nevertheless, you prove that sensitivity is not a liability but a different kind of strength. By balancing your playfulness with your inner fire, you demonstrate that the most powerful force in the universe is often a kind heart backed by an iron will.

characters.name: Buttercup
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate brawler and the muscle of the trio, characterized by your fierce independence and aggressive approach to problem-solving.
characters.profile_text:
You are the toughest fighter who prefers action over words and directness over philosophy. You have little patience for formalities or sugar-coating the truth, choosing instead to tackle obstacles with sheer force and unwavering determination. Your competitive nature drives you to be the best in everything you do, and you never back down from a challenge, no matter how daunting the odds might seem. You are the protector who isn't afraid to get your hands dirty, often serving as the primary shield for those who are more vulnerable than yourself.

This intensity can sometimes manifest as a hot temper or a lack of patience for those who do not share your grit. You might find it difficult to express vulnerability or to admit when you need help, viewing such moments as signs of weakness rather than human necessity. Yet, your loyalty is absolute, and your bravery is unmatched in the heat of battle. You are the one people want in their corner when the chips are down, providing the raw power and tenacity needed to smash through barriers and achieve victory through pure, unadulterated strength.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a complex problem arises unexpectedly, what is your immediate psychological response?

options.text: I instinctively analyze the situation to create a structured plan of action.
I focus on how the situation is affecting the group's morale and emotional well-being.
I prefer to tackle the most difficult part of the problem head-on with immediate action.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal strengths do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My intellectual discipline and ability to lead others effectively.
My empathy and my ability to find beauty in the world around me.
My physical or mental resilience and my refusal to back down from a fight.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle interpersonal conflict within a team setting?

options.text: I act as the mediator, using logic and rules to find a fair resolution.
I try to soothe hurt feelings and restore harmony through kindness.
I am direct and blunt about the issue, even if it causes temporary tension.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when facing a difficult challenge?

options.text: The desire to achieve excellence and fulfill my responsibilities.
The need to protect those I care about from harm.
The drive to prove my capability and win against the odds.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most stimulating for your personal growth?

options.text: A structured academic or professional setting with clear goals.
A creative or natural space where I can express my emotions freely.
A high-stakes, competitive environment that tests my limits.

topics.display_name: Are You a Jedi or a Sith?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Star Wars Force User Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: The Force is calling, but which side of the spectrum do you truly fall on? Whether you are guided by the light of the Jedi or the raw power of the Sith, your choices define your destiny. Take this quiz to discover which legendary character matches your inner spirit and resolve.

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.short_description: You are the beacon of hope who believes in redemption and the enduring power of the light side.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unwavering optimism that allows you to see the good in others, even when they have lost their way. Your journey is defined by a transition from a restless dreamer to a disciplined master, driven by a deep sense of loyalty to your friends and a commitment to justice. You are not afraid to face your inner darkness, but you choose to overcome it through compassion rather than aggression. Your strengths lie in your resilience and your ability to inspire those around you. However, your emotional attachments can sometimes be a double-edged sword, leading you to take great risks for the people you love. You prefer to find peaceful resolutions but are a formidable warrior when the situation demands it. By balancing your heritage with your own moral compass, you represent the potential for renewal and the triumph of the human spirit.

characters.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
characters.short_description: You are the quintessential guardian, defined by your patience, dry wit, and absolute dedication to the Jedi Code.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with a calm, methodical perspective, often serving as the voice of reason in chaotic situations. Your mastery of defensive combat reflects your inner discipline and your preference for negotiation over conflict. You value tradition and duty, yet you possess a subtle sense of humor that helps you navigate the most dire circumstances with grace. Your greatest strength is your reliability; you are the mentor who stays the course even when the world falls apart. You tend to be cautious, sometimes to a fault, as you prioritize the greater good over personal desires. While you carry the weight of past failures, you use those experiences to guide the next generation with wisdom and humility. You are a true protector who understands that true power comes from self-control and sacrifice.

characters.name: Yoda
characters.short_description: You are a venerable master of wisdom whose profound connection to the Force transcends physical strength.
characters.profile_text: You possess a perspective shaped by centuries of experience, allowing you to see the interconnectedness of all living things. Your approach to challenges is unconventional and deeply philosophical, often emphasizing the importance of unlearning what you have learned. You value patience and mindfulness above all else, teaching others that size and appearance are irrelevant when compared to the power of the mind. Your strengths include an unparalleled intuition and the ability to guide others toward their own realizations. However, your adherence to long-standing traditions can occasionally make you slow to adapt to rapid, radical changes in the galaxy. You prefer a life of simplicity and meditation, yet you are capable of incredible feats when the balance of the Force is threatened. You remind everyone that the greatest battles are often won within one's own heart.

characters.name: Ahsoka Tano
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and independent warrior who follows your own moral compass outside of rigid institutions.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your courage and your willingness to question authority when it conflicts with what is right. Having forged your own path, you possess a unique blend of Jedi training and real-world pragmatism. You are highly adaptable and fiercely protective of the innocent, often operating in the shadows to make a tangible difference where others cannot or will not act. Your strengths lie in your agility, both physical and mental, and your ability to empathize with those on the fringes of society. Because you have experienced betrayal and loss, you are sometimes guarded, yet you remain deeply committed to the fight against tyranny. You do not seek glory or titles; instead, you find fulfillment in the quiet pursuit of justice. Your journey is one of self-discovery and the realization that true heroism does not require a label.

characters.name: Darth Vader
characters.short_description: You are a formidable force of nature driven by intense passion, tragic loss, and an imposing presence.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by an overwhelming intensity and a relentless drive to achieve order through strength. Your past is marked by deep emotional wounds that have been channeled into a cold, calculating efficiency. You command respect and fear in equal measure, utilizing your immense power to enforce your will upon the galaxy. You value results above all else and have little patience for failure or incompetence. Your strengths are your indomitable will and your tactical brilliance, making you an almost unstoppable adversary. However, your reliance on anger and pain as sources of power can leave you isolated and trapped within your own internal conflict. You are a figure of tragic complexity, possessing a hidden depth of feeling that you have buried beneath a mask of intimidation. Your path is one of absolute commitment, where the line between protector and conqueror has long since blurred.

characters.name: Emperor Palpatine
characters.short_description: You are a master strategist and manipulator who thrives on secrecy, political maneuvering, and absolute control.
characters.profile_text: You possess a brilliant, patient mind that views the galaxy as a grand chessboard where every move is calculated years in advance. Your greatest asset is your ability to hide your true intentions behind a facade of benevolence or necessity, allowing you to dismantle systems from within. You crave power not just for its own sake, but as a means to impose your vision of perfect, unyielding order upon the universe. Your strengths include an unmatched capacity for foresight and a deep understanding of human psychology, which you use to exploit the weaknesses of others. You are prone to overconfidence, believing that your mastery of the dark side makes you invincible against the unpredictable nature of hope. You prefer to rule through fear and deception, orchestrating events from the shadows until the moment is right to strike. For you, the ultimate victory is the total submission of your enemies to your singular will.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a major obstacle, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: Seek a peaceful resolution through dialogue and negotiation.
Meditate to gain a broader perspective and wait for the right moment.
Act quickly and decisively to protect those I care about.
Analyze the situation to find a hidden tactical advantage.
Use my strength and presence to break through the barrier immediately.
Find a creative solution that bypasses standard rules and expectations.

baseline_questions.question_text: What quality do you value most in a leader or mentor?

options.text: Unwavering optimism and the belief in redemption.
Strict adherence to tradition, duty, and discipline.
Deep philosophical wisdom and spiritual insight.
The courage to challenge authority when it is wrong.
The ability to maintain absolute order and efficiency.
A brilliant mind capable of complex, long-term planning.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your strongest emotions?

options.text: I channel them into a source of raw, focused power.
I acknowledge them but prioritize my duty above personal feelings.
I let them fuel my compassion and loyalty to others.
I look past them to see the interconnected truth of the universe.
I keep them hidden behind a mask of control to stay strategic.
I trust my instincts and personal moral compass over rigid doctrine.

baseline_questions.question_text: In which environment do you feel most effective and at peace?

options.text: A quiet, natural setting conducive to reflection and simplicity.
A structured organization with clear hierarchies and protocols.
On the front lines, making a tangible difference for the innocent.
In a position of absolute authority where my will is law.
The center of political influence, orchestrating events from the shadows.
Wherever my friends are, regardless of the physical location.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate goal when dealing with a chaotic situation?

options.text: To bring balance and inspire hope in others.
To preserve stability and uphold the existing code.
To teach others how to find their own path to clarity.
To fight for justice, even if I have to do it alone.
To establish a perfect, unbreakable order through strength.
To ensure the outcome aligns perfectly with my long-term vision.

topics.display_name: Which Original Avenger Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Of The Original Six Avengers Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the genius billionaire playboy philanthropist or the soldier out of time? It is time to assemble your personality and find out which founding member of Earth's Mightiest Heroes matches your vibe. Whether you lead with your heart or your repulsor blasts, this quiz will reveal your true Marvel identity.

characters.name: Iron Man
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant visionary and charismatic leader who uses your intellect and resources to engineer solutions for the world's most complex problems.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your restless mind and your desire to stay three steps ahead of every potential threat. Your confidence often borders on arrogance, but it is backed by a genuine sense of responsibility for the safety of others. You prefer to take charge of situations, relying on your technological prowess and quick wit to navigate social and tactical challenges. While you might struggle with vulnerability, your loyalty to your team is unwavering, even when your methods are unconventional.

Your greatest strength lies in your ability to innovate under pressure, turning a dire situation into a triumph of engineering. However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to isolation and burnout. You must learn to trust your allies as much as you trust your own inventions, recognizing that even the most advanced armor cannot protect you from the emotional toll of leadership.

characters.name: Captain America
characters.short_description: You are a principled and courageous leader whose unwavering moral compass and selflessness inspire everyone around you.
characters.profile_text:
You represent the heart of the team, standing firm in your convictions regardless of the odds stacked against you. Your sense of duty and honor is not just a persona but the core of your identity, driving you to protect those who cannot protect themselves. You value tradition, discipline, and the power of a unified front, often acting as the glue that holds disparate personalities together during times of crisis.

While your dedication is your greatest asset, your rigid adherence to your ideals can sometimes make it difficult for you to adapt to a rapidly changing world. You may find yourself feeling like a man out of time, struggling to reconcile your old-school values with modern complexities. Despite this, your ability to see the best in people and your willingness to sacrifice everything for the greater good make you a natural beacon of hope.

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and noble warrior who balances a regal sense of duty with a boisterous, adventurous spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a larger-than-life personality and a physical presence that commands respect in any room. Your journey is one of growth and humility, as you have learned that true strength comes from character rather than just raw power. You enjoy the thrill of a challenge and the camaraderie of a shared battle, often approaching life with a mix of solemnity and infectious enthusiasm.

Your pitfalls often stem from your initial impulsiveness and a tendency to rely on your heritage or status. However, your experiences have taught you the value of empathy and the importance of protecting the vulnerable. You are a loyal friend who will travel across realms to aid those you care about, though you must be careful not to let your pride cloud your judgment when faced with personal failure.

characters.name: Hulk
characters.short_description: You are a complex individual who balances a brilliant, gentle intellect with an intense, raw power that you strive to control.
characters.profile_text:
You often feel like two different people living in one skin, constantly negotiating the tension between your quiet, scientific mind and your overwhelming emotions. You are deeply empathetic and cautious, preferring to solve problems through logic and research rather than conflict. However, when pushed to the limit, you possess a transformative strength that is both a burden and a necessary tool for survival.

Your struggle for self-control is a central theme in your life, leading you to seek solitude or peace whenever possible. You fear the damage you might cause, yet your capacity for destruction is matched only by your capacity for heroism. Learning to integrate these two sides of yourself is your lifelong challenge, but when you find that balance, you become an unstoppable force for justice.

characters.name: Black Widow
characters.short_description: You are a highly skilled and pragmatic strategist who uses your intelligence and adaptability to navigate the most dangerous environments.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of observation, always reading the room and calculating your next move before anyone else realizes there is a game being played. Your past has shaped you into a resilient and somewhat guarded individual, but beneath your cool exterior lies a deep-seated desire to atone for your mistakes and do what is right. You excel in roles that require subtlety, precision, and the ability to keep a secret.

While you are incredibly self-reliant, your greatest challenge is learning to let people in and trust them with your true self. You often feel the weight of your history, but your commitment to the present and your loyalty to your chosen family define your path forward. You are the ultimate survivor, capable of turning any disadvantage into a tactical edge through sheer willpower and ingenuity.

characters.name: Hawkeye
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and observant specialist who relies on your incredible focus and dedication to keep your team on target.
characters.profile_text:
You are often the most relatable member of the group, providing a necessary perspective that keeps the more extraordinary personalities tethered to reality. Your skills are the result of years of hard work and discipline rather than innate superpowers, giving you a unique appreciation for the stakes of every mission. You are a devoted protector, especially when it comes to your family and those you consider your inner circle.

Your tendency to stay in the shadows can sometimes lead you to feel overlooked, but your contributions are vital to the team's success. You have a keen eye for detail and a dry sense of humor that helps diffuse tension in high-pressure situations. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward self-criticism, but your reliability and your ability to see what others miss make you an indispensable ally.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a major crisis breaks out, what is your immediate instinctive reaction?

options.text: Analyze the data and engineer a high-tech solution.
Rally the group and stand firm on your principles.
Charge into the fray with a boisterous display of power.
Try to stay calm and contain the situation through logic.
Observe from the shadows and wait for the perfect tactical opening.
Focus on the specific targets that others might have missed.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal traits do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Your visionary intellect and ability to innovate.
Your unwavering sense of duty and moral courage.
Your noble spirit and adventurous heart.
Your hidden depth and capacity for transformation.
Your adaptability and pragmatic strategic mind.
Your grounded nature and disciplined focus.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the biggest internal hurdle you find yourself constantly trying to overcome?

options.text: Managing a restless ego and the weight of responsibility.
Feeling like your traditional values don't fit the modern world.
Learning humility and proving you are worthy of your status.
Maintaining self-control over intense, volatile emotions.
Struggling to trust others enough to reveal your true self.
Dealing with self-criticism and the feeling of being overlooked.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a team setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The charismatic leader who provides the resources and vision.
The moral compass who keeps everyone unified and disciplined.
The powerhouse who inspires others through bold action.
The quiet specialist who prefers research over conflict.
The master of observation who handles the subtle details.
The reliable anchor who keeps the team tethered to reality.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for helping others?

options.text: To leave a lasting legacy and protect the future.
Because it is simply the right thing to do, regardless of the cost.
To fulfill a regal duty and protect those under your care.
To use your unique burdens for a positive purpose.
To atone for past mistakes and balance the scales.
To ensure the safety of your family and inner circle.

topics.display_name: Which Greek God Is Your True Parent?

synopsis.title: Which Greek God Is Your True Parent?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you don't quite belong in the mortal world? Whether you're drawn to the depths of the ocean or the spark of a lightning bolt, your true lineage might be written in the stars. Take this quiz to find out which Olympian deity is your godly parent and what powers you've inherited. It's time to claim your throne at Camp Half-Blood!

characters.name: Zeus
characters.short_description: You are a natural leader with a commanding presence and an unyielding drive to maintain order and authority.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an innate sense of responsibility and a powerful charisma that draws others to your side. Like the King of the Gods, you are most comfortable when you are in charge, making the tough decisions that others shy away from. Your ambition is boundless, and you have a knack for seeing the big picture, ensuring that every piece of the puzzle fits into your grand vision for the future. You value justice and tradition, often acting as the pillar of strength for your friends and family in times of crisis.

However, your desire for control can sometimes manifest as arrogance or a short temper when things do not go your way. You may find it difficult to admit when you are wrong, as your pride is as vast as the sky itself. Learning to balance your authoritative nature with a bit of humility will help you maintain the respect you so naturally command. You thrive in high-stakes environments where your quick thinking and decisive actions can truly shine, making you a formidable force in any professional or social circle.

characters.name: Poseidon
characters.short_description: You are a person of deep emotions and unpredictable power, possessing a spirit as vast and restless as the ocean.
characters.profile_text:
Your personality is defined by its depth and intensity, much like the shifting tides of the sea. You are fiercely loyal to those you care about, and your protective instincts are unmatched. When you are at peace, you are a source of calm and tranquility for everyone around you, offering a steady hand and a compassionate heart. You have a creative soul and a love for freedom, often feeling a strong connection to nature and the raw elements of the world, preferring the open air to confined spaces.

Yet, your moods can be as volatile as a storm, and your anger, once provoked, is a force to be reckoned with. You tend to hold grudges and can be quite stubborn when you feel slighted or misunderstood by those you trust. Finding a way to channel your powerful emotions into constructive outlets is key to your personal growth and stability. You are at your best when you embrace your fluidity, allowing yourself to adapt to life's changes while staying true to your core values and the people you love.

characters.name: Hades
characters.short_description: You are a reserved and introspective soul who finds strength in solitude and possesses a profound understanding of life's deeper mysteries.
characters.profile_text:
While others may mistake your quiet nature for coldness, you simply prefer the company of your own thoughts and a few trusted confidants. You are incredibly hardworking and disciplined, often laboring behind the scenes to ensure everything runs smoothly without the need for public recognition. Your sense of duty is unwavering, and you possess a unique resilience that allows you to thrive in situations that others might find overwhelming or grim. You value honesty and substance over superficiality, always looking beneath the surface to find the truth.

Your tendency to isolate yourself can sometimes lead to feelings of loneliness or a sense of being an outsider in your own community. You may struggle with a pessimistic outlook, focusing too much on the inevitable end of things rather than the beauty of the present moment. By opening up to others and sharing your rich inner world, you can find a balance between your need for privacy and the human need for connection. Your wisdom is a rare gift, born from a life of careful observation and deep reflection.

characters.name: Athena
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant strategist and a lifelong learner who values wisdom, craft, and the power of a well-executed plan.
characters.profile_text:
Your mind is your greatest weapon, and you approach every challenge with a blend of logic and creativity. You are the person people turn to when they need a solution to a complex problem, as you have a remarkable ability to remain calm and objective under pressure. You take pride in your skills and are constantly seeking to improve yourself, whether through academic pursuits or mastering a new craft. For you, knowledge is not just power; it is a way of life that brings order to the chaos of the world.

Because you rely so heavily on your intellect, you may sometimes struggle to connect with your emotions or the feelings of others. You can be overly critical of yourself and those around you, holding everyone to an impossibly high standard of perfection. Learning to appreciate the messy, irrational side of human nature will make you a more effective leader and a more empathetic friend. You excel in environments that reward innovation and strategic thinking, where your sharp wit and tactical mind can truly flourish.

characters.name: Apollo
characters.short_description: You are a multi-talented individual who radiates warmth and creativity, excelling in the arts, sciences, and the pursuit of truth.
characters.profile_text:
Like the sun itself, you bring light and energy to every room you enter. You are likely gifted in many areas, from music and poetry to logic and healing, and you have a natural curiosity that drives you to explore the world. You value clarity and honesty, often acting as a beacon of truth for those who are lost in confusion. Your optimistic outlook is infectious, and you have a unique ability to inspire others to reach their full potential through your own example of excellence and dedication.

Your many talents can sometimes lead to a sense of vanity or a lack of focus, as you may find it difficult to commit to just one path for long. You might also struggle with the pressure of maintaining your golden image, fearing that any failure will diminish your worth in the eyes of others. Embracing your flaws and allowing yourself to be vulnerable will help you find a more authentic sense of self. You are most fulfilled when you are using your gifts to bring beauty and understanding to the world around you.

characters.name: Artemis
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent and adventurous spirit who finds solace in the wild and values the bonds of self-reliance.
characters.profile_text:
You are most at home in the great outdoors, where you can test your limits and connect with the natural world. You possess a strong sense of autonomy and do not feel the need to conform to societal expectations or traditional roles. Your loyalty to your chosen family is absolute, and you are a staunch protector of the vulnerable and the innocent. You are disciplined, focused, and possess a quiet confidence that does not require the validation of others to feel secure in your identity.

Your fierce independence can sometimes border on isolationism, making it difficult for you to let others get close to you emotionally. You may be quick to judge those who do not share your strength or your values, leading to a sense of detachment from the broader community. Finding a way to balance your need for freedom with the benefits of cooperation will allow you to achieve even greater things in life. You thrive when you are pursuing a goal with singular focus, guided by your own internal compass and the silver light of your convictions.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden crisis that affects a group, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: I step up to take command and delegate tasks to restore order.
I react with intense emotion and focus on protecting those I love.
I withdraw to a quiet space to process the situation internally.
I analyze the variables and formulate a logical, strategic plan.
I look for a creative solution or a way to keep spirits high.
I rely on my own skills and prepare to handle the threat independently.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you find most restorative for your energy?

options.text: A high-altitude viewpoint or a place of significant authority.
The shore of a vast, unpredictable ocean or a rushing river.
A silent, dimly lit room where I can be alone with my thoughts.
A library, workshop, or any place where I can learn and build.
A sun-drenched studio filled with music, art, or performance.
The deep, untamed wilderness far away from civilization.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your most defining personal quality?

options.text: My ambition and natural ability to lead others.
My deep capacity for loyalty and emotional intensity.
My resilience and ability to see truths others miss.
My intellect and dedication to mastering new crafts.
My versatility and optimistic outlook on life.
My fierce independence and self-reliance.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a situation where you feel you have been treated unfairly?

options.text: I confront the person directly to re-establish my authority.
I feel a surge of storm-like anger and may hold a long grudge.
I stoically endure it, knowing that time eventually settles all debts.
I objectively evaluate the situation and find a tactical way to fix it.
I try to find the truth of the matter and move toward the light.
I detach myself from the situation and move on alone.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred role within a social circle or community?

options.text: The pillar of strength and the primary decision-maker.
The protective heart who keeps the group together.
The mysterious observer who works behind the scenes.
The wise advisor who provides logic and clarity.
The radiant presence who inspires and heals others.
The autonomous spirit who values freedom over belonging.

topics.display_name: Which Middle-earth Race Would You Be?

synopsis.title: Which Middle-earth Race Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your love for second breakfast means you're a Hobbit, or if your stoic nature points toward the Elves? Journey through the realms of Tolkien's legendarium to discover where you truly belong in the Third Age. From the depths of Moria to the golden leaves of Lothlórien, your destiny awaits. Take this quiz to find your place among the peoples of Middle-earth!

characters.name: Hobbit
characters.short_description: You are a lover of comfort, peace, and the simple joys of a well-tended garden and a full pantry.
characters.profile_text: You find your greatest fulfillment in the quiet rhythms of domestic life, valuing a warm hearth and a steady supply of good food above all else. Your nature is unassuming and gentle, yet beneath your cheerful exterior lies a surprising well of resilience and common sense that emerges when those you love are threatened. You prefer the familiar paths of your community to the dangers of the wide world, finding beauty in the changing seasons and the growth of your garden. While others seek glory or power, you understand that the smallest acts of kindness and hospitality are what truly keep the darkness at bay. Your primary pitfall is a tendency toward complacency or a narrow worldview, as you might ignore the troubles of the world until they arrive at your doorstep. However, your loyalty is absolute, and your ability to endure hardship with a smile makes you an invaluable companion in times of trial. You prove that even the most ordinary person can possess extraordinary courage when pushed.

characters.name: Elf
characters.short_description: You are an immortal soul deeply attuned to the natural world, possessing a grace and wisdom that transcends the passing ages.
characters.profile_text: You move through the world with an ethereal elegance, your spirit forever linked to the ancient forests and the starlit skies. Your perspective is shaped by the long view of history, allowing you to appreciate the intricate patterns of fate and the enduring beauty of creation. You are a master of song, lore, and craftsmanship, infusing everything you create with a touch of magic and a deep respect for the materials you use. Your senses are sharper than those of other races, allowing you to perceive the subtle shifts in the wind or the hidden whispers of the earth. This longevity can sometimes lead to a sense of detachment or a profound sorrow as you watch the world change and fade around you. You may struggle with a feeling of weariness or a longing for distant shores, finding it difficult to relate to the fleeting concerns of shorter-lived beings. Despite this, your commitment to preserving the light and fighting against corruption is unwavering. You are a guardian of beauty and a beacon of hope in a world that often forgets its own ancient majesty.

characters.name: Dwarf
characters.short_description: You are a stout-hearted artisan of the deep places, defined by your unwavering determination and a profound respect for tradition.
characters.profile_text: You are a creature of stone and fire, finding your purpose in the mastery of craft and the extraction of the earth's hidden treasures. Your physical strength is matched only by your stubbornness, and once you have set your mind to a task, nothing can turn you from your path. You value the bonds of kinship and the legacy of your ancestors above all else, often spending your life expanding the great halls and intricate mines of your people. Your loyalty is as solid as the mountains you inhabit, and you are a fierce protector of your home and your friends. However, your intense focus on material wealth and ancient grudges can sometimes lead to greed or a suspicious nature toward outsiders. You may find it difficult to forgive slights, nursing old wounds for generations, which can isolate you from potential allies. Yet, your skill with a forge and an axe is legendary, and your ability to endure the harshest conditions makes you a formidable force. You represent the enduring power of the earth itself, unyielding and magnificent in your craftsmanship.

characters.name: Man
characters.short_description: You are a being of ambition and adaptability, driven by a restless spirit to forge your own destiny in a rapidly changing world.
characters.profile_text: You possess a unique blend of vulnerability and potential, characterized by a drive to leave a lasting mark on the world despite the brevity of your lifespan. Your strength lies in your versatility and your ability to unite under a common cause, building great kingdoms and enduring legacies through sheer will. You are capable of both great nobility and profound darkness, as your heart is easily swayed by the desire for power or the fear of mortality. This duality makes you the most unpredictable of the races, yet it also grants you the capacity for incredible growth and redemption. You often find yourself at the center of history's turning points, your choices shaping the fate of all who dwell in Middle-earth. Your primary struggle is the temptation of corruption and the fleeting nature of your achievements, which can lead to a desperate grasp for control. Nevertheless, your resilience and your capacity for hope in the face of certain doom are your greatest assets. You are the architects of the future, constantly striving to overcome your limitations and achieve greatness.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when starting a new endeavor?

options.text: Ensuring the comfort and well-being of my immediate circle.
Preserving ancient wisdom and the natural beauty of the world.
Mastering a difficult craft and honoring my heritage.
Achieving personal growth and leaving a mark on history.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to a significant threat to your way of life?

options.text: I rely on quiet resilience and the strength of my community.
I take a long-term view, seeking to protect the balance of the world.
I stand my ground with unyielding determination and fierce loyalty.
I adapt quickly, rallying others to forge a new path forward.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you find most rejuvenating?

options.text: A peaceful garden or a warm, well-stocked kitchen.
An ancient forest under a canopy of starlight.
A grand hall of stone filled with the sound of the forge.
A bustling city or a high tower overlooking a kingdom.

baseline_questions.question_text: When making a difficult choice, which factor carries the most weight?

options.text: Practical common sense and the simple truth.
Intuition and the deep patterns of the natural world.
The traditions of my ancestors and the bonds of kinship.
The potential for future change and the exercise of will.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you hope will be your most enduring legacy?

options.text: A reputation for kindness, hospitality, and a life well-lived.
The preservation of light and beauty in a changing world.
Works of unparalleled craftsmanship and the strength of my house.
The foundations of a new era and the memory of my deeds.

topics.display_name: Which Iconic Disney Villain Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Disney Villain Matches Your Dark Side?
synopsis.summary: Have you ever felt like the hero's journey just isn't for you? It's time to embrace your inner mischief and find out which legendary antagonist truly mirrors your personality. From sea witches to power-hungry viziers, discover the villainous mastermind lurking within your soul.

characters.name: Maleficent
characters.short_description: You are a powerful, elegant force of nature who values respect and commands presence through sheer authority.
characters.profile_text: You possess an imposing aura and a deep sense of justice, though it is often skewed by your own high standards and sensitivity to perceived slights. You are not one to be ignored, and when you feel excluded or disrespected, your retaliation is calculated and absolute. Your strengths lie in your patience and your ability to see the long game, often waiting years for the perfect moment to strike. You prefer solitude and the company of a few loyal confidants over the noise of a crowded court. However, your pride can be your downfall. You tend to hold onto grudges with a cold intensity that consumes your better judgment, leading you to overlook the smaller, more human details that might eventually thwart your grand designs. You are a master of your environment, bending the world to your will with a flick of your wrist, yet you struggle to find peace when things do not go exactly as planned.

characters.name: Ursula
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic deal-maker who uses wit and psychological insight to gain the upper hand in every situation.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of the art of the deal, possessing a keen understanding of what people desire most and how to use those desires to your advantage. You thrive in the spotlight and carry yourself with a flamboyant confidence that is both intimidating and magnetic. Your strengths are your resourcefulness and your ability to manipulate the fine print of any agreement to ensure you always come out on top. You enjoy the finer things in life and aren't afraid to take what you believe is rightfully yours, especially if it involves reclaiming a lost status or power. Your pitfall is your overconfidence and your tendency to underestimate those you view as beneath you. While you are brilliant at setting traps, you can become so focused on your own cleverness that you miss the moment the tide turns against you. You value loyalty from your inner circle but view everyone else as a potential pawn in your grand game of social and political maneuvering.

characters.name: Jafar
characters.short_description: You are a calculating strategist who operates from the shadows, driven by a relentless ambition for total control.
characters.profile_text: You are a patient observer who understands that true power is often found behind the throne rather than on it. You possess a sharp, analytical mind and a talent for deception, allowing you to climb the social ladder while keeping your true intentions hidden from those around you. Your strengths include your discipline and your ability to remain calm under pressure, even when your most complex schemes are at risk. You have little patience for incompetence and prefer to surround yourself with tools and allies that serve a specific purpose in your quest for dominance. However, your obsession with power can lead to a narrow-mindedness that blinds you to the simple joys of life. You are prone to fits of temper when your authority is challenged, and your desire for more can eventually lead you into traps of your own making. You believe that you are the only one capable of bringing order to a chaotic world, and you will stop at nothing to ensure your vision becomes reality.

characters.name: Scar
characters.short_description: You are a cynical intellectual who uses your sharp tongue and manipulative charm to overcome those with more physical might.
characters.profile_text: You often feel like the smartest person in the room, and you have little tolerance for those you consider your intellectual inferiors. You are a master of gaslighting and emotional manipulation, knowing exactly which buttons to push to sow discord among your rivals. Your strengths are your silver tongue and your ability to build alliances with the marginalized to further your own agenda. You prefer to let others do the heavy lifting while you orchestrate the grand plan from a distance, enjoying the fruits of a victory you barely broke a sweat to achieve. Your greatest weakness is your inherent laziness and your tendency to neglect the actual responsibilities that come with the power you crave. Once you reach the top, you often find that maintaining control is far more difficult than seizing it. Your bitterness toward those who were born with natural advantages can cloud your judgment, leading you to make impulsive decisions based on spite rather than logic.

characters.name: Cruella De Vil
characters.short_description: You are a high-fashion visionary with an obsessive drive and a complete disregard for the rules in your pursuit of perfection.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and style, living life at a frantic pace and demanding excellence from everyone around you. You have a singular focus that borders on mania, and once you set your sights on a goal, no moral or social boundary will stand in your way. Your strengths are your uncompromising vision and your ability to command attention the moment you enter a room. You don't care about being liked; you care about being legendary. You have a taste for the extravagant and the unique, often feeling that the world is too dull for your vibrant personality. However, your impulsiveness and lack of empathy are your primary pitfalls. You tend to burn bridges as quickly as you build them, leaving a trail of chaos in your wake. Your inability to see the value in anything that doesn't serve your immediate aesthetic or material desires can leave you isolated and vulnerable when your plans inevitably go awry. You are a force of nature, but one that often destroys the very things it seeks to possess.

characters.name: The Evil Queen
characters.short_description: You are a perfectionist driven by vanity and a deep-seated need to be recognized as the absolute best in your field.
characters.profile_text: You hold yourself and others to an impossible standard, and you cannot abide the thought of being second-best. You are regal, disciplined, and possess a cold beauty that masks a volatile insecurity. Your strengths lie in your preparation and your willingness to go to extreme lengths to eliminate any competition. You are likely a person of routine and ritual, finding comfort in the mirrors and tools that confirm your status and power. You prefer to operate with a chilling efficiency, removing obstacles with a clinical detachment that others find terrifying. Your pitfall is your obsession with external validation and your inability to handle the natural passage of time or the rise of new talent. This insecurity drives you to increasingly desperate and irrational acts, as you view the success of others as a personal affront to your own worth. You are a formidable leader, but your reign is often defined by fear rather than respect, leaving you with a hollow victory that requires constant, exhausting maintenance.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you feel slighted or excluded from an important event, how do you typically react?

options.text: I retreat into solitude and plan a cold, absolute retaliation that may take years to unfold.
I use my charisma to find a new angle, making a deal that ensures I come out on top anyway.
I hide my frustration behind a calm mask while strategically working to replace whoever is in charge.
I vent my bitterness through sarcasm and look for a way to manipulate others into doing my dirty work.
I make a scene, ignore the rules, and obsessively pursue my own goals regardless of the social cost.
I become clinical and disciplined, focusing all my energy on eliminating any competition that threatens my status.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments makes you feel most at home?

options.text: A quiet, imposing space where my authority is felt without me having to say a word.
A flamboyant, high-energy setting where I can be the center of attention and strike deals.
The shadows behind the throne, where I can observe everything and pull the strings in secret.
A place of comfort where I can look down on others and let my intellect do the heavy lifting.
A fast-paced, chaotic world of high fashion, luxury, and constant movement.
A perfectly ordered, regal setting where every detail reflects my own perfection and beauty.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view the people you interact with on a daily basis?

options.text: As subjects who owe me respect, or as enemies who will eventually regret crossing me.
As potential clients or 'poor unfortunate souls' who have something I can use to my advantage.
As tools or stepping stones that serve a specific purpose in my grand design for power.
As intellectual inferiors who are easily swayed by a bit of well-placed emotional manipulation.
As either useful accessories to my vision or obstacles that need to be bulldozed out of the way.
As rivals who must be monitored closely to ensure they never surpass my own achievements.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest strength when you are backed into a corner?

options.text: My immense patience and my ability to wait for the exact moment the tide turns in my favor.
My resourcefulness and my talent for finding the fine print that lets me escape any trap.
My analytical mind and my ability to remain disciplined and calm under extreme pressure.
My silver tongue and my ability to sow discord among those who are trying to stop me.
My singular, manic focus that allows me to push through any barrier with sheer force of will.
My meticulous preparation and my willingness to go to any extreme to maintain my position.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary motivation behind your most ambitious goals?

options.text: A deep-seated need for respect and the desire to punish those who have shown me none.
The desire to reclaim a lost status and prove that I am the most charismatic force in the room.
A relentless ambition to bring order to the world—under my absolute control, of course.
A sense of intellectual superiority and the desire to prove I am smarter than those born into power.
A craving for the legendary and the unique, regardless of the chaos it causes for others.
An obsessive need to be recognized as the absolute best and to eliminate any threat of being second-best.

topics.display_name: Which Game of Thrones House Do You Represent?

synopsis.title: Which Great House of Westeros Do You Truly Belong To?
synopsis.summary: The Seven Kingdoms are a dangerous place where loyalty is everything and the wrong move can cost you your head. Whether you value honor above all else or believe that chaos is a ladder, your personality aligns with one of the legendary noble families. Take this quiz to find out if you are a winter-hardened wolf, a golden lion, or a fire-breathing dragon.

characters.name: House Stark
characters.short_description: You are a stoic protector of the North, defined by an unwavering sense of duty and the resilience to weather any storm.
characters.profile_text:
You embody the ancient honor of the North, prioritizing loyalty and integrity above personal gain or political maneuvering. Like the direwolf on your sigil, you are fiercely protective of your pack, believing that when the snows fall and the white winds blow, the lone wolf dies but the pack survives. You are often seen as somber or overly serious, but this stems from a deep-rooted understanding that "Winter is Coming" and one must always be prepared for the hardships ahead. Your strengths lie in your reliability and your ability to inspire genuine devotion in those you lead.

However, your rigid adherence to a moral code can be a double-edged sword in a world filled with deception. You tend to take people at their word and expect others to share your sense of justice, which can leave you vulnerable to those who play by more ruthless rules. While your honesty is your greatest virtue, learning to navigate the complexities of human ambition without losing your soul is your ultimate challenge. You find comfort in tradition and the quiet dignity of a life lived with purpose.

characters.name: House Lannister
characters.short_description: You are a strategic powerhouse driven by ambition, family legacy, and the pragmatic realization that gold and power secure one's place in the world.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a sharp, calculating mind and the iron will necessary to climb the social and political ladder. To you, family is the only thing that truly matters, and you are willing to go to extreme lengths to ensure the Lannister name is respected—and feared. You understand the nuances of influence and the importance of paying your debts, whether they are financial or vengeful. Your confidence is often mistaken for arrogance, but it is backed by a genuine talent for leadership and a refusal to be intimidated by the obstacles in your path.

Your primary pitfall is a tendency to alienate others through your ruthlessness or your preoccupation with appearances. While you are exceptionally skilled at winning the game, your reliance on fear and leverage can leave you isolated when you most need true allies. You thrive in high-stakes environments and have little patience for incompetence. For you, the world is a place of competition where only the strongest and most resourceful survive to see their legacy endure through the ages.

characters.name: House Targaryen
characters.short_description: You are a visionary leader with a fiery spirit, possessing the rare intensity to either forge a new world or consume everything in your path.
characters.profile_text:
You carry the blood of the dragon, marked by a destiny that feels larger than life and a conviction that can move mountains. You are not content with the status quo; you seek to reclaim what is yours and reshape the world according to your ideals. Your charisma is magnetic, drawing followers to your cause through a mixture of awe and inspiration. You possess a unique blend of vulnerability and immense power, often feeling like an outsider until you find the environment where your inner fire can truly burn bright.

The danger you face lies in the thin line between greatness and instability. Your passions run deep, and when crossed, your desire for justice can quickly turn into a thirst for retribution. You must constantly balance your impulse for "Fire and Blood" with the wisdom required to rule fairly. Because you operate on a different plane than most, you may struggle with the mundane aspects of compromise. You are a force of nature, destined to leave an indelible mark on history, provided you can master the dragon within.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex ethical dilemma, what is your primary guiding principle?

options.text: Adherence to established rules and traditional codes of honor.
The pragmatic assessment of what will best secure my family's future.
The pursuit of a higher vision or a more just world, regardless of the cost.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to a direct threat or an act of betrayal?

options.text: I endure it with stoic resilience, focusing on survival and long-term duty.
I respond with calculated precision, ensuring the debt is paid back in full.
I react with overwhelming force to ensure the threat is completely eradicated.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most conducive to your personal growth and comfort?

options.text: A quiet, familiar setting rooted in history and ancestral tradition.
A sophisticated center of power where influence and resources are abundant.
A dynamic, transformative landscape where I can forge my own destiny.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your philosophy regarding the acquisition and use of power?

options.text: Power is a heavy burden to be borne only out of necessity and service.
Power is a tool to be mastered and used to maintain order and legacy.
Power is a birthright and a means to bring about fundamental change.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The reliable protector who ensures the safety and unity of the 'pack'.
The strategic architect who manages logistics and navigates social hierarchies.
The charismatic visionary who inspires others to follow a grand cause.

topics.display_name: Which Justice League Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Justice League Member Are You?
synopsis.summary: Are you the tactical leader who always has a plan, or the powerhouse who charges in headfirst? Whether you are a billionaire with a gadget for every occasion or an alien trying to find your place on Earth, your personality aligns with a legendary hero. Take this quiz to discover which member of the Justice League truly represents your inner strength and values.

characters.name: Batman
characters.short_description: You are the Dark Knight, a master strategist who relies on intellect, discipline, and preparation to overcome any obstacle.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your unwavering resolve and a meticulous approach to every challenge life throws your way. While others might rely on innate luck or raw power, you believe that knowledge and foresight are the ultimate tools for success. You likely have a plan for every possible scenario, often preferring to work in the shadows or behind the scenes where your analytical mind can dissect problems without distraction. Your commitment to justice is absolute, driven by a deep-seated desire to ensure that order prevails over chaos. However, your intense focus and self-reliance can sometimes lead to isolation. You may find it difficult to trust others fully, fearing that their unpredictability might compromise your carefully laid plans. This tendency toward secrecy and perfectionism can be a double-edged sword, making you an incredibly effective leader but also a solitary figure. Learning to lean on your allies and acknowledging your own vulnerabilities is your greatest hurdle, yet it is also what makes your humanity your most profound strength.

characters.name: Superman
characters.short_description: You are the Man of Steel, a beacon of hope and moral integrity who strives to lead by example and protect the innocent.
characters.profile_text: You possess a heart as vast as the cosmos and a moral compass that never wavers, even in the face of overwhelming adversity. You believe in the inherent goodness of people and strive to be a source of inspiration for everyone around you. Your strengths lie in your immense empathy and your willingness to put the needs of others above your own. You are often the person friends turn to for guidance, knowing that you will provide a fair and compassionate perspective regardless of the situation. Despite your incredible capabilities, you often carry the weight of the world on your shoulders. You might struggle with the pressure of living up to the high standards you set for yourself, fearing that a single mistake could let down those who depend on you. Your greatest challenge is finding a balance between your public responsibilities and your personal happiness. By embracing your roots and staying grounded in your values, you remain a symbol of what humanity can achieve when it chooses kindness over conflict.

characters.name: Wonder Woman
characters.short_description: You are a warrior of peace and truth, combining ancient wisdom with a fierce dedication to equality and justice.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural leader who balances strength with grace, possessing a spirit that is both indomitable and deeply nurturing. You value truth above all else and have little patience for deception or injustice. Your approach to life is one of active engagement; you do not wait for change to happen but instead step forward to create it. Whether you are mediating a conflict or standing up for the marginalized, you do so with a sense of duty and a belief that love is the most powerful force in the universe. Your fierce independence and warrior spirit can sometimes make you appear intimidating to those who do not know you well. You might find it frustrating when others lack your clarity of purpose or when diplomacy fails to yield immediate results. While your confidence is a major asset, you must be careful not to let your conviction turn into stubbornness. By remaining open to the perspectives of others and continuing to lead with your heart, you bridge the gap between different worlds and inspire unity.

characters.name: The Flash
characters.short_description: You are the Fastest Man Alive, a quick-witted and energetic individual who uses your speed and optimism to save the day.
characters.profile_text: You move through life at a pace that others can barely keep up with, driven by a restless energy and a genuine desire to help. Your mind is as fast as your feet, allowing you to process information and find creative solutions to problems in the blink of an eye. You are often the heart of your social circle, bringing a sense of humor and lightheartedness even to the most dire situations. Your optimism is infectious, and you have a unique ability to see the silver lining when things go wrong. However, your tendency to rush can sometimes lead to impulsiveness or a lack of attention to detail. You might find yourself overcommitted because you want to be everywhere at once, leading to burnout or missed connections. Learning to slow down and appreciate the present moment is a vital lesson for you. When you manage to channel your incredible speed with focus and patience, there is no obstacle you cannot outrun and no friend you cannot reach in their time of need.

characters.name: Green Lantern
characters.short_description: You are a guardian of the galaxy, fueled by an indomitable will and the imagination to turn your thoughts into reality.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your immense willpower and your ability to overcome fear through sheer determination. You understand that the only limits that exist are the ones you place on yourself, and you use your creativity to manifest solutions that others could never conceive. You are a person of action who thrives in structured environments where you can apply your skills to protect the greater good. Your loyalty to your cause and your comrades is legendary, making you a reliable pillar in any organization. Your greatest pitfall is often your own ego or a tendency to rely too heavily on your internal strength without considering external advice. Because you are so used to willing things into existence, you may struggle when faced with problems that cannot be solved by force of personality alone. Balancing your bold confidence with a degree of humility will allow you to grow even stronger. By trusting in your vision while remaining adaptable, you ensure that your light shines brightly even in the darkest corners of the universe.

characters.name: Aquaman
characters.short_description: You are the King of the Seven Seas, a powerful bridge between two worlds who commands respect through your regal presence and connection to nature.
characters.profile_text: You possess a unique dual nature, feeling at home in vastly different environments and serving as a mediator between conflicting cultures. Your strength is rooted in your heritage and your deep connection to the natural world, giving you a perspective that is both ancient and enduring. You are a protector at heart, fiercely defending your domain and those you love with a quiet, commanding intensity. You don't seek the spotlight, but your natural authority often places you in positions of leadership where your decisiveness is essential. Because you belong to two worlds, you may sometimes feel like an outsider in both, leading to a sense of isolation or a defensive attitude. You might struggle with the burden of tradition versus the need for modern progress, occasionally feeling torn between your various responsibilities. Your challenge is to embrace your unique identity as a source of power rather than a source of conflict. When you find harmony within yourself, you become an unstoppable force capable of uniting disparate groups for a common, noble purpose.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex challenge, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: Analyze every detail to create a meticulous, foolproof plan.
Act as a moral compass to guide others toward the right path.
Step forward immediately to fight for truth and equality.
Think on your feet and adapt instantly to changing circumstances.
Use your imagination and willpower to build a unique solution.
Rely on your instincts and your deep connection to your environment.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically relate to a team or social group?

options.text: I prefer to work alone or lead strategically from the shadows.
I am the person others look to for hope and stability.
I am a fierce advocate who mediates conflict with wisdom.
I am the heart of the group, bringing energy and humor.
I am the disciplined member who values structure and loyalty.
I often feel like an outsider protecting my own territory.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which value do you consider the most essential to your identity?

options.text: Discipline and Order
Kindness and Integrity
Truth and Justice
Optimism and Vitality
Willpower and Creativity
Heritage and Responsibility

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you respond when you encounter a situation that causes fear or uncertainty?

options.text: I study the threat until I find a tactical weakness.
I stay grounded in my values to remain a beacon for others.
I confront it head-on with warrior-like determination.
I keep moving and look for a creative way to outrun the problem.
I channel my internal resolve to manifest a way through it.
I stand my ground and protect what I have built.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the most significant personal hurdle you find yourself trying to overcome?

options.text: Learning to trust others and share the burden of responsibility.
Balancing personal happiness with the weight of high expectations.
Managing my intensity so I don't appear intimidating to others.
Slowing down to appreciate the present moment instead of rushing.
Tempering my confidence with a necessary degree of humility.
Reconciling different parts of my identity to find internal harmony.

topics.display_name: Which Element Would You Bend?

synopsis.title: Which Elemental Power Is Hidden Deep Within Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt a strange connection to the crashing waves or the flickering flame of a candle? Whether you are as stubborn as a mountain or as free-spirited as a summer breeze, your personality holds the key to your bending potential. Take this quiz to discover which of the four ancient elements you were born to master!

characters.name: Water
characters.short_description: You are a fluid and adaptable soul who finds strength in emotional depth and the ability to navigate change with grace.
characters.profile_text: You possess a remarkable capacity for empathy and resilience, much like the tides that ebb and flow. Your strength lies in your flexibility; you do not break under pressure but instead find a way to flow around obstacles or wear them down over time. You are deeply connected to your emotions and the feelings of those around you, making you a natural healer and a supportive friend. However, your sensitivity can sometimes lead to moodiness or a tendency to be overly influenced by the environment, making it crucial for you to find your own steady center. In social settings, you are the glue that holds groups together, using your intuition to resolve conflicts before they escalate. You value community and tradition, yet you are the first to embrace a necessary transformation when the situation demands it. Your pitfall is a tendency to hold onto the past or become stagnant if you lose your sense of purpose. By balancing your nurturing nature with a firm sense of self, you become an unstoppable force that can both soothe a storm and carve through stone.

characters.name: Earth
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and steadfast individual who values stability, hard work, and the enduring power of patience.
characters.profile_text: You are the bedrock of any community, known for your unwavering reliability and practical approach to life's challenges. You prefer to face problems head-on with a directness that others find both intimidating and deeply comforting. Your strength is your endurance; you have the patience to wait for the right moment and the fortitude to stand your ground when others might waver. You appreciate the tangible results of your labor and often find satisfaction in building things that are meant to last, whether they are physical structures or lifelong relationships. While your stubbornness is a source of great power, it can also be your greatest weakness. You may find it difficult to adapt to sudden changes or to see perspectives that conflict with your established worldview. You value tradition and order, sometimes at the expense of spontaneity. To reach your full potential, you must learn that true strength involves knowing when to yield as much as when to stand firm. When you combine your solid foundation with a touch of openness, you become a pillar of support that no force can easily topple.

characters.name: Fire
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and driven visionary who uses your intense energy to spark change and lead others with conviction.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by an internal flame that fuels your ambitions and pushes you to excel in everything you do. Your energy is infectious, often inspiring those around you to take action and pursue their own dreams with renewed vigor. You are a natural leader who isn't afraid to take risks or speak your mind, valuing honesty and directness above all else. Your creativity is a destructive and constructive force, capable of clearing away the old to make room for the new. You thrive in high-pressure situations where your quick thinking and decisive nature can shine. However, your intensity can sometimes border on impulsiveness or aggression if not properly tempered. You may struggle with a short temper or a tendency to burn out by pushing yourself too hard without rest. It is important for you to remember that fire requires control to be useful; without it, you risk hurting yourself or those you care about. By channeling your passion into meaningful goals and practicing self-discipline, you become a beacon of hope and a catalyst for progress that lights the way for everyone.

characters.name: Air
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited and intellectual explorer who seeks harmony and enlightenment through detachment and a broad perspective.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a lightness and curiosity that allows you to see the world from a unique vantage point. Your greatest asset is your mental agility; you are quick to learn, easy to talk to, and always looking for the deeper meaning behind the surface of things. You value freedom above all else and avoid being tied down by material possessions or rigid social expectations. This sense of detachment gives you a peaceful demeanor, making you an excellent mediator who can see all sides of an argument without becoming emotionally entangled. Your challenge lies in staying grounded and following through on your many ideas. Because you are always looking toward the horizon, you may struggle with the mundane details of daily life or find it difficult to commit to a single path. Others might perceive your quest for harmony as a lack of conviction or a tendency to avoid necessary confrontation. By learning to anchor your lofty ideals in practical action, you can turn your dreams into reality. Your path is one of balance, finding the space between the clouds and the earth to lead a life of true wisdom and liberation.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, unexpected obstacle in your path, what is your most natural reaction?

options.text: I adapt my approach, finding a way to flow around the problem or wear it down gradually.
I stand my ground and confront the issue head-on, relying on my persistence to break through.
I tackle it with immediate intensity, using my energy to spark a quick and decisive solution.
I detach from the situation to analyze it from a broader perspective and find a clever way over it.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you find most restorative for your mental well-being?

options.text: A place where I can connect deeply with others and nurture my emotional health.
A stable and orderly setting where I can focus on tangible tasks and physical results.
A dynamic and challenging atmosphere that fuels my ambitions and creative drive.
A quiet, open space that allows for intellectual freedom and a sense of detachment.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically contribute to a group or community project?

options.text: I act as the emotional glue, resolving conflicts and ensuring everyone feels supported.
I am the reliable pillar, providing the hard work and consistency needed to finish the job.
I am the visionary leader, inspiring others with my passion and taking the necessary risks.
I am the objective mediator, offering unique insights and keeping the peace through logic.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary philosophy when it comes to personal growth and change?

options.text: Growth is like the tide; I must embrace the natural cycles of ebb and flow in my life.
Growth is about building a solid foundation and staying true to my core values over time.
Growth is a transformative fire; I must constantly refine myself and pursue new heights.
Growth is a journey toward enlightenment, seeking harmony and freedom from attachments.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these potential weaknesses do you find yourself struggling with most often?

options.text: Becoming overly influenced by my surroundings or losing my sense of self in others' emotions.
Being too stubborn or resistant to change when a situation requires a new approach.
Acting impulsively or letting my temper flare up when I feel my goals are being blocked.
Finding it difficult to stay grounded or follow through on practical, mundane responsibilities.

topics.display_name: Which Narnia Creature Are You?

synopsis.title: Step Through The Wardrobe: Which Narnia Creature Are You?
synopsis.summary: Have you ever wondered if you belong in the snowy woods of Lantern Waste or the high seas of the Dawn Treader? From noble talking beasts to mystical woodland spirits, Narnia is home to a diverse array of magical beings. Take this quiz to discover which legendary creature matches your true spirit and where you fit in Aslan's kingdom.

characters.name: Centaur
characters.short_description: You are a noble, star-gazing warrior who balances profound wisdom with formidable physical prowess.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rare blend of intellectual depth and physical strength, often finding yourself looking toward the horizon or the stars for guidance. As a Centaur, you are naturally inclined toward philosophy and prophecy, taking life’s responsibilities with a solemnity that others might find intimidating. You value tradition and honor above all else, making you a steadfast ally in times of conflict and a wise counselor during peace. Your strength is not just in your muscles but in your unwavering commitment to the truth and the natural order of the world.

While your seriousness makes you reliable, you may struggle with lightheartedness or spontaneity. You tend to be rigid in your expectations of others, assuming everyone shares your disciplined moral compass. However, your ability to see the big picture allows you to remain calm when others panic. You are a natural leader who leads by example, preferring action and strategic thought over idle chatter. Your presence commands respect, and your loyalty is as enduring as the constellations you study.

characters.name: Faun
characters.short_description: You are a charming and hospitable soul who finds joy in music, storytelling, and the comforts of a warm hearth.
characters.profile_text:
You are the heart of any social gathering, possessing a whimsical nature that draws others to you. Like the Fauns of the Narnian woods, you appreciate the finer things in life—a good cup of tea, a haunting melody on the flute, and the company of dear friends. You are sensitive and perceptive, often picking up on the moods of those around you before they even speak. Your imagination is your greatest asset, allowing you to turn a simple walk through the forest into a grand adventure filled with wonder.

Your desire to please others and your love for comfort can sometimes lead you into difficult moral dilemmas. You might find it hard to stand your ground when faced with true danger, preferring to avoid conflict whenever possible. Yet, your bravery often surprises even you when those you love are at risk. You are a loyal friend whose kindness can melt the coldest of hearts, proving that true strength often lies in vulnerability and compassion. You bring a necessary lightness to the world, reminding everyone to stop and enjoy the dance.

characters.name: Dwarf
characters.short_description: You are a practical, industrious, and fiercely independent individual with a talent for craftsmanship and a skeptical mind.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your work ethic and your grounded perspective on reality. Whether you are building great halls or forging legendary weapons, you value tangible results and the mastery of a craft over abstract theories or distant prophecies. You are incredibly resourceful, able to make the most of whatever tools are at hand, and you take great pride in your self-sufficiency. Your loyalty is hard-won, but once someone earns your respect, you are a fierce defender and a tireless worker for their cause.

Your skepticism can sometimes border on cynicism, causing you to miss out on the wonder or magic that others see so clearly. You may be prone to stubbornness, digging in your heels even when a change of course is necessary for the group's success. However, your realism is a vital anchor for any team, providing the common sense needed to navigate practical challenges. You are the one people turn to when a job needs to be done right, as your dedication to quality and durability is unmatched by any other creature.

characters.name: Talking Bear
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, sleepy, and deeply loyal companion who prioritizes peace, food, and the protection of your kin.
characters.profile_text:
You move through life at your own pace, often appearing laid-back or even drowsy to those who do not know you well. As a Talking Bear, you have a simple but profound appreciation for the world’s basic pleasures, especially a good meal and a long, uninterrupted nap. You are not easily provoked to anger, preferring to maintain a peaceful existence and avoid unnecessary drama. Your presence is naturally comforting to others, acting as a steady and warm influence in a chaotic or frightening world.

Your relaxed nature can sometimes be mistaken for laziness or a lack of ambition. You might find it difficult to get motivated for tasks that do not immediately interest you or benefit your immediate circle of friends. However, when your loved ones are threatened, your protective instincts take over, revealing a formidable strength and courage that few would dare to challenge.
