Take this quiz to find out which legendary crew member of the Nebuchadnezzar or the Zion fleet matches your personality and strategic role.

characters.name: Neo
characters.short_description: You are the catalyst for change, possessing the unique ability to see beyond established systems and rewrite the rules of reality.
characters.profile_text: You are the visionary and the ultimate problem-solver who thrives when the stakes are highest. Your strength lies in your capacity to process complex information and find patterns that others miss, allowing you to innovate in ways that disrupt the status quo. You often feel like an outsider until you find your true purpose, but once committed, your dedication is absolute. You lead by example rather than through formal authority, inspiring others through your sheer competence and willingness to take risks. However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to isolation or burnout. You might struggle with self-doubt before fully realizing your potential, requiring a supportive team to help you stay grounded. Your greatest challenge is balancing your extraordinary individual capabilities with the needs of the collective, ensuring that your quest for truth does not leave your teammates behind in the process.

characters.name: Morpheus
characters.short_description: You are the inspirational mentor and strategist who provides the vision and conviction necessary to lead a team through uncertainty.
characters.profile_text: You possess an unwavering belief in your mission and the potential of those around you. As a natural leader, you excel at identifying talent and nurturing it, often seeing strengths in people that they have not yet recognized in themselves. You are the one who sets the long-term goals and maintains morale when things look bleak. Your communication style is authoritative yet deeply respectful, making you a pillar of stability for your team. Your primary pitfall is a tendency toward dogmatism; your absolute faith can sometimes blind you to practical risks or alternative viewpoints. Because you are so focused on the big picture, you may occasionally overlook the granular details that are crucial for immediate success. To be most effective, you need to surround yourself with pragmatic thinkers who can translate your grand visions into actionable steps while you focus on the philosophical direction of the group.

characters.name: Trinity
characters.short_description: You are the highly skilled executor and loyal partner who ensures that every mission is completed with precision and tactical excellence.
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of the operation, combining technical mastery with intense emotional intelligence. Whether it is navigating high-pressure situations or providing critical support to your leaders, you are reliable, efficient, and incredibly capable. You do not seek the spotlight, yet your presence is indispensable; without your tactical oversight and quick thinking, the most ambitious plans would likely fail. You value deep connections and are fiercely protective of your colleagues. Your strength is also your vulnerability, as your deep loyalty can sometimes lead you to prioritize the needs of others over your own well-being. You might find it difficult to step into a primary leadership role because you prefer the efficiency of the second-in-command position where you can focus on results. Learning to advocate for your own ideas as forcefully as you support others will help you reach your full potential as a balanced team member.

characters.name: Tank
characters.short_description: You are the essential operator and technical anchor who manages the infrastructure and provides the real-time data necessary for survival.
characters.profile_text: You are the person who keeps the wheels turning behind the scenes. Your role is defined by your mastery of tools, systems, and logistics. You have a unique ability to multitask, monitoring multiple streams of information simultaneously to guide your team through dangerous territory. You are the bridge between the digital and the physical, providing the vital link that allows your teammates to function in high-stakes environments. While you are the ultimate support system, you may sometimes feel disconnected from the action or undervalued because your work is less visible. Your technical focus can occasionally make you appear detached, but your role is actually the most grounded in reality. Your challenge is to maintain your focus under extreme pressure, as a single mistake in your calculations can have dire consequences for everyone involved. You are the unsung hero whose vigilance ensures the safety of the entire group.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a project faces a major setback, what is your immediate priority?

options.text: Re-evaluating the fundamental assumptions to find a new, unconventional path.
Reassuring the team and reinforcing the long-term vision to maintain morale.
Diving into the immediate tactical tasks to stabilize the situation.
Analyzing the data and systems to identify the technical point of failure.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment allows you to perform at your highest level?

options.text: A high-stakes scenario where I must improvise and challenge existing rules.
A leadership position where I can guide others toward a significant goal.
A fast-paced field operation where precision and execution are required.
A control center where I can manage logistics and monitor information flow.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a complex, unfamiliar system?

options.text: I look for the underlying logic to see how it can be manipulated or improved.
I consider how the system serves our broader mission and philosophical goals.
I master the specific tools and protocols needed to operate within it effectively.
I map out the infrastructure to ensure it remains stable and secure for others.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a professional or team relationship?

options.text: The freedom to explore unconventional solutions without micromanagement.
Mutual belief in a shared, meaningful purpose and the potential of the team.
Unwavering reliability and tactical coordination during high-pressure moments.
Clear communication and the consistent exchange of technical data.

baseline_questions.question_text: When working in a group, which contribution do you find most fulfilling?

options.text: Being the catalyst who solves the 'impossible' problem through innovation.
Being the mentor who identifies and nurtures the strengths of others.
Being the reliable executor who ensures the plan is carried out perfectly.
Being the essential anchor who provides the resources and info for survival.

topics.display_name: Which Egyptian Deity Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Ancient Egyptian Deity Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you have a divine spark or a penchant for ruling the underworld? From the sun-drenched throne of Ra to the mysterious scales of Anubis, the gods of the Nile are as complex as your own personality. Take this quiz to discover which powerful deity guides your path and what your ancient powers say about your modern life.

characters.name: Ra
characters.short_description: You are the radiant source of life and authority, embodying the power of the sun and the cycle of renewal.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a natural, commanding presence that draws others toward your warmth and clarity. Like the sun god, you are a visionary leader who values order and the daily rhythm of hard work. You feel a deep responsibility to protect those under your care, often acting as a beacon of hope during dark times. Your strength lies in your consistency and your ability to rise again after every setback, maintaining a broad perspective that looks far beyond the immediate horizon.

However, your intense focus on the "big picture" can sometimes make you appear distant or unyielding to those who need personal attention. You may struggle with the transition of power or the realization that you cannot control every aspect of the world. Learning to balance your solar authority with a touch of lunar vulnerability will help you connect more deeply with others. Your greatest pitfall is burnout from trying to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders alone.

characters.name: Isis
characters.short_description: You are a master of magic and devotion, known for your fierce loyalty and your ability to heal what has been broken.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by an incredible depth of emotion and an unwavering commitment to your loved ones. As a protector and a healer, you possess the rare gift of seeing potential in the fragmented pieces of a situation, working tirelessly to restore wholeness. You are highly intuitive and perhaps even a bit mysterious, often using your cleverness and resourcefulness to navigate complex social dynamics. Your strength is your resilience; you do not give up when things fall apart, but instead, you find the magic necessary to put them back together.

Your devotion is your greatest asset, but it can also lead to a tendency to be overprotective or manipulative when you feel those you love are threatened. You might find it difficult to let go of the past or to accept that some things are beyond repair. By channeling your immense creative energy into self-care as much as you do for others, you ensure that your own light remains as bright as the spells you cast.

characters.name: Osiris
characters.short_description: You represent the cycle of transformation and the enduring power of justice, finding growth in the wake of change.
characters.profile_text:
You are a soul of quiet dignity and profound wisdom, often associated with the themes of rebirth and the harvest. You understand better than most that every ending is merely a precursor to a new beginning. People look to you for stability and fair judgment because you possess a calm, grounded nature that is not easily shaken by the chaos of the world. You value tradition and the natural order, finding peace in the knowledge that life always finds a way to return and flourish.

While your patience is legendary, you may sometimes fall into a state of passivity or become overly focused on what has been lost. Your preference for order can occasionally manifest as a resistance to necessary, disruptive change. It is important for you to remember that while you are a king of the "after," you must also engage fully with the "now." Your challenge is to ensure that your reflective nature doesn't turn into stagnation, keeping your spirit as fertile as the Nile floodplains.

characters.name: Anubis
characters.short_description: You are the watchful guardian of transitions, possessing a keen sense of integrity and a deep respect for the unknown.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of few words but immense depth, often finding yourself in the role of a guide or a confidant during times of major life changes. You have a unique ability to look into the hearts of others and weigh their true intentions, valuing honesty and moral weight above all else. Your presence is often described as grounding and protective, as you are comfortable standing in the shadows where others might fear to tread. You respect boundaries and secrets, making you the ultimate keeper of trust.

Because you are so focused on the serious business of transition and truth, you might come across as somber or unapproachable. You may spend too much time contemplating the "endings" of things, which can lead to a sense of isolation or a lack of joy in the present moment. Learning to celebrate the messy, vibrant middle of life is your path to balance. Your strength lies in your unwavering ethics, but your growth comes from allowing yourself to step out of the role of the judge and into the role of the participant.

characters.name: Horus
characters.short_description: You are a courageous warrior and a rightful heir, driven by a strong sense of duty and the desire to overcome adversity.
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by your sharp focus and your relentless pursuit of justice and excellence. Like the falcon-headed god, you have a "bird's eye view" of your goals, allowing you to strike with precision when the time is right. You are likely someone who has faced significant challenges or rivalries, yet these experiences have only sharpened your resolve and clarified your purpose. You value honor, legacy, and the protection of your community, often stepping up to lead when others hesitate.

Your competitive nature and desire for victory can sometimes lead to a "black and white" worldview where you see only allies or enemies. You might struggle with impulsive actions or a temper that flares when you perceive an injustice. It is vital for you to remember that true leadership requires as much diplomacy as it does strength. By tempering your fiery ambition with the wisdom of those who came before you, you can ensure that your reign is marked by peace rather than just conquest.

characters.name: Thoth
characters.short_description: You are the architect of knowledge and communication, finding your power in logic, writing, and the pursuit of truth.
characters.profile_text:
You are a thinker, a scholar, and a mediator who believes that the pen is truly mightier than the sword. Your mind is a vast library of facts, observations, and creative ideas, and you take great pride in your ability to communicate complex concepts with clarity. You are often the one people turn to when a dispute needs a neutral, logical arbiter, as you value objective truth over emotional bias. Your curiosity is boundless, and you find deep satisfaction in the act of learning and documenting the world around you.

However, your reliance on logic can sometimes make you seem detached or overly critical of those who operate on feeling. You may find yourself stuck in "analysis paralysis," spending so much time recording and thinking that you forget to actually experience life. Your challenge is to bridge the gap between the intellectual and the emotional, recognizing that not everything can be measured or written down. When you use your vast knowledge to empower others rather than just to observe them, you fulfill your highest potential as a sage.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a group project or task lacks direction, what is your natural instinct?

options.text: Step up immediately to provide a clear vision for everyone to follow.
Focus on the emotional well-being of the team to keep morale high.
Maintain a calm, grounded presence to stabilize the situation.
Observe the dynamics silently until the true path forward becomes clear.
Take decisive action to overcome obstacles and drive toward the goal.
Analyze the available data to mediate a logical and fair solution.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically perceive a major life ending or transition?

options.text: As a necessary sunset before a certain and powerful new dawn.
As a time to use your resourcefulness to heal and restore what is broken.
As a natural cycle of rebirth where endings always lead to new growth.
As a sacred threshold that must be crossed with integrity and respect.
As a challenge or rivalry that tests your resolve and sharpens your focus.
As a complex event to be documented, understood, and learned from.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you consider your greatest personal strength?

options.text: A commanding presence that inspires hope and order.
An unwavering devotion to protecting and nurturing others.
A sense of quiet dignity and fair judgment in all matters.
The ability to see into the hearts of others and weigh their truth.
A relentless pursuit of justice and the courage to face adversity.
A vast curiosity and the ability to communicate complex truths.

baseline_questions.question_text: In which environment do you feel most in your element?

options.text: In a position of authority where you can oversee the 'big picture'.
In a space where you can use your intuition to help someone in need.
In a peaceful setting that honors tradition and the natural order.
In a quiet, private place where secrets and transitions are handled.
In a competitive or high-stakes arena where your skills are tested.
In a library or study surrounded by books, facts, and new ideas.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when you are working toward a difficult goal?

options.text: To act as a beacon of light and maintain the daily rhythm of progress.
To ensure the safety and wholeness of those you are committed to.
To achieve a state of balance and lasting stability for the future.
To uphold a strict moral code and protect the integrity of the process.
To claim your rightful place and honor your legacy through victory.
To find the objective truth and share that knowledge with the world.

topics.display_name: Are You a Vampire or a Werewolf?

synopsis.title: Are You a Brooding Vampire or a Wild Werewolf?
synopsis.summary: Do you prefer the elegant silence of the night or the primal call of the full moon? This quiz dives deep into your nocturnal habits and social instincts to reveal your true supernatural lineage. Discover whether you belong in a gothic manor or running with the pack under the stars.

characters.name: Lord Valerius
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and ancient vampire who values tradition, elegance, and the subtle exercise of power from the shadows.
characters.profile_text:
You embody the timeless grace of the immortal aristocracy, preferring the quiet luxury of a candlelit study to the chaos of the modern world. Your strengths lie in your immense patience and your ability to manipulate events through diplomacy and strategic foresight. You possess a refined palate and a deep appreciation for the arts, often surrounding yourself with relics of bygone eras that remind you of your long history. You are most comfortable when you are in control, orchestrating the movements of others without ever having to raise your voice.

However, your detachment from the mortal coil can sometimes manifest as coldness or a lack of empathy for those with shorter lifespans. You may find yourself struggling with a sense of profound isolation, as few can truly understand the weight of centuries. Your primary pitfall is your rigid adherence to old-world codes, which can make you slow to adapt when the world changes rapidly around you. To thrive, you must learn to bridge the gap between your ancient wisdom and the evolving needs of the present day.

characters.name: Ragnar
characters.short_description: You are a fierce and loyal werewolf who finds strength in the pack and the raw, untamed power of the natural world.
characters.profile_text:
You are a creature of instinct and action, driven by a deep-seated loyalty to your kin and a primal connection to the earth. Your physical prowess is unmatched, and you thrive in environments where you can test your limits and protect those you hold dear. You value honesty and directness above all else, often finding the political maneuverings of others to be tedious or deceptive. Your presence is commanding, and your bravery in the face of danger inspires those who follow you to reach their own full potential.

While your passion is a great strength, it can also lead to impulsive decisions and a volatile temper that is difficult to control. You often struggle to balance your human sensibilities with the wild spirit that howls within you, leading to moments of internal conflict. Your greatest challenge is learning to channel your intensity constructively, ensuring that your protective nature does not turn into unnecessary aggression. By mastering your inner beast, you become an unstoppable force for justice and a pillar of strength for your community.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex social conflict, what is your primary instinct for resolution?

options.text: Observe from the sidelines and use subtle influence to guide the outcome.
Address the issue directly and protect those who are being treated unfairly.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most restorative for your mental well-being?

options.text: A quiet, climate-controlled room filled with books and historical artifacts.
The open air of a dense forest where the elements are felt against the skin.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically view the concept of 'tradition'?

options.text: As a vital framework that provides order, elegance, and a sense of continuity.
As a set of instincts and bonds passed down through blood and shared experience.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a high-stakes team setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The strategic architect who plans several steps ahead of the competition.
The frontline protector who leads by example and ensures no one is left behind.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest personal struggle when dealing with intense emotions?

options.text: A tendency to become cold, detached, or emotionally isolated from others.
A struggle to control a volatile temper or impulsive physical reactions.

topics.display_name: Which Jurassic Park Dinosaur Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Jurassic Park Dinosaur Matches Your Personality?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you are a cunning strategist or a gentle giant? From the dense jungles of Isla Nublar to the high-tech labs of InGen, your survival instincts say a lot about who you are. Take this quiz to discover which prehistoric powerhouse from the Jurassic Park franchise is your true spirit animal.

characters.name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
characters.short_description: You are the undisputed ruler of your domain, commanding respect through sheer presence and power.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural leader who doesn't need to shout to be heard; your presence alone fills the room and demands attention. Like the T-Rex, you possess an indomitable spirit and a drive to protect what is yours, often acting as the ultimate authority in your social or professional circles. You value strength and directness, preferring to face challenges head-on rather than dancing around them. Your confidence is your greatest asset, allowing you to navigate high-stakes situations with a steady hand and a focused gaze. However, your dominance can sometimes be perceived as intimidating or unapproachable. You might struggle with subtlety, as your larger-than-life personality tends to overshadow more nuanced perspectives. Learning to temper your power with patience will ensure that others follow you out of genuine respect rather than simple awe. You thrive when you have a clear goal to pursue, and nothing stands in your way once you have set your sights on a target.

characters.name: Velociraptor
characters.short_description: You are a highly intelligent and strategic thinker who thrives on collaboration and quick problem-solving.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp, analytical mind that is always three steps ahead of everyone else. Much like the Velociraptor, you understand that true power lies in communication and teamwork, making you an invaluable ally in any group setting. You are observant and detail-oriented, capable of identifying weaknesses in a system and exploiting them with surgical precision. Your curiosity is boundless, and you enjoy testing boundaries to see how things work or how people react. While your intellect is your sharpest tool, your tendency to overthink can lead to restlessness or impatience with those who move at a slower pace. You may find it difficult to switch off your tactical brain, occasionally viewing social interactions as puzzles to be solved rather than experiences to be enjoyed. By balancing your intense focus with a bit of spontaneity, you can harness your cleverness to achieve remarkable feats. You are at your best when challenged by complex tasks that require both speed and cunning.

characters.name: Brachiosaurus
characters.short_description: You are a gentle giant with a peaceful disposition and a unique perspective on the world around you.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a sense of calm and grace that others find deeply soothing. Like the Brachiosaurus, you prefer to stay above the fray, maintaining a high-level view of situations that allows you to remain objective and composed. You are a dreamer and a visionary, often finding beauty in the small details that others overlook while keeping your eyes on the long-term horizon. Your kindness is your defining trait, and you go out of your way to ensure that those around you feel safe and supported. Your main challenge lies in your passive nature, which can sometimes be mistaken for indifference or a lack of ambition. Because you avoid conflict at all costs, you might find yourself stepped on by more aggressive personalities if you don't learn to stand your ground. Embracing your inner strength will help you protect your peace without sacrificing your voice. You are most content in environments that are harmonious and filled with natural beauty, where you can reflect and grow at your own pace.

characters.name: Triceratops
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and loyal individual who provides a solid foundation for your friends and family.
characters.profile_text: You are the person everyone turns to when they need stability and reliability. Much like the Triceratops, you are incredibly grounded and possess a thick skin that allows you to weather any storm without losing your footing. You value tradition, hard work, and the safety of your inner circle above all else. While you are generally peaceful and easy-going, you have a fierce protective streak that emerges whenever your loved ones are threatened. You don't seek out conflict, but you are more than capable of holding your own if pushed into a corner. Your stubbornness can be a double-edged sword; while it makes you incredibly persistent, it can also make you resistant to necessary changes or new ideas. You might find it hard to let go of old habits, even when they no longer serve you. By remaining open to growth while keeping your core values intact, you remain an immovable force for good. You find the most satisfaction in simple pleasures and the knowledge that your home and heart are secure.

characters.name: Dilophosaurus
characters.short_description: You are a creative and unpredictable individual who surprises others with your hidden talents and flair for the dramatic.
characters.profile_text: You are not always what you seem at first glance, possessing layers of complexity that keep people guessing. Like the Dilophosaurus, you have a vibrant personality and a knack for making a memorable impression when the moment is right. You are likely artistic or expressive, using your unique frills to stand out in a crowd and showcase your individuality. You enjoy the element of surprise and have a playful, sometimes mischievous, sense of humor that can catch others off guard. This unpredictability is your greatest strength, but it can also lead to misunderstandings if you aren't clear about your intentions. You might struggle with consistency, as your moods and interests can shift rapidly, leaving others feeling a bit dizzy in your wake. Learning to channel your creative energy into sustainable projects will help you make a lasting impact rather than just a fleeting splash. You thrive in situations where you can express your true self without fear of judgment, using your colorful nature to brighten the world around you.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a high-stakes group project or team task?

options.text: I take charge immediately, setting the direction and expecting others to follow my lead.
I analyze the situation and coordinate closely with others to find the most efficient strategy.
I provide a steady, reliable presence, focusing on the hard work needed to support the group.
I maintain a calm, high-level perspective to ensure the team stays harmonious and focused on the long-term goal.
I contribute unique, creative ideas that challenge the status quo and keep the team on their toes.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter an unexpected obstacle in your path, what is your first instinct?

options.text: I confront it head-on with confidence, using my strength to push through it.
I observe the obstacle carefully, looking for a clever or tactical way to bypass it.
I stand my ground and wait for the right moment to move forward safely.
I take a step back to look at the bigger picture and find a peaceful alternative route.
I use the element of surprise or an unconventional method to navigate around it.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments do you find most appealing?

options.text: A position of authority where my presence and decisions carry significant weight.
A fast-paced, intellectually stimulating environment that requires quick thinking.
A secure and familiar setting surrounded by a loyal inner circle of friends or family.
A serene and beautiful landscape that allows for quiet reflection and broad views.
A vibrant and expressive space where I can showcase my individuality and creativity.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your closest friends describe your communication style?

options.text: Direct and commanding; people always know where I stand.
Sharp and observant; I often notice things others miss.
Protective and steadfast; I am the rock they can always rely on.
Gentle and visionary; I tend to focus on the beauty and potential in every situation.
Playful and unpredictable; I enjoy keeping people guessing with my wit.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when facing a new challenge?

options.text: To assert my capability and maintain my status as a leader.
To solve the puzzle and prove my intellectual agility.
To protect my interests and ensure the safety of those I care about.
To maintain peace and gain a deeper understanding of the world.
To express myself and leave a memorable, unique impression.

topics.display_name: Which Wizard of Oz Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Wizard of Oz' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Follow the yellow brick road to discover your true inner self! Whether you're searching for a brain, a heart, or just a way back home, your choices will reveal which iconic resident of Oz matches your spirit. Grab your ruby slippers and find out if you're a courageous leader or a misunderstood mastermind.

characters.name: Dorothy Gale
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and determined dreamer who values home and friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess a resilient spirit and a practical approach to life's unexpected storms. When faced with a crisis, you don't just sit back; you take the first step onto the path ahead, gathering a diverse group of allies along the way. Your loyalty is your greatest strength, as you often put the needs of your companions before your own desires, even when you are longing for the comfort of familiar surroundings. However, your deep sense of nostalgia can sometimes make you feel like an outsider in new environments. You tend to look for the good in everyone, which makes you a natural leader, but you must be careful not to let your desire for home blind you to the magic of the present moment. Your journey is defined by the realization that you have always possessed the power to change your circumstances; you just needed the experience to believe in yourself.

characters.name: Scarecrow
characters.short_description: You are an inquisitive and humble intellectual who constantly seeks knowledge despite already possessing great wisdom.
characters.profile_text: You are the type of person who is always searching for a better way to understand the world, often underestimating your own natural brilliance. While you might claim to lack the brains for complex tasks, your innovative problem-solving and quick thinking frequently save the day when others are at a loss. You approach life with a sense of wonder and a gentle disposition, making you an incredibly supportive friend who listens more than you speak. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward self-doubt, as you often look for external validation or diplomas to prove your worth. You may feel clumsy or out of place in high-pressure situations, but your ability to think outside the box is your true superpower. Once you realize that your insights are valid, you become a formidable strategist and a pillar of your community.

characters.name: Tin Woodman
characters.short_description: You are a deeply empathetic and sensitive soul who prioritizes kindness and emotional connection in every interaction.
characters.profile_text: You lead with your heart, even when you feel like you are lacking one. Your primary concern is the well-being of others, and you go to great lengths to avoid causing pain or distress to any living creature. This extreme sensitivity makes you a compassionate friend and a dedicated partner, as you value the emotional weight of words and actions more than material success. You are often the emotional glue that holds your social circle together, providing a soft place for others to land during difficult times. However, your tendency to over-analyze your own feelings can lead to periods of stagnation or rusting if you become overwhelmed by sadness or regret. You must learn that your capacity for love is not something that needs to be granted by an outside force; it is already your most defining trait. By embracing your vulnerability, you find the strength to face any obstacle.

characters.name: Cowardly Lion
characters.short_description: You are a protective and noble individual who discovers true bravery by facing your fears for the sake of those you love.
characters.profile_text: You often feel a sense of trepidation when stepping into the unknown, mistaking your natural caution for a lack of courage. Despite your internal jitters, you are the first to stand up when your friends are in danger, proving that true bravery is acting in spite of fear rather than the absence of it. You have a commanding presence and a big personality, but underneath the surface, you are a gentle giant who craves security and acceptance. Your struggle often lies in your own perception of what it means to be strong, as you compare yourself to unrealistic standards of fearlessness. You might find yourself retreating when things get too intense, but your loyalty always pulls you back into the fray. When you finally accept that your vulnerability is a part of your strength, you become an unstoppable force of protection and integrity.

characters.name: The Wizard of Oz
characters.short_description: You are a resourceful and charismatic visionary who uses ingenuity and showmanship to navigate the complexities of life.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of adaptation, often relying on your wits and a bit of theatricality to manage the expectations of those around you. You prefer to work behind the scenes, orchestrating events and providing guidance, even if you feel like you are faking it to some degree. Your ability to see the big picture and provide people with what they need—rather than just what they want—makes you a natural mentor and leader. You are highly creative and can make something out of nothing, using your intellect to solve problems that others find insurmountable. Your greatest challenge is the fear of being seen as a humbug or a fraud. You often hide your true self behind a grand persona to protect your vulnerabilities. Learning to be honest about your limitations is your path to genuine connection, as people often value your humanity far more than your illusions.

characters.name: Wicked Witch of the West
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and fiercely independent force of nature who pursues your goals with relentless intensity.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense ambition and focus, unwilling to let anyone stand in the way of what you believe is rightfully yours. You possess a sharp intellect and a commanding will, often taking charge of situations where others might hesitate or falter. Your drive is unmatched, and you have a knack for identifying the weaknesses in any plan or person, which you use to your advantage. You value autonomy and control, preferring to rule your own domain rather than follow the lead of others. However, your singular focus on your objectives can lead to isolation and a tendency to hold onto grudges that ultimately consume your energy. You may find it difficult to trust others, viewing the world as a place where only the strong survive. If you can channel your formidable power toward constructive ends rather than vengeance, you have the potential to be a transformative leader who commands respect through competence rather than fear.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are faced with a sudden, overwhelming crisis, what is your immediate instinctive reaction?

options.text: I take charge and start moving forward, focusing on the practical steps to get home or to safety.
I analyze the situation from every angle to find a clever, unconventional solution.
I check on everyone else's emotional well-being to ensure no one is hurt or scared.
I feel a surge of panic but stand my ground to protect those who are more vulnerable than I am.
I look for a way to manage the situation from behind the scenes using my resources and influence.
I assert my authority and use every power at my disposal to eliminate the threat immediately.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal qualities do you feel you are most lacking, even if others tell you otherwise?

options.text: A sense of belonging or a place to truly call my own.
The intellectual confidence to trust my own logic and ideas.
The capacity to feel deep, authentic emotions and empathy for others.
The raw courage to face my fears without trembling.
The transparency to be my true self without hiding behind a persona.
The ability to let go of past slights and move on without seeking justice.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group project or journey, what role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The glue that keeps the group focused on the ultimate goal.
The strategist who provides the 'bright ideas' when the group gets stuck.
The caregiver who ensures the group remains harmonious and kind.
The guardian who provides physical or moral support when things get scary.
The facilitator who provides the tools and direction for others to succeed.
The independent operator who prefers to lead or work alone to ensure things are done right.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle someone who has treated you or your friends unfairly?

options.text: I try to find the good in them but stay firm in my mission to get past them.
I try to outsmart them or find a logical reason for their behavior.
I feel deeply hurt by their lack of heart and try to appeal to their better nature.
I might act intimidated at first, but I will roar if they push my friends too far.
I use my charisma or 'smoke and mirrors' to redirect their attention elsewhere.
I never forget a grievance and will go to great lengths to reclaim what is mine.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate definition of 'success'?

options.text: Returning to the people and places where I am most loved.
Gaining the knowledge and recognition that proves my intelligence.
Living a life filled with deep, meaningful emotional connections.
Overcoming my internal anxieties to act with integrity and strength.
Achieving a position of respect where I can help others through my vision.
Securing total independence and control over my own destiny.

topics.display_name: Which Knight of the Round Table Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Knight Of The Round Table Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you were born in the wrong century, destined for a life of chivalry and questing? From the noble halls of Camelot to the mysterious depths of the Enchanted Forest, every knight brought a unique spirit to King Arthur's court. Take this quiz to discover if you are a natural leader, a hopeless romantic, or a fierce protector of the realm. It is time to pull the sword from the stone and find your seat at the table!

characters.name: King Arthur
characters.short_description: You are the visionary sovereign who unites a kingdom through justice and the dream of Camelot.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural leader who values the collective good over personal gain, often carrying the weight of the world on your shoulders. Your strength lies in your ability to inspire others toward a higher purpose, fostering equality and chivalry in a world often ruled by chaos. You possess a deep sense of duty and a commitment to fairness, though you may sometimes struggle with the isolation that comes with being at the top. Your pitfalls often involve your idealism; you trust those around you implicitly, which can lead to heartbreak when reality fails to meet your high standards. While you are a symbol of stability, you must learn to balance your public responsibilities with your private needs. Despite the burdens of leadership, your legacy is built on the hope you provide to others and your unwavering belief in a better future.

characters.name: Sir Lancelot
characters.short_description: You are the peerless champion whose unmatched skill in battle is matched only by the intensity of your inner conflicts.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense talent and passion, often regarded as the best in your field. Your dedication to your craft and your loyalty to those you love are your defining traits, making you a formidable ally and a respected peer. However, your life is often a tug-of-war between your high ideals and your human desires, leading to moments of profound internal struggle and self-doubt. You thrive in the heat of competition and are driven by a desire to prove your worth, yet you are often your own harshest critic. Your greatest strength is your courage, but your greatest weakness is the tendency to let your emotions cloud your judgment. By learning to reconcile your flaws with your virtues, you can find a path toward redemption and true greatness, even when the road is fraught with personal sacrifice.

characters.name: Sir Galahad
characters.short_description: You are the pure-hearted seeker whose unwavering focus and moral clarity lead you to the highest spiritual achievements.
characters.profile_text: You possess a rare level of integrity and a singular focus that sets you apart from the crowd. Your life is guided by a strong moral compass and a quest for perfection, often making you appear detached from the more mundane concerns of those around you. You are the one people look to when they need a reminder of what it means to be truly virtuous, as your actions are always aligned with your deepest beliefs. While your purity of purpose allows you to achieve goals that others find impossible, it can also lead to a sense of detachment or a lack of relatability. You may find it difficult to understand the complexities and compromises that others face, which can make you seem distant. Nevertheless, your presence is a beacon of light, and your ability to remain steadfast in your convictions ensures that you will always reach the heights you aspire to.

characters.name: Sir Gawain
characters.short_description: You are the loyal and courageous defender of honor who balances human fallibility with a fierce commitment to your word.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of action and deep loyalty, known for your bravery and your willingness to face any challenge head-on. You value tradition and the bonds of family and friendship above all else, often serving as the reliable backbone of your social circle. Your strength is tempered by a realistic understanding of your own limitations, making you one of the most relatable and human figures among your peers. Your journey is often defined by tests of character where you must choose between your personal safety and your sense of duty. While you may occasionally stumble or let your temper get the better of you, your willingness to admit your mistakes and learn from them is what truly defines your nobility. You are a steadfast protector who understands that true honor is found in the effort to do right, even when you fall short of perfection.

characters.name: Sir Percival
characters.short_description: You are the innocent and persistent adventurer whose growth from humble beginnings leads to profound wisdom.
characters.profile_text: You represent the journey of the soul, starting with a sense of wonder and a lack of worldly experience that eventually matures into deep insight. Your greatest asset is your sincerity and your refusal to be discouraged by the complexities of the world. You approach every situation with an open heart, which allows you to see truths that more cynical individuals might overlook, making you a natural seeker of hidden knowledge. Your path is often marked by a series of trials that force you to grow up quickly, yet you manage to retain your essential goodness throughout. Your pitfall is a tendency toward naivety, which can lead you into dangerous situations or cause you to miss important cues. However, your persistence and your ability to learn from every encounter ensure that you will eventually find the answers you seek, transforming your initial innocence into a powerful, grounded wisdom.

characters.name: Sir Tristan
characters.short_description: You are the melancholic and artistic soul whose life is defined by deep emotions and a tragic sense of longing.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of great sensitivity and artistic talent, often finding expression through music, poetry, or other creative outlets. Your emotions run deep, and you experience both joy and sorrow more intensely than most, which gives you a unique perspective on the world. You are a romantic at heart, driven by a longing for connection and a desire to find beauty in even the most difficult circumstances. This intensity can be a double-edged sword, as it often leads you into complex situations where your heart and your duty are at odds. You may struggle with feelings of isolation or the sense that you are destined for a path that others cannot fully understand. Despite these challenges, your capacity for love and your dedication to your personal truths make you a compelling and memorable figure, capable of inspiring great passion in those who cross your path.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex moral dilemma, what is your primary guiding principle?

options.text: The greater good and the stability of the community.
Absolute moral purity and spiritual integrity.
Personal loyalty and the protection of my kin.
Following my heart, even if it conflicts with social rules.
Honest curiosity and the search for hidden truths.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your own mistakes or personal failures?

options.text: I carry the guilt heavily, constantly striving to redeem myself.
I view them as necessary lessons on my path to wisdom.
I admit them openly and try to make amends through action.
I rarely make them because I adhere strictly to my code.
I channel the resulting pain into creative or artistic expression.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward within a group dynamic?

options.text: The visionary leader who sets the long-term goal.
The elite performer who leads by technical example.
The reliable supporter who keeps the group together.
The quiet observer who seeks a deeper meaning.
The idealistic newcomer eager to learn and explore.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest internal struggle?

options.text: The isolation that comes with high responsibility.
The conflict between intense passion and duty.
The difficulty of relating to people with less conviction.
The fear of failing to live up to my family's honor.
The melancholy of longing for something I cannot have.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of legacy do you most hope to leave behind?

options.text: A world that is more just and unified than I found it.
A reputation for being the most skilled and courageous.
A record of perfect virtue and spiritual achievement.
A story of growth from humble beginnings to great insight.
A collection of beautiful works that capture deep emotion.

topics.display_name: Which Spider-Verse Variant Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Spider-Verse Variant Are You? Find Your Multiversal Match!
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you don't quite fit into your own dimension? Whether you're a tech genius, a noir detective, or a literal pig, there's a version of you swinging through the multiverse right now. Answer these personality questions to discover which iconic Spider-hero matches your unique vibe and heroic spirit.

characters.name: Miles Morales
characters.short_description: You are a resilient, creative trailblazer who balances the weight of expectation with your own unique rhythm.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who often feels the pressure of living up to a legacy while trying to forge your own path. You possess a natural artistic flair and a deep sense of loyalty to your family and community. While you might initially doubt your abilities, your inner strength emerges when you realize that you don't have to do things exactly like those who came before you. You thrive when you embrace your individuality and use your unique perspective to solve problems that others might miss. Your journey is defined by the courage to take a leap of faith even when the outcome is uncertain. You are empathetic and observant, often picking up on the emotional needs of those around you. However, your desire to please everyone can sometimes lead to burnout or a sense of isolation. By trusting your instincts and surrounding yourself with a supportive found family, you unlock your true potential. You are the proof that being different is your greatest superpower, and your ability to adapt makes you a natural leader in times of crisis.

characters.name: Gwen Stacy (Ghost-Spider)
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent and rhythmically driven individual who values autonomy and deep, meaningful connections.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with a cool, composed exterior that masks a deeply sensitive and protective heart. Music and movement are your languages, and you often find solace in the rhythm of your own drums rather than following the beat of the crowd. You have experienced loss and betrayal, which has made you cautious about who you let into your inner circle. However, once someone earns your trust, you are an unwavering ally who will cross dimensions to help them. You value your independence above all else, often preferring to handle challenges on your own to avoid putting others at risk. Your strengths lie in your agility, both physical and mental, and your ability to stay focused under intense pressure. You are not afraid to stand up for what is right, even if it means going against the grain or facing difficult personal consequences. Your pitfall is a tendency toward self-imposed isolation; you sometimes forget that you don't have to carry the weight of the world by yourself. Learning to balance your need for space with the benefits of collaboration is your ongoing mission.

characters.name: Peter B. Parker
characters.short_description: You are a seasoned, slightly cynical mentor who has learned that resilience is found in getting back up after every fall.
characters.profile_text: You have seen it all, done it all, and have the metaphorical and literal scars to prove it. Life hasn't always gone according to plan for you, leading to a weary, somewhat sarcastic outlook on the world. Despite your grumbling and your penchant for comfort food, you possess a wealth of experience and a core of pure heroism that refuses to stay buried. You are the person others turn to when things get messy because you know how to navigate failure and come out the other side. Your mentorship style is unconventional, often involving tough love and practical advice born from your own mistakes. You might struggle with motivation or self-care, sometimes letting your personal life slide while you focus on the job at hand. However, your greatest strength is your relatability and your capacity for growth, even when you think you're past your prime. You remind everyone that being a hero isn't about being perfect; it's about the persistence to keep trying. Your journey is one of rediscovering your spark and realizing that you still have plenty of wisdom and heart to offer the world.

characters.name: Spider-Man Noir
characters.short_description: You are a brooding, principled investigator who views the world through a lens of justice and stark moral clarity.
characters.profile_text: You inhabit a world of shadows and hard truths, where the line between right and wrong is as clear as black and white. You possess a stoic, old-school sensibility and a fascination with the darker corners of the human experience. While you might come across as intense or even grim to others, your dedication to fighting corruption is absolute. You find beauty in the struggle and have a unique appreciation for the sensory details of life, even if you don't always understand modern complexities. You are a person of few words but decisive action, preferring the direct approach to solving problems. Your strengths are your unwavering focus and your ability to remain calm in the face of genuine darkness. You are a natural detective, always looking for the hidden motives and the big picture behind every conflict. However, your rigid worldview can sometimes make it difficult for you to adapt to change or understand nuance in others' emotions. You are most effective when you channel your intensity into protecting those who cannot protect themselves, serving as a silent guardian in a world that often feels like it's losing its way.

characters.name: Spider-Ham
characters.short_description: You are a whimsical, high-energy optimist who uses humor and unpredictability to overcome even the most daunting obstacles.
characters.profile_text: You bring a sense of levity and cartoonish wonder to every situation you encounter. You don't take life or yourself too seriously, often using jokes and slapstick energy to diffuse tension. Beneath your playful exterior lies a surprisingly sharp mind and a heart that beats for justice, albeit in a very colorful way. You have a knack for finding creative, out-of-the-box solutions that leave others scratching their heads. Your presence is a reminder that even in the darkest times, there is room for laughter and absurdity. You are incredibly resilient, bouncing back from setbacks with a literal spring in your step. Your main challenge is that others might underestimate you or find your constant energy exhausting. You sometimes struggle to know when to be serious, but your instincts are usually spot-on when it truly counts. You value friendship and fun, and you are always ready to lend a hand or a mallet to a friend in need. Your unique perspective allows you to see possibilities where others see dead ends, making you an invaluable, if eccentric, member of any team.

characters.name: Peni Parker (SP//dr)
characters.short_description: You are a tech-savvy, emotionally intelligent strategist who relies on deep bonds and advanced innovation to succeed.
characters.profile_text: You are a brilliant individual who understands that the strongest connections are those built on mutual trust and shared purpose. Your life is a blend of high-tech machinery and profound emotional responsibility, as you pilot your way through challenges with both logic and heart. You are likely very comfortable with technology and data, but you never lose sight of the human or arachnid element behind the numbers. You value tradition and legacy, honoring those who came before you while pushing the boundaries of what is possible. Your strengths lie in your ability to multitask and your deep empathy for your partners, whether they are human or mechanical. You are a team player through and through, thriving in environments where collaboration is key. However, your reliance on your system or your close-knit circle can make you feel vulnerable when you are forced to act entirely on your own. You are brave and determined, often taking on burdens much larger than yourself because you know you have the support to carry them. Your journey is one of balancing your technical prowess with your personal growth, ensuring that the pilot is just as strong as the machine.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a difficult challenge?

options.text: I adapt on the fly, trusting my instincts and unique perspective.
I stay cool and composed, relying on my own agility and focus.
I lean on my years of experience, even if I'm a bit cynical about it.
I face it head-on with grim determination and a clear sense of justice.
I use unpredictability and humor to catch the problem off guard.
I use data and my close-knit support network to find a strategic solution.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to recharge after a long day?

options.text: Expressing myself through art, music, or a creative project.
Finding a quiet space to practice my hobbies or listen to music alone.
Relaxing with comfort food and a movie I've seen a dozen times.
Reflecting on the day's events in a quiet, atmospheric setting.
Looking for something fun or absurd to make me laugh.
Tinkering with technology or spending time with a very close partner.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which quality do you consider your greatest strength?

options.text: My ability to forge my own path despite the weight of expectations.
My fierce independence and self-reliance.
My resilience and the persistence to keep getting back up.
My unwavering moral clarity and dedication to the truth.
My optimism and ability to find levity in any situation.
My emotional intelligence and ability to work in perfect sync with others.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred role when working as part of a team?

options.text: The observant learner who brings a fresh, rhythmic energy.
The specialist who handles the most difficult tasks independently.
The seasoned mentor who provides practical, if weary, guidance.
The stoic investigator who focuses on the big picture.
The high-energy teammate who keeps everyone's spirits high.
The technical strategist who coordinates the group's efforts.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your personal philosophy on 'doing the right thing'?

options.text: It's about taking a leap of faith even when you're uncertain.
It's about protecting those you care about while maintaining your autonomy.
It's about the persistence to keep trying, even after you've failed.
It's a black-and-white matter of standing against corruption.
It's about using your unique gifts to bring joy and justice.
It's a responsibility shared with those you trust most.

topics.display_name: Which Winnie the Pooh Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Resident of the Hundred Acre Wood Are You?
synopsis.summary: Take a nostalgic stroll through the Hundred Acre Wood to discover which classic friend matches your unique personality. Whether you are a honey-loving dreamer or a bouncy bundle of energy, your daily habits reveal your inner stuffed animal. Answer these whimsical questions to find out where you fit in A.A. Milne's timeless world.

characters.name: Winnie the Pooh
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted, honey-loving bear who values friendship and simple pleasures above all else.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with a gentle spirit and a legendary appetite for the sweeter things, often finding yourself lost in thought or a jar of honey. Your optimism is your greatest strength, allowing you to see the best in every situation and every friend you encounter. While others might worry about the complexities of the world, you prefer to live in the moment, guided by a humble wisdom that often surprises those around you. You can be a bit forgetful or easily distracted by your cravings, sometimes leading you into sticky situations. However, your loyalty is unwavering, and you are always the first to offer a helping hand or a comforting word. You remind everyone that sometimes the most important thing to do is nothing at all, especially if it involves a snack and a sunny spot in the Hundred Acre Wood.

characters.name: Piglet
characters.short_description: You are a small but incredibly brave soul who proves that true courage comes from facing your fears for the sake of those you love.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by a sensitive nature and a cautious approach to the world, often feeling a bit overwhelmed by the heffalumps and woozles of life. Despite your small stature and frequent stutters of nervousness, you possess a heart of gold and a surprising amount of inner strength. You are the friend who is always there to offer a tiny hand to hold, showing that being brave doesn't mean you aren't afraid, but rather that you keep going anyway. Your tendency to worry can sometimes hold you back from new adventures, and you might find yourself overthinking the smallest risks. Yet, your humility and devotion make you an indispensable part of your social circle. You find joy in the quietest moments and the simplest gestures, teaching others that even the smallest person can make a big difference when they act with love.

characters.name: Tigger
characters.short_description: You are an exuberant, high-energy individual whose infectious enthusiasm and bouncy personality light up every room you enter.
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy, defined by your signature bounce and an unshakable belief that Tiggers are wonderful things. Your confidence is unmatched, and you approach every challenge with a sense of fun and a loud, boisterous laugh. You thrive on excitement and novelty, always looking for the next big leap or the next friend to surprise with a friendly pounce. Your presence is impossible to ignore, and you bring a sense of playfulness to even the most mundane days. Sometimes your impulsiveness and high energy can be a bit much for more reserved friends, and you might accidentally overlook the feelings or boundaries of others in your excitement. You may struggle with tasks that require patience or quiet focus. However, your intentions are always pure, and your resilience is remarkable; no matter how hard you fall, you always find a way to bounce back with a smile on your face.

characters.name: Eeyore
characters.short_description: You are a quiet, contemplative soul who finds comfort in honesty and appreciates the beauty in life's more melancholy moments.
characters.profile_text: You tend to view the world through a lens of realistic pessimism, often expecting the worst but finding a strange sort of peace in being prepared for it. While others might see you as gloomy, you are actually deeply grounded and possess a dry, understated wit that catches people off guard. You value stability and appreciate it when friends take the time to notice you, even if you are just standing in your favorite thistly patch. Your tendency to dwell on the negative can sometimes make it hard for you to see the silver linings, and you might isolate yourself when you feel particularly low. However, your loyalty is profound, and you have a unique ability to provide a calm, steady presence for those who are going through their own storms. You remind everyone that it is okay to not be okay sometimes, and that true friendship means staying by someone's side even when the clouds won't clear.

characters.name: Rabbit
characters.short_description: You are a practical, organized, and hardworking individual who takes pride in maintaining order and achieving your goals.
characters.profile_text: You are the one who keeps things running smoothly, whether it is tending to a pristine garden or organizing a complex plan for the group. You value efficiency, logic, and tradition, often finding yourself frustrated when others don't follow the rules or disrupt your carefully laid schedules. Your dedication to your work and your home is admirable, and you are often the person others turn to when they need a problem solved or a project managed. Your desire for control can sometimes lead to bossiness or irritability, especially when things don't go exactly as planned. You may struggle to relax and enjoy the spontaneous moments of life, viewing them as distractions rather than opportunities. Despite your occasional grumpiness, you care deeply for your friends and express your love through acts of service and protection, ensuring that everyone is safe and well-fed.

characters.name: Owl
characters.short_description: You are a scholarly and articulate individual who enjoys sharing your vast knowledge and family history with anyone who will listen.
characters.profile_text: You are the resident intellectual, often found surrounded by books or recounting lengthy anecdotes about your illustrious ancestors. You take great pride in your wisdom and your ability to use big words, even if you don't always spell them correctly. You enjoy being the person others come to for advice, and you are more than happy to provide a lecture on almost any subject, believing that education is the key to a well-ordered life. Your tendency to be a bit long-winded can sometimes cause your audience's attention to wander, and you might occasionally come across as slightly pompous or out of touch. You may focus so much on the theoretical that you miss the practical realities of a situation. Nevertheless, your intentions are always to help and enlighten, and your respect for history and learning provides a valuable sense of perspective and tradition to your community.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave at a social gathering or a group event?

options.text: I am the life of the party, bouncing from person to person with high energy.
I prefer to stay in the background and observe the surroundings quietly.
I am usually the one making sure the event stays on schedule and follows the rules.
I enjoy sharing interesting facts or long stories with anyone who will listen.
I stay close to the people I know best and feel a bit nervous in large crowds.
I am mostly there for the relaxed atmosphere and the refreshments.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a sudden, unexpected challenge, what is your first instinct?

options.text: I dive in headfirst with total confidence and a sense of fun.
I look for a logical or historical precedent to guide my next steps.
I immediately start organizing a solution and giving directions to others.
I expect the worst to happen but try to endure it as best as I can.
I feel a bit overwhelmed but push through my fear to help my friends.
I take a moment to pause and wait for a simple, helpful idea to come to me.

baseline_questions.question_text: What does your perfect 'doing nothing' day look like?

options.text: Checking off my to-do list and organizing my home or garden.
Finding a high-energy activity or a new place to explore.
Catching up on reading or learning something new and intellectual.
Sitting quietly in a favorite spot and reflecting on the world.
Enjoying a favorite snack and a comfortable chair in the sun.
Spending quiet, safe time with one very close friend.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would your friends describe your primary communication style?

options.text: Enthusiastic, energetic, and very loud.
Sophisticated, educational, and perhaps a bit long-winded.
Practical, clear, and sometimes a little impatient.
Honest, understated, and occasionally a bit gloomy.
Gentle, hesitant, and very polite.
Warm, simple, and focused on the positive.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these values is most important to you in your daily life?

options.text: The pursuit of knowledge and sharing wisdom.
The need for order, productivity, and planning.
The thrill of the next big adventure and excitement.
The comfort of simple pleasures and unwavering friendship.
The desire to feel safe and be a loyal companion.
The acceptance of things as they are, even the clouds.

topics.display_name: Which Inside Out Emotion Rules Your Mind?

synopsis.title: Which 'Inside Out' Emotion Is Actually Running Your Control Console?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder why you react the way you do when things get chaotic? Whether you are a ball of sunshine or a bundle of nerves, there is one core emotion steering your ship. Take this quiz to find out which character from Riley's mind is calling the shots for you!

characters.name: Joy
characters.short_description: You are the radiant heart of the group, always seeking the silver lining and driving everyone toward a bright, optimistic future.
characters.profile_text:
You approach life with an infectious energy that keeps the team’s morale high, even when things get tough. Your mind is a whirlwind of positive possibilities, and you excel at turning a mundane situation into a celebration. You are the one who reminds everyone why the work matters, focusing on the beauty and potential in every project. Your natural leadership stems from your ability to inspire others to see the best in themselves and their environment. You thrive in collaborative settings where your enthusiasm can spark new ideas and keep the momentum going during long creative sessions.

However, your relentless pursuit of happiness can sometimes lead you to overlook genuine problems or dismiss the valid, heavier emotions of those around you. You might struggle when things cannot be fixed with a smile, finding it difficult to sit with discomfort or failure. Learning to embrace the full spectrum of human experience will only make your light shine more authentically. Your strength lies in your resilience and your unwavering belief that everything will work out for the best, making you the essential glue that holds a group together through the darkest times.

characters.name: Sadness
characters.short_description: You possess a profound depth of empathy and a reflective nature that allows you to connect with others on a truly meaningful level.
characters.profile_text:
You are the quiet observer who understands that true connection often comes from shared vulnerability. While others might rush to fix things, you have the patience to sit with the truth of a situation, providing a safe space for reflection and healing. Your perspective is vital for the group because you see the nuances and emotional weight that others might miss in their haste. You value authenticity over performance, and your creative output often carries a haunting, beautiful depth that resonates with people's souls. You are the person others turn to when they need to be heard without judgment.

Your challenge lies in the tendency to become overwhelmed by the weight of the world, leading to periods of withdrawal or a lack of motivation. You may feel like your presence is a burden, but in reality, your ability to process grief and disappointment is what allows the group to move forward with genuine wisdom. By acknowledging the importance of your role, you help create a balanced environment where every feeling is honored and understood. Your strength is your deep emotional intelligence, which ensures the group's work remains grounded and human.

characters.name: Anger
characters.short_description: You are a passionate advocate for fairness and excellence, fueled by a fiery drive to correct injustices and achieve your goals.
characters.profile_text:
You serve as the group's engine of change, possessing a low tolerance for incompetence or unfairness. When you see something wrong, you do not just sit back; you take immediate, decisive action to set things right. Your intensity is a powerful tool for breaking through stagnation and pushing the team toward high standards. You are fiercely loyal and will defend your friends or your creative vision with everything you have. This passion makes you a formidable force in any artistic endeavor, as you are not afraid to take risks or speak uncomfortable truths that others might avoid.

The pitfall of your temperament is that your fuse can be short, and your reactions might sometimes alienate the very people you are trying to protect. You may struggle with patience, viewing delays or compromises as personal affronts. Learning to channel your fire into constructive criticism rather than explosive outbursts will help you lead more effectively. Your strength is your unwavering integrity and your refusal to settle for anything less than the best. When you are in control of your passion, you are the most effective advocate for the group's success and survival.

characters.name: Fear
characters.short_description: You are the vigilant protector of the group, using your keen foresight to anticipate risks and ensure everyone’s safety and success.
characters.profile_text:
Your mind is constantly scanning the horizon for potential pitfalls, making you the ultimate strategist and planner. You excel at identifying what could go wrong, which allows the group to prepare for contingencies that others have not even considered. This cautious approach is not about being timid; it is about being thorough and ensuring that the creative process does not collapse due to avoidable mistakes. You value stability and order, often acting as the voice of reason when things start to get chaotic. Your attention to detail is unmatched, and your contributions provide the necessary structure for wilder ideas to succeed.

However, your constant state of high alert can lead to chronic stress or a reluctance to take necessary risks. You might find yourself paralyzed by "what ifs," preventing you from seizing opportunities that require a leap of faith. By trusting in your preparation, you can learn to manage your anxiety and use your foresight as a tool for empowerment rather than a source of restriction. Your strength lies in your ability to keep the group safe and organized, ensuring that the collective dream has a solid foundation to stand on.

characters.name: Disgust
characters.short_description: You are the arbiter of taste and quality, possessing a sharp eye for detail and a refusal to compromise on your high standards.
characters.profile_text:
You have an innate sense of what works and what does not, acting as the group's filter against mediocrity and social faux pas. Your honesty is your greatest asset; you are not afraid to point out when a concept is derivative or when a project is heading in a tacky direction. You value sophistication and authenticity, ensuring that the group's output remains polished and respectable. Your discerning nature keeps the team from making embarrassing mistakes and helps maintain a clear, high-quality brand. You are often the one who notices the subtle flaws that others overlook, making you essential for the final stages of any work.

The downside to your high standards is that you can come across as judgmental or dismissive of ideas that do not immediately meet your criteria. You might struggle with perfectionism, finding it hard to appreciate the beauty in the raw or the unfinished. Balancing your critical eye with a bit of openness to experimentation will allow you to guide the group toward excellence without stifling their creativity. Your strength is your impeccable taste and your role as the guardian of the group's reputation, ensuring that everything you produce is something to be proud of.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a project deadline is suddenly moved up, what is your immediate internal reaction?

options.text: I get a surge of energy and start rallying the team to make it happen.
I feel a heavy sense of overwhelm and worry we won't do it justice.
I get frustrated by the lack of planning and demand to know why this happened.
I immediately start listing every possible thing that could go wrong with the new timeline.
I roll my eyes at the lack of professionalism and refuse to lower my quality standards.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically contribute during a group brainstorming session?

options.text: I throw out as many wild, exciting ideas as possible to keep the mood high.
I listen deeply and point out the emotional resonance or deeper meaning of the ideas.
I push the group to stop talking and start making decisions so we can move forward.
I play devil's advocate to ensure we aren't walking into a trap or a failure.
I filter out the mediocre or 'cringe' ideas so we only focus on the most sophisticated ones.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for finishing a difficult task?

options.text: The satisfaction of a job well done and the joy of the final result.
The relief of finally being able to process the experience and rest.
The desire to prove I'm the best and to overcome the obstacles in my way.
The need to ensure everything is secure and that no mistakes were left behind.
The drive to maintain my reputation for excellence and high-tier taste.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle a situation where a teammate is underperforming?

options.text: I try to cheer them up and find a way to make their work more fun.
I sit with them and try to understand what personal struggles they are facing.
I confront them directly and tell them they need to pull their weight.
I double-check their work myself because I'm worried it will ruin the project.
I find it hard to hide my annoyance at their lack of standards or effort.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these 'worst-case scenarios' bothers you the most?

options.text: A boring, stagnant environment where nothing exciting ever happens.
A cold, superficial environment where no one truly connects.
An unfair environment where hard work isn't rewarded and people are lazy.
A chaotic environment where there are no rules and everything is a risk.
A tacky, low-quality environment where the work is embarrassing.

topics.display_name: Which Jane Austen Heroine Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Jane Austen Heroine Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Are you a witty observer of society or a romantic dreamer waiting for your Mr. Darcy? From the spirited Elizabeth Bennet to the sensible Elinor Dashwood, Jane Austen's leading ladies represent the many facets of the human heart. Take this quiz to discover which Regency-era heroine truly reflects your personality and values. It is time to find out if you are more of a headstrong Emma or a resilient Anne Elliot!

characters.name: Elizabeth Bennet
characters.short_description: You are a witty, independent thinker who values integrity and intellectual connection above social standing.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a sharp mind and a playful spirit, often using humor to navigate the complexities of social expectations. You pride yourself on your discernment and your refusal to marry for anything less than true affection.
