You are a stoic and noble figure, capable of manipulating matter and energy on a galactic scale, yet you remain deeply introspective and sensitive to the suffering of others. Your strength is matched only by your loneliness, as your role as a cosmic herald often keeps you wandering the stars far from any place you might call home. You seek harmony in a chaotic universe, using your abilities to preserve life and maintain the balance of the cosmos. Your challenge is finding a sense of belonging in a vast, indifferent expanse, even as you wield the power to reshape entire worlds and witness the birth and death of stars.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you see a systemic injustice, what is your primary instinct for addressing it?

options.text: Work within the local community to protect individuals on the ground.
Engineer a large-scale technological or structural solution to fix the root cause.
Act as a moral beacon to inspire others to choose the right path.
Use the sheer force of my will to reshape the situation immediately.
Observe the broader cosmic balance and intervene only where necessary.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process intense emotions or personal stress?

options.text: I internalize the pain and focus on physical discipline to push through it.
I distract myself by staying busy with complex projects and innovation.
I rely on my core values and kindness to remain steady and calm.
My emotions are powerful and often dictate the energy of my environment.
I take a philosophical approach, viewing my feelings as part of a vast, transient universe.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal role within a team?

options.text: The gritty specialist who handles the tasks others are afraid to touch.
The visionary strategist who provides the resources and the plan.
The reliable anchor who keeps everyone united and hopeful.
The wild card whose immense potential can change the tide of any battle.
The detached observer who provides perspective that others might miss.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be the most important use of power?

options.text: Defending those who have no one else to turn to.
Advancing civilization and solving the problems of the future.
Setting an example of restraint and integrity for others to follow.
Protecting the people I love, regardless of the cost to reality.
Maintaining the fundamental harmony of the natural and cosmic order.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you feel about your place in the world around you?

options.text: I am an underdog, constantly fighting to make a difference in the shadows.
I am a leader who is often misunderstood because I am ahead of my time.
I am a guardian who feels a deep responsibility but also a sense of isolation.
I am a force of nature, struggling to balance my internal chaos with the world's needs.
I am a traveler, more connected to the stars and the big picture than any one place.

topics.display_name: Which Dog Breed Matches Your Energy?

synopsis.title: Which Dog Breed Actually Matches Your Inner Energy?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder if your personality is more 'zoomies' or 'nap time'? Whether you are a social butterfly or a loyal homebody, there is a canine counterpart that shares your specific vibe. Take this quiz to discover which breed perfectly mirrors your daily energy levels and lifestyle.

characters.name: Border Collie
characters.short_description: You are a high-octane intellectual who thrives on complex challenges and constant movement.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an intensity that few can match, always looking for the next problem to solve or the next goal to achieve. Your mind never truly rests, and you find the most satisfaction when you are fully engaged in a demanding project that requires both precision and stamina. You are likely the person who organizes the group or finds the most efficient way to complete a task, driven by a deep-seated need for purpose and order. You value competence and efficiency above all else, often pushing yourself to the limit to ensure that every detail is perfect.

However, this relentless drive can sometimes lead to burnout if you do not find a healthy outlet for your mental energy. You might find yourself overthinking small details or becoming restless when things are too quiet for too long. Your strength lies in your unparalleled focus and work ethic, but your primary challenge is learning how to switch off and enjoy the moment without feeling like you are wasting time. When you find balance, your ability to innovate and lead is truly unmatched.

characters.name: Golden Retriever
characters.short_description: You are a warm, dependable optimist who finds joy in building community and supporting those around you.
characters.profile_text:
Your energy is radiant and welcoming, making you the natural glue that holds your social circles together. You approach life with a glass-half-full mentality, always looking for the best in people and situations. Loyalty is your defining trait; once you have committed to a friend or a cause, you are there for the long haul, offering steady encouragement and a listening ear. You thrive in collaborative environments where harmony and kindness are prioritized over competition, and you are often the first to volunteer when someone needs a helping hand.

While your agreeable nature makes you incredibly likable, you may sometimes struggle with setting boundaries or saying no to others. You tend to prioritize the happiness of the group over your own personal needs, which can leave you feeling emotionally drained if you are not careful to recharge. Your greatest asset is your high emotional intelligence and your ability to make everyone feel seen and valued. By creating a legacy of warmth and trust, you ensure that you are never truly alone in your journey through life.

characters.name: Beagle
characters.short_description: You are a curious explorer with a keen sense of adventure and a stubborn streak that keeps life interesting.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by your senses and a desire to uncover the unknown, often following your latest interest wherever it leads you. You have a playful, merry disposition that draws people in, but you also possess a surprising amount of determination. When you set your sights on a particular goal or mystery, you can be incredibly single-minded, sometimes ignoring the practicalities of the world around you in favor of the chase. You enjoy the thrill of discovery and are rarely content staying in one place for too long without a new project to investigate.

Your independent spirit is one of your best qualities, though it can occasionally manifest as a refusal to follow the rules if they do not make sense to your internal logic. You are happiest when you have the freedom to roam and discover new things at your own pace. While you are a social creature who enjoys the company of a pack, you never lose that unique, slightly mischievous spark that makes you stand out in a crowd. Your life is a series of adventures, and you wouldn't have it any other way.

characters.name: Cavalier King Charles Spaniel
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, affectionate soul who values deep emotional connections and the comforts of a peaceful home.
characters.profile_text:
Your energy is soft and soothing, making you a natural source of comfort for those in your life. You prefer intimate gatherings over loud parties and find your greatest fulfillment in one-on-one conversations where you can truly connect with someone’s heart. You have an innate grace and a polite, accommodating manner that makes you easy to be around, and you often act as a calming influence during times of stress or conflict. You appreciate the finer things in life, from a cozy environment to the beauty of a well-tended garden.

Because you are so sensitive to the emotions of others, you might find yourself avoiding confrontation at all costs, even when it is necessary. You thrive on affection and validation, which means you can feel quite lonely if you are not receiving the same level of care and attention you give out to the world. Your strength is your immense capacity for empathy and your ability to create a sanctuary of peace for yourself and your loved ones. You remind everyone you meet of the importance of tenderness and the power of a kind word.

characters.name: Bulldog
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast, laid-back individual who values reliability and the simple pleasures of a relaxed lifestyle.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a quiet strength and a slow and steady approach to life that allows you to weather any storm with composure. You are not one to be rushed or pressured into things that do not feel right; instead, you move at your own pace, prioritizing comfort and stability above all else. People know they can count on you because you are incredibly consistent and grounded, offering a sense of security to those who might be more flighty or anxious. You have a dry sense of humor and a no-nonsense attitude that keeps you focused on what truly matters.

While your stubbornness can be a hurdle when change is necessary, it also means you are incredibly resilient and difficult to discourage once you have made up your mind. You enjoy your routines and find deep satisfaction in the familiar, whether it is a favorite meal or a quiet evening at home. Your challenge is to occasionally step out of your comfort zone to experience new things, but your gift is the ability to find total contentment exactly where you are, without needing constant external stimulation.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a brand-new, complex project or hobby?

options.text: I dive in headfirst, researching every detail to master it as quickly as possible.
I look for ways to involve my friends so we can enjoy the process together.
I follow my curiosity wherever it leads, even if I get sidetracked by something new.
I take it slow, focusing on how the activity makes me feel rather than the end result.
I stick to what I know works and only change my routine if it's absolutely necessary.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal way to spend a Saturday afternoon when you have no obligations?

options.text: Engaging in a high-energy activity or solving a difficult puzzle.
Hosting a casual get-together or helping a neighbor with a task.
Exploring a new neighborhood or trail I've never visited before.
Curling up in a comfortable spot with a good book or a close confidant.
Napping or relaxing in my favorite chair with zero distractions.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you usually react when your carefully planned schedule gets interrupted?

options.text: I immediately start reorganizing and optimizing to get back on track.
I stay positive and try to make the best of the new situation for everyone.
I see it as an unexpected adventure and follow the new path to see where it goes.
I feel a bit sensitive to the disruption and seek a quiet moment to recalibrate.
I simply shrug it off and continue at my own pace; I don't let it ruffle me.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do your friends value most in you?

options.text: My sharp intelligence and tireless work ethic.
My unwavering kindness and ability to bring people together.
My independent spirit and sense of fun.
My gentle empathy and talent for providing emotional comfort.
My steady reliability and no-nonsense perspective.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when you are working toward a goal?

options.text: The thrill of achieving peak performance and total competence.
The satisfaction of knowing I've supported my community or team.
The excitement of discovering something new along the way.
The desire to create a harmonious and peaceful environment.
The security of maintaining a stable and comfortable lifestyle.

topics.display_name: Which Classic Cocktail Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Classic Cocktail Are You?
synopsis.summary: Your drink order says more about your personality than your zodiac sign ever could. Whether you are a sophisticated night owl or the life of the party, there is a legendary libation that matches your vibe. Shake things up and discover which timeless cocktail truly represents your soul.

characters.name: Old Fashioned
characters.short_description: You are a timeless traditionalist who values substance, patience, and the beauty of a well-crafted foundation.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who appreciates the finer details and understands that the best things in life often require a bit of time and a steady hand. Like this iconic drink, you aren't interested in fleeting trends or flashy gimmicks; instead, you focus on quality and consistency. You possess a quiet confidence that draws people in, offering a sense of reliability and wisdom that makes you the anchor in any social circle. Your strengths lie in your ability to remain composed under pressure and your deep respect for heritage and history. However, your commitment to tradition can sometimes be mistaken for stubbornness. You might find it difficult to adapt to rapid changes or embrace new ideas that haven't been tested by time. While your grounded nature is a virtue, remember that a little flexibility can go a long way in keeping your perspective fresh. You thrive in intimate settings where deep conversation is the main event, preferring a leather armchair and a meaningful dialogue over a crowded, noisy room.

characters.name: Martini
characters.short_description: You embody a sharp, sophisticated elegance and a preference for clarity and precision in all aspects of life.
characters.profile_text: You embody the definition of poise and refinement, moving through the world with a calculated grace that others find both intimidating and admirable. You have a keen eye for detail and a low tolerance for fluff or unnecessary complications. Whether you prefer things dirty or with a twist, you know exactly what you want and aren't afraid to ask for it. Your directness is your greatest strength, allowing you to cut through the noise and get straight to the heart of any matter. This high standard of excellence can sometimes make you appear aloof or overly critical to those who don't know you well. You expect a lot from yourself and even more from others, which can lead to frustration when things don't meet your exacting specifications. To find balance, try to embrace the occasional messiness of life. Your sharp wit and discerning taste make you a natural leader, but learning to soften your edges will help you connect more deeply with those who value your brilliance but fear your judgment.

characters.name: Margarita
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, energetic soul who brings a perfect balance of zest and sweetness to every gathering.
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, radiating a sunny disposition that is both refreshing and infectious. You have a natural talent for turning a mundane Tuesday into a celebration, and people are drawn to your adventurous spirit and salt-of-the-earth authenticity. You balance a sharp, tangy wit with a genuine warmth, making you approachable yet endlessly entertaining. You aren't afraid to get your hands a little dirty or take a risk if it means having a good time or making a lasting memory. Because you are so focused on the present moment and keeping the energy high, you might sometimes struggle with long-term planning or serious introspection. Your desire to keep things light can occasionally lead you to avoid difficult conversations or gloss over complex emotions. While your spontaneity is a gift, don't forget that even the brightest sun needs a little shade. By grounding your exuberant energy with occasional moments of stillness, you ensure that your zest for life remains sustainable and deeply fulfilling for years to come.

characters.name: Mojito
characters.short_description: You are a refreshing and adaptable individual who thrives in social environments and values a clean, natural approach to life.
characters.profile_text: You possess a cool, calm demeanor that makes you incredibly easy to be around, much like a breeze on a humid afternoon. You value simplicity and natural beauty, often preferring the organic and the authentic over anything synthetic or forced. Your personality is a blend of sweetness and sharp insight, allowing you to navigate various social circles with ease. You are a great listener and a supportive friend, always ready to provide a fresh perspective when someone feels stuck or overwhelmed. Your laid-back nature is a major asset, but it can sometimes lead to a lack of urgency or a tendency to drift with the current rather than steering your own ship. You might find yourself avoiding conflict to maintain the peace, which can result in your own needs being overlooked. Embracing a bit more assertiveness will help you protect your boundaries while maintaining your signature chill. You are at your best when you are surrounded by greenery and good company, where you can let your natural charm shine without any pressure to perform.

characters.name: Manhattan
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated urbanite with a complex inner world and a penchant for the bold and the bittersweet.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of depth and complexity, possessing a rich inner life that isn't always apparent at first glance. Like the city you're named after, you are multifaceted, blending a certain toughness with a hidden sweetness that only those close to you get to see. You appreciate the finer things in life but have a realistic, sometimes cynical, outlook that keeps you grounded. Your strengths include your intellectual curiosity and your ability to handle complex situations with a level of maturity that others often lack. The pitfall of your personality is a tendency toward moodiness or overthinking. You can get caught up in the bittersweet aspects of life, dwelling on what could have been rather than what is. This introspective nature is what makes you so compelling, but it can also lead to social withdrawal if you aren't careful. You thrive in environments that challenge you mentally and emotionally. By learning to balance your serious side with a bit of playfulness, you can share your profound insights with the world without feeling drained by the weight of your own thoughts.

characters.name: Cosmopolitan
characters.short_description: You are a stylish, modern trendsetter who values social connection, aesthetics, and a touch of playful glamour.
characters.profile_text: You have a natural flair for the dramatic and a keen sense of what is current and fashionable. You are highly social and thrive in environments where you can see and be seen, often acting as the social glue that holds your friend group together. Your personality is bright, tart, and undeniably fun, making you a favorite guest at any event. You have a talent for curation, whether it's your wardrobe, your home, or your social media feed, and you take pride in presenting a polished version of yourself to the world. However, your focus on appearances and social standing can sometimes leave you feeling a bit hollow or disconnected from your deeper self. You might worry too much about what others think or feel pressured to maintain a certain image even when you're struggling. It is important for you to remember that your value isn't tied to your popularity or your aesthetic. When you allow yourself to be vulnerable and step away from the spotlight, you'll find that your true friends appreciate your heart just as much as your style.

baseline_questions.question_text: When choosing a setting for a night out, which atmosphere feels most like home to you?

options.text: A quiet, historic lounge with leather chairs and low lighting.
A sleek, minimalist space that feels sharp and exclusive.
A vibrant, high-energy spot where the music is loud and the crowd is lively.
A breezy, open-air garden or a relaxed patio surrounded by greenery.
A moody, urban hideaway that feels intellectual and slightly mysterious.
A trendy, glamorous venue where everyone is dressed to impress.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new and complex challenge at work or in life?

options.text: I rely on time-tested methods and a steady, patient hand.
I cut through the fluff and address the core issue with total precision.
I dive in with enthusiasm and figure out the details as I go.
I stay flexible and look for the most natural, stress-free path forward.
I spend time reflecting on the deeper implications and hidden layers.
I focus on how the solution will look and how it affects the group dynamic.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you consider your greatest personal strength?

options.text: Reliability: People know they can always count on my consistency.
Poise: I remain composed and direct even in high-pressure situations.
Zest: I have a natural ability to bring energy and fun to any situation.
Adaptability: I am easy-going and can get along with almost anyone.
Depth: I possess a rich inner life and a mature, thoughtful perspective.
Style: I have a keen eye for aesthetics and social connection.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred style of communication when interacting with others?

options.text: Measured and traditional; I value meaningful, one-on-one dialogue.
Sharp and efficient; I prefer clarity and have little patience for small talk.
Warm and expressive; I love to share stories and keep things lighthearted.
Calm and supportive; I am usually the one listening and providing a fresh take.
Intellectual and bittersweet; I enjoy discussing the complexities of life.
Bright and social; I enjoy being the glue that holds the conversation together.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle a situation where things aren't going exactly according to plan?

options.text: I stay grounded in my values and wait for the storm to pass.
I become critical and work quickly to bring things back to my standards.
I laugh it off and find a way to turn the mishap into a fun memory.
I drift with the current and try to avoid any unnecessary conflict.
I retreat inward to process my thoughts and analyze what went wrong.
I focus on maintaining appearances and managing the social fallout.

topics.display_name: D&D Character Class

synopsis.title: Which D&D Class Matches Your Real-Life Personality?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your natural charisma makes you a Bard or if your gym routine screams Barbarian? Whether you are a strategic mastermind or a chaotic free spirit, there is a classic Dungeons & Dragons class that perfectly captures your essence. Take this quiz to discover which legendary role you would play in an epic fantasy adventure!

characters.name: Bard
characters.short_description: You are a versatile performer and spellcaster who uses the power of music and words to inspire allies and manipulate the world around you.
characters.profile_text:
You thrive in the spotlight, weaving magic through song, oratory, or dance to bolster your friends and confound your enemies. Your greatest strength lies in your adaptability; you are a jack-of-all-trades who can heal, fight, or charm your way through any situation. You likely value social interaction and creative expression above all else, often serving as the face of your party during tense negotiations or grand celebrations. You have a knack for finding the right word at the right time, turning the tide of a conflict with a witty insult or a stirring melody.

However, your desire for attention can sometimes lead you into trouble, and your reliance on versatility might mean you lack the raw power of more specialized classes. You must balance your flair for the dramatic with the practical needs of the moment to avoid being seen as a mere distraction. When you find that harmony, you become the glue that holds a group together, ensuring that every victory is accompanied by a legendary tale that will be told for generations.

characters.name: Barbarian
characters.short_description: You are a primal warrior who harnesses raw, unbridled fury to shrug off damage and devastate foes in close-quarters combat.
characters.profile_text:
You rely on your instincts and physical prowess rather than complex tactics or heavy armor. When the heat of battle rises, you tap into a deep well of rage that grants you incredible resilience and strength, allowing you to endure blows that would fell a lesser person. You prefer the direct approach, meeting challenges head-on with a ferocity that strikes fear into the hearts of your enemies. Your connection to your primal nature gives you a heightened sense of awareness, making you a formidable tracker and survivor in the wild.

While your combat effectiveness is unmatched, your impulsive nature and reliance on emotion can lead to reckless decisions. You might struggle in situations that require subtlety, diplomacy, or long-term planning, as your first instinct is often to smash through obstacles rather than navigate around them. Despite this, your loyalty to your companions is unshakable, and you serve as a living shield, willing to take any hit to protect those you call kin. You are the storm that breaks the enemy line, a force of nature that cannot be ignored.

characters.name: Fighter
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined master of martial combat, proficient with every weapon and armor type to excel on the front lines of any engagement.
characters.profile_text:
You represent the pinnacle of physical training and tactical expertise, viewing the battlefield as a chess match where every move counts. Whether you favor a heavy shield and sword or a long-range bow, your reliability and stamina make you the backbone of any adventuring party. You value consistency and hard work, believing that a sharp blade and a steady hand are more dependable than fickle magic or fleeting emotions. Your ability to push past your physical limits allows you to strike more often and harder than any other warrior.

Your focus on martial prowess can sometimes make you appear rigid or overly pragmatic to others who prefer more creative solutions. You might find yourself at a disadvantage when faced with purely supernatural threats that cannot be solved by steel alone, requiring you to rely on your teammates for magical support. Nevertheless, your ability to adapt your fighting style to any opponent ensures that you are never truly outmatched. You are the professional soldier, the one who stays standing when everyone else has fallen, providing the stability your team needs to survive.

characters.name: Rogue
characters.short_description: You are a cunning specialist who relies on stealth, precision, and a diverse set of skills to overcome obstacles and strike from the shadows.
characters.profile_text:
You operate best where others cannot see you, using your agility and wit to navigate dangerous environments and bypass security. In combat, you don't trade blows; instead, you wait for the perfect opening to deliver a single, devastating strike to a vulnerable spot. You likely have a penchant for problem-solving and a keen eye for detail, making you invaluable for disarming traps, picking locks, or uncovering hidden secrets. Your resourcefulness allows you to turn even the most dire situation to your advantage through cleverness and quick fingers.

Your independent streak and tendency toward secrecy can sometimes create friction with your allies, as they may find it difficult to fully trust someone who thrives in the dark. You are also physically more fragile than your armored companions, meaning a single mistake in positioning or a failed stealth check can be fatal. By mastering the art of the unseen, you ensure that you are always one step ahead of your rivals. You are the ghost in the machine, the silent blade that ends a threat before it even realizes you are there.

characters.name: Wizard
characters.short_description: You are a scholarly magic-user who commands the fundamental forces of the multiverse through rigorous study and an expansive spellbook.
characters.profile_text:
You believe that knowledge is the ultimate power, spending your life deciphering ancient scrolls and mastering complex arcane formulas. Your versatility is unmatched because you can prepare for almost any eventuality, provided you have the time to study and the resources to expand your library. From conjuring fireballs to warping the very fabric of reality, your spells allow you to solve problems that others find impossible, making you the ultimate strategist of the group. You approach every challenge with an analytical mind, looking for the most efficient magical solution.

This intellectual focus often comes at the cost of physical durability, leaving you vulnerable if an enemy manages to close the distance. You may also struggle with a sense of superiority or become so engrossed in your research that you lose touch with the practical world. However, your foresight and preparation are what keep your party alive in the face of cosmic horrors. For you, there is no mystery that cannot be solved with the right incantation and a bit of focus. You are the master of the arcane, turning the impossible into the inevitable.

characters.name: Cleric
characters.short_description: You are a devoted servant of a higher power, wielding divine magic to heal the wounded, protect the innocent, and smite the unholy.
characters.profile_text:
You act as the bridge between the mortal realm and the divine, drawing strength from your faith to perform miracles on the battlefield. While you are a capable warrior in your own right, your true calling is the preservation of your allies and the enforcement of your deity's will. You are often the moral compass of your group, providing guidance and spiritual support during the darkest hours of your journey. Your magic is not just a tool, but an expression of your devotion, capable of mending flesh or calling down celestial wrath.

Your deep convictions can sometimes lead to dogmatism or conflict with those who do not share your beliefs or your code of ethics. You may feel a heavy burden of responsibility, as the lives of your companions often rest directly in your hands, and failing them can feel like failing your god. Despite these pressures, your connection to the divine provides you with a sense of purpose that others lack. Whether you are mending a broken bone or standing as a bulwark against the undead, you are a beacon of hope in a world filled with shadows.

topics.display_name: Pokémon Elemental Type

synopsis.title: Which Pokémon Elemental Type Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your personality burns bright like a Fire-type or flows with the calm of a Water-type? This quiz dives deep into your daily habits and battle strategies to uncover your true elemental affinity. Discover which of the core Pokémon types defines your spirit and how you would fare in the tall grass!

characters.name: Fire
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and high-energy individual who burns brightly in everything you do.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an intense inner drive that propels you forward, often making you the most energetic person in the room. Like the flames you represent, you are warm and inviting to those you care about, but you can become volatile if your boundaries are crossed. You thrive in competitive environments where your ambition can shine, and you aren't afraid to take risks to achieve your goals. Your presence is impossible to ignore, and you often inspire others to find their own spark through your sheer enthusiasm.

However, your impulsive nature can sometimes lead to burnout if you don't manage your resources carefully. You tend to act on instinct, which makes you a formidable force in a crisis but can lead to friction in collaborative settings where patience is required. You might struggle with a short temper or a tendency to rush into situations without a plan. Learning to temper your heat with a bit of cool-headed logic will help you maintain your momentum without scorching those around you.

characters.name: Water
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and adaptable soul who flows effortlessly through life's many challenges.
characters.profile_text:
You have a remarkable ability to adjust to any situation, much like water taking the shape of its container. Whether you are calm and serene like a still pond or powerful and relentless like a crashing wave, your emotional depth is your greatest strength. You value harmony and often act as a mediator in your social circles, using your intuition to navigate complex interpersonal dynamics. Your strength is not always loud, but it is persistent and capable of wearing down even the toughest obstacles over time.

While your flexibility is an asset, you may occasionally struggle with a lack of direction, drifting wherever the current takes you rather than forging your own path. You are deeply empathetic, which can leave you feeling drained if you absorb too much of the negativity around you. You might find it difficult to make firm decisions when you see the validity in every perspective. By finding a balance between your gentle nature and your hidden strength, you can become an unstoppable force of nature.

characters.name: Grass
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and nurturing spirit who finds strength in patience and steady growth.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a deep connection to the world around you and a natural ability to foster growth in both yourself and others. Like a resilient plant, you are patient and willing to wait for the right moment to bloom, understanding that the best things in life take time to cultivate. You are often seen as the anchor in your group, providing stability and a sense of calm even when things get chaotic. Your approach to life is holistic, and you prefer sustainable progress over quick, temporary fixes.

Your preference for the status quo can sometimes manifest as a resistance to change, making it difficult for you to adapt when life demands a sudden shift. You might find yourself being too selfless, giving away your energy until you are wilted and tired. Because you are so rooted in your ways, you may miss out on exciting opportunities that require a leap of faith. Remembering to prioritize your own needs and occasionally stepping out of your comfort zone will ensure that you continue to thrive in any environment.

characters.name: Electric
characters.short_description: You are a quick-witted and charismatic spark who brings instant excitement to any situation.
characters.profile_text:
You move through life at a high frequency, always looking for the next big thrill or intellectual challenge. Your mind works faster than most, allowing you to come up with innovative solutions and witty remarks in the blink of an eye. People are naturally drawn to your magnetic personality, and you have a knack for energizing a crowd just by walking into the room. You are a trendsetter who isn't afraid to be different, often leading the charge into new and unexplored territories.

Because you are always on, you may find it difficult to slow down and focus on long-term projects that require sustained effort. Your high energy can sometimes come across as nervous or erratic if you don't have a productive outlet for your internal charge. You might struggle with boredom easily, leading you to abandon tasks before they are fully finished. Learning to ground yourself and channel your brilliance into specific, actionable goals will prevent you from short-circuiting when the pressure mounts.

characters.name: Normal
characters.short_description: You are a reliable and well-rounded individual who prides yourself on your incredible versatility.
characters.profile_text:
You are the ultimate generalist, capable of fitting into almost any role or social group with ease. While some might see your nature as simple, your true strength lies in your lack of glaring weaknesses and your ability to learn a wide variety of skills. You are practical, down-to-earth, and dependable, making you the person everyone turns to when they need a job done right without any unnecessary drama. You find beauty in the everyday and possess a quiet confidence that doesn't need constant validation.

Your desire for stability and your middle-of-the-road approach can sometimes make you feel like you lack a distinct identity or a specialty. You might shy away from the spotlight, preferring to support others from the background rather than taking the lead, which can lead to your contributions being overlooked. You may also struggle with a lack of ambition, feeling content to stay where you are even when you have the potential for more. Embracing your unique blend of talents and realizing that being dependable is a rare and valuable trait will help you find your true purpose.

characters.name: Fighting
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined and courageous warrior who believes in the power of hard work and integrity.
characters.profile_text:
You live by a strict personal code and possess an unwavering sense of justice that guides your every action. You aren't afraid of a challenge; in fact, you seek out obstacles as a way to test your limits and improve your character. Your physical or mental stamina is impressive, and you have a natural talent for leadership because others respect your dedication and your never-give-up attitude. You believe that anything is possible through training and perseverance, and you hold yourself to the highest standards.

However, your focus on direct action can sometimes lead you to overlook more subtle or diplomatic solutions to problems. You may be prone to stubbornness, viewing any compromise as a sign of weakness rather than a strategic move. Your intense focus on self-improvement can also make you overly critical of yourself and others when expectations aren't met. By learning to incorporate a bit of flexibility into your rigid discipline, you will become a more effective and well-rounded leader who can handle any type of conflict with grace.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a sudden, unexpected obstacle in your path, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I tackle it with immediate, burning intensity and drive.
I adjust my approach and flow around it smoothly.
I patiently wait for the right moment to act or for it to resolve.
I look for a clever shortcut or an unconventional solution.
I apply a tried-and-true, practical method I've used before.
I confront it head-on with discipline and raw determination.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward when working in a group setting?

options.text: The passionate motivator who pushes the team to excel.
The empathetic mediator who ensures everyone is heard.
The steady anchor who keeps the project grounded.
The creative spark who generates high-energy ideas.
The versatile helper who can fill any role needed.
The principled leader who sets high standards for work.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of environment allows you to be your most productive self?

options.text: A high-stakes, competitive arena where I can shine.
A calm, serene space that allows for deep reflection.
A quiet, natural setting that feels stable and alive.
A fast-paced, stimulating hub filled with new technology.
A simple, functional workspace without distractions.
A structured environment that challenges my limits.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically manage long-term goals or large projects?

options.text: I work in intense bursts of energy followed by periods of rest.
I let the project evolve naturally, adapting to changes as they come.
I focus on steady, incremental growth and long-term sustainability.
I execute tasks rapidly and move on to the next exciting thing.
I maintain a consistent, practical effort until the job is done.
I follow a rigorous, disciplined schedule with total focus.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My inner fire and ambition to succeed.
My emotional depth and ability to adapt.
My patience and ability to nurture others.
My quick wit and magnetic personality.
My reliability and well-rounded skill set.
My integrity and unwavering sense of justice.

topics.display_name: Enneagram Personality Type

synopsis.title: What Is Your True Enneagram Personality Type?
synopsis.summary: Discover the core motivations and internal fears that drive your daily behavior through the lens of the Enneagram system. This factual assessment categorizes personality into nine distinct types, each offering unique insights into your emotional intelligence and interpersonal relationships. By identifying your primary type, you can unlock a deeper understanding of your personal growth path and communication style.

characters.name: The Reformer
characters.short_description: You are a principled and purposeful individual driven by a strong sense of right and wrong and a desire for integrity.
characters.profile_text: You possess a powerful internal compass that guides you toward improvement and excellence in all aspects of life. Your commitment to high standards often makes you a reliable and ethical leader who strives to live according to your ideals. You are naturally organized and detail-oriented, finding satisfaction in bringing order to chaos and ensuring that every task is completed with precision. However, your pursuit of perfection can lead to a critical inner voice that judges both yourself and others harshly. You may struggle with repressed anger or resentment when things do not meet your expectations, leading to rigidity or a "black and white" worldview. Learning to balance your drive for improvement with self-compassion and acceptance of imperfection is key to your personal growth.

characters.name: The Helper
characters.short_description: You are a generous and demonstrative person who focuses on building deep connections and meeting the needs of others.
characters.profile_text: Your warmth and empathy make you a natural caregiver who thrives on being helpful and appreciated by those around you. You have an uncanny ability to sense the emotional needs of others, often putting their desires ahead of your own to ensure harmony and support. This selfless nature allows you to build strong, lasting relationships and create a sense of belonging wherever you go. On the downside, your desire to be needed can sometimes manifest as people-pleasing or intrusive behavior. You might neglect your own physical and emotional well-being while seeking validation through your service to others. If you feel unappreciated, you may experience feelings of martyrdom or resentment. Developing healthy boundaries and learning to acknowledge your own needs is essential for maintaining your emotional balance.

characters.name: The Achiever
characters.short_description: You are a success-oriented and pragmatic individual who is highly motivated by goals, efficiency, and personal accomplishment.
characters.profile_text: You are exceptionally driven and adaptable, possessing a remarkable ability to focus on your objectives and achieve significant results. Your charisma and confidence often inspire others, and you are skilled at presenting the best version of yourself to the world. You value productivity and are constantly seeking ways to improve your skills and status, making you a high-performer in professional and social environments. Despite your many successes, you may struggle with a tendency to tie your self-worth entirely to your achievements. This can lead to workaholism and a fear of failure that prevents you from showing vulnerability or authenticity. You might find yourself "performing" for others rather than connecting with your true feelings. Finding value in who you are, rather than just what you do, will help you find deeper satisfaction.

characters.name: The Individualist
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive and introspective person who seeks to express your unique identity and find profound meaning in your experiences.
characters.profile_text: You possess a rich inner world and a deep appreciation for beauty, authenticity, and emotional depth. You are often drawn to creative pursuits and are not afraid to explore the more complex or melancholy aspects of the human condition. Your desire to be unique and understood drives you to seek out experiences that feel significant and personal, often making you a highly intuitive and empathetic friend. However, your focus on what is missing in your life can lead to feelings of envy or a sense of being fundamentally flawed. You may retreat into your imagination or become overly self-absorbed when faced with the mundane realities of daily life. This emotional intensity can result in mood swings or a feeling of alienation from others. Embracing the present moment and finding beauty in the ordinary can help ground your creative spirit.

characters.name: The Investigator
characters.short_description: You are an intense and cerebral individual who values knowledge, competence, and independence above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are a keen observer of the world, driven by a need to understand how things work and to master complex systems of thought. Your independence is a core part of your identity, and you often prefer to work alone where you can focus deeply without distraction. You are highly analytical and objective, providing valuable insights and innovative solutions to difficult problems. Your preference for privacy and intellectual pursuits can sometimes lead to social isolation or emotional detachment. You may feel overwhelmed by the demands of others, causing you to withdraw into your thoughts to conserve your energy. This tendency to over-intellectualize can make it difficult for you to connect with your own emotions or the feelings of those around you. Learning to share your internal world and engage more fully with the physical environment will enhance your well-being.

characters.name: The Loyalist
characters.short_description: You are a committed and security-oriented person who values stability, loyalty, and the support of trusted communities.
characters.profile_text: You are a reliable and hardworking individual who excels at identifying potential risks and preparing for future challenges. Your loyalty to your friends, family, and beliefs is unwavering, and you often serve as the "glue" that holds groups together through your dedication and sense of duty. You value structure and clear expectations, finding comfort in knowing where you stand and who you can trust. Despite your strength and reliability, you are often plagued by anxiety and self-doubt. You may spend a significant amount of time worrying about "worst-case scenarios" and seeking external reassurance to calm your fears. This can lead to indecisiveness or a tendency to become overly cautious and suspicious of change. Building self-confidence and learning to trust your own inner guidance will help you navigate life's uncertainties with greater ease.

baseline_questions.question_text: When starting a new project or task, what is your primary focus?

options.text: Ensuring every detail is correct and meets high ethical standards.
Supporting the people involved and making sure everyone feels appreciated.
Maximizing efficiency and productivity to achieve a successful outcome.
Ensuring the work is a unique and authentic expression of my vision.
Gathering all necessary information to fully understand the mechanics of the task.
Identifying potential risks and securing the support needed to succeed.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically interact with others in a group setting?

options.text: I am principled and serious, often pointing out how things can be improved.
I am warm and demonstrative, focusing on building deep personal connections.
I am charismatic and adaptable, often taking the lead to drive results.
I am introspective and sensitive, seeking meaningful and profound interactions.
I am private and objective, preferring to observe and analyze from the sidelines.
I am cooperative and cautious, looking for stability and group consensus.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your internal response to stress or pressure?

options.text: I become increasingly critical and rigid about following the right procedures.
I become overly focused on being helpful to ensure others don't leave me.
I push my feelings aside and work harder to maintain my image of success.
I withdraw into my own world to process my intense and complex emotions.
I retreat into my thoughts to conserve energy and avoid emotional demands.
I become anxious and start worrying about various worst-case scenarios.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in your personal and professional life?

options.text: Integrity, order, and the pursuit of perfection.
Generosity, empathy, and being needed by others.
Achievement, competence, and personal status.
Authenticity, creativity, and emotional depth.
Knowledge, independence, and intellectual mastery.
Security, loyalty, and reliable support systems.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these fears resonates most with you?

options.text: The fear of being wrong, defective, or corrupt.
The fear of being unwanted or unworthy of being loved.
The fear of being worthless or failing to achieve my goals.
The fear of being ordinary or having no significant identity.
The fear of being helpless, useless, or incapable.
The fear of being without support or guidance in an uncertain world.

topics.display_name: Internet 'Core' Aesthetic

synopsis.title: Which Internet 'Core' Aesthetic Actually Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Are you more of a moss-covered forest dweller or a neon-soaked digital nomad? The internet has carved out hyper-specific niches for every mood, and it's time to find out where you truly belong. Take this vibe check to see which aesthetic character defines your digital presence.

characters.name: The Cottagecore Dreamer
characters.short_description: You find solace in the simplicity of rural life, surrounded by wildflowers, vintage linens, and the scent of freshly baked bread.
characters.profile_text: You are a soul rooted in the romanticism of the past, often found tending to a small garden or sketching in a sun-drenched meadow. Your life is a collection of soft textures and slow moments, where the ticking of a grandfather clock is the only rhythm you need. You value sustainability and the handmade, finding deep fulfillment in crafts like embroidery or herbalism that connect you to the earth. While your gentle nature makes you a comforting presence, you may struggle with the demands of the modern, fast-paced world. Your tendency to retreat into a pastoral fantasy can lead to avoidance of practical responsibilities or social isolation. However, your ability to find beauty in the mundane is a rare gift, allowing you to cultivate a sanctuary of peace for yourself and those you love.

characters.name: The Cyberpunk Nomad
characters.short_description: You navigate the neon-lit fringes of a high-tech society, blending digital mastery with a gritty, rebellious spirit.
characters.profile_text: You thrive in the intersections of technology and urban decay, always one step ahead of the system with your modified gear and sharp wit. Your aesthetic is defined by sleek hardware, glowing accents, and a wardrobe built for utility in a rain-slicked city. You are a natural problem-solver who views the world through a lens of data and disruption, valuing autonomy above all else. Your independence is your greatest strength, yet it often manifests as a deep-seated cynicism or a refusal to trust others. You might find yourself constantly on the move, physically or digitally, to avoid being pinned down by authority or emotional attachments. Despite this cold exterior, your drive to expose the truth and survive against the odds makes you a formidable force in any digital frontier.

characters.name: The Dark Academia Scholar
characters.short_description: You are a seeker of hidden knowledge, devoted to the pursuit of literature, history, and the melancholic beauty of ancient libraries.
characters.profile_text: You are most at home among leather-bound books and the hushed whispers of a university archive, driven by an insatiable curiosity for the classics. Your style is timeless and sophisticated, favoring tweed blazers, ink-stained fingers, and the dramatic flair of a tragic protagonist. You possess a sharp intellect and a passion for the arts that often borders on obsession, leading you to spend late nights unraveling mysteries or debating philosophy. This intense focus on the intellectual can sometimes alienate you from the present moment, causing you to neglect your physical well-being or social connections. You may romanticize the darker aspects of life, finding a strange comfort in tragedy and the passage of time. Nevertheless, your dedication to learning and your appreciation for the profound ensure that your life is never shallow or without meaning.

characters.name: The Vaporwave Aesthete
characters.short_description: You exist in a nostalgic dreamscape of pastel gradients, retro-tech, and the surreal echoes of 1980s consumer culture.
characters.profile_text: You are a curator of moods, blending the glitchy remnants of the early internet with a longing for a future that never quite arrived. Your world is one of marble statues, palm trees, and the soft glow of a CRT monitor, where irony and sincerity blur into a single, hazy experience. You have a keen eye for visual harmony and a talent for finding beauty in the discarded artifacts of late-stage capitalism. While your creative vision is unparalleled, you may find it difficult to ground yourself in reality, often feeling like a spectator in your own life. The detachment you use to process the world can sometimes feel like emptiness or a lack of genuine direction. Yet, your ability to transform the mundane into a surreal masterpiece allows you to navigate the complexities of modern life with a unique, stylized grace.

characters.name: The Goblincore Forager
characters.short_description: You find magic in the overlooked and the messy, celebrating the beauty of moss, mushrooms, and shiny trinkets found in the dirt.
characters.profile_text: You are a creature of the woods and the wetlands, unbothered by mud on your boots or tangles in your hair. Your pockets are always full of treasures—smooth stones, snail shells, or interesting twigs—that others might dismiss as clutter. You possess a playful, earthy spirit and a deep respect for the cycles of decay and growth that define the natural world. Your rejection of traditional beauty standards is liberating, but it can occasionally lead to a lack of organization or a disregard for social conventions that others find important. You might struggle with the expectations of a polished, professional environment, feeling stifled by rigid structures. However, your authenticity and your ability to find joy in the smallest, grittiest details of life make you a refreshing and grounded individual.

characters.name: The E-Kid Trendsetter
characters.short_description: You are a digital native who masters the art of self-expression through bold fashion, internet subcultures, and a high-energy online presence.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of the aesthetic pivot, constantly evolving your look with dyed hair, layered chains, and striking makeup that commands attention on any screen. Your life is lived at the speed of a social media feed, and you have an intuitive grasp of how to craft a persona that resonates with a global audience. You are creative, tech-savvy, and unafraid to experiment with the boundaries of identity and style. The pressure to remain relevant and the constant gaze of the internet can sometimes lead to burnout or a sense of performative exhaustion. You may find it challenging to separate your true self from the curated version you present to the world. Despite these pressures, your boldness and your ability to build community in digital spaces make you a pioneer of modern self-expression and a voice for a new generation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment feels most like a sanctuary to you?

options.text: A sun-drenched meadow filled with wildflowers.
A rain-slicked city street lit by flickering neon.
A quiet, high-ceilinged library smelling of old paper.
A surreal, empty shopping mall bathed in pastel light.
A damp forest floor covered in thick, green moss.
A high-energy room glowing with custom LED setups.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically relate to the digital world and technology?

options.text: I prefer the tactile world of physical crafts and nature.
It is a tool for survival and staying ahead of the system.
I use it as a gateway to access hidden archives and history.
I appreciate it for its nostalgic glitches and retro aesthetics.
I mostly ignore it in favor of foraging and the outdoors.
It is my primary stage for self-expression and community.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were to show someone your most prized collection, what would it contain?

options.text: Handmade linens, dried herbs, and vintage tea sets.
Encrypted drives, modified hardware, and sleek gadgets.
Leather-bound books, inkwells, and classical records.
VHS tapes, old-school gaming consoles, and marble busts.
Smooth stones, snail shells, and interesting twigs.
Bold streetwear, colorful hair dyes, and layered chains.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary motivation behind your daily choices and lifestyle?

options.text: Cultivating a slow, peaceful, and sustainable life.
Maintaining my independence in a high-tech society.
The relentless pursuit of knowledge and artistic depth.
Exploring the hazy intersection of memory and irony.
Finding magic and joy in the messy details of nature.
Staying ahead of trends and mastering digital identity.

baseline_questions.question_text: How would you describe your typical social presence or 'vibe' in a group?

options.text: A gentle and nurturing soul who values quiet comfort.
A sharp-witted and guarded individual who values autonomy.
A sophisticated intellectual who romanticizes the classics.
A detached and dreamy observer of modern culture.
A playful and earthy spirit who ignores social norms.
A bold and experimental trendsetter who commands attention.

topics.display_name: Genshin Impact Vision

synopsis.title: Which Genshin Impact Vision Matches Your True Team Role?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered which elemental power the gods of Teyvat would bestow upon you based on your personality? Whether you are the backbone of the group or the one leading the charge, your inner drive determines your elemental affinity. Take this quiz to discover if you are a fiery DPS, a sturdy Geo protector, or a versatile Anemo support!

characters.name: Pyro Vision: The Fiery DPS
characters.short_description: You are the heart of the offensive, wielding intense flames to incinerate enemies and lead your team to victory.
characters.profile_text: You possess a burning passion that translates directly into raw power on the battlefield. As a Pyro Vision wielder, you are naturally inclined toward the spotlight, taking the lead during combat to unleash devastating elemental reactions. Your playstyle is aggressive and high-risk, often pushing the limits of your stamina to ensure that not a single foe remains standing. You thrive when the heat is on, finding your rhythm in the chaos of a melting or vaporizing strike. However, your intense focus on damage can sometimes lead to tunnel vision, causing you to ignore your own defensive needs or the positioning of your allies. You prefer straightforward solutions and might become frustrated when faced with complex puzzles that cannot be solved with a simple explosion. Despite this, your unwavering determination makes you the reliable core of any team composition, providing the spark needed to overcome even the most daunting challenges.

characters.name: Geo Vision: The Sturdy Protector
characters.short_description: You provide an unbreakable foundation for your allies, utilizing the strength of the earth to shield and stabilize the team.
characters.profile_text: You are the bedrock of your group, characterized by a steadfast nature and an unwavering sense of duty. With a Geo Vision, you prioritize the safety of your comrades above all else, creating crystalline shields and solid constructs that dictate the flow of battle. You find satisfaction in being the immovable object that stands against the tide, ensuring that your teammates can perform their roles without fear of interruption or injury. Your methodical approach means you rarely make impulsive decisions, preferring to analyze the terrain and set up a defensive perimeter before engaging. While some might see your style as slow or overly cautious, your presence brings a sense of calm and security to the most frantic encounters. You must be careful not to become too rigid in your ways, as adaptability is sometimes required when the ground beneath you shifts unexpectedly.

characters.name: Anemo Vision: The Versatile Support
characters.short_description: You master the winds to control the battlefield, grouping enemies and amplifying the elemental power of your teammates.
characters.profile_text: You are a breath of fresh air in any party, possessing the unique ability to manipulate the environment to your advantage. As an Anemo Vision holder, you excel at crowd control, using swirling currents to pull enemies together and set the stage for massive elemental combinations. You are highly observant, always looking for the perfect moment to trigger a Swirl reaction that spreads other elements across the field, effectively acting as a force multiplier for your allies. Your personality is often as fleeting and adaptable as the breeze, allowing you to fit into almost any team dynamic with ease. You enjoy the freedom of movement and the tactical depth that comes with repositioning both friends and foes. However, your desire to assist others can sometimes leave you feeling secondary to the main action. It is important to remember that without your guidance and control, the team's efforts would likely scatter like leaves in a storm.

characters.name: Hydro Vision: The Compassionate Healer
characters.short_description: You flow through the battlefield like a soothing stream, mending wounds and applying vital elemental status to your foes.
characters.profile_text: You are the lifeblood of your team, driven by a deep-seated desire to nurture and protect those around you. With a Hydro Vision, you specialize in restorative arts, ensuring that your allies remain in peak condition even during the most grueling battles. Your presence is calming, and your ability to apply the Wet status to enemies creates endless opportunities for powerful elemental reactions like Freeze or Bloom, making you an indispensable asset. You tend to be empathetic and highly attuned to the needs of others, often anticipating a problem before it even arises. This sensitivity allows you to manage the team's health with grace and efficiency. On the downside, you may struggle when forced to act alone, as your strengths are inherently tied to the well-being of your companions. By embracing your role as the heart of the group, you ensure that the journey continues no matter how difficult the path becomes.

characters.name: Electro Vision: The Dynamic Enabler
characters.short_description: You strike with the speed of lightning, facilitating rapid-fire elemental reactions and keeping the team's energy flowing.
characters.profile_text: You are a spark of pure energy, bringing a fast-paced and unpredictable edge to every encounter. As an Electro Vision wielder, you focus on high-frequency attacks and energy regeneration, ensuring that your team's most powerful abilities are always ready to fire. You excel at creating reactions like Superconduct or Aggravate, which weaken enemies and pave the way for your allies to deal massive damage. Your movements are quick, and your impact is felt instantly across the entire battlefield. You often have a restless spirit, always looking for the next challenge or a more efficient way to achieve your goals. This drive makes you an excellent catalyst for change, pushing your team to try new strategies and maintain a high tempo. However, your erratic nature can sometimes make it difficult for others to keep up with you. Learning to synchronize your bursts of power with the needs of your teammates will transform you from a lone bolt of lightning into a sustained and unstoppable storm.

characters.name: Cryo Vision: The Calculated Striker
characters.short_description: You utilize the biting cold to freeze enemies in their tracks, delivering precise and devastating blows to vulnerable targets.
characters.profile_text: You approach combat with a chilling focus and a sharp mind, preferring to wait for the perfect opening rather than rushing in blindly. With a Cryo Vision, you specialize in battlefield manipulation through freezing and critical strikes. You take pride in your ability to immobilize threats, giving your team the breathing room they need to execute complex maneuvers. Your strikes are deliberate and lethal, often targeting the weak points of your enemies with surgical precision. Your personality is likely reserved and introspective, as you value logic and efficiency over emotional outbursts. This detachment allows you to remain calm under pressure, making you the ideal person to handle high-stakes situations where a single mistake could be fatal. While your cool exterior might be mistaken for indifference, your commitment to the team's success is absolute. You must be wary of becoming too isolated in your calculations, as the warmth of your allies is often what keeps the frost from consuming you entirely.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a high-stakes conflict erupts, what is your immediate psychological impulse?

options.text: To confront the source of the problem head-on with maximum intensity.
To establish a secure perimeter and ensure everyone's safety first.
To analyze the environment and find a way to redirect the tension.
To provide emotional or physical restoration to those affected.
To find a tactical opening that allows for a quick, decisive strike.
To accelerate the pace and keep the momentum moving forward.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward when working in a group setting?

options.text: The primary executor who delivers the final results.
The reliable anchor who keeps the group grounded and stable.
The coordinator who facilitates communication and synergy.
The caregiver who monitors the well-being of every member.
The specialist who handles complex, precise tasks with focus.
The catalyst who energizes the team and speeds up the process.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to handle obstacles that block your path?

options.text: Overpowering them through sheer force of will.
Outlasting them by building a resilient defense.
Manipulating the situation to bypass or move the obstacle.
Softening the impact and healing the damage caused by the block.
Freezing the situation to analyze and strike the weakest point.
Using rapid bursts of energy to find a new, faster route.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest strength when under extreme pressure?

options.text: Unwavering courage and offensive drive.
Steadfast patience and defensive reliability.
Adaptability and the ability to see the big picture.
Empathy and the ability to sustain others.
Calculated logic and emotional detachment.
High-speed reflexes and resourcefulness.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of impact do you want to have on your environment?

options.text: To leave a lasting, transformative mark through action.
To provide a solid, unchanging foundation for others.
To create a sense of flow and harmony between elements.
To nurture growth and ensure the survival of the group.
To bring order and precision to chaotic situations.
To spark change and keep things constantly evolving.

topics.display_name: Primary Love Language

synopsis.title: What Is Your Secret Primary Love Language?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder why a simple 'thank you' makes your day, or why you crave a long hug after a stressful afternoon? Understanding how you give and receive affection is the key to deeper, more fulfilling relationships. Take this quiz to uncover the specific way your heart speaks and hears love.

characters.name: Words of Affirmation
characters.short_description: You feel most cherished when your partner expresses their love and appreciation through spoken or written words.
characters.profile_text:
You place immense value on verbal expressions of affection, finding that compliments, words of appreciation, and frequent declarations of love are the lifeblood of your relationship. For you, hearing the specific reasons why you are loved provides a deep sense of security and belonging. You likely treasure handwritten notes, thoughtful text messages, and verbal encouragement during difficult times, as these affirmations serve as tangible proof of your partner's devotion and presence in your life.

However, this sensitivity to language means that insults or harsh words can be particularly devastating to your spirit and take a long time to forgive. You may find yourself overanalyzing silence or a lack of verbal feedback, interpreting it as a sign of emotional distance or fading interest. Your strength lies in your ability to uplift others with your own words, but you must communicate to your partner that your emotional tank requires consistent, positive verbal reinforcement to stay full and vibrant.

characters.name: Quality Time
characters.short_description: Your primary emotional need is centered on receiving undivided attention and sharing meaningful activities with your partner.
characters.profile_text:
To you, nothing says love like a partner who is fully present and engaged in the moment without the distraction of technology or outside interruptions. You value deep conversations, shared hobbies, and the simple act of being together, believing that the quality of the interaction matters far more than the specific activity itself. You feel most seen and understood when your partner makes eye contact, listens actively to your thoughts, and prioritizes your time together above other competing demands.

Postponed dates, frequent interruptions, or a distracted partner can make you feel neglected or unimportant, as you view time as the most precious gift one can give. You thrive in environments where you can bond through shared experiences, but you may struggle if your partner has a busy schedule that leaves little room for focused connection. By prioritizing intentional togetherness and creating rituals of connection, you build a foundation of intimacy that sustains your relationship through life's many distractions.

characters.name: Receiving Gifts
characters.short_description: You perceive gifts as visual symbols of love and thoughtfulness, reflecting the fact that your partner was thinking of you.
characters.profile_text:
For you, a gift is not about the monetary value but the sentiment and effort behind the gesture. You see a physical object as a tangible representation of your partner's affection, proving that they were thinking of you even when you were physically apart. Whether it is a small trinket from a trip, a hand-picked flower, or a carefully chosen birthday present, these items serve as lasting reminders of the bond you share. You likely keep mementos for years, finding comfort in the history and care they represent.

A missed occasion or a thoughtless, last-minute gift can feel like a lack of care or a lack of interest in your unique personality. You are not materialistic; rather, you appreciate the creativity and intentionality involved in selecting something that resonates with your soul. Your challenge is ensuring others understand that your need for gifts is an emotional requirement for connection, not a desire for accumulation, and that you find immense joy in the ritual of both giving and receiving tokens of love.

characters.name: Acts of Service
characters.short_description: You feel most loved when your partner eases the burdens of your daily life through helpful actions and shared responsibilities.
characters.profile_text:
For you, actions truly speak louder than words, and you feel most supported when your partner takes the initiative to help with chores, errands, or complex tasks. Whether it is cooking a meal, fixing something broken, or handling the grocery shopping, these acts demonstrate a willingness to invest energy into your well-being. You view these efforts as a profound expression of commitment, as they show that your partner values your time and actively wants to make your life easier and less stressful.

Laziness, broken commitments, or a perceived lack of effort can be deeply hurtful to you, as they may feel like a dismissal of your needs or a lack of respect for your hard work. You tend to be a doer yourself, often showing love by taking care of the people around you, but you can become overwhelmed if the effort is not reciprocated. Learning to ask for specific help and recognizing that your partner’s service is a form of devotion will help you maintain a balanced and harmonious partnership where you feel truly cared for.

characters.name: Physical Touch
characters.short_description: You prioritize physical closeness and non-sexual touch as the most direct way to experience emotional intimacy and security.
characters.profile_text:
Physical presence and touch are the primary ways you connect with your partner and feel grounded in your relationship. From holding hands and hugging to sitting close on the couch, these small gestures of physical affection provide you with a sense of safety and belonging that words cannot replicate. You likely find that a simple touch on the arm or a long embrace can soothe your stress and reaffirm your partner's love more effectively than any other gesture, acting as a direct line to your emotional core.

Long periods without physical contact can leave you feeling isolated, lonely, and unloved, even if your partner is kind and helpful in other ways. You are highly sensitive to your partner's physical cues and may feel rejected if they seem distant or avoidant of touch. While sexual intimacy is a component of this language, it is the everyday, non-sexual physical connection that truly fills your emotional tank. Communicating your need for frequent, gentle contact ensures that you feel consistently cherished and secure in your partner's arms.

baseline_questions.question_text: After a particularly exhausting and stressful day at work, which of these gestures from a partner would most effectively help you recharge?

options.text: They sit quietly with me on the couch, giving me their full attention while we talk.
They surprise me with a small treat or something they saw that reminded them of me.
They take over my evening chores or cook dinner so I can truly rest.
They give me a long, meaningful hug or a back rub to help me decompress.
They tell me how proud they are of my hard work and how much they appreciate me.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of the following scenarios would make you feel the most neglected or unappreciated in a long-term relationship?

options.text: My partner rarely offers compliments or forgets to say 'I love you' regularly.
My partner is physically distant and rarely initiates small touches like holding hands.
My partner is constantly on their phone or distracted when we are spending time together.
My partner leaves all the mental load and household management entirely to me.
My partner ignores special occasions or puts no thought into gifts for milestones.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you want to show someone else that you truly care about them, what is your most natural 'go-to' response?

options.text: I write them a heartfelt note or send a text expressing my admiration.
I look for a specific item I know they've wanted and surprise them with it.
I clear my schedule to ensure we have uninterrupted time to bond.
I look for practical ways to help them, like running an errand or fixing something.
I reach for their hand, offer a hug, or stay in close physical proximity.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a shared experience with a romantic partner?

options.text: The verbal exchange of ideas and the words of encouragement we share.
The feeling of being a team where we both contribute effort to get things done.
The physical closeness and the comfort of their touch during the activity.
The undivided focus we have on each other, regardless of what we are doing.
The tangible memento or memory we create that I can look back on later.

baseline_questions.question_text: If your partner could only do one of these things for your upcoming birthday, which would mean the most to you?

options.text: Giving me a carefully selected, meaningful gift that shows they know me well.
Planning a full day of activities where we focus entirely on each other.
Writing a long, sincere letter detailing what they love about our relationship.
Handling all the planning, cleaning, and logistics so I can just enjoy the day.
Prioritizing physical intimacy and staying close to me throughout the celebration.

topics.display_name: Minecraft Biome

synopsis.title: Which Minecraft Biome Matches Your Soul's Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Are you a cozy cottage-core enthusiast or a daring explorer of the deep dark? Whether you prefer the blocky serenity of a cherry grove or the chaotic heat of the Nether, your personality has a biome to call home. Dig deep into your inner inventory to discover where you truly belong in the Overworld and beyond!

characters.name: Plains
characters.short_description: You are the quintessential starting point, a vast expanse of rolling green grass and endless possibilities.
characters.profile_text:
You represent the classic adventurer who values clarity and a clean slate. Like the wide-open horizon of the Plains, you are approachable and versatile, often serving as the foundation upon which others build their grandest dreams. You prefer a life without clutter, where the sun shines brightly on your simple but effective plans. Your strengths lie in your reliability and your ability to adapt to any structure, whether it is a humble cottage or a sprawling fortress. You have a natural gift for making others feel at home, providing a stable environment where growth feels inevitable and easy.

However, your openness can sometimes leave you feeling exposed to the elements or the occasional wandering creeper. You might struggle with a lack of mystery, as your straightforward nature means you rarely keep secrets or hide your true intentions. While others might seek the thrill of the unknown in dark caves, you find true joy in the steady rhythm of a village and the peaceful grazing of livestock under a clear blue sky.
