You are the reliable heart of the world, proving that there is profound beauty in simplicity and a well-placed sunflower.

characters.name: Desert
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and sun-drenched soul who thrives in the heat of challenge and the mystery of ancient sands.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rugged endurance that allows you to flourish where others might wither. Like the shifting dunes of the Desert, you are constantly evolving, yet you remain anchored by a deep sense of history and hidden treasures. You have a knack for finding value in the most barren places, often uncovering temples of wisdom or wells of inspiration that others overlook. Your preference for a minimalist, high-stakes environment makes you a formidable presence in any group, as you are rarely distracted by superficial decorations. You are a master of survival, knowing exactly how to conserve your energy for the moments that truly matter.

Your main pitfall is a tendency toward isolation, as your intense focus on survival can make you seem prickly or distant to those who do not share your heat. You might find yourself thirsting for variety when the landscape of your life becomes too predictable or dry. Despite this, your ability to withstand the harshest conditions ensures that you are the one left standing when the dust finally settles. You guard your secrets like a buried pyramid, offering great rewards only to those who are patient enough to dig beneath your surface.

characters.name: Snowy Tundra
characters.short_description: You are a serene and stoic individual who finds beauty in the quiet isolation of a frozen, white-washed world.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by a calm, cool exterior that masks a heart of pure resilience. Like the vast, silent reaches of the Snowy Tundra, you prefer the peace of solitude and the crisp air of high-altitude thinking. You are not one for flashy displays; instead, you find satisfaction in the steady crunch of snow beneath your boots and the architectural elegance of an ice spike. Your strengths include an incredible patience and a unique perspective that allows you to see the world in its most crystalline, essential form. You are the person others turn to when things get chaotic, as your icy composure can freeze any panic in its tracks.

Because you are so comfortable in the cold, you may sometimes come across as emotionally detached or difficult to reach. You might struggle to connect with those who crave constant warmth and social interaction, preferring the company of a stray polar bear to a crowded tavern. You risk becoming too rigid in your ways, much like a block of packed ice that refuses to melt. Yet, for those who brave the trek to find you, you offer a rare kind of loyalty that is as enduring and solid as the permafrost, providing a quiet sanctuary in a noisy world.

characters.name: Jungle
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant and energetic spirit, teeming with life and hidden depths within a lush, tangled canopy.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of growth and complexity, much like the towering trees and thick vines of the Jungle. You thrive in environments that are rich with detail and sensory input, always seeking the next vine to swing from or the next hidden temple to explore. Your personality is multi-layered, offering a mix of wild spontaneity and ancient wisdom. You have a natural talent for camouflage, knowing exactly when to stand out with bright colors and when to blend into the shadows of the undergrowth. Your energy is boundless, and you often inspire those around you to climb higher and see the world from a new vantage point.

Your greatest challenge is managing the chaos that often follows your intense curiosity. You can easily become overwhelmed by your own many interests, getting lost in the thicket of your ambitions without a clear path out. While your enthusiasm is infectious, it can be exhausting for those who prefer a slower, more predictable pace. Nevertheless, your ability to find nourishment and excitement in every corner of your life makes you a truly unforgettable force of nature. You remind everyone that life is an adventure meant to be lived at full volume, surrounded by the lush music of the wild.

characters.name: Mushroom Fields
characters.short_description: You are a rare and whimsical dreamer who lives in a world of gentle oddities and peaceful safety.
characters.profile_text:
You are a truly unique individual who marches to the beat of your own giant mushroom. Like the elusive Mushroom Fields, you offer a sanctuary from the typical stresses of life, providing a safe haven where the usual rules of danger do not seem to apply. You value harmony and quirkiness above all else, often surrounding yourself with colorful ideas and gentle companions like the Mooshroom. Your strength lies in your ability to create a peaceful atmosphere where everyone feels welcome and secure. You possess a rare kind of magic that turns the mundane into something extraordinary, simply by changing the color of the ground beneath your feet.

However, your preference for this idyllic bubble can sometimes make you appear out of touch with the harsher realities of the world. You might find it difficult to leave your comfort zone, as the outside world feels far too hostile compared to your purple-mycelium home. You may struggle with being misunderstood by those who value efficiency over whimsy. While you may be seen as eccentric, your presence is a soothing balm to those lucky enough to find you. You serve as a living reminder that life is better when it is a little bit strange, a lot more kind, and completely free of monsters.

characters.name: Cherry Grove
characters.short_description: You are a romantic and optimistic soul who sees the world through a flurry of pink petals and soft, fleeting beauty.
characters.profile_text:
You are the embodiment of a fresh start and the delicate charm of springtime. Like the Cherry Grove, you bring a sense of wonder and aesthetic grace to everything you touch, turning even the simplest mountain slope into a masterpiece of pink blossoms. You are naturally drawn to beauty and harmony, often acting as a peacemaker who uses your creative flair to brighten the moods of those around you. Your strengths are your infectious optimism and your ability to find joy in the most transient moments. You have a gift for making the world feel softer and more inviting, encouraging others to stop and smell the flowers.

Your pitfall is a tendency toward idealism, which can lead to disappointment when the world does not live up to your picturesque expectations. You might spend so much time admiring the falling petals that you forget to prepare for the storms that inevitably follow. You may struggle with being taken seriously in high-pressure situations because of your gentle and decorative nature. Despite this, your vision of a more beautiful world is a genuine gift to others. You teach those around you that even the most fleeting moments of beauty are worth celebrating, leaving a trail of pink petals wherever you go.

baseline_questions.question_text: A mysterious map appears in your inventory. Where does your heart hope the 'X' marks the spot?

options.text: A wide-open horizon where I can build anything I imagine.
A hidden, ancient temple buried beneath shifting sands.
A silent, frozen peak where the air is crisp and the world is still.
A tangled, vibrant thicket overflowing with life and secrets.
A surreal, purple-tinted island where the rules of nature feel different.
A soft, pink-petaled slope that feels like a living dream.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle a surprise visit from a wandering trader (and his llamas)?

options.text: I welcome the company and see if he has any practical seeds for my farm.
I observe from a distance, skeptical of what he's trying to sell me.
I appreciate the brief interaction before returning to my peaceful solitude.
I'm already distracted by a nearby parrot or a vine I want to climb.
I offer him a strange mushroom and hope he enjoys the whimsical vibes.
I admire the aesthetic of his blue robes against the falling blossoms.

baseline_questions.question_text: Night is falling and the mobs are spawning. What is your survival strategy?

options.text: Build a sturdy, reliable shelter with a clear view of the surroundings.
Rely on my grit and endurance to outlast the heat and the hazards.
Retreat into the quiet cold where the silence keeps me safe.
Use the dense canopy to stay mobile and outmaneuver any threats.
Relax—I've created a space so unique that monsters don't even bother me.
Light a few lanterns and focus on keeping the atmosphere beautiful.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which 'block' best describes your inner philosophy?

options.text: A Grass Block: Simple, foundational, and full of potential.
Chiseled Sandstone: Hard-earned, resilient, and etched with history.
Blue Ice: Solid, calm, and elegantly detached from the chaos.
Bamboo: Flexible, fast-growing, and reaching for the sun.
Mycelium: Quirky, rare, and transforming the ground I walk on.
Cherry Wood: Soft, romantic, and undeniably aesthetic.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you could enchant your life with one effect, which would you choose?

options.text: Efficiency: To make the most of every day and every resource.
Fire Resistance: To stay cool and collected even in the harshest heat.
Frost Walker: To move gracefully across the world without breaking the surface.
Swift Sneak: To explore every hidden corner without being detected.
Luck: To find the extraordinary in the most unusual places.
Slow Falling: To drift through life and appreciate the view from above.

topics.display_name: Classic RPG Archetype

synopsis.title: Which Classic RPG Archetype Defines Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you are the one leading the charge or the one keeping everyone alive from the backlines? Whether you prefer the weight of a broadsword or the whisper of a forbidden spell, your personality fits a legendary mold. Take this quiz to discover which iconic role you would play in a pixelated fantasy world!

characters.name: Warrior
characters.short_description: You are a stalwart frontline defender who relies on physical prowess and unwavering courage to overcome any obstacle.
characters.profile_text: You are the bedrock of any adventuring party, possessing the grit and physical endurance to stand between your allies and certain doom. Your approach to problem-solving is direct and decisive, favoring action over endless deliberation. You find satisfaction in the weight of a blade and the reliability of well-maintained armor, trusting in your own strength to see you through the darkest dungeons. In social situations, you are often seen as the dependable anchor, someone whose word is as solid as stone and whose loyalty is never in question. However, your reliance on brute force can sometimes lead you to overlook more subtle or diplomatic solutions. You might struggle in environments where physical power is secondary to political maneuvering or complex magical theory. Your greatest strength is your resilience, but your greatest pitfall is a tendency to charge headlong into danger without fully assessing the risks. Learning to balance your natural aggression with tactical patience is the key to your long-term survival and success.

characters.name: Mage
characters.short_description: You are a master of the arcane who wields cosmic forces and intellectual brilliance to reshape reality to your whim.
characters.profile_text: You possess an insatiable curiosity and a mind sharp enough to pierce the veil of the mundane world. For you, knowledge is the ultimate form of power, and you spend your time deciphering ancient scrolls and mastering complex incantations. You prefer to stay at a distance, analyzing the battlefield or a social situation before unleashing a precisely calculated response. Your strength lies in your versatility and the sheer scale of the effects you can produce, from conjuring fire to bending the very fabric of time and space. Despite your intellectual dominance, you often find yourself physically vulnerable and may rely heavily on others for protection. Your tendency to overthink can lead to paralysis by analysis, and your pursuit of forbidden knowledge might occasionally blind you to the immediate needs of your companions. You are most comfortable in libraries or laboratories, yet your true potential is realized when you apply your vast theoretical understanding to the unpredictable challenges of the real world.

characters.name: Healer
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate guardian of life who uses restorative energies and empathy to sustain your allies through the harshest trials.
characters.profile_text: You are the heart of the group, driven by a profound desire to protect and nurture those around you. While others focus on dealing damage or seeking glory, your eyes are always on the well-being of your team, ensuring that no one falls behind. You possess a calm, stabilizing presence that can turn the tide of despair into a wave of renewed hope. Your preferences lean toward harmony and cooperation, and you often act as the mediator when tensions rise within your party. Your selflessness is your greatest virtue, but it can also be your undoing if you neglect your own needs in favor of others. You may find it difficult to stand your ground when direct confrontation is required, and your empathetic nature can make you susceptible to emotional exhaustion. While you are essential for survival, you must learn that protecting yourself is just as important as mending the wounds of your friends. Your power comes from a place of deep connection, making you the indispensable glue that holds everything together.

characters.name: Rogue
characters.short_description: You are a cunning opportunist who utilizes stealth, agility, and quick wits to navigate the world on your own terms.
characters.profile_text: You thrive in the shadows and the spaces between, where your keen observation and nimble fingers give you a distinct advantage. You value independence and flexibility, often finding creative solutions that others would never even consider. Whether you are disarming a complex trap or slipping past a sentry unnoticed, you rely on your reflexes and your ability to read people and environments. You are a pragmatist at heart, preferring to strike from a position of advantage rather than engaging in a fair fight. Your penchant for secrecy and your "me-first" attitude can sometimes create friction with more idealistic companions. You might find it hard to fully trust others, leading to a sense of isolation even when you are part of a team. Your greatest pitfall is overconfidence in your own cleverness, which can lead you into situations where your luck finally runs out. However, your ability to adapt to any circumstance and find a way through the impossible makes you an invaluable asset in any high-stakes endeavor.

characters.name: Paladin
characters.short_description: You are a virtuous champion of justice who combines martial skill with divine conviction to lead and protect the innocent.
characters.profile_text: You are guided by a strict code of honor and an unwavering belief in a higher purpose. Your presence on the battlefield is a beacon of inspiration, as you lead by example and demand the best from yourself and those around you. You are not just a warrior; you are a symbol of hope and a shield against the darkness. Your preferences lean toward order, tradition, and the pursuit of the greater good, often making you the natural leader in any group setting. Your rigid adherence to your ideals can sometimes make you appear inflexible or judgmental to those who operate in shades of gray. You may struggle to reconcile your high standards with the messy realities of the world, leading to internal conflict or friction with more pragmatic allies. Your greatest strength is your indomitable will, but your greatest weakness is the weight of the responsibility you carry. Balancing your zeal for justice with a measure of mercy and understanding for human frailty is your lifelong challenge.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a significant obstacle in your path, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: Confront it directly with physical force and determination.
Step back to analyze the situation and find a logical or technical solution.
Look for ways to support and protect those around me as we navigate it.
Search for a hidden shortcut or a way to bypass the obstacle entirely.
Take the lead and guide the group through it according to a set of principles.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Resilience and the strength to endure any hardship.
Intellectual curiosity and the mastery of complex knowledge.
Compassion and the ability to heal or comfort others.
Adaptability and the wit to thrive in any circumstance.
Integrity and an unwavering commitment to justice.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group project or team setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The reliable anchor who handles the heavy lifting.
The strategist who provides the vision and technical expertise.
The mediator who ensures everyone is supported and harmonious.
The independent contributor who finds creative, unconventional paths.
The principled leader who inspires others to do their best.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave when you find yourself in a high-stakes, risky situation?

options.text: I charge forward to draw attention away from more vulnerable people.
I stay at a safe distance and use my resources to control the outcome.
I focus entirely on the well-being and safety of my companions.
I wait for the perfect moment to strike or slip away unnoticed.
I stand my ground as a shield, refusing to let the darkness pass.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment makes you feel most in your element?

options.text: A rugged training ground where physical skill is tested.
A quiet library or laboratory filled with ancient secrets.
A peaceful sanctuary dedicated to restoration and care.
A bustling, unpredictable city where I can blend into the crowd.
A grand hall or temple where order and honor are upheld.

topics.display_name: The Four Temperaments

synopsis.title: Which Ancient Greek Personality Type Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Travel back to the era of Hippocrates and discover the elemental forces driving your behavior. Are you a fiery leader or a calm observer of the tides of history? This quiz dives deep into the four humors to reveal which classical temperament defines your unique personality.

characters.name: Sanguine
characters.short_description: You are the vibrant life of the party, characterized by an optimistic spirit and a restless need for social connection.
characters.profile_text: You move through the world like a sudden burst of sunlight, radiating warmth and an infectious enthusiasm that draws others toward you. Your primary drive is the pursuit of novelty and joy, making you an expert at turning mundane moments into celebratory events. Because you live so fully in the present, you possess a remarkable ability to forgive and forget, rarely holding onto grudges or dwelling on the shadows of the past. You are the quintessential social butterfly, flitting from one conversation to the next with an ease that makes everyone feel seen and appreciated. However, your desire for constant stimulation can sometimes lead to a lack of focus or a tendency to overcommit yourself to too many projects at once. You might find that your initial burst of energy fades when the hard work of maintenance begins, leaving a trail of unfinished ideas in your wake. Despite this, your natural charisma and resilience ensure that you are always ready to bounce back from setbacks with a smile, eager to discover what the next adventure holds for you and your wide circle of friends.

characters.name: Choleric
characters.short_description: You are a natural-born leader defined by your unwavering resolve, intense focus, and a relentless drive to achieve your goals.
characters.profile_text: You possess a commanding presence that demands respect and a vision that looks far beyond the immediate horizon. Your mind is a strategic engine, constantly calculating the most efficient path toward victory and refusing to let obstacles stand in your way. You thrive on challenge and competition, often finding your greatest strength when the pressure is highest and others are looking for a way out. This intensity makes you an invaluable asset in times of crisis, as you are capable of making difficult decisions with cold, clear logic and a firm hand. Yet, this same fire can sometimes burn those closest to you if you are not careful. Your impatience with perceived incompetence or slow progress can lead to friction, and you may struggle to appreciate the emotional nuances of a situation when you are focused solely on the objective. You are often seen as the architect of progress, pushing boundaries and demanding excellence from yourself and everyone around you. Learning to balance your formidable will with a touch of empathy is your lifelong journey, but your ability to inspire action and create tangible change in the world remains your greatest legacy.

characters.name: Melancholic
characters.short_description: You are a thoughtful and sensitive soul who seeks depth, order, and perfection in every aspect of your life.
characters.profile_text: You view the world through a lens of profound introspection, often noticing the subtle details and emotional undercurrents that others overlook. Your inner life is rich and complex, filled with a longing for beauty and a commitment to high standards that you apply to yourself and your work. You are the architect of systems and the keeper of traditions, finding comfort in structure and the quiet satisfaction of a job done with meticulous care. This dedication to excellence often makes you a master of your craft, as you are willing to spend hours refining a single thought or project until it meets your exacting requirements. However, your tendency toward perfectionism can sometimes lead to a paralyzing fear of failure or a cycle of self-criticism that is difficult to break. You may find yourself withdrawing into your own thoughts when the world feels too chaotic or loud, preferring the sanctuary of your own mind to the noise of the crowd. While you may be prone to bouts of sadness or longing, your capacity for deep empathy and your unwavering loyalty to those you love make you a pillar of quiet strength for those who truly know you.

characters.name: Phlegmatic
characters.short_description: You are the calm anchor in the storm, valued for your easygoing nature, reliability, and talent for maintaining harmony.
characters.profile_text: You possess a rare and enviable peace of mind, navigating the ups and downs of life with a steady hand and a gentle spirit. Your primary motivation is the preservation of balance, and you often act as the mediator in conflicts, using your natural diplomacy to bridge gaps between more volatile personalities. People are drawn to your dependable nature, knowing that you are the one who will remain composed when everything else seems to be falling apart. You prefer the comfort of the familiar and the steady rhythm of a predictable routine, finding joy in the simple pleasures of life and the company of a few close companions. While your desire for peace is a great strength, it can sometimes manifest as a reluctance to take risks or a tendency to avoid necessary confrontations. You might find yourself settling for the status quo rather than pushing for change, even when change is needed for your own growth. By recognizing that your quiet observations hold immense value, you can learn to assert yourself more effectively. Your gift lies in your ability to provide a sense of security and continuity to everyone you encounter, making the world a kinder and more stable place.

baseline_questions.question_text: At a grand symposium in Athens, where would one most likely find you?

options.text: In the center of a lively circle, sharing tales and laughter with everyone.
Engaged in a heated debate, striving to convince others of your vision.
In a quiet corner, observing the crowd and contemplating the deeper meaning of the dialogue.
Seated comfortably at the edge, content to listen and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a sudden crisis threatens the stability of your city-state, what is your first instinct?

options.text: To rally the citizens' spirits and keep morale high with optimistic energy.
To take immediate command and direct a strategic plan of action.
To analyze the cause of the problem and worry about the potential for failure.
To remain calm and steady, waiting for the initial chaos to subside before acting.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you approach the task of building a new monument or temple?

options.text: With a burst of creative inspiration, though the repetitive labor may eventually bore you.
With a focus on efficiency and ensuring the project is completed as quickly as possible.
With meticulous attention to detail, ensuring every measurement is mathematically perfect.
With a preference for a simple, traditional design that requires minimal conflict or stress.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these virtues do you hold in the highest regard for yourself?

options.text: Charisma: The ability to inspire joy and connect with any soul.
Resolve: The unwavering will to overcome obstacles and achieve greatness.
Wisdom: The pursuit of truth through deep reflection and high standards.
Serenity: The gift of maintaining inner peace and outward harmony.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most common reaction when your plans are unexpectedly disrupted?

options.text: You quickly find a new, exciting alternative and move on without a second thought.
You feel a flash of irritation and immediately work to force the situation back under control.
You withdraw to process your disappointment and dwell on what went wrong.
You accept the change with a shrug, preferring to go with the flow rather than fight it.

topics.display_name: MOBA Lane Position

synopsis.title: Which MOBA Lane Position Actually Matches Your Personality?
synopsis.summary: Are you the lone wolf holding down the fort or the tactical mastermind pulling the strings from the shadows? Every team needs a balance of ego, utility, and raw power to secure the win. Take this quiz to find out where you truly belong on the map before the next match starts.

characters.name: The Solo Sentinel
characters.short_description: You are the resilient anchor of the team, thriving in isolation and mastering the art of the duel.
characters.profile_text: You possess a unique blend of patience and grit, comfortable holding down the fort on a remote island while the rest of the map erupts in chaos. As a Solo Sentinel, you understand that your primary duty is to survive and scale, often acting as the frontline tank or a split-pushing threat that forces the enemy to divert resources. You take pride in your mechanical consistency and your ability to turn a 1v1 stalemate into a decisive victory through sheer attrition. However, your independence can sometimes be a double-edged sword. You might find yourself so focused on your personal lane dominance that you lose track of the broader map state, potentially arriving late to crucial team fights. Your strength lies in your durability and your capacity to absorb pressure, but your greatest challenge is knowing exactly when to teleport away from your tower to save your allies.

characters.name: The Jungle Predator
characters.short_description: You are the invisible hand that shapes the early game, striking from the shadows to tip the scales in your team's favor.
characters.profile_text: You thrive on uncertainty and the thrill of the hunt, viewing the entire map as your personal playground rather than being confined to a single lane. As the Jungle Predator, your mind is constantly calculating pathing efficiency, objective timers, and the psychological state of your opponents. You are the catalyst for momentum, appearing exactly where the enemy is most vulnerable to secure a kill or steal a neutral objective. Your role requires a high level of macro-awareness and the ability to adapt on the fly when your initial plans go awry. While you have the power to carry the game through early aggression, you also shoulder the heavy burden of being blamed when lanes fall behind. Success for you means balancing the need to farm your own camps with the constant demand for presence across all three lanes, ensuring your team never feels truly alone.

characters.name: The Mid Lane Maestro
characters.short_description: You are the central heartbeat of the match, utilizing high-impact spells and roaming potential to dictate the tempo of play.
characters.profile_text: Positioned at the literal center of the action, you are a high-risk, high-reward player who enjoys being the primary source of magic or burst damage. You excel at the mechanical dance of the short lane, where every missed skillshot or mistimed roam can have immediate consequences for the entire map. As the Maestro, you are expected to be everywhere at once, pushing your lane and then disappearing into the fog of war to assist your side lanes. Your playstyle is defined by your versatility and your desire to be the playmaker who decides the outcome of mid-game skirmishes. You likely prefer champions with high mobility or devastating area-of-effect abilities that can turn a losing fight into a clean sweep. Despite your power, you are often a glass cannon, requiring impeccable positioning and quick reflexes to avoid being shut down by a coordinated enemy assault.

characters.name: The Relentless Marksman
characters.short_description: You are the late-game insurance policy, focusing on precise positioning and consistent damage output to shred through enemy defenses.
characters.profile_text: You are a player of immense focus and discipline, understanding that your true power only emerges once you have secured your core items. As the Relentless Marksman, you spend the early stages of the game meticulously last-hitting minions and avoiding unnecessary risks, all in preparation for the moment you become an unstoppable force. You live for the high-pressure environment of a team fight, where one wrong step means death but perfect kiting leads to a pentakill. Because you are often the primary target for the enemy team, you have developed a keen sense of danger and a reliance on your teammates for protection. You might struggle with frustration when your team fails to peel for you, but you also know that your sustained damage is the only way to take down structures and massive tanks. Your journey is one of patience, transforming from a vulnerable target into the most lethal weapon on the battlefield.

characters.name: The Strategic Enabler
characters.short_description: You are the unsung hero and tactical mastermind who provides the vision, utility, and protection necessary for victory.
characters.profile_text: You find satisfaction not in the glory of the killing blow, but in the perfectly timed shield, the life-saving crowd control, or the vision ward that reveals an incoming ambush. As the Strategic Enabler, you are the glue that holds the team together, often sacrificing your own resources to ensure your allies can shine. You possess a deep understanding of game flow, tracking enemy cooldowns and managing the emotional state of your teammates during high-stress moments. Your role is perhaps the most intellectually demanding, as you must manage the map's vision while simultaneously babysitting your marksman and setting up plays for your jungler. While you may not always top the damage charts, your influence is felt in every successful engagement and every narrow escape. Your greatest strength is your selflessness, but your pitfall can be a tendency to overextend while trying to save a teammate who is already beyond help.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a high-stakes competitive environment, how do you prefer to engage with your opponents?

options.text: A direct, one-on-one test of strength and endurance where I outlast my rival.
A surprise strike from an unexpected angle when they are most vulnerable.
A fast-paced, high-skill exchange in the center of the action to dictate the tempo.
Maintaining a safe distance while dealing consistent, calculated damage.
Providing the crowd control and openings necessary for my allies to secure the win.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary focus during the early stages of a complex project or match?

options.text: Securing my own territory and ensuring I remain an immovable force.
Moving constantly between tasks to find the most efficient path to success.
Controlling the most important central hub and looking for chances to assist others.
Focusing entirely on resource accumulation and preparation for the final phase.
Ensuring my partners have the resources and protection they need to thrive.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically view your relationship with the rest of your team?

options.text: I am the sturdy anchor; I hold the line so they can focus on their own goals.
I am the invisible hand; I influence the outcome from the shadows without being seen.
I am the heartbeat; I set the pace and lead the charge in every major engagement.
I am the insurance policy; I carry the weight of the victory once I have reached my full potential.
I am the glue; I keep everyone alive, informed, and coordinated.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these 'superpowers' would you value most in a high-pressure situation?

options.text: Unstoppable resilience and the ability to survive even the most brutal assaults.
Perfect intuition and knowing exactly where the enemy is at all times.
Explosive power and the ability to neutralize a threat in a matter of seconds.
Flawless precision and the ability to out-maneuver any opponent through positioning.
Total battlefield control and the ability to shield my allies from harm.

baseline_questions.question_text: When the dust settles, what metric makes you feel the most successful?

options.text: The amount of pressure I absorbed and the ground I refused to give up.
The number of successful ambushes and key objectives I secured for the group.
The total impact of my actions and my presence across the entire field.
The sheer volume of damage I dealt during the final, decisive confrontation.
The number of lives I saved and the critical information I provided to the team.

topics.display_name: Stardew Valley Marriage Candidate

synopsis.title: Which Stardew Valley Bachelor Or Bachelorette Is Your True Soulmate?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered which Pelican Town resident would actually share a farmhouse with you? Whether you are a fan of late-night programming sessions or early morning foraging, there is a perfect match waiting for you. Take this quiz to discover which marriage candidate aligns with your personality and lifestyle!

characters.name: Abigail
characters.short_description: You are a spirited adventurer who finds beauty in the mysterious and the unconventional.
characters.profile_text: You possess a restless spirit and a deep fascination with the unknown, often found exploring the local graveyard or dreaming of sword-fighting in the mines. Your personality is a blend of youthful rebellion and genuine curiosity, making you someone who isn't afraid to stand out or challenge the status quo. You value independence and seek a partner who can keep up with your spontaneous energy and appreciation for the darker, more magical side of life. However, your impulsive nature can sometimes lead to conflict with authority or traditional expectations. You might struggle with feeling misunderstood by those who prefer a more conventional path. Your strength lies in your courage and your willingness to embrace your true self, even if it means eating a quartz or two along the way. You are a loyal friend who brings excitement and a touch of the supernatural to every relationship.

characters.name: Alex
characters.short_description: You are a driven and confident individual who masks a sensitive heart with a focus on physical excellence and grand ambitions.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your dedication to your goals and your outward display of self-assurance. On the surface, you are the quintessential athlete, focused on training and dreaming of a professional career that will take you far beyond the borders of your small town. You take great pride in your appearance and your physical capabilities, often using your competitive nature as a way to navigate the world and prove your worth to those around you. Beneath that bravado lies a deeply sentimental person who cares immensely for family and harbors a vulnerability born from past hardships. You may sometimes come across as arrogant or shallow to those who don't know you well, but this is often a shield for your own insecurities. Your journey is one of learning that true strength comes from emotional honesty as much as physical prowess. You seek a partner who sees the real you behind the jersey and supports your growth.

characters.name: Elliott
characters.short_description: You are a refined and sentimental soul who views the world through a lens of literary beauty and grand romantic gestures.
characters.profile_text: You live for the written word and the sweeping drama of a well-told story, often found lost in thought by the sea or crafting prose in your cabin. Your personality is marked by a certain old-world charm and a sophisticated vocabulary that sets you apart from the more mundane aspects of daily life. You appreciate the finer things, from a good bottle of wine to the rhythmic sound of the waves, and you possess a flair for the dramatic that makes every interaction feel significant. While your passion is your greatest strength, it can also lead to bouts of melancholy or a tendency to become overly absorbed in your own creative world. You may struggle with the practicalities of life, preferring the realm of imagination to the grit of reality. You are looking for a muse and a partner who can appreciate your artistic temperament and provide the stability you need to finish your masterpiece. Your devotion is absolute, and you offer a love that is as deep and enduring as the ocean.

characters.name: Emily
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant and empathetic dreamer who finds joy in the spiritual connections and creative expressions of the universe.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a unique rhythm, guided by your intuition and a deep-seated belief in the power of positive energy. Whether you are sewing your own colorful clothing or meditating with crystals, your life is a testament to your individuality and your desire to bring light to those around you. You possess an uncanny ability to see the beauty in everyone and everything, making you a source of comfort and inspiration for your friends and neighbors. Your unconventional outlook can sometimes make you seem detached from reality or difficult for more practical minds to understand. You might find yourself lost in your own visions, occasionally overlooking the more grounded needs of a relationship. However, your kindness is boundless, and your willingness to help others is a core part of your identity. You seek a partner who respects your spiritual journey and isn't afraid to dance to the beat of their own drum alongside you.

characters.name: Haley
characters.short_description: You are a stylish and discerning individual who values aesthetics but possesses a hidden capacity for profound personal growth and warmth.
characters.profile_text: You have a keen eye for beauty and a strong sense of personal style, often prioritizing appearances and social standing in your initial interactions. To many, you may seem superficial or dismissive, as you have high standards and a clear idea of how you want your life to look. You enjoy the comforts of a well-curated environment and take pride in your photography, capturing the world exactly as you wish to see it. As you open up, you reveal a much softer and more appreciative side that values the simple joys of nature and genuine connection. Your journey is one of shedding your defensive vanity to discover the fulfillment that comes from hard work and empathy. While you can be judgmental at first, your loyalty is fierce once earned. You need a partner who can challenge your perspectives and appreciate the complex, evolving person you are becoming beneath the polished exterior.

characters.name: Harvey
characters.short_description: You are a dedicated and cautious professional who prioritizes the well-being of others while nurturing your own quiet passions.
characters.profile_text: You are the pillar of your community, a person whose life is defined by a sense of duty and a genuine desire to help those in need. Your approach to life is methodical and careful, often driven by a need for safety and health that borders on the anxious. You find solace in intellectual pursuits, such as aviation history or radio technology, which allow you to explore the world from a controlled and secure environment. Your tendency to worry can sometimes hold you back from taking risks or fully enjoying the spontaneity of life. You may struggle with self-doubt, wondering if you are doing enough or if you are perceived as too rigid by those around you. Despite this, your heart is incredibly kind, and you offer a level of stability and care that is rare to find. You seek a partner who can provide a sense of security and help you step out of your comfort zone, reminding you that it's okay to fly high every once in a while.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically spend your free time when you want to recharge?

options.text: Exploring outdoors or seeking out a new, slightly mysterious adventure.
Focusing on physical fitness, sports, or personal self-improvement.
Engaging in creative writing, reading, or appreciating fine arts.
Practicing mindfulness, crafting, or exploring spiritual interests.
Refining your personal style, photography, or enjoying high-quality aesthetics.
Pursuing intellectual hobbies like science, history, or technical interests.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when pursuing a long-term goal?

options.text: The thrill of discovery and breaking away from the mundane.
Achieving peak performance and proving your capabilities to the world.
Creating something of lasting beauty or profound emotional impact.
Helping others and finding a deeper connection to the universe.
Cultivating a life of comfort, elegance, and social recognition.
Ensuring stability, health, and the well-being of your community.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you usually react to unexpected changes or risks?

options.text: I embrace them with excitement; I love the unpredictable.
I see them as a challenge to overcome through discipline.
I find them poetic, though they may lead to periods of deep reflection.
I trust my intuition and the energy of the situation to guide me.
I am initially skeptical if they disrupt my curated environment.
I approach them with caution and prioritize safety and logic.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments makes you feel most at home?

options.text: A place with a bit of edge, like a rainy forest or an old library.
A high-energy setting where I can stay active and visible.
A secluded, scenic spot by the water where I can be alone with my thoughts.
A vibrant, colorful space filled with handmade items and positive vibes.
A clean, fashionable, and well-organized space that looks great in photos.
A quiet, professional, and secure space equipped with the tools I need.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a potential partner?

options.text: A shared sense of adventure and a rebellious spirit.
Support for my ambitions and someone who sees the heart behind the mask.
A romantic soul who can be my muse and appreciate the finer things.
An open-minded person who respects my spiritual journey and individuality.
Someone who challenges my perspectives and appreciates my growth.
A reliable partner who provides security and encourages me to take flight.

topics.display_name: Social Media Platform Vibe

synopsis.title: Which Social Media Platform Matches Your Soul's Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder why you feel at home in a chaotic thread but lost in a curated aesthetic feed? Your digital energy says a lot about how you process the world and connect with others. Take this quiz to discover which social media platform perfectly encapsulates your unique personality and social battery.

characters.name: Twitter
characters.short_description: You are a fast-paced conversationalist who thrives on real-time updates and sharp-witted discourse.
characters.profile_text:
You are the pulse of the moment, always ready with a quick retort or a breaking news update. Your mind moves at the speed of a scrolling feed, processing information in bite-sized chunks and finding the humor or the outrage in every situation. You value brevity and wit above all else, believing that if something cannot be said in a few sentences, it might not be worth saying at all. You are likely the first to know about a global event and the first to share a meme about it, making you a central hub for cultural commentary.

However, your constant engagement with the "now" can lead to a sense of urgency that borders on exhaustion. You might find yourself caught in endless debates or doomscrolling through negativity, losing sight of the bigger picture in favor of winning a momentary argument. Your strength lies in your connectivity and sharp intellect, but your pitfall is a tendency toward cynicism. Learning to step back from the digital roar is essential for your mental clarity and long-term peace of mind.

characters.name: Instagram
characters.short_description: You are a visual storyteller who appreciates aesthetics, curated experiences, and the art of the perfect moment.
characters.profile_text:
You have a keen eye for beauty and a talent for framing your life in the most flattering light possible. Whether it is a perfectly plated meal or a sunset over the ocean, you understand the power of an image to convey emotion and status. You are likely someone who values personal branding and social connection, using your platform to document your journey and stay inspired by the lifestyles of others. Your world is one of vibrant colors, carefully chosen filters, and a deep appreciation for the visual grid of your life.

The challenge you face is the pressure to maintain a flawless facade. You may sometimes struggle with the gap between your curated online presence and the messy reality of daily existence. This can lead to feelings of inadequacy or a constant need for external validation through likes and comments. While your ability to find beauty everywhere is a gift, remember that your worth is not defined by your engagement metrics. Embracing the unpolished moments will bring a sense of authenticity to your creative spirit and help you connect more deeply with others.

characters.name: TikTok
characters.short_description: You are an energetic trendsetter who finds joy in creative expression, rhythmic movement, and spontaneous entertainment.
characters.profile_text:
You are the life of the party, always ready to jump on the latest trend or start a new one yourself. Your creativity is boundless and often expressed through music, dance, or quick-fire humor that resonates with a global audience. You have an uncanny ability to capture attention in seconds, mastering the art of the hook and the drop. For you, life is a series of short, high-energy clips, and you are constantly looking for the next soundbite that will define your day. You thrive on the unexpected and the viral.

Because you move so quickly from one interest to the next, you might find it difficult to focus on long-term projects or deep, sustained concentration. Your attention span is optimized for variety, which makes you incredibly adaptable but sometimes leaves you feeling scattered. You thrive on the algorithm's unpredictability, but this can also lead to hours of mindless consumption. Balancing your high-octane creative output with moments of quiet reflection will help you maintain your vibrant energy without burning out in the fast-moving digital landscape.

characters.name: Reddit
characters.short_description: You are a deep-diver and community seeker who values niche knowledge, anonymity, and the collective wisdom of the crowd.
characters.profile_text:
You are less interested in personal fame and more focused on the pursuit of information and shared interests. You likely spend your time exploring specific subcultures, from technical hobbies to obscure fan theories, seeking out the upvoted truth in a sea of opinions. You value the democratic nature of discourse where the best ideas rise to the top, and you are not afraid to engage in long-form debates or provide detailed advice to a stranger. Your identity is tied to the communities you frequent rather than a singular profile.

Your preference for anonymity can sometimes lead to a lack of accountability or a tendency to get lost in echo chambers where your views are never challenged. You might also find yourself becoming overly critical or pedantic when others do not meet your standards of logic or evidence. While your intellectual curiosity is your greatest asset, it is important to remember the human element behind the screen. Cultivating empathy alongside your quest for facts will make your community contributions even more impactful and rewarding.

characters.name: Pinterest
characters.short_description: You are a visionary planner and curator who uses inspiration to manifest a more beautiful and organized future.
characters.profile_text:
You are a dreamer with a plan, constantly gathering ideas for your next project, home renovation, or personal style evolution. You see the world as a collection of possibilities, and you take great joy in organizing these inspirations into cohesive boards that reflect your aspirations. Unlike other social archetypes, you are often more focused on your own future than on what others are doing right now. You possess a quiet, focused creativity that manifests in DIY projects, recipes, and aesthetic mood boards that serve as a blueprint for your life.

However, your tendency to live in the future perfect can sometimes prevent you from enjoying the present moment. You may find yourself stuck in the planning phase, accumulating thousands of ideas without ever taking the first step toward execution. This aspirational paralysis can lead to a sense of dissatisfaction with your current surroundings. Your strength is your ability to visualize what could be, but your challenge is to bring those visions to life. Turning your digital pins into physical reality is where your true satisfaction and growth will be found.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to consume information during a short break?

options.text: Skimming headlines and short, punchy opinions.
Scrolling through beautiful imagery and lifestyle updates.
Watching short, high-energy videos that make me laugh.
Reading detailed threads on specific, niche topics.
Browsing curated collections of ideas for future projects.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation for sharing content online?

options.text: To contribute to a fast-moving conversation or debate.
To document a beautiful moment or personal milestone.
To entertain others or participate in a viral trend.
To share knowledge or seek advice within a community.
To organize my thoughts and save inspiration for later.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which digital atmosphere feels most comfortable to you?

options.text: A fast-paced, text-driven environment where wit is king.
A polished, visual space focused on aesthetics and curation.
A high-energy, audio-visual stream that feels spontaneous.
An anonymous forum where the quality of the idea matters most.
A quiet, solitary space for planning and manifesting goals.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react to a major cultural event?

options.text: I look for the sharpest or funniest commentary immediately.
I look for the most iconic or visually striking images.
I look for creative video reactions or musical remixes.
I look for a deep-dive explanation or a technical breakdown.
I look for how it might influence my future style or projects.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your biggest digital pet peeve?

options.text: People who take things too seriously or can't take a joke.
Cluttered, unappealing layouts or low-quality photos.
Content that is slow-paced, boring, or lacks energy.
Surface-level discussions that lack evidence or logic.
Chaotic environments that make it hard to find what I've saved.

topics.display_name: Hero Shooter Role

synopsis.title: Which Hero Shooter Role Best Fits Your Playstyle?
synopsis.summary: Discover your essential place on the battlefield by analyzing your tactical preferences and mechanical strengths. Whether you prefer leading the charge, dealing massive damage, or keeping your teammates alive, this quiz identifies your optimal team contribution. Find out if you are the backbone of the defense or the spearhead of the attack.

characters.name: Tank
characters.short_description: You are the frontline anchor who absorbs pressure and dictates the flow of battle through superior durability and crowd control.
characters.profile_text:
You thrive in the thick of the fight, acting as the physical barrier between your teammates and the opposition. Your primary objective is to create space, using your high health pool and defensive abilities to force the enemy team to react to your presence. You are often the one to initiate engagements, deciding when to push forward and when to hold the line. Your presence alone provides a sense of security for your allies, allowing them to operate effectively under your protection.

However, playing this role requires a deep understanding of positioning and resource management. You must balance your aggression with survival, as overextending can leave your team vulnerable and without a leader. While you possess significant power, your large hitbox makes you an easy target for focused fire. Success for you comes from knowing how to mitigate damage while simultaneously disrupting the enemy's formation, ensuring your team maintains control over the objective at all times.

characters.name: Damage
characters.short_description: You are the primary offensive force responsible for securing eliminations and applying relentless pressure to the enemy team.
characters.profile_text:
You focus on high-impact output, utilizing a diverse kit of weaponry and abilities to dismantle the opposition's defenses. Whether you prefer flanking from the shadows, sniping from a distance, or engaging in direct brawls, your goal remains the same: neutralize threats as quickly as possible. You possess the mobility or raw firepower needed to turn the tide of a skirmish in seconds. Your playstyle is often defined by precision and timing, as you wait for the perfect moment to strike and capitalize on enemy mistakes.

Despite your high lethality, you are often more fragile than your teammates, making you a priority target for the enemy. You must rely on your reflexes and game sense to avoid being caught out of position. A common pitfall for you is focusing too much on your individual score rather than coordinating with your team to secure objectives. When you master the balance of aggression and self-preservation, you become the decisive factor that breaks through even the toughest enemy compositions.

characters.name: Support
characters.short_description: You are the strategic backbone of the team, providing essential healing, utility, and buffs to keep your allies in the fight.
characters.profile_text:
You prioritize the well-being and efficiency of your teammates over individual glory, acting as the glue that holds the group together. Your kit is designed to sustain your allies through intense combat, whether by restoring health, granting shields, or enhancing their damage output. You possess a unique perspective on the battlefield, often tracking the status of every teammate and anticipating where your assistance will be needed most. Your ability to keep a key player alive during a critical moment can be more impactful than any single elimination.

The challenge of your role lies in your vulnerability and the constant need for situational awareness. Enemies will often target you first to collapse your team's endurance, requiring you to master defensive positioning and use your utility to escape danger. You must also manage your cooldowns carefully, ensuring you have the right tools available when a crisis arises. While you may not always be in the spotlight, your tactical contributions and life-saving interventions are the foundation upon which every victory is built.

baseline_questions.question_text: When an engagement begins, what is your primary focus on the battlefield?

options.text: Positioning myself at the front to absorb incoming fire and create space.
Identifying and neutralizing high-priority enemy targets as quickly as possible.
Monitoring the status of my teammates to provide healing or tactical buffs.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which mechanical skill do you prioritize most during gameplay?

options.text: Resource management of shields and defensive cooldowns.
Precision aiming and high-reflex movement for offensive output.
Situational awareness and timing of utility abilities to assist others.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when the enemy team launches a coordinated push?

options.text: I stand my ground and use crowd control to disrupt their momentum.
I look for a flanking opportunity to punish their aggressive positioning.
I retreat to a safe distance while ensuring my allies stay alive through the pressure.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be the most satisfying contribution to a victory?

options.text: Successfully initiating a fight and dictating where the battle takes place.
Securing the final blows that collapse the enemy's defensive line.
Saving a teammate from certain death with a well-timed intervention.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these drawbacks are you most willing to tolerate in a character kit?

options.text: A large hitbox that makes me an easy target for the enemy.
Low health and high vulnerability if caught out of position.
Limited individual damage output and a reliance on teammates to finish kills.

topics.display_name: Super Mario Character

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Super Mario Character Matches Your Personality?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you are the hero of the Mushroom Kingdom or the one causing all the chaos? From brave plumbers to sassy princesses and mischievous villains, every character brings a unique vibe to the party. Take this quiz to discover which legendary Mario character truly reflects your inner spirit!

characters.name: Mario
characters.short_description: The legendary Mushroom Kingdom hero known for his bravery, red cap, and incredible jumping ability.
characters.profile_text: You are the quintessential hero, always ready to leap into action when duty calls. Your optimistic spirit and unwavering determination allow you to face any obstacle, from fire-breathing dragons to treacherous platforming challenges. You possess a versatile set of skills, making you a jack-of-all-trades who can adapt to any situation, whether it involves racing karts or exploring galaxy-spanning worlds. However, your strong sense of justice sometimes leads you to take on more than you can handle alone. You value your friends and family above all else, often putting their safety before your own. While you are generally cheerful, you can be quite competitive when it comes to sports or games. Your legacy is built on a foundation of courage and a refusal to give up, no matter how many times you might fall.

characters.name: Luigi
characters.short_description: Mario's younger, taller brother who overcomes his cautious nature to save the day with his unique high-jumping skills.
characters.profile_text: You are a sensitive and cautious soul who often finds yourself in the shadow of your more famous brother. Despite your frequent bouts of anxiety and your tendency to tremble at the sight of ghosts, you possess a hidden well of bravery that emerges when your loved ones are in danger. Your physical attributes, such as your impressive vertical leap and slightly slippery traction, set you apart and allow you to navigate environments in ways others cannot. You often prefer the quiet life but are constantly pulled into grand adventures that test your mettle. Your humility is one of your greatest strengths, as you do not seek the spotlight, yet you are always there to provide support when it matters most. Sometimes your self-doubt can hold you back, but your loyalty is absolute. You prove that true courage isn't the absence of fear, but the ability to move forward despite it.

characters.name: Princess Peach
characters.short_description: The graceful ruler of the Mushroom Kingdom who balances her royal duties with a surprising proficiency in magic and athletics.
characters.profile_text: You are a poised and compassionate leader who deeply cares for the well-being of your subjects and the harmony of your kingdom. While you are often the target of kidnapping plots, you are far from a helpless figure, frequently demonstrating your own unique abilities like floating through the air or using your parasol for defense. You have a penchant for the color pink and enjoy baking cakes, but you are equally at home on the tennis court or behind the wheel of a high-speed racing machine. Your kindness is your defining trait, allowing you to see the good in almost everyone, though this can sometimes make you a bit too trusting of those with ill intentions. You possess a quiet inner strength and a magical affinity that manifests in moments of great need. Your presence brings a sense of calm and elegance to any situation, and you remain a beacon of hope for the entire Mushroom Kingdom.

characters.name: Bowser
characters.short_description: The powerful King of the Koopas who uses his immense strength and fire-breathing abilities in a persistent quest for conquest.
characters.profile_text: You are a formidable force of nature, driven by a desire for power and a stubborn refusal to accept defeat. As the leader of the Koopa Troop, you command a vast army and possess incredible physical might, complemented by your ability to exhale devastating blasts of flame. Your personality is boisterous and often intimidating, yet you also harbor a surprisingly soft spot for your son, Bowser Jr., showing a complex side to your villainous exterior. You are highly persistent, returning time and again with increasingly elaborate schemes to expand your empire or capture your rival's attention. Your ego is as large as your spiked shell, which can lead to your downfall when you underestimate the ingenuity of your opponents. Despite your antagonistic role, you have occasionally joined forces with your enemies when a greater threat looms, proving that your motivations are not always purely destructive. You thrive on competition and the thrill of the chase.

characters.name: Yoshi
characters.short_description: A cheerful and loyal dinosaur from Yoshi's Island who assists his friends with his long tongue and incredible appetite.
characters.profile_text: You are a dependable and energetic companion, known for your vibrant colors and your willingness to carry others through dangerous terrain. Your unique digestive system allows you to transform enemies into eggs, which you then use as versatile projectiles to solve puzzles or defeat foes. You have a playful nature and a deep love for fruit, often letting your stomach guide your path. Your flutter jump gives you a distinct advantage in reaching high places, showcasing your agility and resourcefulness. While you are incredibly helpful, your innocent outlook can sometimes lead you into tricky situations if you aren't careful. You are the ultimate team player, always putting the needs of your group first and providing a morale boost with your upbeat attitude. Your bond with your friends is unbreakable, and you are always ready to embark on a new journey at a moment's notice.

characters.name: Toad
characters.short_description: A dedicated and hardworking citizen of the Mushroom Kingdom who serves as a loyal attendant to Princess Peach.
characters.profile_text: You are a spirited and industrious individual, often found scurrying about to ensure the Mushroom Kingdom runs smoothly. Despite your small stature, you possess a surprising amount of speed and strength, making you a valuable asset during adventures or sporting events. You are characterized by your distinctive mushroom cap and your high-pitched, enthusiastic voice, which reflects your generally positive outlook on life. While you can be prone to panic when things go wrong, your dedication to your duties and your friends usually helps you find your footing quickly. You take great pride in your role as a protector and assistant, often providing crucial items or information to those in need. Your tendency to be a bit high-strung can be a pitfall, but your heart is always in the right place. You represent the resilient spirit of your people, proving that even the smallest person can make a big difference.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a sudden challenge arises, what is your immediate instinctive reaction?

options.text: I jump straight into action without overthinking it.
I feel a wave of anxiety but prepare to face it anyway.
I try to maintain my composure and look for a diplomatic or magical solution.
I use my strength to dominate the situation and take control.
I look for ways to support my friends and help them through it.
I might panic momentarily, but I quickly get to work on the logistics.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically prefer to spend your free time?

options.text: Engaging in competitive sports or exploring new places.
Relaxing at home where it is quiet and safe.
Baking, hosting social gatherings, or enjoying the arts.
Planning my next big move or asserting my influence.
Snacking on my favorite foods and playing outdoors.
Staying busy with chores or helping others finish their tasks.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest strength when working in a group?

options.text: My versatility and ability to adapt to any role needed.
My loyalty and the unique perspective I bring from the sidelines.
My ability to keep the peace and provide emotional support.
My natural leadership and commanding presence.
My high energy and willingness to carry the heavy load.
My speed, efficiency, and attention to detail.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle being in the spotlight?

options.text: I embrace it; I'm used to being the one people look to.
I find it quite intimidating and prefer to stay in the background.
I handle it with grace and use the platform to inspire others.
I demand it; I want everyone to know who is in charge.
I don't mind it as long as I'm with my friends.
I'm usually too busy working to notice if people are watching.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these traits do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Unwavering determination.
Hidden courage.
Kindness and empathy.
Ambition and power.
Reliability and playfulness.
Diligence and spirit.

topics.display_name: Primary Learning Style

synopsis.title: Which Legendary Genius Matches Your Primary Learning Style?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder why you can remember a song lyric from 2005 but forget where you put your keys two seconds ago? Your brain has a unique way of soaking up the world, and it’s time to find out which legendary figure shares your intellectual DNA. Take this quiz to discover if your learning style matches a master artist, a musical genius, or a literary icon. Stop struggling with boring study methods and embrace the way you were born to learn!

characters.name: Leonardo da Vinci
characters.short_description: You absorb the world through observation, sketching connections between disparate fields to understand the underlying mechanics of reality.
characters.profile_text:
You are a visual thinker who thrives on the intersection of art and science, finding that a single diagram can often reveal more than a thousand words. Your mind functions like a complex map where every observation is a node connected to a dozen others, allowing you to see patterns that others miss. You prefer to learn by doing and drawing, using your keen eye to dissect the physical world and reconstruct it in your imagination. This holistic approach makes you an incredible problem solver, as you rarely view a challenge in isolation.

However, your insatiable curiosity can sometimes lead to a lack of focus, as you are easily distracted by the next fascinating mystery before finishing the current one. You might find traditional, linear instruction stifling, preferring instead to wander through a subject at your own pace. To truly excel, you must learn to bridge the gap between your grand visions and the practical steps required to bring them to life. Your strength lies in your ability to synthesize information across boundaries, making you a true polymath in any environment.

characters.name: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart
characters.short_description: You process information through rhythm, tone, and sequence, finding harmony in complex data and learning best when there is a melodic flow to the material.
characters.profile_text:
Your world is defined by sound and structure, and you possess an uncanny ability to hear the underlying music in any new concept. You learn best when information is presented with a clear cadence or when you can use auditory cues to memorize and organize facts. For you, a lecture is not just a series of words but a performance, and you are highly sensitive to the tone and delivery of the speaker. You often find yourself humming or tapping out rhythms while you work, using these physical movements to anchor your thoughts and maintain your focus.

While your ability to grasp complex patterns quickly is a major asset, you may struggle in environments that are overly silent or visually cluttered without a clear narrative thread. You might become impatient with slow-paced instruction, as your mind often leaps ahead to the resolution of a logical sequence. By leaning into your natural sense of timing and structure, you can master intricate systems with an elegance that seems effortless to observers. Your challenge is to stay grounded when the music stops, ensuring you can still function in less rhythmic settings.

characters.name: Jane Austen
characters.short_description: You master new concepts through the power of language, storytelling, and the nuanced observation of human interactions.
characters.profile_text:
You have a profound appreciation for the written and spoken word, believing that anything worth knowing can be better understood through a well-crafted narrative. Your learning style is deeply rooted in communication; you process ideas by discussing them, writing about them, or observing how they play out in social dynamics. You possess a sharp wit and a keen eye for detail, often picking up on subtle subtexts that others overlook. For you, the best way to internalize a new theory is to see it applied to real people and their complex motivations.

Your strength lies in your ability to articulate difficult concepts with clarity and charm, making you an excellent collaborator and teacher. However, you may find yourself overly focused on the human element rather than technical mechanics, occasionally neglecting raw data in favor of the story. You might also struggle with abstract concepts that lack a personal or social context. By integrating your love for language with structured analysis, you can turn any subject into a compelling story that sticks in your memory and the memories of those around you.

characters.name: Marie Curie
characters.short_description: You learn through rigorous experimentation, logical deduction, and the hands-on pursuit of empirical evidence.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a need for precision and a desire to uncover the fundamental truths of the universe through systematic investigation. Your learning style is characterized by a tireless dedication to the scientific method; you are not content with hearsay and must prove things for yourself through trial and error. You thrive in environments where you can interact physically with your subject matter, whether that means conducting experiments in a lab or meticulously organizing data into logical frameworks. Your focus is legendary, allowing you to tune out distractions and delve deep into the most challenging problems.

While your analytical mind is your greatest tool, your preference for hard facts can sometimes make you skeptical of intuitive or creative approaches that lack immediate proof. You may find it difficult to pivot when a long-held hypothesis is challenged, as you invest a great deal of yourself in your findings. It is important for you to remember that not all valuable insights can be measured in a beaker or calculated on a page. By balancing your intense drive for accuracy with a willingness to explore the unknown, you become an unstoppable force of discovery and innovation.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are trying to understand a complex new system, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Look at a blueprint or sketch its internal parts to see the connections.
Listen to the sound it makes or have someone explain the process aloud.
Read the manual or discuss its purpose and social impact with an expert.
Take it apart and put it back together to see how it functions physically.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you most easily remember a set of random facts or data points?

options.text: I visualize them as locations on a mental map or images in a gallery.
I turn them into a song, rhyme, or a specific rhythmic sequence.
I weave them into a story or associate them with specific personalities.
I categorize them into a logical system or a physical hierarchy.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of creative challenge most excites your curiosity?

options.text: Designing a multi-disciplinary invention that bridges art and engineering.
Composing a complex arrangement where every part must fit a specific timing.
Writing an insightful critique of human behaviors and relationships.
Conducting a long-term study to isolate a specific variable in a lab.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a learning environment, what do you find most frustrating?

options.text: Being forced to follow a linear path without seeing the 'big picture' visually.
A chaotic atmosphere with no clear tempo or logical progression.
Abstract data that has no connection to real human experiences or stories.
Theories that are presented as facts without any empirical evidence or testing.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically organize your thoughts when planning a large project?

options.text: I create a visual mind map with arrows connecting different ideas.
I establish a rhythmic schedule and focus on the 'tempo' of the work.
I write out a detailed narrative or talk through the plan with a partner.
I build a structured spreadsheet or a list of logical requirements.

topics.display_name: Among Us Crewmate Color

synopsis.title: Which Among Us Color Matches Your True Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Are you the silent observer or the one shouting 'SUS' in every meeting? Your choice of color in the lobby says more about your survival strategy than you think. Take this quiz to find out which iconic crewmate hue perfectly captures your playstyle and personality.

characters.name: Red
characters.short_description: You are the high-stakes protagonist who commands attention and often finds yourself at the center of every heated debate.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an undeniable presence that makes you impossible to ignore, whether you are leading a charge toward tasks or defending your innocence in the cafeteria. Your energy is assertive and direct, often making you the first to speak up when something feels off. This boldness is your greatest strength, allowing you to take charge in chaotic situations and rally others toward a common goal. You thrive in the heat of the moment, preferring action over hesitation and movement over stillness. Your preference for being in the thick of things means you rarely stay in one room for long, always moving with a sense of purpose.

However, your high visibility often makes you an easy target for suspicion, as your intensity can be mistaken for aggression by more cautious crewmates. While your confidence can intimidate some, those who trust you know that you are a fiercely loyal ally who will go to great lengths to protect the group. Your primary pitfall lies in your tendency to act before thinking, which can lead to misunderstandings or being framed by more subtle players. You must learn to balance your natural leadership with a bit of restraint to avoid being the first one ejected into the void.

characters.name: Blue
characters.short_description: You are the calm, collected observer who relies on logic and consistency to navigate the complexities of the ship.
characters.profile_text:
You approach every situation with a cool head and a steady hand, prioritizing facts over emotional outbursts. You are the type of player who keeps a mental log of everyone’s movements, noticing the small inconsistencies that others might overlook during a crisis. Your strength lies in your reliability; when you say you were in Navigation, people tend to believe you because your track record is spotless. You prefer a structured environment where tasks are completed efficiently and communication is clear. This analytical nature makes you a formidable opponent for any impostor, as you are difficult to rattle and even harder to deceive.

However, your stoic demeanor can sometimes be perceived as cold or detached, leading others to wonder what you are hiding behind that calm exterior. You might struggle to connect with more impulsive teammates, finding their lack of strategy frustrating or even suspicious. Your preference for staying in the background allows you to gather information safely, but it can also mean you are overlooked when it comes time to make critical decisions. To succeed, you must ensure that your logical conclusions are shared with the group in a way that builds trust rather than distance.

characters.name: Black
