characters.short_description: You are a quiet, observant strategist who prefers to work from the periphery while keeping a sharp eye on the bigger picture.
characters.profile_text:
You move through the ship with a quiet intensity, often preferring to complete your tasks in solitude rather than joining the crowd. Your strength is your ability to blend into the background, allowing you to witness events without being noticed yourself. You are naturally skeptical and rarely take words at face value, preferring to wait for concrete evidence before casting your vote. This cautious approach makes you incredibly difficult to catch off guard, as you are always thinking three steps ahead of everyone else. You value efficiency and silence, finding the constant chatter of meetings more of a distraction than a help.

Your pitfall is your tendency to isolate yourself, which can make you appear suspicious to those who do not understand your need for space. While you are a powerful ally when your interests align with the group, your independent streak can make it hard for others to fully trust you. You excel in high-pressure situations where quick, logical thinking is required, often being the one to solve a crisis while others are still panicking. By occasionally stepping out of the shadows to validate your allies, you can turn your solitary strength into a collective advantage.

characters.name: Pink
characters.short_description: You are the heart of the crew, using your social intuition and charm to maintain harmony and build trust among your peers.
characters.profile_text:
You bring a sense of warmth and approachability to the ship, often acting as the glue that holds the team together during stressful rounds. Your strength lies in your emotional intelligence; you are quick to pick up on the vibes of the room and can often tell when someone is lying just by the tone of their voice. You prefer to work in pairs or small groups, believing that there is safety and strength in numbers. Your friendly nature makes it easy for others to trust you, and you often find yourself acting as a mediator during heated arguments in the meeting room.

However, your desire for harmony can sometimes lead you to be overly trusting, making you vulnerable to manipulation by those with darker intentions. You might struggle to make the hard calls when a friend is accused, as you value your relationships deeply and hate to see the group divided. Your preference for social interaction means you are often the most vocal during discussions, using your charm to sway the group toward a peaceful resolution. To truly protect your crew, you must learn to combine your kindness with a healthy dose of skepticism, ensuring your empathy isn't used against you.

characters.name: White
characters.short_description: You are a beacon of clarity and order, striving for total transparency and flawless execution in everything you do.
characters.profile_text:
You hold yourself and others to a high standard, believing that the key to survival is absolute honesty and meticulous attention to detail. Your strength is your transparency; you are often the first to report a body or call a meeting, and you do so with a level of detail that leaves little room for doubt. You prefer a clean, organized approach to tasks and can become frustrated when others are careless or vague about their whereabouts. This commitment to the truth makes you a pillar of the community, as your word is often seen as the gold standard of reliability.

However, your rigid adherence to rules and logic can make you appear inflexible or even judgmental toward those who play more loosely. You might find it difficult to adapt when the situation becomes messy or when the truth is obscured by layers of deception. Your pitfall is your expectation that everyone else is playing as fairly as you are, which can leave you blindsided by a clever impostor who knows how to mimic your perfection. You thrive when you can lead by example, showing the crew that through discipline and honesty, any threat can be overcome, provided you remain open to the unpredictable nature of others.

characters.name: Green
characters.short_description: You are a down-to-earth and dependable presence, focusing on the practical needs of the ship and the safety of your crewmates.
characters.profile_text:
You are the type of person who keeps their head down and gets the job done, valuing hard work and tangible results over theories and speculation. Your strength lies in your common sense; you are rarely swayed by wild accusations and prefer to stick to what you have seen with your own eyes. You are a protective soul, often keeping an eye on the younger or more vulnerable members of the crew to ensure they aren't left alone in dangerous areas. This grounded nature makes you a comforting presence during a crisis, as you are often the one to suggest a practical solution while others are spinning their wheels.

However, your focus on the immediate and the practical can sometimes cause you to miss the more subtle, long-term strategies being played around you. You might be slow to suspect someone you have deemed a friend, as your loyalty is deeply rooted and not easily shaken. Your preference for stability means you are often the one maintaining the engines or fixing the lights, ensuring the ship keeps running smoothly. While you may not be the loudest voice in the room, your steady contributions are the foundation of the crew's success. Your challenge is to look beyond the physical tasks and recognize the psychological games being played in the shadows.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a high-pressure group setting, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The assertive leader who takes charge of the conversation.
The analytical observer who looks for logical inconsistencies.
The quiet strategist who watches from the periphery.
The social glue who tries to keep everyone calm and united.
The detail-oriented reporter who demands total transparency.
The practical worker who focuses on getting the job done.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when you notice something is slightly out of place?

options.text: I call it out immediately to see how others react.
I keep it to myself and wait for more evidence to emerge.
I fix it myself quietly without making a scene.
I ask a trusted friend if they noticed the same thing.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when working on a complex team project?

options.text: Achieving a flawless, high-quality result through order.
Ensuring the group remains harmonious and supportive.
Solving the most difficult technical puzzles involved.
Being the driving force that moves the project forward.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your ideal way to spend a free afternoon?

options.text: In the middle of a lively social gathering.
Engrossed in a solitary hobby that requires deep focus.
Organizing my environment to ensure everything is in its place.
Helping a friend or family member with a practical task.

baseline_questions.question_text: When someone challenges your integrity or honesty, what is your first instinct?

options.text: To provide a detailed, factual account of my actions.
To confront the accuser directly and defend my position.
To feel hurt and try to understand why they don't trust me.
To stay calm and let my consistent track record speak for itself.

topics.display_name: Star Wars Force Path

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Star Wars Force User Matches Your Inner Path?
synopsis.summary: The Force flows through all living things, but how you choose to wield it defines your destiny in the galaxy. Whether you seek the serenity of the Light, the raw power of the Dark, or the balance of the Grey, your choices reveal your true master. Take this quiz to discover which legendary Force user aligns with your spirit and where your journey leads.

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.short_description: A beacon of hope who balances the light side with a deep sense of compassion and redemption.
characters.profile_text: You are a symbol of resilience and the transformative power of belief. Like the farm boy who became a Jedi Master, you possess a natural talent for seeing the good in others, even when they cannot see it in themselves. Your journey is defined by a willingness to face your inner darkness and emerge stronger, choosing peace and purpose over the easy path of anger. You value family and legacy, often carrying the weight of the world on your shoulders while striving to do what is right. Your deep emotional attachments can sometimes lead to impulsive decisions or moments of profound doubt. You might struggle with the pressure of living up to a legendary reputation, occasionally retreating into isolation when the burden becomes too heavy. However, your ability to return to the light and forgive yourself is your greatest strength, ensuring that you remain a guiding star for those lost in the shadows.

characters.name: Darth Vader
characters.short_description: A formidable enforcer of the dark side driven by loss, discipline, and an overwhelming presence.
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature, characterized by an iron will and a relentless pursuit of order. Your path is one of intense passion and tragic sacrifice, where your immense power is often fueled by the pain of your past. You command respect through sheer presence and tactical brilliance, rarely tolerating failure in yourself or others. In your world, strength is the only currency that matters, and you use it to impose your vision upon a chaotic galaxy. Your greatest weakness lies in the very emotions that give you strength—anger and grief. These feelings can blind you to the manipulation of others and trap you in a cycle of suffering. While you appear invincible, there is a flicker of conflict deep within you that you struggle to suppress. Balancing your desire for control with the need for emotional healing is your ultimate challenge, as the shadow you cast is often as long as the one you live in.

characters.name: Yoda
characters.short_description: A wise and patient mentor who emphasizes mindfulness, discipline, and the interconnectedness of all living things.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of perspective, viewing the universe through the lens of centuries of experience and quiet contemplation. Your approach to life is rooted in the belief that size and physical might are secondary to the power of the mind and the spirit. You value teaching and guidance, often speaking in riddles to encourage others to find their own truths. Your calm demeanor and mastery over your impulses make you a pillar of stability in times of great upheaval. Your adherence to tradition and long-term planning can sometimes make you appear detached or slow to act in the face of immediate crises. You may struggle with the changing tides of the era, finding it difficult to adapt your ancient wisdom to rapidly evolving circumstances. Despite this, your commitment to the light is unwavering, and your legacy is built on the growth of those you have mentored, proving that true power lies in patience and humility.

characters.name: Emperor Palpatine
characters.short_description: A master manipulator who uses cunning, patience, and absolute authority to reshape the galaxy to his will.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate architect of your own destiny, possessing a chillingly brilliant mind for strategy and political maneuvering. You thrive on secrecy and the slow accumulation of influence, waiting for the perfect moment to strike and seize total control. Your understanding of human nature allows you to exploit the weaknesses of others, turning their fears and desires into tools for your own advancement. You do not just participate in the game; you create the rules and ensure you are the only one who can win. Your arrogance and absolute certainty in your own superiority are your most dangerous flaws. By underestimating the power of selfless love and the unpredictability of the human spirit, you leave yourself vulnerable to the very things you cannot quantify or control. Your obsession with eternal power can lead to a profound isolation, as you view everyone around you as either a pawn or a threat. In the end, the very empire you built on fear may crumble under the weight of its own tyranny.

characters.name: Ahsoka Tano
characters.short_description: A resilient and independent warrior who follows her own moral compass outside the traditional structures of power.
characters.profile_text: You are a survivor who has learned to trust your instincts above all else. Having walked away from established institutions that failed to live up to their ideals, you forge your own path with courage and integrity. You are a natural leader who leads by example, often standing up for the marginalized and the forgotten. Your combat skills are matched only by your emotional intelligence, allowing you to connect with people from all walks of life while maintaining your personal autonomy. Your independence can sometimes lead to a sense of loneliness or a reluctance to fully commit to new organizations. Because you have been let down by those you trusted in the past, you may find it difficult to lower your guard or accept help when you need it most. However, your ability to remain true to yourself in a galaxy of shifting loyalties is your defining trait, making you a beacon for those who seek justice without the baggage of dogma.

characters.name: Qui-Gon Jinn
characters.short_description: A maverick philosopher who prioritizes the living Force and the present moment over rigid codes and bureaucracy.
characters.profile_text: You are a deep thinker who finds beauty and meaning in the immediate world around you. Unlike those who are obsessed with the future or the past, you focus on the living Force, believing that true wisdom comes from listening to the universe in the here and now. You are often seen as a rebel because you are willing to defy authority if it conflicts with what you know to be right. Your compassion extends to all creatures, and you have a unique knack for discovering potential in the most unlikely places. Your tendency to follow your own intuition can lead to friction with your peers and superiors, sometimes causing you to be sidelined or misunderstood. You may become so focused on a single cause or individual that you overlook the broader political implications of your actions. While your unconventional methods often yield extraordinary results, they also carry a high risk of unintended consequences. Nevertheless, your legacy is one of profound influence, as your willingness to challenge the status quo paves the way for future generations.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex moral dilemma, what is your primary guiding principle?

options.text: The established rules and traditions of my community.
My personal intuition and the immediate needs of those involved.
The long-term strategic advantage and the acquisition of influence.
A commitment to justice, even if it means standing alone.
The restoration of order and the elimination of chaos.
Compassion and the belief that anyone can be redeemed.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically respond to a significant personal failure or setback?

options.text: I meditate on the lesson and accept it as the will of the universe.
I channel my frustration into a relentless drive to succeed next time.
I analyze the situation to see how I can manipulate the outcome in the future.
I distance myself from the situation to re-evaluate my path independently.
I feel a deep sense of guilt but strive to make amends and move forward.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most conducive to your personal growth?

options.text: A quiet, natural setting far from the distractions of civilization.
The front lines of a conflict where I can protect the innocent.
A position of high authority where I can shape the world's structure.
A place of learning where ancient wisdom is preserved and taught.
The open road, moving between worlds and helping where I am needed.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your perspective on the use of power and influence?

options.text: Power is a dangerous tool that must be tempered by extreme discipline.
Power is a means to an end, necessary to bring security to the galaxy.
Power should be decentralized and used only to serve the living moment.
Power is something to be seized and guarded to ensure total control.
Power is a burden one accepts to serve as a beacon for others.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view your relationship with those who have mentored or led you?

options.text: I hold them in the highest regard and follow their teachings strictly.
I respect them but am willing to challenge them if they lose their way.
I see them as obstacles to be surpassed or tools to be utilized.
I feel a complicated mix of loyalty and resentment due to past traumas.
I have moved beyond their shadow to define my own unique identity.

topics.display_name: Greek God Parentage

synopsis.title: Who Is Your Divine Parent? Discover Your Greek God Heritage!
synopsis.summary: Ever felt like you don't quite belong in the mortal world? Whether you're a natural-born leader or a dreamer with your head in the clouds, your personality might reveal a legendary lineage. Take this quiz to find out which Olympian deity is claiming you as their own!

characters.name: Zeus
characters.short_description: You are a natural-born leader who commands authority and possesses a grand vision for the future.
characters.profile_text:
As a child of Zeus, you possess an innate sense of authority and a magnetic presence that draws others toward your cause. You are driven by a desire to lead and organize, often finding yourself at the center of any social or professional circle. Your strengths lie in your decisiveness and your ability to see the big picture, making you a formidable strategist who isn't afraid to take charge when chaos ensues. You value justice and order, though your definition of these concepts often aligns with your own personal code of conduct. You have a natural talent for delegating tasks and inspiring confidence in those who follow you.

However, your confidence can sometimes veer into arrogance, leading you to believe that your perspective is the only valid one. You may struggle with restlessness, always seeking the next great challenge or conquest to prove your worth. Learning to temper your power with humility and listening to the counsel of others is essential for your growth. When you find balance, you become a truly benevolent force, capable of inspiring greatness in everyone around you and maintaining stability in even the most turbulent environments.

characters.name: Hera
characters.short_description: You are a guardian of tradition and loyalty, valuing deep-rooted connections and the sanctity of commitment.
characters.profile_text:
Being a child of Hera means you place an immense value on loyalty, family, and the enduring strength of long-term partnerships. You are the glue that holds your community together, often acting as a protector of traditions and a fierce advocate for those you love. Your sense of duty is unparalleled, and you take great pride in maintaining harmony within your inner circle. You possess a regal dignity and a sharp eye for social dynamics, allowing you to navigate complex relationships with grace and a touch of strategic foresight. You are often the one people turn to when they need a sense of belonging or a firm hand to guide them.

Your intense devotion can sometimes manifest as possessiveness or a tendency to hold onto grudges when you feel betrayed. You may find it difficult to forgive those who disrupt the order you work so hard to maintain, leading to a rigid outlook on morality. By learning to embrace change and understanding that not all disruptions are threats, you can channel your protective nature into a source of profound stability. Your ability to nurture lasting bonds is your greatest gift, provided you allow room for individual growth within those connections.

characters.name: Poseidon
characters.short_description: You are a person of deep emotional intensity and raw power, capable of both great calm and sudden, transformative storms.
characters.profile_text:
As a child of Poseidon, your personality is as vast and unpredictable as the ocean itself. You possess a rich inner world filled with intense emotions and a creative spark that can manifest in powerful, world-changing ways. You are deeply intuitive and often feel a strong connection to the natural world, finding solace in the ebb and flow of life's cycles. Your strengths lie in your authenticity and your refusal to hide your true self, making you a refreshing and honest presence in a world of pretension. You are fiercely protective of your domain and those you consider your own, showing a depth of passion that few can match.

Your volatility can be your greatest challenge, as your moods may shift rapidly from serene to tempestuous. You might struggle with impulsivity, acting on your feelings before considering the long-term consequences of your actions. When you feel slighted, your reactions can be overwhelming for those around you, sometimes causing unintended damage. Finding healthy outlets for your passion and learning to ground yourself during emotional surges will allow you to harness your immense power for constructive and healing purposes, turning your internal storms into a force for positive change.

characters.name: Demeter
characters.short_description: You are a nurturing soul who finds fulfillment in growth, sustenance, and the cyclical beauty of the natural world.
characters.profile_text:
Being a child of Demeter signifies that you are a natural caregiver with a profound ability to nurture both people and projects into fruition. You find deep satisfaction in the tangible results of your labor, whether that involves gardening, cooking, or mentoring others. Your patience is one of your greatest assets, allowing you to wait for the right moment to act and understanding that all good things take time to mature. You are grounded, practical, and possess a quiet strength that provides a sense of security to everyone in your life. You have a keen understanding of the needs of others and are often the first to offer support.

Your desire to protect and provide can sometimes lead to over-protectiveness or a struggle with letting go when it is time for others to find their own way. You may experience deep sorrow or a sense of loss when things change beyond your control, making it hard to adapt to the inevitable winters of life. By recognizing that cycles of loss are necessary for new growth, you can maintain your generous spirit without becoming drained by the needs of others. Your capacity for unconditional love is a rare and beautiful trait that can transform the lives of those you touch.

characters.name: Athena
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant strategist and a seeker of wisdom who approaches every challenge with logic, skill, and a cool head.
characters.profile_text:
As a child of Athena, you are defined by your intellect and your remarkable ability to solve complex problems through careful planning and observation. You value knowledge above all else and are likely a lifelong learner who enjoys mastering new crafts or academic disciplines. In times of crisis, you are the person others turn to for a rational perspective and a clear-headed plan of action. You possess a unique blend of creativity and practicality, allowing you to design solutions that are both innovative and functional. You take pride in your independence and your ability to remain objective even in highly emotional situations.

Your reliance on logic can sometimes make you appear detached or overly critical of those who are driven by emotion. You might find yourself over-analyzing situations to the point of paralysis, or struggling to connect with your own feelings when they don't fit into a logical framework. Learning to appreciate the messy, irrational side of human nature will enhance your leadership and help you build deeper connections. When you combine your sharp mind with empathy, you become an unstoppable force for progress and justice, capable of building structures that stand the test of time.

characters.name: Apollo
characters.short_description: You are a beacon of clarity and creativity, excelling in the arts, sciences, and the pursuit of truth.
characters.profile_text:
Being a child of Apollo means you are gifted with a bright, inquisitive mind and a natural talent for expression, whether through music, writing, or medicine. You strive for excellence in everything you do and possess a keen eye for beauty and order. Your optimism is infectious, and you often act as a source of inspiration and enlightenment for those around you. You value honesty and transparency, believing that the truth is the ultimate goal of any endeavor. Your ability to see things clearly allows you to cut through confusion and find the heart of any matter, making you an excellent communicator and teacher.

Your drive for perfection can lead to high levels of self-criticism and a tendency to be judgmental of others who do not meet your standards. You may struggle with the darker, more chaotic aspects of life, preferring to stay in the light where everything is orderly and understood. This can sometimes make you seem distant or elitist to those who are struggling with their own complexities. By embracing the shadows and acknowledging that imperfection is a vital part of the human experience, you can use your many talents to bring genuine healing and light to a complex world, rather than just seeking a flawless surface.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a group project falls into total disarray, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: Take command and assign roles to restore order.
Focus on keeping the team together and resolving interpersonal friction.
Express your frustration openly and push for a radical change in direction.
Patiently work on the foundational tasks that others are neglecting.
Step back to analyze the root cause and devise a logical plan.
Seek a creative solution that brings clarity and highlights the truth of the situation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself?

options.text: My ability to see the big picture and lead others toward it.
My unwavering loyalty to those I love and my community.
My deep emotional depth and refusal to hide my true self.
My capacity to nurture and sustain growth in people or projects.
My intellectual curiosity and ability to solve complex problems.
My pursuit of excellence and the clarity I bring to my work.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a significant personal disappointment?

options.text: I look for the next challenge to prove my worth and regain my status.
I lean on my traditions and the support of my closest inner circle.
I feel it intensely and let my emotions run their course like a storm.
I find solace in productive work, waiting for a new season of growth.
I retreat into my thoughts to understand the logic of why it happened.
I strive to find the underlying truth or lesson to improve myself.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred way to contribute to a community or organization?

options.text: Establishing the rules and structures that maintain stability.
Protecting the sanctity of existing bonds and shared traditions.
Challenging the status quo with raw, honest energy and passion.
Providing the practical resources and care people need to thrive.
Designing innovative systems and solving technical challenges.
Inspiring others through art, healing, or the pursuit of knowledge.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal challenges do you struggle with the most?

options.text: A sense of restlessness or a tendency toward arrogance.
Holding onto grudges or becoming overly possessive.
Mood volatility or acting on impulsive feelings.
Difficulty adapting to change or letting go of control.
Being perceived as cold or detached due to over-analysis.
A drive for perfection that leads to being overly critical.

topics.display_name: Cat Breed Personality

synopsis.title: Which Cat Breed Matches Your True Personality?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder if your daily habits align more with a regal Persian or a high-energy Bengal? This quiz dives deep into your social battery, nap preferences, and curiosity levels to find your feline twin. Discover the breed that shares your unique vibe and finally understand why you act the way you do. It's time to let your inner cat out of the bag!

characters.name: Persian
characters.short_description: You are a serene and sophisticated soul who values comfort, tranquility, and the finer things in life.
characters.profile_text: You prefer a quiet environment where you can relax in style, often choosing the softest cushion in the room as your throne. Your calm demeanor makes you an excellent companion for those who appreciate a peaceful household, though you may be seen as somewhat reserved or even aloof by strangers. You aren't one for high-speed chases or chaotic play; instead, you find joy in being admired and pampered. Because you have such high standards for your surroundings, you might struggle with sudden changes or loud, bustling environments. Your gentle nature is your greatest strength, but it also means you require a dedicated routine to feel secure. You thrive when you are the center of a stable, loving home where your needs are met with consistency and care.

characters.name: Bengal
characters.short_description: You are an adventurous and high-energy spirit with a wild streak and an insatiable curiosity for the world around you.
characters.profile_text: You possess an athletic build and a mind that is always racing, seeking out the next challenge or hidden corner to explore. Boredom is your greatest enemy, and you often find yourself creating your own entertainment if life becomes too predictable. You are highly intelligent and capable of learning complex tasks, often surprising others with your ingenuity and physical prowess. While your confidence is infectious, your intense energy can sometimes be overwhelming for those who prefer a slower pace. You need constant mental and physical stimulation to stay happy, and without it, you might become restless or mischievous. You are best suited for a life filled with activity, vertical spaces to climb, and plenty of interactive engagement to keep your sharp mind occupied.

characters.name: Siamese
characters.short_description: You are a highly social and communicative individual who thrives on deep connections and constant interaction with others.
characters.profile_text: You have a lot to say and aren't afraid to use your voice to ensure you are heard and understood. Your personality is vibrant and demanding, as you crave the spotlight and feel most at home when you are part of a tight-knit group. You are incredibly perceptive, often picking up on the moods of those around you and responding with intense loyalty and affection. Your deep need for companionship means you do not handle solitude well; you can become anxious or depressed if left alone for too long. You are a social creature through and through, requiring a partner or family who can match your level of engagement. Your intelligence and vocal nature make you an unforgettable presence in any room you occupy, ensuring you are never ignored.

characters.name: Ragdoll
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate companion, known for your affectionate nature and ability to go with the flow.
characters.profile_text: You are a devoted friend, often following your loved ones from room to room just to be near them. Your temperament is exceptionally docile, and you have a unique ability to relax completely when held, earning you a reputation for being incredibly easygoing and sweet. You rarely get ruffled by the small stuff, preferring to meet the world with a soft gaze and a gentle purr. However, your trusting and passive nature can sometimes make you vulnerable, as you may not always stand up for yourself in tense or competitive situations. You thrive in indoor environments where you feel safe and protected from the harshness of the outside world. Your strength lies in your kindness and your ability to provide comfort, making you a soothing presence for anyone lucky enough to be in your inner circle.

characters.name: Abyssinian
characters.short_description: You are a busy and inquisitive explorer who views every day as an opportunity for a new discovery.
characters.profile_text: You are rarely found sitting still, as your natural curiosity drives you to investigate every nook and cranny of your environment. You are an action-oriented person, preferring to be involved in whatever is happening rather than watching from the sidelines. Your intelligence is sharp, and you approach life with a playful, almost clownish sense of humor that keeps everyone around you entertained. While you are social and enjoy the company of others, you are also quite independent and don't necessarily need to be held to feel loved. You prefer to show your affection by including others in your games or by perching nearby to observe the action. Your main pitfall is a tendency to get into trouble when your curiosity outweighs your caution, requiring a stimulating environment to keep you busy.

characters.name: British Shorthair
characters.short_description: You are a dignified and self-sufficient individual who enjoys a balanced life of quiet companionship and personal space.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sturdy and dependable nature, often serving as the calm anchor in a chaotic world. You are not one for dramatic displays of emotion or excessive demands for attention; instead, you show your loyalty through a steady, quiet presence. You value your independence and are perfectly happy spending time on your own, though you still appreciate the comfort of a warm home and a familiar face. Your reserved nature can sometimes be mistaken for coldness, but those who know you well understand that you simply prefer to observe before you act. You aren't a lap-dweller in the traditional sense, as you value your personal bubble, but you are deeply devoted to your chosen few. You thrive in a stable environment where your boundaries are respected and your quiet strength is appreciated.

topics.display_name: Daily Coffee Order

synopsis.title: What Does Your Daily Coffee Order Actually Say About Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Your morning caffeine ritual is more than just a habit; it is a window into your deepest personality traits. Whether you are a minimalist purist or a seasonal syrup enthusiast, your choice of bean and brew reveals how you handle stress and social situations. Take this quiz to find out which iconic coffee order matches your unique vibe and daily energy. It is time to see if your personality is as bold as an espresso or as sweet as a caramel macchiato.

characters.name: The Bold Espresso
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy minimalist who values efficiency, intensity, and getting straight to the point.
characters.profile_text: You don't have time for fluff or filler, preferring to tackle your day with a concentrated burst of focus. You likely appreciate the raw, unadulterated essence of things, whether it's a project at work or a conversation with a friend. Your strength lies in your decisiveness and your ability to remain sharp under pressure, often serving as the engine that keeps a team moving forward when others might hesitate. However, your fast-paced nature can sometimes lead to burnout or a lack of patience for those who need more time to process information. You might find yourself rushing through moments that deserve a slower pace, potentially missing out on the finer details. Learning to balance your natural intensity with occasional moments of stillness will help you maintain your momentum without losing your edge.

characters.name: The Comforting Latte
characters.short_description: You are a warm and approachable individual who prioritizes harmony, balance, and the well-being of those around you.
characters.profile_text: You are the person people turn to when they need a listening ear or a steady hand. Like a perfectly steamed latte, you bring a sense of smoothness and calm to every environment you enter. You value routine and reliability, finding comfort in the familiar and the well-crafted. Your greatest strength is your empathy, which allows you to bridge gaps between people and create a welcoming atmosphere wherever you go. While your desire for peace is a virtue, you may sometimes struggle with setting boundaries or speaking up when things get difficult. You might prioritize others' comfort over your own needs, leading to a sense of quiet exhaustion. Embracing a bit more boldness will help you ensure that your own voice is heard just as clearly as the support you offer to everyone else.

characters.name: The Sweet Caramel Macchiato
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant and optimistic soul who loves to find the joy and sweetness in every layer of life.
characters.profile_text: You believe that life is meant to be enjoyed, and you aren't afraid to add a little extra flair to everything you do. You likely have a creative streak and a knack for making even the most mundane tasks feel like a special occasion. People are drawn to your positive energy and your ability to see the silver lining in challenging situations. You thrive in environments where you can express your personality and share your enthusiasm with others. On the flip side, your preference for the sweet side of things might lead you to avoid necessary conflicts or difficult truths. You may find it hard to stay grounded when things become overly serious or demanding. By learning to sit with the bitter moments as well as the sweet ones, you will develop a deeper resilience that complements your naturally sunny disposition.

characters.name: The Chill Cold Brew
characters.short_description: You are a laid-back and patient strategist who understands that the best results often come to those who wait.
characters.profile_text: You possess a cool, collected demeanor that makes you appear unflappable even in the middle of a crisis. You prefer to let things develop naturally rather than forcing an outcome, trusting in your long-term vision and your ability to adapt. Your strength is your endurance; you are built for the long haul and can maintain a steady level of productivity without the frantic spikes of energy that others experience. Because you are so relaxed, others might occasionally mistake your calm for a lack of urgency or passion. You might struggle with tasks that require immediate, high-intensity action, preferring to stay in your steady flow. Finding ways to inject a bit of fire into your projects when the situation calls for it will ensure that your steady progress eventually leads to the impactful results you desire.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a high-pressure deadline at work or school?

options.text: I dive in immediately with intense focus to finish as fast as possible.
I create a comfortable environment and tackle it steadily with frequent breaks.
I look for creative ways to make the task more enjoyable or visually appealing.
I stay calm, take my time to plan, and trust the process will work out.

baseline_questions.question_text: When entering a social gathering where you don't know many people, what is your natural role?

options.text: The direct networker who moves quickly from person to person.
The warm host-figure who ensures everyone feels included and comfortable.
The life of the party who brings high energy and fun stories.
The observant wallflower who waits for the right moment to engage deeply.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments helps you feel most like yourself?

options.text: A minimalist, high-tech office with zero distractions.
A cozy, sun-drenched living room with soft blankets and music.
A vibrant, colorful festival or a bustling creative studio.
A quiet, shaded park or a slow-paced coastal town.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to receive feedback or information?

options.text: Give it to me straight and fast; don't sugarcoat anything.
I prefer a gentle, balanced approach that considers my feelings.
I like feedback that is enthusiastic and highlights my unique style.
I want the full context and time to process the information slowly.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when starting a new project?

options.text: Achieving maximum efficiency and a powerful end result.
Building strong relationships and maintaining team harmony.
Expressing my personality and finding joy in the creation.
Developing a sustainable, long-term strategy that lasts.

topics.display_name: Tactical Shooter Agent Class

synopsis.title: Which Tactical Shooter Agent Class Are You Destined to Main?
synopsis.summary: Whether you are holding a tight angle with a sniper or rushing onto a site with flashes, every tactical shooter team needs a perfect balance. Are you the mastermind behind the smoke or the entry fragger who takes all the glory? Take this quiz to discover which specialized role matches your playstyle and personality.

characters.name: Duelist
characters.short_description: You are the spearhead of the team, specializing in high-mobility combat and securing early eliminations to break open the enemy's defense.
characters.profile_text: You thrive in the heat of the moment, relying on your mechanical skill and quick reflexes to win isolated duels. As a Duelist, you are expected to be the first one through the door, creating space for your teammates by drawing fire and punishing any defender caught out of position. Your playstyle is defined by aggression and confidence, often taking calculated risks that others would find reckless. You prefer tools that enhance your survivability or mobility, allowing you to escape dangerous situations after securing a kill. However, your greatest strength can also be your downfall if you become too predictable or overextend without support. You might struggle when the enemy team plays a disciplined, passive game that denies you the aggressive openings you crave. To truly master this role, you must learn to balance your hunger for highlights with the tactical needs of the round, ensuring your entry-fragging actually leads to a site take rather than just a trade.

characters.name: Controller
characters.short_description: You are the master of the battlefield's visibility, using smokes and barriers to slice up territory and dictate the flow of every engagement.
characters.profile_text: You possess a strategic mind that views the map as a chessboard, focusing on utility that blocks vision and slows down enemy rotations. As a Controller, your primary responsibility is to provide cover for your team, ensuring that your allies can move safely into position without being picked off by long-range defenders. You excel at patience and timing, knowing exactly when to drop a smoke or deploy a wall to stall a push or facilitate a plant. Your presence is felt across the entire map, even if you aren't the one pulling the trigger in every fight. Your pitfalls often involve mismanaging your utility or failing to communicate your vision-blocking plans with your team, which can lead to accidental friendly fire or blocked sightlines for your own snipers. You are most effective when you stay alive until the late game, as your recharging abilities become increasingly valuable as the clock runs down. You prefer a methodical approach, valuing map control and information over raw aggression, making you the backbone of any successful tactical execution.

characters.name: Initiator
characters.short_description: You specialize in flushing out enemies and gathering vital intelligence to set your team up for a successful breach.
characters.profile_text: You are the scout and the playmaker, using your utility to reveal enemy positions or disorient them before your team makes a move. As an Initiator, you bridge the gap between the backline and the front-line attackers, providing the necessary information that turns a blind push into a coordinated strike. You enjoy using flashes, stuns, or reconnaissance drones to force defenders out of their comfortable corners, making it significantly easier for your Duelists to secure kills. Your role requires a deep understanding of map geometry and common hiding spots to maximize the impact of your abilities. While you are essential for breaking through tough defenses, you can sometimes find yourself vulnerable if you focus too much on your gadgets rather than your gunplay. You must be careful not to waste your utility early in the round, as a lack of information during the final push can be catastrophic. You are at your best when you are communicating constantly with your team, acting as the eyes and ears that guide the squad toward the path of least resistance.

characters.name: Sentinel
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate defensive anchor, utilizing traps and surveillance to lock down sites and prevent enemy flanks.
characters.profile_text: You take pride in being an immovable object, specializing in area denial and defensive setups that make it a nightmare for the enemy to enter your territory. As a Sentinel, your focus is on stability and security, often holding down a site solo while your teammates rotate to assist elsewhere. You prefer tools like tripwires, turrets, or healing abilities that allow you to sustain yourself and your team through long rounds. Your playstyle is reactive and disciplined, rewarding those who can predict enemy movements and set traps that catch them off guard. The danger for you lies in becoming too static or predictable in your setups, allowing savvy opponents to bypass or destroy your utility before it can be effective. You might also struggle when forced into a high-mobility offensive role, as your kit is designed for holding ground rather than taking it. To excel, you must master the art of the lurk and the anchor, knowing when to stay put and when to reposition your defenses to counter the enemy's evolving strategy.

baseline_questions.question_text: When the round begins, what is your primary focus?

options.text: Securing an early kill to give my team a numbers advantage.
Gathering information on enemy positions to plan our approach.
Deploying utility to block enemy sightlines and control the map.
Setting up defensive measures to prevent a flank or rush.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to handle a high-pressure 1v1 situation?

options.text: Taking the fight head-on with aggressive movement and aim.
Using utility to force the enemy out of cover before engaging.
Playing the clock and using smokes to create confusion.
Holding a defensive angle and waiting for the enemy to make a mistake.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which type of utility do you find most satisfying to use?

options.text: Abilities that enhance my speed or help me survive a firefight.
Tools that reveal, stun, or blind enemies behind cover.
Vision-blocking orbs and walls that reshape the battlefield.
Traps, cameras, or healing abilities that provide team stability.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal position during a site execution?

options.text: The very first person through the smoke, clearing the way.
Just behind the entry, using my kit to disrupt the defenders.
In the back or mid-range, managing the smokes and timing.
Watching the rear to ensure no one sneaks up on the team.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in a teammate?

options.text: Someone who can consistently win their aim duels.
Someone who communicates enemy locations clearly.
Someone who coordinates their utility with mine for a strategy.
Someone who can hold down a site solo while the team rotates.
